Experimental results on two public datasets V2V4Real and OPV2V show that our UMS method achieved significantly higher 3D detection performance than the state-of-the-art methods on both multi-agent and single-agent perception tasks in an unsupervised setting.

</details>


### [147] [Learning Spatial Structure from Pre-Beamforming Per-Antenna Range-Doppler Radar Data via Visibility-Aware Cross-Modal Supervision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01921)
*George Sebastian,Philipp Berthold,Bianca Forkel,Leon Pohl,Mirko Maehlisch*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该研究探索了能否直接从波束成形前的天线级距离-多普勒张量中学习有意义的空间结构，而无需构建角度域表示，通过双啁啾共享权重编码器在端到端数据驱动框架下验证了可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统汽车雷达感知流程通常先通过波束成形构建角度域表示，再应用学习模型。本研究旨在探索能否绕过这一显式角度域构建步骤，直接从波束成形前的天线级距离-多普勒测量中学习空间结构，从而简化处理流程并探索更直接的表示学习方法。

Method: 使用6发8收（48个虚拟天线）商用汽车雷达，采用A/B啁啾序列FMCW发射方案，其中有效发射孔径随啁啾变化。构建双啁啾共享权重编码器，在端到端数据驱动框架下处理波束成形前的天线级距离-多普勒张量。监督信号来自激光雷达，采用可见性感知的跨模态监督，明确建模雷达视场和基于射线的可见性分析。通过啁啾消融实验（仅A、仅B、A+B）、距离带分析和物理对齐基线评估发射配置对几何可恢复性的影响。

Result: 实验结果表明，无需显式角度域构建或手工信号处理阶段，空间结构可以直接从波束成形前的天线级距离-多普勒张量中学习得到。通过不同发射配置的分析，验证了该方法能够有效恢复几何信息，为雷达感知提供了新的表示学习途径。

Conclusion: 该研究证明了直接从波束成形前的天线级雷达数据中学习空间结构的可行性，为汽车雷达感知提供了绕过传统角度域构建步骤的新范式，简化了处理流程并展示了数据驱动方法的潜力。

Abstract: Automotive radar perception pipelines commonly construct angle-domain representations via beamforming before applying learning-based models. This work instead investigates a representational question: can meaningful spatial structure be learned directly from pre-beamforming per-antenna range-Doppler (RD) measurements? Experiments are conducted on a 6-TX x 8-RX (48 virtual antennas) commodity automotive radar employing an A/B chirp-sequence frequency-modulated continuous-wave (CS-FMCW) transmit scheme, in which the effective transmit aperture varies between chirps (single-TX vs. multi-TX), enabling controlled analysis of chirp-dependent transmit configurations. We operate on pre-beamforming per-antenna RD tensors using a dual-chirp shared-weight encoder trained in an end-to-end, fully data-driven manner, and evaluate spatial recoverability using bird's-eye-view (BEV) occupancy as a geometric probe rather than a performance-driven objective. Supervision is visibility-aware and cross-modal, derived from LiDAR with explicit modeling of the radar field-of-view and occlusion-aware LiDAR observability via ray-based visibility. Through chirp ablations (A-only, B-only, A+B), range-band analysis, and physics-aligned baselines, we assess how transmit configurations affect geometric recoverability. The results indicate that spatial structure can be learned directly from pre-beamforming per-antenna RD tensors without explicit angle-domain construction or hand-crafted signal-processing stages.

</details>


### [148] [VitaTouch: Property-Aware Vision-Tactile-Language Model for Robotic Quality Inspection in Manufacturing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03322)
*Junyi Zong,Qingxuan Jia,Meixian Shi,Tong Li,Jiayuan Li,Zihang Lv,Gang Chen,Fang Deng*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: VitaTouch是一个面向智能制造质量检测的视觉-触觉-语言多模态模型，能够推断材料属性并生成自然语言描述，在多个基准测试中表现优异，并在实验室机器人试验中实现了94%的端到端分拣成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 智能制造中的质量检测需要识别超出可见几何形状的内在材料和表面属性，但纯视觉方法容易受到遮挡和反射的影响。现有方法缺乏对材料属性的深入理解和自然语言描述能力。

Method: 提出VitaTouch模型，使用模态特定编码器和双Q-Former提取语言相关的视觉和触觉特征，通过对比学习对齐模态并显式耦合视觉和触觉。构建VitaSet多模态数据集（186个物体，52k图像，5.1k人工验证的指令-答案对）。

Result: 在HCT和TVL基准测试中表现最佳，在SSVTP中保持竞争力。在VitaSet上达到88.89%硬度准确率、75.13%粗糙度准确率和54.81%描述符召回率；材料描述任务峰值语义相似度0.9009。使用LoRA微调后，缺陷识别准确率分别为100.0%（2类）、96.0%（3类）和92.0%（5类），实验室机器人试验中实现94.0%闭环识别准确率和94.0%端到端分拣成功率。

Conclusion: VitaTouch通过融合视觉、触觉和语言模态，有效解决了智能制造中材料属性识别和描述的挑战，在多任务基准测试和实际机器人应用中表现出色，为智能质量检测提供了强大的多模态解决方案。

Abstract: Quality inspection in smart manufacturing requires identifying intrinsic material and surface properties beyond visible geometry, yet vision-only methods remain vulnerable to occlusion and reflection. We propose VitaTouch, a property-aware vision-tactile-language model for material-property inference and natural-language attribute description. VitaTouch uses modality-specific encoders and a dual Q-Former to extract language-relevant visual and tactile features, which are compressed into prefix tokens for a large language model. We align each modality with text and explicitly couple vision and touch through contrastive learning. We also construct VitaSet, a multimodal dataset with 186 objects, 52k images, and 5.1k human-verified instruction-answer pairs. VitaTouch achieves the best performance on HCT and the overall TVL benchmark, while remaining competitive on SSVTP. On VitaSet, it reaches 88.89% hardness accuracy, 75.13% roughness accuracy, and 54.81% descriptor recall; the material-description task further achieves a peak semantic similarity of 0.9009. With LoRA-based fine-tuning, VitaTouch attains 100.0%, 96.0%, and 92.0% accuracy for 2-, 3-, and 5-category defect recognition, respectively, and delivers 94.0% closed-loop recognition accuracy and 94.0% end-to-end sorting success in 100 laboratory robotic trials. More details are available at the project page: https://vitatouch.github.io/

</details>


### [149] [Indoor Asset Detection in Large Scale 360° Drone-Captured Imagery via 3D Gaussian Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05316)
*Monica Tang,Avideh Zakhor*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种在3D高斯泼溅场景中进行目标室内资产对象级检测与分割的方法，利用3D对象码本和多视角掩码关联，显著提升了检测精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决从360°无人机图像重建的3DGS场景中，对特定室内资产进行对象级检测和分割的挑战。传统方法在多视角掩码一致性和对象实例聚合方面存在不足。

Method: 引入3D对象码本，联合利用掩码语义和对应高斯基元空间信息来指导多视角掩码关联；集成2D对象检测和分割模型，通过语义和空间约束的合并程序，将多视角掩码聚合成一致的3D对象实例。

Result: 在两个大型室内场景上的实验表明：可靠的多视角掩码一致性，F1分数比最先进基线提升65%；准确的物体级3D室内资产检测，mAP比基线方法提高11%。

Conclusion: 该方法有效解决了3DGS场景中室内资产的对象级检测与分割问题，通过语义-空间联合约束显著提升了多视角掩码关联和对象实例聚合的性能。

Abstract: We present an approach for object-level detection and segmentation of target indoor assets in 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) scenes, reconstructed from 360° drone-captured imagery. We introduce a 3D object codebook that jointly leverages mask semantics and spatial information of their corresponding Gaussian primitives to guide multi-view mask association and indoor asset detection. By integrating 2D object detection and segmentation models with semantically and spatially constrained merging procedures, our method aggregates masks from multiple views into coherent 3D object instances. Experiments on two large indoor scenes demonstrate reliable multi-view mask consistency, improving F1 score by 65% over state-of-the-art baselines, and accurate object-level 3D indoor asset detection, achieving an 11% mAP gain over baseline methods.

</details>


### [150] [SmokeGS-R: Physics-Guided Pseudo-Clean 3DGS for Real-World Multi-View Smoke Restoration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05301)
*Xueming Fu,Lixia Han*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SmokeGS-R：用于烟雾场景3D重建的实用管道，通过解耦几何恢复与外观校正，结合物理引导的伪干净监督和渲染后外观协调，在NTIRE 2026挑战中取得显著性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 真实烟雾同时衰减场景辐射、增加空气光并破坏多视角外观一致性，使得鲁棒的3D重建特别困难。需要开发能够处理这些复杂影响的实用解决方案。

Method: 采用几何恢复与外观校正解耦策略：1) 使用改进的暗通道先验和引导滤波生成物理引导的伪干净监督；2) 训练锐利的仅干净3D高斯泼溅源模型；3) 通过几何平均参考聚合、LAB空间Reinhard转移和轻量高斯平滑，将渲染结果与捐赠集合协调。

Result: 在官方测试排行榜上获得PSNR=15.217，SSIM=0.666。在RealX3D公开后重新评估，在七个场景上获得PSNR=15.209，SSIM=0.644，LPIPS=0.551，比最强官方基线平均提升+3.68 dB PSNR。

Conclusion: 几何优先的重建策略结合稳定的渲染后外观协调是处理真实世界多视角烟雾恢复的有效方法。该方法在NTIRE 2026挑战中表现出色，代码已开源。

Abstract: Real-world smoke simultaneously attenuates scene radiance, adds airlight, and destabilizes multi-view appearance consistency, making robust 3D reconstruction particularly difficult. We present \textbf{SmokeGS-R}, a practical pipeline developed for the NTIRE 2026 3D Restoration and Reconstruction Track 2 challenge. The key idea is to decouple geometry recovery from appearance correction: we generate physics-guided pseudo-clean supervision with a refined dark channel prior and guided filtering, train a sharp clean-only 3D Gaussian Splatting source model, and then harmonize its renderings with a donor ensemble using geometric-mean reference aggregation, LAB-space Reinhard transfer, and light Gaussian smoothing. On the official challenge testing leaderboard, the final submission achieved \mbox{PSNR $=15.217$} and \mbox{SSIM $=0.666$}. After the public release of RealX3D, we re-evaluated the same frozen result on the seven released challenge scenes without retraining and obtained \mbox{PSNR $=15.209$}, \mbox{SSIM $=0.644$}, and \mbox{LPIPS $=0.551$}, outperforming the strongest official baseline average on the same scenes by $+3.68$ dB PSNR. These results suggest that a geometry-first reconstruction strategy combined with stable post-render appearance harmonization is an effective recipe for real-world multi-view smoke restoration. The code is available at https://github.com/windrise/3drr_Track2_SmokeGS-R.

</details>


### [151] [DriveDreamer-Policy: A Geometry-Grounded World-Action Model for Unified Generation and Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01765)
*Yang Zhou,Xiaofeng Wang,Hao Shao,Letian Wang,Guosheng Zhao,Jiangnan Shao,Jiagang Zhu,Tingdong Yu,Zheng Zhu,Guan Huang,Steven L. Waslander*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: DriveDreamer-Policy是一个统一的驾驶世界-动作模型，通过集成深度生成、未来视频生成和运动规划，在单个模块化架构中实现了几何感知的世界建模和驾驶策略学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有世界-动作模型主要关注2D外观或潜在表示建模，缺乏几何基础，而几何感知对于在物理世界中运行的具身系统至关重要。需要开发一个能够统一深度生成、未来预测和运动规划的驾驶世界模型。

Method: 采用大型语言模型处理语言指令、多视角图像和动作，然后通过三个轻量级生成器分别生成深度、未来视频和动作。模型学习几何感知的世界表示，并在统一框架内指导未来预测和规划。

Result: 在Navsim v1和v2基准测试中表现出色：Navsim v1达到89.2 PDMS，Navsim v2达到88.7 EPDMS，超越了现有基于世界模型的方法，同时生成更高质量的深度和未来视频预测。消融研究表明显式深度学习对视频想象和规划鲁棒性有互补益处。

Conclusion: DriveDreamer-Policy通过集成几何感知的世界建模，在统一框架中实现了更连贯的未来想象和更明智的驾驶动作，同时保持了模块化和可控延迟，为具身驾驶系统提供了有效的世界-动作模型解决方案。

Abstract: Recently, world-action models (WAM) have emerged to bridge vision-language-action (VLA) models and world models, unifying their reasoning and instruction-following capabilities and spatio-temporal world modeling. However, existing WAM approaches often focus on modeling 2D appearance or latent representations, with limited geometric grounding-an essential element for embodied systems operating in the physical world. We present DriveDreamer-Policy, a unified driving world-action model that integrates depth generation, future video generation, and motion planning within a single modular architecture. The model employs a large language model to process language instructions, multi-view images, and actions, followed by three lightweight generators that produce depth, future video, and actions. By learning a geometry-aware world representation and using it to guide both future prediction and planning within a unified framework, the proposed model produces more coherent imagined futures and more informed driving actions, while maintaining modularity and controllable latency. Experiments on the Navsim v1 and v2 benchmarks demonstrate that DriveDreamer-Policy achieves strong performance on both closed-loop planning and world generation tasks. In particular, our model reaches 89.2 PDMS on Navsim v1 and 88.7 EPDMS on Navsim v2, outperforming existing world-model-based approaches while producing higher-quality future video and depth predictions. Ablation studies further show that explicit depth learning provides complementary benefits to video imagination and improves planning robustness.

</details>


### [152] [From Measurement to Mitigation: Quantifying and Reducing Identity Leakage in Image Representation Encoders with Linear Subspace Removal](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05296)
*Daniel George,Charles Yeh,Daniel Lee,Yifei Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种针对视觉嵌入模型的身份隐私审计方法和线性投影去身份化技术，在保持视觉检索效用的同时降低人脸身份泄漏风险。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉嵌入模型（如CLIP、DINOv2/v3、SSCD）在人脸数据上的应用受到身份信息泄漏风险的限制，缺乏可部署的缓解措施。需要从攻击者角度评估这些模型的隐私风险并开发有效的去身份化方法。

Method: 1) 建立视觉嵌入模型隐私基准：包括低误接受率下的开放集验证、基于扩散的模板反演检查、以及等面积扰动的人脸上下文归因分析；2) 提出一次性线性投影器（ISP），通过移除估计的身份子空间来消除身份信息，同时保留视觉检索所需的互补空间。

Result: 在CelebA-20和VGGFace2数据集上的实验表明：CLIP的身份泄漏相对高于DINOv2/v3和SSCD；所有编码器对模板反演具有鲁棒性且上下文主导；ISP能将线性访问准确率降至接近随机水平，同时保持高非生物特征效用，且在不同数据集间具有良好的迁移性。

Conclusion: 该研究首次建立了非人脸识别编码器的攻击者校准面部隐私审计框架，并证明线性子空间移除方法能在保持视觉搜索和检索效用的同时提供强大的隐私保证。

Abstract: Frozen visual embeddings (e.g., CLIP, DINOv2/v3, SSCD) power retrieval and integrity systems, yet their use on face-containing data is constrained by unmeasured identity leakage and a lack of deployable mitigations. We take an attacker-aware view and contribute: (i) a benchmark of visual embeddings that reports open-set verification at low false-accept rates, a calibrated diffusion-based template inversion check, and face-context attribution with equal-area perturbations; and (ii) propose a one-shot linear projector that removes an estimated identity subspace while preserving the complementary space needed for utility, which for brevity we denote as the identity sanitization projection ISP. Across CelebA-20 and VGGFace2, we show that these encoders are robust under open-set linear probes, with CLIP exhibiting relatively higher leakage than DINOv2/v3 and SSCD, robust to template inversion, and are context-dominant. In addition, we show that ISP drives linear access to near-chance while retaining high non-biometric utility, and transfers across datasets with minor degradation. Our results establish the first attacker-calibrated facial privacy audit of non-FR encoders and demonstrate that linear subspace removal achieves strong privacy guarantees while preserving utility for visual search and retrieval.

</details>


### [153] [Toward Unified Fine-Grained Vehicle Classification and Automatic License Plate Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05271)
*Gabriel E. Lima,Valfride Nascimento,Eduardo Santos,Eduil Nascimento,Rayson Laroca,David Menotti*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出UFPR-VeSV数据集，包含24,945张监控图像，标注了13种颜色、26个品牌、136个型号和14种类型的车辆信息，用于细粒度车辆分类和车牌识别任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有细粒度车辆分类研究通常假设理想条件、探索有限属性，且忽视了与车牌识别系统的集成。需要真实世界、多属性标注的数据集来推动智能交通系统应用。

Method: 从巴西巴拉那州军事警察监控系统收集24,945张图像，标注13种颜色、26个品牌、136个型号和14种类型。使用车牌信息验证标注准确性，提供文本和角点标注。与现有数据集进行定性和定量比较，使用五种深度学习模型进行基准测试。

Result: 数据集包含真实世界挑战（部分遮挡、夜间红外成像、光照变化）。基准测试揭示了多色车辆处理、红外图像识别、共享平台车辆区分等具体挑战。车牌识别和细粒度车辆分类的联合应用显示出互补潜力。

Conclusion: UFPR-VeSV数据集为细粒度车辆分类和车牌识别研究提供了真实世界基准。数据集公开可用，集成两种互补任务有望提升智能交通系统的实际应用效果。

Abstract: Extracting vehicle information from surveillance images is essential for intelligent transportation systems, enabling applications such as traffic monitoring and criminal investigations. While Automatic License Plate Recognition (ALPR) is widely used, Fine-Grained Vehicle Classification (FGVC) offers a complementary approach by identifying vehicles based on attributes such as color, make, model, and type. Although there have been advances in this field, existing studies often assume well-controlled conditions, explore limited attributes, and overlook FGVC integration with ALPR. To address these gaps, we introduce UFPR-VeSV, a dataset comprising 24,945 images of 16,297 unique vehicles with annotations for 13 colors, 26 makes, 136 models, and 14 types. Collected from the Military Police of Paraná (Brazil) surveillance system, the dataset captures diverse real-world conditions, including partial occlusions, nighttime infrared imaging, and varying lighting. All FGVC annotations were validated using license plate information, with text and corner annotations also being provided. A qualitative and quantitative comparison with established datasets confirmed the challenging nature of our dataset. A benchmark using five deep learning models further validated this, revealing specific challenges such as handling multicolored vehicles, infrared images, and distinguishing between vehicle models that share a common platform. Additionally, we apply two optical character recognition models to license plate recognition and explore the joint use of FGVC and ALPR. The results highlight the potential of integrating these complementary tasks for real-world applications. The UFPR-VeSV dataset is publicly available at: https://github.com/Lima001/UFPR-VeSV-Dataset.

</details>


### [154] [Region-R1: Reinforcing Query-Side Region Cropping for Multi-Modal Re-Ranking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05268)
*Chan-Wei Hu,Zhengzhong Tu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Region-R1：一个用于多模态检索增强生成的查询端区域裁剪框架，通过动态裁剪问题相关区域来减少视觉干扰，提升重排序性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准多模态重排序器通常将完整查询图像作为全局嵌入处理，容易受到视觉干扰物（如背景杂乱）的影响，导致相似性评分偏差。需要一种方法来聚焦于问题相关区域，减少无关视觉信息的干扰。

Method: 提出Region-R1框架，将区域选择建模为决策问题，在重排序过程中学习保留完整图像或仅关注问题相关区域。采用新颖的区域感知组相对策略优化（r-GRPO）学习动态裁剪判别性区域的策略。

Result: 在两个挑战性基准测试E-VQA和InfoSeek上，Region-R1取得一致性能提升，达到最先进水平，条件Recall@1提升高达20%。

Conclusion: 查询端自适应是增强多模态检索增强生成重排序的简单而有效方法，展示了通过动态区域裁剪减少视觉干扰的显著潜力。

Abstract: Multi-modal retrieval-augmented generation (MM-RAG) relies heavily on re-rankers to surface the most relevant evidence for image-question queries. However, standard re-rankers typically process the full query image as a global embedding, making them susceptible to visual distractors (e.g., background clutter) that skew similarity scores. We propose Region-R1, a query-side region cropping framework that formulates region selection as a decision-making problem during re-ranking, allowing the system to learn to retain the full image or focus only on a question-relevant region before scoring the retrieved candidates. Region-R1 learns a policy with a novel region-aware group relative policy optimization (r-GRPO) to dynamically crop a discriminative region. Across two challenging benchmarks, E-VQA and InfoSeek, Region-R1 delivers consistent gains, achieving state-of-the-art performances by increasing conditional Recall@1 by up to 20%. These results show the great promise of query-side adaptation as a simple but effective way to strengthen MM-RAG re-ranking.

</details>


### [155] [Protecting and Preserving Protest Dynamics for Responsible Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05256)
*Cohen Archbold,Usman Hassan,Nazmus Sakib,Sen-ching Cheung,Abdullah-Al-Zubaer Imran*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出负责任计算框架，使用条件图像合成生成带标签的合成抗议图像，在分析集体抗议动态的同时降低个人隐私风险


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 抗议相关的社交媒体数据对理解集体行动有价值，但存在高风险：AI系统能识别个体、推断敏感属性、跨平台交叉引用信息，导致监控风险、身份泄露和追溯性参与者识别。现有抗议分析方法缺乏整合隐私风险评估、下游分析和公平性考虑的整体流程。

Method: 提出负责任计算框架，使用条件图像合成技术将敏感抗议图像替换为带标签的合成再现图像。该方法平衡下游分析效用与隐私风险降低，并评估生成数据的群体公平性。

Result: 方法能生成真实且多样化的合成图像，在保持下游分析效用的同时降低隐私风险。进一步评估了生成数据的群体公平性，检查合成表示是否对特定亚群体产生不成比例的影响。

Conclusion: 采用务实的伤害缓解方法，而非提供绝对隐私保证，使社会敏感分析成为可能，同时承认残余风险。框架在分析集体抗议动态与保护个人隐私之间取得平衡。

Abstract: Protest-related social media data are valuable for understanding collective action but inherently high-risk due to concerns surrounding surveillance, repression, and individual privacy. Contemporary AI systems can identify individuals, infer sensitive attributes, and cross-reference visual information across platforms, enabling surveillance that poses risks to protesters and bystanders. In such contexts, large foundation models trained on protest imagery risk memorizing and disclosing sensitive information, leading to cross-platform identity leakage and retroactive participant identification. Existing approaches to automated protest analysis do not provide a holistic pipeline that integrates privacy risk assessment, downstream analysis, and fairness considerations.
  To address this gap, we propose a responsible computing framework for analyzing collective protest dynamics while reducing risks to individual privacy. Our framework replaces sensitive protest imagery with well-labeled synthetic reproductions using conditional image synthesis, enabling analysis of collective patterns without direct exposure of identifiable individuals. We demonstrate that our approach produces realistic and diverse synthetic imagery while balancing downstream analytical utility with reductions in privacy risk. We further assess demographic fairness in the generated data, examining whether synthetic representations disproportionately affect specific subgroups. Rather than offering absolute privacy guarantees, our method adopts a pragmatic, harm-mitigating approach that enables socially sensitive analysis while acknowledging residual risks.

</details>


### [156] [Active Measurement of Two-Point Correlations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05227)
*Max Hamilton,Daniel Sheldon,Subhransu Maji*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出一种人机协作框架，通过预训练分类器引导采样，高效估计目标源的两点相关函数，显著降低方差并减少标注工作量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在天文学等应用中，两点相关函数通常用于分析特定子集（如星团）的空间聚类特性，但传统方法需要大量人工标注构建完整目录，耗时且低效。

Method: 开发人机协作框架：1) 利用预训练分类器指导采样，自适应选择最具信息量的点进行人工标注；2) 提出新的无偏估计器，每次标注后同时生成多个距离区间内的配对计数估计；3) 设计采样策略和置信区间构建方法。

Result: 相比简单蒙特卡洛方法，该方法在显著减少标注工作量的同时，实现了更低的方差，能够进行可扩展且统计可靠的两点相关函数测量。

Conclusion: 该框架为天文学数据集中的两点相关函数测量提供了一种高效、可扩展且统计严谨的解决方案，通过智能采样策略大幅降低了人工标注成本。

Abstract: Two-point correlation functions (2PCF) are widely used to characterize how points cluster in space. In this work, we study the problem of measuring the 2PCF over a large set of points, restricted to a subset satisfying a property of interest. An example comes from astronomy, where scientists measure the 2PCF of star clusters, which make up only a tiny subset of possible sources within a galaxy. This task typically requires careful labeling of sources to construct catalogs, which is time-consuming. We present a human-in-the-loop framework for efficient estimation of 2PCF of target sources. By leveraging a pre-trained classifier to guide sampling, our approach adaptively selects the most informative points for human annotation. After each annotation, it produces unbiased estimates of pair counts across multiple distance bins simultaneously. Compared to simple Monte Carlo approaches, our method achieves substantially lower variance while significantly reducing annotation effort. We introduce a novel unbiased estimator, sampling strategy, and confidence interval construction that together enable scalable and statistically grounded measurement of two-point correlations in astronomy datasets.

</details>


### [157] [Hierarchical Mesh Transformers with Topology-Guided Pretraining for Morphometric Analysis of Brain Structures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05215)
*Yujian Xiong,Mohammad Farazi,Yanxi Chen,Wenhui Zhu,Xuanzhao Dong,Natasha Lepore,Yi Su,Raza Mushtaq,Stephen Foldes,Andrew Yang,Yalin Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出用于神经影像中异质网格分析的层次化Transformer框架，支持体积和表面网格，整合多尺度顶点特征，通过自监督预训练实现跨模态迁移学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模非结构化体积和表面网格的表示学习面临挑战，现有方法要么忽略临床信息特征，要么仅支持单一网格拓扑，限制了跨成像管道的应用。

Method: 引入层次化Transformer框架，基于任意阶单纯复形构建空间自适应树分区，支持体积和表面离散化。特征投影模块将变长顶点临床描述符映射到空间层次中，分离几何结构与特征维度。通过坐标和形态测量通道的掩码重建进行自监督预训练。

Result: 在ADNI的体积脑网格上进行阿尔茨海默病分类和淀粉样蛋白负荷预测，以及在MELD数据集的皮质表面网格上进行局灶性皮质发育不良检测，在所有基准测试中均达到最先进结果。

Conclusion: 该框架能够处理异质网格数据，整合多种神经影像特征集，通过自监督预训练获得可迁移的编码器骨干，适用于多种下游任务和网格模态。

Abstract: Representation learning on large-scale unstructured volumetric and surface meshes poses significant challenges in neuroimaging, especially when models must incorporate diverse vertex-level morphometric descriptors, such as cortical thickness, curvature, sulcal depth, and myelin content, which carry subtle disease-related signals. Current approaches either ignore these clinically informative features or support only a single mesh topology, restricting their use across imaging pipelines. We introduce a hierarchical transformer framework designed for heterogeneous mesh analysis that operates on spatially adaptive tree partitions constructed from simplicial complexes of arbitrary order. This design accommodates both volumetric and surface discretizations within a single architecture, enabling efficient multi-scale attention without topology-specific modifications. A feature projection module maps variable-length per-vertex clinical descriptors into the spatial hierarchy, separating geometric structure from feature dimensionality and allowing seamless integration of different neuroimaging feature sets. Self-supervised pretraining via masked reconstruction of both coordinates and morphometric channels on large unlabeled cohorts yields a transferable encoder backbone applicable to diverse downstream tasks and mesh modalities. We validate our approach on Alzheimer's disease classification and amyloid burden prediction using volumetric brain meshes from ADNI, as well as focal cortical dysplasia detection on cortical surface meshes from the MELD dataset, achieving state-of-the-art results across all benchmarks.

</details>


### [158] [Integration of Object Detection and Small VLMs for Construction Safety Hazard Identification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05210)
*Muhammad Adil,Mehmood Ahmed,Muhammad Aqib,Vicente A. Gonzalez,Gaang Lee,Qipei Mei*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出检测引导的小型视觉语言模型框架，通过目标检测与多模态推理结合，实现高效准确的施工现场危险识别。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型视觉语言模型计算需求高，难以满足实时施工危险检测需求；小型视觉语言模型虽然效率高，但在复杂施工场景中准确率低且易产生幻觉。需要平衡效率与准确性。

Method: 提出检测引导的sVLM框架：1) 使用YOLOv11n检测器定位工人和施工机械；2) 将检测实体嵌入结构化提示，引导sVLM进行空间基础的危险评估；3) 在零样本设置下评估六种sVLM模型。

Result: 框架在所有模型中一致提升危险检测性能：最佳模型Gemma-3 4B的F1分数从34.5%提升至50.6%；解释质量显著改善，BERTScore F1从0.61提升至0.82；推理时每张图像仅增加2.5毫秒开销。

Conclusion: 轻量级目标检测与小型VLM推理结合，为上下文感知的施工安全危险检测提供了有效且高效的解决方案。

Abstract: Accurate and timely identification of construction hazards around workers is essential for preventing workplace accidents. While large vision-language models (VLMs) demonstrate strong contextual reasoning capabilities, their high computational requirements limit their applicability in near real-time construction hazard detection. In contrast, small vision-language models (sVLMs) with fewer than 4 billion parameters offer improved efficiency but often suffer from reduced accuracy and hallucination when analyzing complex construction scenes. To address this trade-off, this study proposes a detection-guided sVLM framework that integrates object detection with multimodal reasoning for contextual hazard identification. The framework first employs a YOLOv11n detector to localize workers and construction machinery within the scene. The detected entities are then embedded into structured prompts to guide the reasoning process of sVLMs, enabling spatially grounded hazard assessment. Within this framework, six sVLMs (Gemma-3 4B, Qwen-3-VL 2B/4B, InternVL-3 1B/2B, and SmolVLM-2B) were evaluated in zero-shot settings on a curated dataset of construction site images with hazard annotations and explanatory rationales. The proposed approach consistently improved hazard detection performance across all models. The best-performing model, Gemma-3 4B, achieved an F1-score of 50.6%, compared to 34.5% in the baseline configuration. Explanation quality also improved significantly, with BERTScore F1 increasing from 0.61 to 0.82. Despite incorporating object detection, the framework introduces minimal overhead, adding only 2.5 ms per image during inference. These results demonstrate that integrating lightweight object detection with small VLM reasoning provides an effective and efficient solution for context-aware construction safety hazard detection.

</details>


### [159] [OrthoFuse: Training-free Riemannian Fusion of Orthogonal Style-Concept Adapters for Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05183)
*Ali Aliev,Kamil Garifullin,Nikolay Yudin,Vera Soboleva,Alexander Molozhavenko,Ivan Oseledets,Aibek Alanov,Maxim Rakhuba*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种无需训练的适配器融合方法，利用正交微调（OFT）的几何特性，通过结构化正交参数化和流形几何公式实现主题与风格适配器的合并。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在模型训练领域，参数高效微调和少量数据适应特定任务的技术备受关注，但如何将针对不同任务训练的多个适配器合并为一个能同时处理多个任务的适配器仍是一个开放问题，特别是生成模型中主题和风格适配器的融合问题尚未解决。

Method: 利用正交微调（OFT）的结构化正交参数化及其几何特性，推导了Group-and-Shuffle（𝒢𝒮）正交矩阵形成的流形结构，获得了两点间测地线近似的高效公式，并提出了谱恢复变换来恢复合并后适配器的谱特性以提高融合质量。

Result: 在主题驱动生成任务中的实验表明，该技术能够成功融合不同适配器的概念和风格特征，这是首个无需训练的多重正交适配器融合方法。

Conclusion: 通过利用正交微调的几何特性，成功实现了无需训练的适配器融合，为解决多任务适配器合并问题提供了有效方案，特别是在主题和风格适配器融合方面取得了突破。

Abstract: In a rapidly growing field of model training there is a constant practical interest in parameter-efficient fine-tuning and various techniques that use a small amount of training data to adapt the model to a narrow task. However, there is an open question: how to combine several adapters tuned for different tasks into one which is able to yield adequate results on both tasks? Specifically, merging subject and style adapters for generative models remains unresolved. In this paper we seek to show that in the case of orthogonal fine-tuning (OFT), we can use structured orthogonal parametrization and its geometric properties to get the formulas for training-free adapter merging. In particular, we derive the structure of the manifold formed by the recently proposed Group-and-Shuffle ($\mathcal{GS}$) orthogonal matrices, and obtain efficient formulas for the geodesics approximation between two points. Additionally, we propose a $\text{spectra restoration}$ transform that restores spectral properties of the merged adapter for higher-quality fusion. We conduct experiments in subject-driven generation tasks showing that our technique to merge two $\mathcal{GS}$ orthogonal matrices is capable of uniting concept and style features of different adapters. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first training-free method for merging multiplicative orthogonal adapters. Code is available via the $\href{https://github.com/ControlGenAI/OrthoFuse}{link}$.

</details>


### [160] [F3DGS: Federated 3D Gaussian Splatting for Decentralized Multi-Agent World Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01605)
*Morui Zhu,Mohammad Dehghani Tezerjani,Mátyás Szántó,Márton Vaitkus,Song Fu,Qing Yang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: F3DGS是一个联邦3D高斯泼溅框架，用于去中心化的多智能体3D重建，通过固定几何位置、仅更新外观属性，并结合可见性感知聚合来解决分布式场景中的几何一致性和部分可观测性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3DGS管道假设集中访问所有观测数据，这在分布式机器人设置中不适用，因为智能体独立运行且集中数据聚合可能受限。直接扩展集中训练到多智能体系统会引入通信开销和几何不一致问题。

Method: 首先通过注册多个客户端的局部合并LiDAR点云构建共享几何支架来初始化全局3DGS模型。联邦优化期间固定高斯位置以保持几何对齐，每个客户端仅更新外观相关属性（协方差、不透明度、球谐系数）。服务器使用可见性感知聚合这些更新，根据每个客户端观察每个高斯的频率加权其贡献。

Result: 实验表明F3DGS在实现与集中训练相当的重建质量的同时，支持跨智能体的分布式优化。收集了包含同步LiDAR、RGB和IMU测量的多序列室内数据集进行评估。

Conclusion: F3DGS为分布式多智能体3D重建提供了一种有效的联邦学习方法，解决了几何一致性和部分可观测性挑战，数据集、开发工具包和源代码将公开发布。

Abstract: We present F3DGS, a federated 3D Gaussian Splatting framework for decentralized multi-agent 3D reconstruction. Existing 3DGS pipelines assume centralized access to all observations, which limits their applicability in distributed robotic settings where agents operate independently, and centralized data aggregation may be restricted. Directly extending centralized training to multi-agent systems introduces communication overhead and geometric inconsistency. F3DGS first constructs a shared geometric scaffold by registering locally merged LiDAR point clouds from multiple clients to initialize a global 3DGS model. During federated optimization, Gaussian positions are fixed to preserve geometric alignment, while each client updates only appearance-related attributes, including covariance, opacity, and spherical harmonic coefficients. The server aggregates these updates using visibility-aware aggregation, weighting each client's contribution by how frequently it observed each Gaussian, resolving the partial-observability challenge inherent to multi-agent exploration. To evaluate decentralized reconstruction, we collect a multi-sequence indoor dataset with synchronized LiDAR, RGB, and IMU measurements. Experiments show that F3DGS achieves reconstruction quality comparable to centralized training while enabling distributed optimization across agents. The dataset, development kit, and source code will be publicly released.

</details>


### [161] [LSRM: High-Fidelity Object-Centric Reconstruction via Scaled Context Windows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05182)
*Zhengqin Li,Cheng Zhang,Jakob Engel,Zhao Dong*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: LSRM通过扩展transformer上下文窗口（增加对象和图像token数量）显著提升前馈式3D重建质量，结合稀疏注意力、空间路由和并行策略，在重建保真度和逆渲染任务上超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于对象中心的前馈式3D重建方法虽然在鲁棒性和质量上有所提升，但在恢复精细纹理和外观方面仍落后于密集视图优化方法。研究者希望通过扩展transformer的上下文窗口来缩小这一差距。

Method: 提出大型稀疏重建模型（LSRM），采用三个关键技术：1）高效的粗到细管道，通过预测稀疏高分辨率残差集中计算资源；2）3D感知空间路由机制，使用显式几何距离而非标准注意力分数建立准确的2D-3D对应关系；3）自定义块感知序列并行策略，采用All-gather-KV协议在GPU间平衡动态稀疏工作负载。

Result: LSRM能够处理比现有SOTA方法多20倍的对象token和2倍以上的图像token。在标准新视角合成基准测试中，PSNR提升2.5dB，LPIPS降低40%。在逆渲染任务中，纹理和几何细节得到一致改善，LPIPS达到或超过SOTA密集视图优化方法。

Conclusion: 扩展transformer上下文窗口显著提升了前馈式3D重建的保真度，LSRM通过创新的稀疏注意力架构和并行策略实现了这一目标，在重建质量和逆渲染性能上超越了现有方法。

Abstract: We introduce the Large Sparse Reconstruction Model to study how scaling transformer context windows impacts feed-forward 3D reconstruction. Although recent object-centric feed-forward methods deliver robust, high-quality reconstruction, they still lag behind dense-view optimization in recovering fine-grained texture and appearance. We show that expanding the context window -- by substantially increasing the number of active object and image tokens -- remarkably narrows this gap and enables high-fidelity 3D object reconstruction and inverse rendering. To scale effectively, we adapt native sparse attention in our architecture design, unlocking its capacity for 3D reconstruction with three key contributions: (1) an efficient coarse-to-fine pipeline that focuses computation on informative regions by predicting sparse high-resolution residuals; (2) a 3D-aware spatial routing mechanism that establishes accurate 2D-3D correspondences using explicit geometric distances rather than standard attention scores; and (3) a custom block-aware sequence parallelism strategy utilizing an All-gather-KV protocol to balance dynamic, sparse workloads across GPUs. As a result, LSRM handles 20x more object tokens and >2x more image tokens than prior state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods. Extensive evaluations on standard novel-view synthesis benchmarks show substantial gains over the current SOTA, yielding 2.5 dB higher PSNR and 40% lower LPIPS. Furthermore, when extending LSRM to inverse rendering tasks, qualitative and quantitative evaluations on widely-used benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements in texture and geometry details, achieving an LPIPS that matches or exceeds that of SOTA dense-view optimization methods. Code and model will be released on our project page.

</details>


### [162] [MIRAGE: Benchmarking and Aligning Multi-Instance Image Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05180)
*Ziqian Liu,Stephan Alaniz*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MIRAGE是一个无需训练的图像编辑框架，专门解决多实例场景下的精确编辑问题，通过视觉语言模型解析指令和多分支并行去噪策略实现区域对齐。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有指令引导的图像编辑模型（如FLUX.2和Qwen-Image-Edit）在处理多相似实例和复合指令时存在严重过编辑和空间错位问题，需要专门针对多实例场景的解决方案。

Method: 提出MIRAGE框架：1）使用视觉语言模型将复杂指令解析为区域子集；2）采用多分支并行去噪策略，将目标区域的潜在表示注入全局表示空间；3）通过参考轨迹保持背景完整性。

Result: 在MIRA-Bench和RefEdit-Bench上的广泛评估表明，MIRAGE显著优于现有方法，能够实现精确的实例级修改同时保持背景一致性。

Conclusion: MIRAGE通过区域对齐和引导编辑有效解决了多实例图像编辑中的过编辑和空间错位问题，为复杂场景下的精确编辑提供了有效的训练免费解决方案。

Abstract: Instruction-guided image editing has seen remarkable progress with models like FLUX.2 and Qwen-Image-Edit, yet they still struggle with complex scenarios with multiple similar instances each requiring individual edits. We observe that state-of-the-art models suffer from severe over-editing and spatial misalignment when faced with multiple identical instances and composite instructions. To this end, we introduce a comprehensive benchmark specifically designed to evaluate fine-grained consistency in multi-instance and multi-instruction settings. To address the failures of existing methods observed in our benchmark, we propose Multi-Instance Regional Alignment via Guided Editing (MIRAGE), a training-free framework that enables precise, localized editing. By leveraging a vision-language model to parse complex instructions into regional subsets, MIRAGE employs a multi-branch parallel denoising strategy. This approach injects latent representations of target regions into the global representation space while maintaining background integrity through a reference trajectory. Extensive evaluations on MIRA-Bench and RefEdit-Bench demonstrate that our framework significantly outperforms existing methods in achieving precise instance-level modifications while preserving background consistency. Our benchmark and code are available at https://github.com/ZiqianLiu666/MIRAGE.

</details>


### [163] [Modality-Aware and Anatomical Vector-Quantized Autoencoding for Multimodal Brain MRI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05171)
*Mingjie Li,Edward Kim,Yue Zhao,Ehsan Adeli,Kilian M. Pohl*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: NeuroQuant：一种用于多模态脑MRI重建的模态感知解剖基础3D向量量化VAE，通过双流编码器分离解剖结构和模态特征，使用共享码本和FiLM调制实现高质量重建。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有脑VAE主要关注单模态数据（如T1加权MRI），忽视了其他模态（如T2加权MRI）的互补诊断价值。需要开发能够处理多模态脑MRI的鲁棒VAE模型，以支持医学图像分析中的下游应用。

Method: 1. 使用因子化多轴注意力学习跨模态共享潜在表示；2. 双流3D编码器显式分离模态不变解剖结构和模态依赖外观特征；3. 解剖编码通过共享码本离散化；4. 解码阶段使用特征线性调制（FiLM）结合解剖和外观特征；5. 采用联合2D/3D训练策略适应3D MRI数据的切片采集特性。

Result: 在两个多模态脑MRI数据集上的广泛实验表明，NeuroQuant相比现有VAE实现了更优的重建保真度，为下游生成建模和跨模态脑图像分析提供了可扩展的基础。

Conclusion: NeuroQuant通过模态感知和基于解剖的3D VQ-VAE框架，成功解决了多模态脑MRI重建问题，其分离解剖结构和外观特征的方法为医学图像分析中的生成模型和跨模态分析提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Learning a robust Variational Autoencoder (VAE) is a fundamental step for many deep learning applications in medical image analysis, such as MRI synthesizes. Existing brain VAEs predominantly focus on single-modality data (i.e., T1-weighted MRI), overlooking the complementary diagnostic value of other modalities like T2-weighted MRIs. Here, we propose a modality-aware and anatomically grounded 3D vector-quantized VAE (VQ-VAE) for reconstructing multi-modal brain MRIs. Called NeuroQuant, it first learns a shared latent representation across modalities using factorized multi-axis attention, which can capture relationships between distant brain regions. It then employs a dual-stream 3D encoder that explicitly separates the encoding of modality-invariant anatomical structures from modality-dependent appearance. Next, the anatomical encoding is discretized using a shared codebook and combined with modality-specific appearance features via Feature-wise Linear Modulation (FiLM) during the decoding phase. This entire approach is trained using a joint 2D/3D strategy in order to account for the slice-based acquisition of 3D MRI data. Extensive experiments on two multi-modal brain MRI datasets demonstrate that NeuroQuant achieves superior reconstruction fidelity compared to existing VAEs, enabling a scalable foundation for downstream generative modeling and cross-modal brain image analysis.

</details>


### [164] [Watch Before You Answer: Learning from Visually Grounded Post-Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05117)
*Yuxuan Zhang,EunJeong Hwang,Huaisong Zhang,Penghui Du,Yiming Jia,Dongfu Jiang,Xuan He,Shenhui Zhang,Ping Nie,Peter West,Kelsey R. Allen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 论文发现现有视频理解基准存在严重文本偏见问题，40-60%的问题仅凭文本线索即可回答，提出VidGround方法通过筛选真正需要视觉基础的问题进行后训练，显著提升模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前视觉语言模型在视频理解方面表现落后于文本推理，研究发现主要原因是现有评估基准和后训练数据集中存在大量仅需文本线索即可回答的问题，这削弱了模型学习视觉基础能力的需求。

Method: 提出VidGround方法：1）识别并筛选真正需要视觉基础的问题；2）仅使用这些无语言偏见的问题进行后训练；3）结合基于强化学习的后训练算法，使用更少但质量更高的数据。

Result: 使用VidGround后，性能相对使用完整数据集提升高达6.2个百分点，同时仅使用原始后训练数据的69.1%。数据筛选配合简单后训练算法优于多个复杂后训练技术，表明数据质量是提升视频理解的主要瓶颈。

Conclusion: 数据质量是提升视觉语言模型视频理解能力的关键瓶颈，必须精心筛选真正需要视觉基础的后训练数据和评估基准，才能推动更强大VLM的发展。

Abstract: It is critical for vision-language models (VLMs) to comprehensively understand visual, temporal, and textual cues. However, despite rapid progress in multimodal modeling, video understanding performance still lags behind text-based reasoning. In this work, we find that progress is even worse than previously assumed: commonly reported long video understanding benchmarks contain 40-60% of questions that can be answered using text cues alone. Furthermore, we find that these issues are also pervasive in widely used post-training datasets, potentially undercutting the ability of post-training to improve VLM video understanding performance. Guided by this observation, we introduce VidGround as a simple yet effective solution: using only the actual visually grounded questions without any linguistic biases for post-training. When used in tandem with RL-based post-training algorithms, this simple technique improves performance by up to 6.2 points relative to using the full dataset, while using only 69.1% of the original post-training data. Moreover, we show that data curation with a simple post-training algorithm outperforms several more complex post-training techniques, highlighting that data quality is a major bottleneck for improving video understanding in VLMs. These results underscore the importance of curating post-training data and evaluation benchmarks that truly require visual grounding to advance the development of more capable VLMs. Project page: http://vidground.etuagi.com.

</details>


### [165] [Simultaneous Dual-View Mammogram Synthesis Using Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05110)
*Jorge Alberto Garza-Abdala,Gerardo A. Fumagal-González,Eduardo de Avila-Armenta,Sadam Hussain,Jasiel H. Toscano-Martínezb,Diana S. M. Rosales Gurmendi,Alma A. Pedro-Pérez,Jose G. Tamez-Pena*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于三通道去噪扩散概率模型的双视角乳腺X线摄影合成方法，通过差异引导编码同时生成CC和MLO视图


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 乳腺X线摄影筛查依赖于CC和MLO双视角的互补信息，但许多数据集缺乏完整的配对视图，限制了依赖跨视图一致性的算法开发

Method: 使用三通道去噪扩散概率模型，前两个通道分别存储CC和MLO视图，第三个通道编码两者的绝对差异以引导模型学习投影间的解剖关系一致性；基于Hugging Face预训练DDPM在私有筛查数据集上进行微调

Result: 差异引导编码有助于保持跨视图的全局乳腺结构，生成的合成CC-MLO配对与真实采集相似；通过自动乳腺掩模分割评估几何一致性，并与真实图像进行分布比较和定性检查

Conclusion: 证明了基于差异引导DDPM同时合成双视角乳腺X线摄影的可行性，展示了其在数据集增强和未来跨视图感知AI应用中的潜力

Abstract: Breast cancer screening relies heavily on mammography, where the craniocaudal (CC) and mediolateral oblique (MLO) views provide complementary information for diagnosis. However, many datasets lack complete paired views, limiting the development of algorithms that depend on cross-view consistency. To address this gap, we propose a three-channel denoising diffusion probabilistic model capable of simultaneously generating CC and MLO views of a single breast. In this configuration, the two mammographic views are stored in separate channels, while a third channel encodes their absolute difference to guide the model toward learning coherent anatomical relationships between projections. A pretrained DDPM from Hugging Face was fine-tuned on a private screening dataset and used to synthesize dual-view pairs. Evaluation included geometric consistency via automated breast mask segmentation and distributional comparison with real images, along with qualitative inspection of cross-view alignment. The results show that the difference-based encoding helps preserve the global breast structure across views, producing synthetic CC-MLO pairs that resemble real acquisitions. This work demonstrates the feasibility of simultaneous dual-view mammogram synthesis using a difference-guided DDPM, highlighting its potential for dataset augmentation and future cross-view-aware AI applications in breast imaging.

</details>


### [166] [DISSECT: Diagnosing Where Vision Ends and Language Priors Begin in Scientific VLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06250)
*Dikshant Kukreja,Kshitij Sah,Karan Goyal,Mukesh Mohania,Vikram Goyal*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 论文提出DISSECT基准测试，用于诊断视觉语言模型中的感知-整合差距问题，发现开源模型在从自身描述推理时表现优于从原始图像推理，揭示了系统性的整合瓶颈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准测试将感知和整合能力混为一谈，无法识别视觉语言模型中存在的感知-整合差距问题，即模型能够正确提取视觉信息但在下游推理中却无法有效利用这些信息。

Method: 引入DISSECT诊断基准，包含12,000个化学和生物学问题，每个问题在五种输入模式下评估：视觉+文本、纯文本、纯视觉、人类Oracle和新型模型Oracle（模型先描述图像再基于描述推理）。

Result: 评估18个VLM发现：1)化学领域语言先验可利用性远低于生物学；2)开源模型从自身描述推理时得分高于从原始图像推理，暴露整合瓶颈；3)闭源模型无此差距，表明感知-整合整合是开源与闭源模型能力的关键差异。

Conclusion: 感知-整合差距是视觉语言模型的重要瓶颈，模型Oracle协议可作为通用诊断工具，感知与整合的有效整合是提升多模态能力的关键前沿。

Abstract: When asked to describe a molecular diagram, a Vision-Language Model correctly identifies ``a benzene ring with an -OH group.'' When asked to reason about the same image, it answers incorrectly. The model can see but it cannot think about what it sees. We term this the perception-integration gap: a failure where visual information is successfully extracted but lost during downstream reasoning, invisible to single-configuration benchmarks that conflate perception with integration under one accuracy number. To systematically expose such failures, we introduce DISSECT, a 12,000-question diagnostic benchmark spanning Chemistry (7,000) and Biology (5,000). Every question is evaluated under five input modes -- Vision+Text, Text-Only, Vision-Only, Human Oracle, and a novel Model Oracle in which the VLM first verbalizes the image and then reasons from its own description -- yielding diagnostic gaps that decompose performance into language-prior exploitation, visual extraction, perception fidelity, and integration effectiveness. Evaluating 18~VLMs, we find that: (1) Chemistry exhibits substantially lower language-prior exploitability than Biology, confirming molecular visual content as a harder test of genuine visual reasoning; (2) Open-source models consistently score higher when reasoning from their own verbalized descriptions than from raw images, exposing a systematic integration bottleneck; and (3) Closed-source models show no such gap, indicating that bridging perception and integration is the frontier separating open-source from closed-source multimodal capability. The Model Oracle protocol is both model and benchmark agnostic, applicable post-hoc to any VLM evaluation to diagnose integration failures.

</details>


### [167] [SVAgent: Storyline-Guided Long Video Understanding via Cross-Modal Multi-Agent Collaboration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05079)
*Zhongyu Yang,Zuhao Yang,Shuo Zhan,Tan Yue,Wei Pang,Yingfang Yuan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SVAgent：基于故事情节引导的多智能体框架，通过模拟人类故事情节推理提升视频问答性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频问答方法主要依赖定位相关帧来回答问题，而不是像人类那样通过连贯的故事情节进行推理。人类通过故事情节解释视频的能力对于做出稳健且上下文相关的预测至关重要，现有方法在这方面存在不足。

Method: 提出SVAgent框架：1) 故事情节智能体基于细化建议智能体提供的帧逐步构建叙事表示；2) 跨模态决策智能体在故事情节指导下从视觉和文本模态独立预测答案；3) 元智能体评估跨模态预测以对齐结果并增强推理鲁棒性和答案一致性。

Result: 实验结果表明SVAgent通过模拟人类故事情节推理，在视频问答任务中实现了优越的性能和可解释性。

Conclusion: SVAgent框架通过故事情节引导的跨模态多智能体协作，有效提升了视频问答的推理能力和性能，更接近人类理解视频的方式。

Abstract: Video question answering (VideoQA) is a challenging task that requires integrating spatial, temporal, and semantic information to capture the complex dynamics of video sequences. Although recent advances have introduced various approaches for video understanding, most existing methods still rely on locating relevant frames to answer questions rather than reasoning through the evolving storyline as humans do. Humans naturally interpret videos through coherent storylines, an ability that is crucial for making robust and contextually grounded predictions. To address this gap, we propose SVAgent, a storyline-guided cross-modal multi-agent framework for VideoQA. The storyline agent progressively constructs a narrative representation based on frames suggested by a refinement suggestion agent that analyzes historical failures. In addition, cross-modal decision agents independently predict answers from visual and textual modalities under the guidance of the evolving storyline. Their outputs are then evaluated by a meta-agent to align cross-modal predictions and enhance reasoning robustness and answer consistency. Experimental results demonstrate that SVAgent achieves superior performance and interpretability by emulating human-like storyline reasoning in video understanding.

</details>


### [168] [ID-Sim: An Identity-Focused Similarity Metric](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05039)
*Julia Chae,Nicholas Kolkin,Jui-Hsien Wang,Richard Zhang,Sara Beery,Cusuh Ham*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出ID-Sim度量标准，用于评估模型在身份识别任务中的性能，以匹配人类的选择性敏感度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类在身份识别方面具有卓越的选择性敏感度，能够区分高度相似的身份，而视觉模型难以达到这种能力。身份相关任务（如个性化图像生成）的进展受到缺乏身份聚焦评估指标的阻碍

Method: 提出ID-Sim前馈度量标准，构建高质量训练集包含多样现实领域图像，并使用生成式合成数据进行增强，提供受控的细粒度身份和上下文变化

Result: 创建了新的统一评估基准，用于评估身份聚焦识别、检索和生成任务中与人类标注的一致性

Conclusion: ID-Sim旨在促进视觉模型在身份相关任务上的进展，通过提供与人类选择性敏感度一致的评估指标

Abstract: Humans have remarkable selective sensitivity to identities -- easily distinguishing between highly similar identities, even across significantly different contexts such as diverse viewpoints or lighting. Vision models have struggled to match this capability, and progress toward identity-focused tasks such as personalized image generation is slowed by a lack of identity-focused evaluation metrics. To help facilitate progress, we propose ID-Sim, a feed-forward metric designed to faithfully reflect human selective sensitivity. To build ID-Sim, we curate a high-quality training set of images spanning diverse real-world domains, augmented with generative synthetic data that provides controlled, fine-grained identity and contextual variations. We evaluate our metric on a new unified evaluation benchmark for assessing consistency with human annotations across identity-focused recognition, retrieval, and generative tasks.

</details>


### [169] [AffordTissue: Dense Affordance Prediction for Tool-Action Specific Tissue Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01371)
*Aiza Maksutova,Lalithkumar Seenivasan,Hao Ding,Jiru Xu,Chenhao Yu,Chenyan Jing,Yiqing Shen,Mathias Unberath*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: AffordTissue：用于胆囊切除术中预测工具-动作特定组织可操作区域的多模态框架，通过密集热图提供手术自动化空间推理


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前手术动作自动化方法在临床部署中存在局限性：缺乏对器械与组织表面交互位置的预测性，缺少强制执行工具-动作特定安全交互区域的显式条件输入

Method: 结合时间视觉编码器（捕捉多视角工具运动和组织动态）、语言条件（实现不同器械-动作对的泛化）和DiT风格解码器（密集可操作性预测）的多模态框架

Result: 在首个组织可操作性基准测试中显著优于视觉语言模型基线（20.6 px ASSD vs. 60.2 px for Molmo-VLM），任务特定架构在密集手术可操作性预测上优于大规模基础模型

Conclusion: 通过预测工具-动作特定组织可操作性区域，AffordTissue为安全手术自动化提供显式空间推理，可能实现向适当组织区域的显式策略引导和器械偏离预测安全区时的早期安全停止

Abstract: Surgical action automation has progressed rapidly toward achieving surgeon-like dexterous control, driven primarily by advances in learning from demonstration and vision-language-action models. While these have demonstrated success in table-top experiments, translating them to clinical deployment remains challenging: current methods offer limited predictability on where instruments will interact on tissue surfaces and lack explicit conditioning inputs to enforce tool-action-specific safe interaction regions. Addressing this gap, we introduce AffordTissue, a multimodal framework for predicting tool-action specific tissue affordance regions as dense heatmaps during cholecystectomy. Our approach combines a temporal vision encoder capturing tool motion and tissue dynamics across multiple viewpoints, language conditioning enabling generalization across diverse instrument-action pairs, and a DiT-style decoder for dense affordance prediction. We establish the first tissue affordance benchmark by curating and annotating 15,638 video clips across 103 cholecystectomy procedures, covering six unique tool-action pairs involving four instruments (hook, grasper, scissors, clipper) and their associated tasks: dissection, grasping, clipping, and cutting. Experiments demonstrate substantial improvement over vision-language model baselines (20.6 px ASSD vs. 60.2 px for Molmo-VLM), showing that our task-specific architecture outperforms large-scale foundation models for dense surgical affordance prediction. By predicting tool-action specific tissue affordance regions, AffordTissue provides explicit spatial reasoning for safe surgical automation, potentially unlocking explicit policy guidance toward appropriate tissue regions and early safe stop when instruments deviate outside predicted safe zones.

</details>


### [170] [Vanast: Virtual Try-On with Human Image Animation via Synthetic Triplet Supervision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04934)
*Hyunsoo Cha,Wonjung Woo,Byungjun Kim,Hanbyul Joo*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Vanast是一个统一框架，直接从单张人体图像、服装图像和姿态引导视频生成服装转移的人体动画视频，解决了传统两阶段流程中的身份漂移、服装变形和前后不一致问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统虚拟试穿和姿态驱动动画的两阶段流程存在身份漂移、服装变形和前后不一致等问题，需要统一的端到端解决方案来生成连贯的服装转移动画。

Method: 构建大规模三元组监督数据，包括生成身份保持的换装图像、捕获完整上下装三元组、组装多样化真实世界三元组；提出双模块视频扩散Transformer架构，稳定训练并保持预训练生成质量。

Result: Vanast能够生成高保真、身份一致的动画视频，在服装准确性、姿态遵循和身份保持方面表现优异，并支持零样本服装插值，适用于广泛的服装类型。

Conclusion: Vanast通过统一框架解决了传统两阶段流程的局限性，实现了从单张图像到服装转移动画的连贯合成，为虚拟试穿和人体动画提供了更高质量的解决方案。

Abstract: We present Vanast, a unified framework that generates garment-transferred human animation videos directly from a single human image, garment images, and a pose guidance video. Conventional two-stage pipelines treat image-based virtual try-on and pose-driven animation as separate processes, which often results in identity drift, garment distortion, and front-back inconsistency. Our model addresses these issues by performing the entire process in a single unified step to achieve coherent synthesis. To enable this setting, we construct large-scale triplet supervision. Our data generation pipeline includes generating identity-preserving human images in alternative outfits that differ from garment catalog images, capturing full upper and lower garment triplets to overcome the single-garment-posed video pair limitation, and assembling diverse in-the-wild triplets without requiring garment catalog images. We further introduce a Dual Module architecture for video diffusion transformers to stabilize training, preserve pretrained generative quality, and improve garment accuracy, pose adherence, and identity preservation while supporting zero-shot garment interpolation. Together, these contributions allow Vanast to produce high-fidelity, identity-consistent animation across a wide range of garment types.

</details>


### [171] [Video-MME-v2: Towards the Next Stage in Benchmarks for Comprehensive Video Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05015)
*Chaoyou Fu,Haozhi Yuan,Yuhao Dong,Yi-Fan Zhang,Yunhang Shen,Xiaoxing Hu,Xueying Li,Jinsen Su,Chengwu Long,Xiaoyao Xie,Yongkang Xie,Xiawu Zheng,Xue Yang,Haoyu Cao,Yunsheng Wu,Ziwei Liu,Xing Sun,Caifeng Shan,Ran He*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Video-MME-v2是一个新的视频理解基准测试，通过三级渐进层次结构和基于组的非线性评估策略，旨在解决现有基准测试分数膨胀与实际能力之间的差距问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频理解基准测试逐渐饱和，排行榜分数与实际模型能力存在严重脱节，需要更严格的评估方法来衡量模型的鲁棒性和忠实性。

Method: 设计了三级渐进层次结构：从多点视觉信息聚合，到时序动态建模，再到复杂多模态推理。提出基于组的非线性评估策略，强调相关查询间的一致性和多步推理的连贯性。通过严格的人工标注流程构建数据集，投入3300人时，经过5轮质量保证。

Result: 实验显示当前最佳模型Gemini-3-Pro与人类专家存在显著差距，揭示了明显的层次瓶颈：视觉信息聚合和时序建模的错误会传播并限制高层推理。还发现基于思考的推理高度依赖文本线索，有字幕时性能提升，纯视觉设置中有时性能下降。

Conclusion: Video-MME-v2通过暴露现有模型的局限性，为下一代视频多模态大语言模型的发展建立了具有挑战性的新测试平台。

Abstract: With the rapid advancement of video understanding, existing benchmarks are becoming increasingly saturated, exposing a critical discrepancy between inflated leaderboard scores and real-world model capabilities. To address this widening gap, we introduce Video-MME-v2, a comprehensive benchmark designed to rigorously evaluate the robustness and faithfulness of video understanding. To systematically evaluate model capabilities, we design a \textbf{progressive tri-level hierarchy} that incrementally increases the complexity of video comprehension, ranging from multi-point visual information aggregation, to temporal dynamics modeling, and ultimately to complex multimodal reasoning. Besides, in contrast to conventional per-question accuracy, we propose a \textbf{group-based non-linear evaluation} strategy that enforces both consistency across related queries and coherence in multi-step reasoning. It penalizes fragmented or guess-based correctness and assigns credit only to answers supported by valid reasoning. To guarantee data quality, Video-MME-v2 is constructed through a rigorously controlled human annotation pipeline, involving 12 annotators and 50 independent reviewers. Backed by \textbf{3,300 human-hours} and up to \textbf{5 rounds} of quality assurance, Video-MME-v2 aims to serve as one of the most authoritative video benchmarks. Extensive experiments reveal a substantial gap between current best model Gemini-3-Pro and human experts, and uncover a clear hierarchical bottleneck where errors in visual information aggregation and temporal modeling propagate to limit high-level reasoning. We further find that thinking-based reasoning is highly dependent on textual cues, improving performance with subtitles but sometimes degrading it in purely visual settings. By exposing these limitations, Video-MME-v2 establishes a demanding new testbed for the development of next-generation video MLLMs.

</details>


### [172] [LoMa: Local Feature Matching Revisited](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04931)
*David Nordström,Johan Edstedt,Georg Bökman,Jonathan Astermark,Anders Heyden,Viktor Larsson,Mårten Wadenbäck,Michael Felsberg,Fredrik Kahl*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: LoMa通过数据驱动方法显著提升局部特征匹配性能，在多个基准测试中大幅超越现有方法，并发布HardMatch数据集解决评估饱和问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 局部特征匹配作为3D视觉系统的基础组件，其发展滞后于现代数据驱动方法。现有方法仅在少数中型数据集上训练，而标准基准主要基于成功3D重建的稀疏视图，导致评估局限于相对简单的图像对，造成基准测试饱和。

Method: LoMa采用数据驱动方法，结合大规模多样化数据混合、现代训练方法、扩展模型容量和计算资源。同时收集1000个极具挑战性的互联网图像对构建HardMatch数据集，通过作者手动标注获取真实对应关系。

Result: LoMa在多个基准测试中取得显著进步：HardMatch上超越ALIKED+LightGlue +18.6 mAA，WxBS上+29.5 mAA，InLoc上+21.4 (1m, 10°)，RUBIK上+24.2 AUC，IMC 2022上+12.4 mAA。

Conclusion: 通过数据驱动方法、大规模数据混合和现代训练技术，LoMa显著提升了局部特征匹配性能，解决了现有基准测试饱和问题，为特征匹配领域带来实质性进展。

Abstract: Local feature matching has long been a fundamental component of 3D vision systems such as Structure-from-Motion (SfM), yet progress has lagged behind the rapid advances of modern data-driven approaches. The newer approaches, such as feed-forward reconstruction models, have benefited extensively from scaling dataset sizes, whereas local feature matching models are still only trained on a few mid-sized datasets. In this paper, we revisit local feature matching from a data-driven perspective. In our approach, which we call LoMa, we combine large and diverse data mixtures, modern training recipes, scaled model capacity, and scaled compute, resulting in remarkable gains in performance. Since current standard benchmarks mainly rely on collecting sparse views from successful 3D reconstructions, the evaluation of progress in feature matching has been limited to relatively easy image pairs. To address the resulting saturation of benchmarks, we collect 1000 highly challenging image pairs from internet data into a new dataset called HardMatch. Ground truth correspondences for HardMatch are obtained via manual annotation by the authors. In our extensive benchmarking suite, we find that LoMa makes outstanding progress across the board, outperforming the state-of-the-art method ALIKED+LightGlue by +18.6 mAA on HardMatch, +29.5 mAA on WxBS, +21.4 (1m, 10$^\circ$) on InLoc, +24.2 AUC on RUBIK, and +12.4 mAA on IMC 2022. We release our code and models publicly at https://github.com/davnords/LoMa.

</details>


### [173] [Rethinking Model Efficiency: Multi-Agent Inference with Large Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04929)
*Sixun Dong,Juhua Hu,Steven Li,Wei Wen,Qi Qian*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 大型视觉语言模型通过多智能体推理框架，利用小模型的推理标记来提升大模型效率，实现更少输出标记下的高性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉语言模型通常使用大型语言模型作为解码器，采用自回归方式生成响应标记，输出标记数量成为端到端延迟的瓶颈。不同模型需要不同数量的输出标记才能达到可比性能，而大模型可能比小模型更高效，前提是输出标记更少。

Method: 提出多智能体推理框架：保持大模型生成简短响应，但在必要时从小模型转移关键推理标记。通过复用小模型的推理标记，帮助大模型接近其自身推理的性能。

Result: 实验表明，大模型通过更少的输出标记可以实现比小模型更好的效率。在多样化真实世界基准测试中，大模型能够以显著更少的输出标记达到更好或可比的性能。多智能体框架通过复用小模型的推理标记，能够接近大模型自身推理的性能。

Conclusion: 输出标记数量是视觉语言模型延迟的关键瓶颈。大模型在输出标记较少时可能比小模型更高效。提出的多智能体推理框架通过复用小模型的推理标记，有效提升了大模型的效率，同时保持了高性能。

Abstract: Most vision-language models (VLMs) apply a large language model (LLM) as the decoder, where the response tokens are generated sequentially through autoregression. Therefore, the number of output tokens can be the bottleneck of the end-to-end latency. However, different models may require vastly different numbers of output tokens to achieve comparable performance. In this work, we conduct a comprehensive analysis of the latency across different components of VLMs on simulated data. The experiment shows that a large model with fewer output tokens can be more efficient than a small model with a long output sequence. The empirical study on diverse real-world benchmarks confirms the observation that a large model can achieve better or comparable performance as a small model with significantly fewer output tokens. To leverage the efficiency of large models, we propose a multi-agent inference framework that keeps large models with short responses but transfers the key reasoning tokens from the small model when necessary. The comparison on benchmark tasks demonstrates that by reusing the reasoning tokens from small models, it can help approach the performance of a large model with its own reasoning, which confirms the effectiveness of our proposal.

</details>


### [174] [SimpleProc: Fully Procedural Synthetic Data from Simple Rules for Multi-View Stereo](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04925)
*Zeyu Ma,Alexander Raistrick,Jia Deng*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SimpleProc：一种基于NURBS和基本位移纹理模式的完全程序化MVS训练数据生成器，在小规模（8,000张）上优于人工采集数据，大规模（352,000张）上性能与692,000张人工数据相当甚至更好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索多视图立体视觉（MVS）程序化规则的设计空间，解决人工采集训练数据成本高、规模受限的问题，通过程序化方法生成高质量训练数据。

Method: 提出SimpleProc：完全程序化生成器，使用少量规则驱动，基于非均匀有理B样条（NURBS）以及基本位移和纹理模式来生成MVS训练数据。

Result: 1. 8,000张程序化图像优于同规模游戏和真实物体人工采集数据；2. 352,000张程序化数据训练模型性能与692,000张人工数据相当，在多个基准测试中甚至超过。

Conclusion: 程序化数据生成是MVS训练的有效替代方案，能以更小规模达到或超过大规模人工数据的性能，为计算机视觉训练数据获取提供了新途径。

Abstract: In this paper, we explore the design space of procedural rules for multi-view stereo (MVS). We demonstrate that we can generate effective training data using SimpleProc: a new, fully procedural generator driven by a very small set of rules using Non-Uniform Rational Basis Splines (NURBS), as well as basic displacement and texture patterns. At a modest scale of 8,000 images, our approach achieves superior results compared to manually curated images (at the same scale) sourced from games and real-world objects. When scaled to 352,000 images, our method yields performance comparable to--and in several benchmarks, exceeding--models trained on over 692,000 manually curated images. The source code and the data are available at https://github.com/princeton-vl/SimpleProc.

</details>


### [175] [Your Pre-trained Diffusion Model Secretly Knows Restoration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04924)
*Sudarshan Rajagopalan,Vishal M. Patel*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 通过直接学习文本编码器输出的提示嵌入，解锁预训练扩散模型固有的修复能力，无需微调或控制模块


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的修复方法主要依赖微调或Control-Net模块来利用预训练模型的先验知识，但预训练扩散模型本身可能已具备修复能力，只是无法通过文本提示访问

Method: 提出在扩散桥框架中学习提示嵌入，对齐训练和推理动态，确保从噪声退化状态到干净图像的一致去噪路径；在WAN视频模型和FLUX图像模型上实现轻量级学习提示

Result: 方法在多种退化类型上实现了竞争性性能和泛化能力，避免了模型微调和修复专用控制模块的需求

Conclusion: 预训练扩散模型固有修复能力可通过学习提示嵌入解锁，扩散桥框架解决了训练推理不对齐问题，为全场景修复提供了轻量高效方案

Abstract: Pre-trained diffusion models have enabled significant advancements in All-in-One Restoration (AiOR), offering improved perceptual quality and generalization. However, diffusion-based restoration methods primarily rely on fine-tuning or Control-Net style modules to leverage the pre-trained diffusion model's priors for AiOR. In this work, we show that these pre-trained diffusion models inherently possess restoration behavior, which can be unlocked by directly learning prompt embeddings at the output of the text encoder. Interestingly, this behavior is largely inaccessible through text prompts and text-token embedding optimization. Furthermore, we observe that naive prompt learning is unstable because the forward noising process using degraded images is misaligned with the reverse sampling trajectory. To resolve this, we train prompts within a diffusion bridge formulation that aligns training and inference dynamics, enforcing a coherent denoising path from noisy degraded states to clean images. Building on these insights, we introduce our lightweight learned prompts on the pre-trained WAN video model and FLUX image models, converting them into high-performing restoration models. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves competitive performance and generalization across diverse degradations, while avoiding fine-tuning and restoration-specific control modules.

</details>


### [176] [ProOOD: Prototype-Guided Out-of-Distribution 3D Occupancy Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01081)
*Yuheng Zhang,Mengfei Duan,Kunyu Peng,Yuhang Wang,Di Wen,Danda Pani Paudel,Luc Van Gool,Kailun Yang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ProOOD：一种用于3D语义占据预测的轻量级即插即用方法，通过原型引导的细化和免训练OOD评分，解决长尾类别偏差和分布外输入问题，提升自动驾驶场景下的安全性和可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前3D语义占据预测方法存在两个关键问题：1）对长尾类别偏差敏感，容易将异常过度自信地分配给稀有类别；2）对分布外（OOD）输入脆弱。这些问题在安全关键的自动驾驶场景中尤为危险。

Method: ProOOD包含三个核心组件：1）原型引导的语义填补：用类别一致的特征填充遮挡区域；2）原型引导的尾部挖掘：增强稀有类别表示以减少OOD吸收；3）EchoOOD：融合局部logit一致性、局部和全局原型匹配，生成可靠的体素级OOD分数。

Result: 在五个数据集上的实验表明，ProOOD在3D占据预测和OOD检测方面均达到最先进性能。在SemanticKITTI上，整体mIoU提升+3.57%，尾部类别mIoU提升+24.80%；在VAA-KITTI上，AuPRCr提升+19.34个点，各基准测试均有稳定提升。

Conclusion: ProOOD通过原型引导的细化和免训练OOD评分，显著提升了3D语义占据预测的校准性和OOD检测的可靠性，为安全关键的城市场景自动驾驶提供了更稳健的解决方案。代码已开源。

Abstract: 3D semantic occupancy prediction is central to autonomous driving, yet current methods are vulnerable to long-tailed class bias and out-of-distribution (OOD) inputs, often overconfidently assigning anomalies to rare classes. We present ProOOD, a lightweight, plug-and-play method that couples prototype-guided refinement with training-free OOD scoring. ProOOD comprises (i) prototype-guided semantic imputation that fills occluded regions with class-consistent features, (ii) prototype-guided tail mining that strengthens rare-class representations to curb OOD absorption, and (iii) EchoOOD, which fuses local logit coherence with local and global prototype matching to produce reliable voxel-level OOD scores. Extensive experiments on five datasets demonstrate that ProOOD achieves state-of-the-art performance on both in-distribution 3D occupancy prediction and OOD detection. On SemanticKITTI, it surpasses baselines by +3.57% mIoU overall and +24.80% tail-class mIoU; on VAA-KITTI, it improves AuPRCr by +19.34 points, with consistent gains across benchmarks. These improvements yield more calibrated occupancy estimates and more reliable OOD detection in safety-critical urban driving. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/7uHeng/ProOOD.

</details>


### [177] [Vero: An Open RL Recipe for General Visual Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04917)
*Gabriel Sarch,Linrong Cai,Qunzhong Wang,Haoyang Wu,Danqi Chen,Zhuang Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Vero是一个完全开源的视觉语言模型家族，通过构建600K样本的RL数据集和任务路由奖励机制，在多样化视觉推理任务上达到或超越现有开源模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前最强的视觉语言模型(VLMs)虽然展现出广泛的视觉推理能力，但其构建方法被专有的强化学习(RL)流程和非公开数据所锁定。研究旨在开发完全开源的视觉推理模型，揭示跨图表、科学、空间理解和开放任务的有效构建方法。

Method: 1) 构建Vero-600K数据集：从59个数据集中收集600K样本，覆盖六个广泛任务类别；2) 设计任务路由奖励：处理异构答案格式；3) 基于Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct等基础模型进行RL训练；4) 开发VeroEval评估套件：包含30个具有挑战性的基准测试。

Result: Vero在VeroEval的30个基准测试上平均提升3.6-5.3分，达到最先进性能。基于Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct的Vero在30个基准中的23个上超越了Qwen3-VL-8B-Thinking，且无需额外的专有思维数据。系统消融实验表明，广泛的数据覆盖是RL扩展的主要驱动力。

Conclusion: 构建强大的跨领域视觉推理模型需要广泛的任务覆盖，而非单一任务类别的优化。Vero证明了通过开源方法构建高性能视觉语言模型的可行性，所有数据、代码和模型均已开源发布。

Abstract: What does it take to build a visual reasoner that works across charts, science, spatial understanding, and open-ended tasks? The strongest vision-language models (VLMs) show such broad visual reasoning is within reach, but the recipe behind them remains unclear, locked behind proprietary reinforcement learning (RL) pipelines with non-public data. We introduce Vero, a family of fully open VLMs that matches or exceeds existing open-weight models across diverse visual reasoning tasks. We scale RL data and rewards across six broad task categories, constructing Vero-600K, a 600K-sample dataset from 59 datasets, and designing task-routed rewards that handle heterogeneous answer formats. Vero achieves state-of-the-art performance, improving over four base models by 3.6-5.3 points on average across VeroEval, our suite of 30 challenging benchmarks. Starting from Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct, Vero outperforms Qwen3-VL-8B-Thinking on 23 of 30 benchmarks without additional proprietary thinking data. When trained from the same base model, Vero-600K exceeds existing RL datasets across task categories. Systematic ablations reveal that different task categories elicit qualitatively distinct reasoning patterns that transfer poorly in isolation, suggesting that broad data coverage is the primary driver of strong RL scaling. All data, code, and models are released.

</details>


### [178] [A Frame is Worth One Token: Efficient Generative World Modeling with Delta Tokens](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04913)
*Tommie Kerssies,Gabriele Berton,Ju He,Qihang Yu,Wufei Ma,Daan de Geus,Gijs Dubbelman,Liang-Chieh Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: DeltaWorld：基于VFM特征差异的紧凑token表示，实现高效多假设生成式世界建模


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频世界建模方法面临挑战：判别式模型产生确定性预测（隐式平均可能未来），生成式模型计算成本高。最近研究表明在视觉基础模型特征空间预测比像素重建潜在空间更高效，但多数方法仍是判别式的。

Method: 提出DeltaTok tokenizer将连续帧间VFM特征差异编码为单个连续"delta" token；DeltaWorld基于这些token的生成式世界模型。Delta token将视频从三维时空表示压缩为一维时间序列（如512x512帧实现1024倍token减少），支持可处理的多假设训练（并行生成多个未来，仅监督最佳预测）。

Result: 在密集预测任务实验中，DeltaWorld预测的未来更符合真实世界结果，同时参数比现有生成式世界模型少35倍以上，FLOPs减少2000倍。推理时单次前向传播即可产生多样化预测。

Conclusion: DeltaWorld通过紧凑的delta token表示和高效多假设训练，实现了计算高效且能生成多样化未来预测的生成式世界建模，在参数和计算效率上显著优于现有方法。

Abstract: Anticipating diverse future states is a central challenge in video world modeling. Discriminative world models produce a deterministic prediction that implicitly averages over possible futures, while existing generative world models remain computationally expensive. Recent work demonstrates that predicting the future in the feature space of a vision foundation model (VFM), rather than a latent space optimized for pixel reconstruction, requires significantly fewer world model parameters. However, most such approaches remain discriminative. In this work, we introduce DeltaTok, a tokenizer that encodes the VFM feature difference between consecutive frames into a single continuous "delta" token, and DeltaWorld, a generative world model operating on these tokens to efficiently generate diverse plausible futures. Delta tokens reduce video from a three-dimensional spatio-temporal representation to a one-dimensional temporal sequence, for example yielding a 1,024x token reduction with 512x512 frames. This compact representation enables tractable multi-hypothesis training, where many futures are generated in parallel and only the best is supervised. At inference, this leads to diverse predictions in a single forward pass. Experiments on dense forecasting tasks demonstrate that DeltaWorld forecasts futures that more closely align with real-world outcomes, while having over 35x fewer parameters and using 2,000x fewer FLOPs than existing generative world models. Code and weights: https://deltatok.github.io.

</details>


### [179] [SpatialEdit: Benchmarking Fine-Grained Image Spatial Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04911)
*Yicheng Xiao,Wenhu Zhang,Lin Song,Yukang Chen,Wenbo Li,Nan Jiang,Tianhe Ren,Haokun Lin,Wei Huang,Haoyang Huang,Xiu Li,Nan Duan,Xiaojuan Qi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出SpatialEdit-Bench基准测试、SpatialEdit-500k合成数据集和SpatialEdit-16B基线模型，用于评估和提升图像空间编辑能力


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前图像空间编辑模型在细粒度空间操控方面不足，需要专门的评估基准和训练数据来推动该领域发展

Method: 1) 构建SpatialEdit-Bench基准，通过视角重建和构图分析联合评估感知合理性和几何保真度；2) 使用可控Blender流水线生成SpatialEdit-500k合成数据集；3) 基于该数据开发SpatialEdit-16B基线模型

Result: SpatialEdit-16B在通用编辑任务上表现竞争力，在空间操控任务上显著优于现有方法

Conclusion: 提出的基准、数据集和基线模型为图像空间编辑研究提供了完整框架，所有资源将公开共享

Abstract: Image spatial editing performs geometry-driven transformations, allowing precise control over object layout and camera viewpoints. Current models are insufficient for fine-grained spatial manipulations, motivating a dedicated assessment suite. Our contributions are listed: (i) We introduce SpatialEdit-Bench, a complete benchmark that evaluates spatial editing by jointly measuring perceptual plausibility and geometric fidelity via viewpoint reconstruction and framing analysis. (ii) To address the data bottleneck for scalable training, we construct SpatialEdit-500k, a synthetic dataset generated with a controllable Blender pipeline that renders objects across diverse backgrounds and systematic camera trajectories, providing precise ground-truth transformations for both object- and camera-centric operations. (iii) Building on this data, we develop SpatialEdit-16B, a baseline model for fine-grained spatial editing. Our method achieves competitive performance on general editing while substantially outperforming prior methods on spatial manipulation tasks. All resources will be made public at https://github.com/EasonXiao-888/SpatialEdit.

</details>


### [180] [ClickAIXR: On-Device Multimodal Vision-Language Interaction with Real-World Objects in Extended Reality](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04905)
*Dawar Khan,Alexandre Kouyoumdjian,Xinyu Liu,Omar Mena,Dominik Engel,Ivan Viola*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ClickAIXR是一个在设备端运行的多模态视觉语言交互框架，通过控制器点击选择XR环境中的真实物体，使用本地视觉语言模型处理物体图像并回答自然语言问题，实现隐私保护、低延迟的交互体验。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有XR系统存在以下问题：1) 依赖云端AI（如ChatGPT）存在隐私和延迟问题；2) 基于注视的选择（如GazePointAR）存在模糊性；3) 纯语音界面不够精确。需要一种更透明、隐私保护且精确的交互方式。

Method: 1) 集成设备端视觉语言模型（VLM）与控制器选择范式；2) 用户通过控制器精确点击XR环境中的真实物体；3) 物体图像在本地由VLM处理；4) 通过文本和语音回答自然语言问题；5) 在Magic Leap SDK（C API）中实现，使用ONNX进行本地VLM推理。

Result: 1) 与Gemini 2.5 Flash和ChatGPT 5相比，延迟适中，用户体验可接受；2) 用户研究表明，基于点击的物体选择减少了模糊性；3) 设备端推理提高了透明度和隐私保护；4) 整体系统展示了可信赖、隐私保护的XR交互潜力。

Conclusion: ClickAIXR证明了基于点击的物体选择与设备端AI结合能够推进可信赖、隐私保护的XR交互。该方法通过精确选择、本地处理和减少模糊性，为XR交互提供了新的解决方案。

Abstract: We present ClickAIXR, a novel on-device framework for multimodal vision-language interaction with objects in extended reality (XR). Unlike prior systems that rely on cloud-based AI (e.g., ChatGPT) or gaze-based selection (e.g., GazePointAR), ClickAIXR integrates an on-device vision-language model (VLM) with a controller-based object selection paradigm, enabling users to precisely click on real-world objects in XR. Once selected, the object image is processed locally by the VLM to answer natural language questions through both text and speech. This object-centered interaction reduces ambiguity inherent in gaze- or voice-only interfaces and improves transparency by performing all inference on-device, addressing concerns around privacy and latency. We implemented ClickAIXR in the Magic Leap SDK (C API) with ONNX-based local VLM inference. We conducted a user study comparing ClickAIXR with Gemini 2.5 Flash and ChatGPT 5, evaluating usability, trust, and user satisfaction. Results show that latency is moderate and user experience is acceptable. Our findings demonstrate the potential of click-based object selection combined with on-device AI to advance trustworthy, privacy-preserving XR interactions. The source code and supplementary materials are available at: nanovis.org/ClickAIXR.html

</details>


### [181] [HorizonWeaver: Generalizable Multi-Level Semantic Editing for Driving Scenes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04887)
*Mauricio Soroco,Francesco Pittaluga,Zaid Tasneem,Abhishek Aich,Bingbing Zhuang,Wuyang Chen,Manmohan Chandraker,Ziyu Jiang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: HorizonWeaver是一个用于自动驾驶场景编辑的框架，通过大规模数据集、语言引导掩码和联合训练损失，解决了密集驾驶场景中的多粒度编辑、丰富语义保持和领域迁移挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动驾驶安全需要超越真实世界测试的可扩展、真实可控的驾驶场景生成。现有基于指令的图像编辑方法在密集、安全关键的驾驶布局上表现不佳，主要面临三个挑战：多级粒度编辑、丰富高层语义保持和普遍领域迁移。

Method: 1) 数据：从Boreas、nuScenes和Argoverse2构建大规模配对真实/合成数据集；2) 模型：语言引导掩码用于细粒度编辑，通过语义增强的掩码和提示实现精确的语言引导编辑；3) 训练：内容保持和指令对齐，使用联合损失强制场景一致性和指令保真度。

Result: 收集了13个编辑类别的255K图像，在L1、CLIP和DINO指标上优于先前方法，获得+46.4%的用户偏好，BEV分割IoU提升+33%。

Conclusion: HorizonWeaver为复杂驾驶场景的逼真、指令驱动编辑提供了一个可扩展框架，解决了自动驾驶场景编辑中的关键挑战，显著提升了编辑质量和用户偏好。

Abstract: Ensuring safety in autonomous driving requires scalable generation of realistic, controllable driving scenes beyond what real-world testing provides. Yet existing instruction guided image editors, trained on object-centric or artistic data, struggle with dense, safety-critical driving layouts. We propose HorizonWeaver, which tackles three fundamental challenges in driving scene editing: (1) multi-level granularity, requiring coherent object- and scene-level edits in dense environments; (2) rich high-level semantics, preserving diverse objects while following detailed instructions; and (3) ubiquitous domain shifts, handling changes in climate, layout, and traffic across unseen environments. The core of HorizonWeaver is a set of complementary contributions across data, model, and training: (1) Data: Large-scale dataset generation, where we build a paired real/synthetic dataset from Boreas, nuScenes, and Argoverse2 to improve generalization; (2) Model: Language-Guided Masks for fine-grained editing, where semantics-enriched masks and prompts enable precise, language-guided edits; and (3) Training: Content preservation and instruction alignment, where joint losses enforce scene consistency and instruction fidelity. Together, HorizonWeaver provides a scalable framework for photorealistic, instruction-driven editing of complex driving scenes, collecting 255K images across 13 editing categories and outperforming prior methods in L1, CLIP, and DINO metrics, achieving +46.4% user preference and improving BEV segmentation IoU by +33%. Project page: https://msoroco.github.io/horizonweaver/

</details>


### [182] [DIRECT: Video Mashup Creation via Hierarchical Multi-Agent Planning and Intent-Guided Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04875)
*Ke Li,Maoliang Li,Jialiang Chen,Jiayu Chen,Zihao Zheng,Shaoqi Wang,Xiang Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: DIRECT是一个用于视频混剪创作的分层多智能体框架，将视频混剪建模为多模态连贯性满足问题，通过编剧、导演和编辑三个层级实现跨级别多模态编排，显著提升专业级流畅度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动化视频编辑框架往往忽视跨级别的多模态编排，导致序列不连贯、视觉过渡突兀和音乐对齐不佳，无法达到专业级流畅度。视频混剪创作需要在语义、视觉和听觉多个维度及级别上进行复杂编排。

Method: 将视频混剪建模为多模态连贯性满足问题，提出DIRECT分层多智能体框架，模拟专业制作流程：1)编剧层进行源感知的全局结构锚定；2)导演层实例化自适应编辑意图和指导；3)编辑层进行意图引导的镜头序列编辑和细粒度优化。

Result: DIRECT在客观指标和人类主观评估中均显著优于现有最先进基线方法。作者还引入了Mashup-Bench基准测试，包含针对视觉连续性和听觉对齐的定制化指标。

Conclusion: DIRECT框架通过分层多智能体方法有效解决了视频混剪中的跨级别多模态编排问题，实现了专业级流畅的视频混剪创作，为自动化视频编辑提供了新的解决方案。

Abstract: Video mashup creation represents a complex video editing paradigm that recomposes existing footage to craft engaging audio-visual experiences, demanding intricate orchestration across semantic, visual, and auditory dimensions and multiple levels. However, existing automated editing frameworks often overlook the cross-level multimodal orchestration to achieve professional-grade fluidity, resulting in disjointed sequences with abrupt visual transitions and musical misalignment. To address this, we formulate video mashup creation as a Multimodal Coherency Satisfaction Problem (MMCSP) and propose the DIRECT framework. Simulating a professional production pipeline, our hierarchical multi-agent framework decomposes the challenge into three cascade levels: the Screenwriter for source-aware global structural anchoring, the Director for instantiating adaptive editing intent and guidance, and the Editor for intent-guided shot sequence editing with fine-grained optimization. We further introduce Mashup-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark with tailored metrics for visual continuity and auditory alignment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DIRECT significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both objective metrics and human subjective evaluation. Project page and code: https://github.com/AK-DREAM/DIRECT

</details>


### [183] [DVGT-2: Vision-Geometry-Action Model for Autonomous Driving at Scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.00813)
*Sicheng Zuo,Zixun Xie,Wenzhao Zheng,Shaoqing Xu,Fang Li,Hanbing Li,Long Chen,Zhi-Xin Yang,Jiwen Lu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出Vision-Geometry-Action（VGA）自动驾驶新范式，强调密集3D几何作为关键线索，并开发了在线推理的DVGT-2模型，同时输出几何重建和轨迹规划。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
