Motivation: 现有端到端自动驾驶从稀疏感知发展到VLA模型，但作者认为车辆在3D世界中运行，密集3D几何应作为决策的最全面信息源。然而现有几何重建方法依赖多帧批处理，无法用于在线规划。

Method: 提出DVGT-2模型：1）采用流式处理实现在线推理；2）使用时间因果注意力和历史特征缓存；3）引入滑动窗口流式策略避免重复计算；4）联合输出密集几何和轨迹规划。

Result: DVGT-2在多个数据集上实现更优的几何重建性能，且速度更快。同一模型无需微调即可直接应用于不同相机配置的规划任务，在NAVSIM闭环和nuScenes开环基准测试中均表现良好。

Conclusion: Vision-Geometry-Action（VGA）范式通过密集3D几何作为核心线索，结合DVGT-2的流式处理架构，为自动驾驶提供了更高效且通用的解决方案，实现了几何重建与规划的统一框架。

Abstract: End-to-end autonomous driving has evolved from the conventional paradigm based on sparse perception into vision-language-action (VLA) models, which focus on learning language descriptions as an auxiliary task to facilitate planning. In this paper, we propose an alternative Vision-Geometry-Action (VGA) paradigm that advocates dense 3D geometry as the critical cue for autonomous driving. As vehicles operate in a 3D world, we think dense 3D geometry provides the most comprehensive information for decision-making. However, most existing geometry reconstruction methods (e.g., DVGT) rely on computationally expensive batch processing of multi-frame inputs and cannot be applied to online planning. To address this, we introduce a streaming Driving Visual Geometry Transformer (DVGT-2), which processes inputs in an online manner and jointly outputs dense geometry and trajectory planning for the current frame. We employ temporal causal attention and cache historical features to support on-the-fly inference. To further enhance efficiency, we propose a sliding-window streaming strategy and use historical caches within a certain interval to avoid repetitive computations. Despite the faster speed, DVGT-2 achieves superior geometry reconstruction performance on various datasets. The same trained DVGT-2 can be directly applied to planning across diverse camera configurations without fine-tuning, including closed-loop NAVSIM and open-loop nuScenes benchmarks.

</details>


### [184] [Free-Range Gaussians: Non-Grid-Aligned Generative 3D Gaussian Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04874)
*Ahan Shabanov,Peter Hedman,Ethan Weber,Zhengqin Li,Denis Rozumny,Gael Le Lan,Naina Dhingra,Lei Luo,Andrea Vedaldi,Christian Richardt,Andrea Tagliasacchi,Bo Zhu,Numair Khan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Free-Range Gaussians：一种多视角重建方法，通过流匹配预测非像素、非体素对齐的3D高斯分布，仅需4张图像即可生成高质量重建结果，能合成未观测区域的合理内容。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决现有方法生成高度冗余的网格对齐高斯分布的问题，这些方法在未观测区域存在空洞或模糊的条件均值，且需要大量高斯分布才能获得高质量结果。

Method: 1. 使用高斯参数上的流匹配进行生成式重建；2. 引入分层分块方案将空间相关的高斯分组为联合transformer token，序列长度减半；3. 训练时使用时间步加权渲染损失；4. 推理时采用光度梯度引导和分类器无关引导提高保真度。

Result: 在Objaverse和Google Scanned Objects数据集上，相比像素和体素对齐方法，使用显著更少的高斯分布获得了一致的改进，在输入视图未覆盖物体部分时提升尤其显著。

Conclusion: Free-Range Gaussians通过生成式重建框架和高效的分层表示，实现了从少量图像进行高质量3D重建，能够合成未观测区域的合理内容，优于现有网格对齐方法。

Abstract: We present Free-Range Gaussians, a multi-view reconstruction method that predicts non-pixel, non-voxel-aligned 3D Gaussians from as few as four images. This is done through flow matching over Gaussian parameters. Our generative formulation of reconstruction allows the model to be supervised with non-grid-aligned 3D data, and enables it to synthesize plausible content in unobserved regions. Thus, it improves on prior methods that produce highly redundant grid-aligned Gaussians, and suffer from holes or blurry conditional means in unobserved regions. To handle the number of Gaussians needed for high-quality results, we introduce a hierarchical patching scheme to group spatially related Gaussians into joint transformer tokens, halving the sequence length while preserving structure. We further propose a timestep-weighted rendering loss during training, and photometric gradient guidance and classifier-free guidance at inference to improve fidelity. Experiments on Objaverse and Google Scanned Objects show consistent improvements over pixel and voxel-aligned methods while using significantly fewer Gaussians, with large gains when input views leave parts of the object unobserved.

</details>


### [185] [Beyond the Global Scores: Fine-Grained Token Grounding as a Robust Detector of LVLM Hallucinations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04863)
*Tuan Dung Nguyen,Minh Khoi Ho,Qi Chen,Yutong Xie,Nguyen Cam-Tu,Minh Khoi Nguyen,Dang Huy Pham Nguyen,Anton van den Hengel,Johan W. Verjans,Phi Le Nguyen,Vu Minh Hieu Phan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出基于图像块级别的幻觉检测框架，通过分析细粒度token交互来检测大视觉语言模型中的幻觉对象，准确率达90%


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的大视觉语言模型幻觉检测方法主要依赖全局图像度量，但幻觉token可能在多个局部区域表现出微弱但分散的相关性，这些相关性聚合后形成欺骗性的高整体相关性，从而逃避全局检测器

Method: 基于关键观察（忠实对象token必须牢固地基于特定图像区域），引入图像块级别的幻觉检测框架，分析跨模型层的细粒度token交互，发现幻觉token的两个特征：1）产生分散、非局部化的注意力模式；2）与任何视觉区域缺乏有意义的语义对齐。开发轻量级可解释检测方法，利用图像块级统计特征结合隐藏层表示

Result: 提出的方法在token级别幻觉检测中达到90%的准确率，证明了细粒度结构分析在检测幻觉方面的优越性

Conclusion: 通过分析细粒度的token交互和注意力模式，可以更有效地检测大视觉语言模型中的幻觉，图像块级别的分析比全局方法更有效

Abstract: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) achieve strong performance on visual reasoning tasks but remain highly susceptible to hallucination. Existing detection methods predominantly rely on coarse, whole-image measures of how an object token relates to the input image. This global strategy is limited: hallucinated tokens may exhibit weak but widely scattered correlations across many local regions, which aggregate into deceptively high overall relevance, thus evading the current global hallucination detectors. We begin with a simple yet critical observation: a faithful object token must be strongly grounded in a specific image region. Building on this insight, we introduce a patch-level hallucination detection framework that examines fine-grained token-level interactions across model layers. Our analysis uncovers two characteristic signatures of hallucinated tokens: (i) they yield diffuse, non-localized attention patterns, in contrast to the compact, well-focused attention seen in faithful tokens; and (ii) they fail to exhibit meaningful semantic alignment with any visual region. Guided by these findings, we develop a lightweight and interpretable detection method that leverages patch-level statistical features, combined with hidden-layer representations. Our approach achieves up to 90% accuracy in token-level hallucination detection, demonstrating the superiority of fine-grained structural analysis for detecting hallucinations.

</details>


### [186] [Unified Vector Floorplan Generation via Markup Representation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04859)
*Kaede Shiohara,Toshihiko Yamasaki*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: FMLM：基于Floorplan Markup Language和Transformer的通用住宅平面图生成模型，在多种条件任务下超越现有方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有住宅平面图自动生成方法存在局限性：早期基于约束满足或组合优化的方法缺乏多样性和灵活性；近期生成模型难以泛化到异构条件任务（如从场地边界、房间邻接图或部分布局生成），因其表示方法不够理想。

Method: 提出Floorplan Markup Language（FML），一种通用结构化语法表示，将整个平面图生成问题转化为下一个标记预测任务。基于FML开发了Transformer生成模型FMLM，能够在多样化条件下生成高保真且功能合理的平面图。

Result: 在RPLAN数据集上的综合实验表明，FMLM虽然是单一模型，但在多种条件任务下均超越了先前任务特定的最先进方法。

Conclusion: FML表示和FMLM模型为解决住宅平面图生成的异构条件任务提供了有效的通用解决方案，显著提升了生成质量和灵活性。

Abstract: Automatic residential floorplan generation has long been a central challenge bridging architecture and computer graphics, aiming to make spatial design more efficient and accessible. While early methods based on constraint satisfaction or combinatorial optimization ensure feasibility, they lack diversity and flexibility. Recent generative models achieve promising results but struggle to generalize across heterogeneous conditional tasks, such as generation from site boundaries, room adjacency graphs, or partial layouts, due to their suboptimal representations. To address this gap, we introduce Floorplan Markup Language (FML), a general representation that encodes floorplan information within a single structured grammar, which casts the entire floorplan generation problem into a next token prediction task. Leveraging FML, we develop a transformer-based generative model, FMLM, capable of producing high-fidelity and functional floorplans under diverse conditions. Comprehensive experiments on the RPLAN dataset demonstrate that FMLM, despite being a single model, surpasses the previous task-specific state-of-the-art methods.

</details>


### [187] [The Blind Spot of Adaptation: Quantifying and Mitigating Forgetting in Fine-tuned Driving Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04857)
*Runhao Mao,Hanshi Wang,Yixiang Yang,Qianli Ma,Jingmeng Zhou,Zhipeng Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文首次系统研究了自动驾驶中视觉语言模型(VLMs)的灾难性遗忘问题，提出了一个包含18万场景的新数据集和基准测试，并设计了Drive Expert Adapter框架来通过提示空间适配而非权重微调来缓解此问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将视觉语言模型集成到自动驾驶中虽然能解决长尾场景问题，但面临灾难性遗忘的关键挑战。微调过程在使模型适应驾驶数据的同时，会侵蚀其预训练的世界知识，这与使用VLMs的核心目的相悖。

Method: 提出了Drive Expert Adapter(DEA)框架，将适配从权重空间转移到提示空间。DEA基于场景特定线索动态路由推理到不同的知识专家，在不破坏模型基础参数的情况下提升驾驶任务性能。

Result: 实验表明该方法在驾驶任务上达到最先进性能，同时有效缓解了灾难性遗忘，保留了VLMs的泛化能力。创建了包含18万场景的大规模数据集FidelityDrivingBench用于量化评估。

Conclusion: 该研究首次系统揭示了自动驾驶中VLMs的灾难性遗忘问题，提出的DEA框架通过提示空间适配而非权重微调，成功解决了性能提升与知识保留之间的权衡，为VLMs在自动驾驶中的实际应用提供了可行方案。

Abstract: The integration of Vision-Language Models (VLMs) into autonomous driving promises to solve long-tail scenarios, but this paradigm faces the critical and unaddressed challenge of catastrophic forgetting. The very fine-tuning process used to adapt these models to driving-specific data simultaneously erodes their invaluable pre-trained world knowledge, creating a self-defeating paradox that undermines the core reason for their use. This paper provides the first systematic investigation into this phenomenon. We introduce a new large-scale dataset of 180K scenes, which enables the first-ever benchmark specifically designed to quantify catastrophic forgetting in autonomous driving. Our analysis reveals that existing methods suffer from significant knowledge degradation. To address this, we propose the Drive Expert Adapter (DEA), a novel framework that circumvents this trade-off by shifting adaptation from the weight space to the prompt space. DEA dynamically routes inference through different knowledge experts based on scene-specific cues, enhancing driving-task performance without corrupting the model's foundational parameters. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach not only achieves state-of-the-art results on driving tasks but also effectively mitigates catastrophic forgetting, preserving the essential generalization capabilities that make VLMs a transformative force for autonomous systems. Data and model are released at FidelityDrivingBench.

</details>


### [188] [InfBaGel: Human-Object-Scene Interaction Generation with Dynamic Perception and Iterative Refinement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04843)
*Yude Zou,Junji Gong,Xing Gao,Zixuan Li,Tianxing Chen,Guanjie Zheng*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于一致性模型的粗到细指令条件交互生成框架，通过动态感知策略和碰撞感知引导实现实时的人-物-场景交互生成，并设计了混合训练策略解决数据稀缺问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人-物-场景交互生成在具身AI、仿真和动画中有广泛应用，但相比人-物交互和人-场景交互，HOSI生成需要考虑动态的物-场景变化，且面临标注数据有限的问题。

Method: 1) 提出粗到细指令条件交互生成框架，与一致性模型的迭代去噪过程对齐；2) 采用动态感知策略，利用前一步精炼的轨迹更新场景上下文；3) 引入碰撞感知引导，减少物理伪影；4) 设计混合训练策略，通过将体素化场景占用注入HOI数据集合成伪HOSI样本，并与高保真HSI数据联合训练。

Result: 在HOSI和HOI生成任务上达到最先进性能，对未见场景具有强泛化能力，能够实现实时生成。

Conclusion: 该方法通过动态感知策略、碰撞感知引导和混合训练策略，有效解决了HOSI生成中的动态场景变化推理和数据稀缺问题，实现了高质量、实时的交互生成。

Abstract: Human-object-scene interactions (HOSI) generation has broad applications in embodied AI, simulation, and animation. Unlike human-object interaction (HOI) and human-scene interaction (HSI), HOSI generation requires reasoning over dynamic object-scene changes, yet suffers from limited annotated data. To address these issues, we propose a coarse-to-fine instruction-conditioned interaction generation framework that is explicitly aligned with the iterative denoising process of a consistency model. In particular, we adopt a dynamic perception strategy that leverages trajectories from the preceding refinement to update scene context and condition subsequent refinement at each denoising step of consistency model, yielding consistent interactions. To further reduce physical artifacts, we introduce a bump-aware guidance that mitigates collisions and penetrations during sampling without requiring fine-grained scene geometry, enabling real-time generation. To overcome data scarcity, we design a hybrid training startegy that synthesizes pseudo-HOSI samples by injecting voxelized scene occupancy into HOI datasets and jointly trains with high-fidelity HSI data, allowing interaction learning while preserving realistic scene awareness. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in both HOSI and HOI generation, and strong generalization to unseen scenes. Project page: https://yudezou.github.io/InfBaGel-page/

</details>


### [189] [Less Detail, Better Answers: Degradation-Driven Prompting for VQA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04838)
*Haoxuan Han,Weijie Wang,Zeyu Zhang,Yefei He,Bohan Zhuang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: DDP通过策略性降低图像保真度，迫使视觉语言模型关注本质结构信息，从而提升VQA性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高分辨率细节有时会成为噪声，导致幻觉或推理错误，需要让模型聚焦于关键结构信息

Method: 提出Degradation-Driven Prompting框架，包含两个任务：物理属性任务使用80%下采样、结构视觉辅助和白背景掩码；感知现象任务结合任务分类和模糊掩码、对比度增强等工具

Result: 实验证明"少即是多"：通过故意降低视觉输入并提供针对性结构提示，DDP使VLMs能够绕过分散注意力的纹理，在挑战性视觉基准上实现更优推理准确率

Conclusion: 策略性降低图像保真度并聚焦结构信息能有效提升VLM在VQA任务中的性能，减少幻觉和推理错误

Abstract: Recent advancements in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have significantly pushed the boundaries of Visual Question Answering (VQA).However,high-resolution details can sometimes become noise that leads to hallucinations or reasoning errors. In this paper,we propose Degradation-Driven Prompting (DDP), a novel framework that improves VQA performance by strategically reducing image fidelity to force models to focus on essential structural information. We evaluate DDP across two distinct tasks. Physical attributes targets images prone to human misjudgment, where DDP employs a combination of 80p downsampling, structural visual aids (white background masks and orthometric lines), and In-Context Learning (ICL) to calibrate the model's focus. Perceptual phenomena addresses various machine-susceptible visual anomalies and illusions, including Visual Anomaly (VA), Color (CI), Motion(MI),Gestalt (GI), Geometric (GSI), and Visual Illusions (VI).For this task, DDP integrates a task-classification stage with specialized tools such as blur masks and contrast enhancement alongside downsampling. Our experimental results demonstrate that less is more: by intentionally degrading visual inputs and providing targeted structural prompts, DDP enables VLMs to bypass distracting textures and achieve superior reasoning accuracy on challenging visual benchmarks.

</details>


### [190] [Multi-Modal Sensor Fusion using Hybrid Attention for Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04797)
*Mayank Mayank,Bharanidhar Duraisamy,Florian Geiß,Abhinav Valada*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MMF-BEV是一个用于自动驾驶的雷达-相机BEV融合框架，通过可变形注意力机制实现跨模态特征对齐，在VoD 4D雷达数据集上优于单模态基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动驾驶需要互补的传感器：相机提供密集语义但深度不可靠，毫米波雷达提供精确的距离和速度测量但几何稀疏。需要有效融合这两种模态以实现准确的3D目标检测。

Method: 提出MMF-BEV框架，包含BEVDepth相机分支和RadarBEVNet雷达分支，每个分支都增强可变形自注意力，通过可变形交叉注意力模块进行融合。采用两阶段训练策略：先用深度监督预训练相机分支，然后联合训练雷达和融合模块。

Result: 在VoD数据集上，MMF-BEV持续优于单模态基线方法，并在所有物体类别上（包括完整标注区域和近距感兴趣区域）与现有融合方法相比取得竞争性结果。传感器贡献分析提供了模态互补性的可解释证据。

Conclusion: MMF-BEV通过可变形注意力机制有效融合雷达和相机模态，证明了传感器互补性在3D目标检测中的重要性，为自动驾驶系统提供了稳健的多模态感知解决方案。

Abstract: Accurate 3D object detection for autonomous driving requires complementary sensors. Cameras provide dense semantics but unreliable depth, while millimeter-wave radar offers precise range and velocity measurements with sparse geometry. We propose MMF-BEV, a radar-camera BEV fusion framework that leverages deformable attention for cross-modal feature alignment on the View-of-Delft (VoD) 4D radar dataset [1]. MMF-BEV builds a BEVDepth [2] camera branch and a RadarBEVNet [3] radar branch, each enhanced with Deformable Self-Attention, and fuses them via a Deformable Cross-Attention module. We evaluate three configurations: camera-only, radar-only, and hybrid fusion. A sensor contribution analysis quantifies per-distance modality weighting, providing interpretable evidence of sensor complementarity. A two-stage training strategy - pre-training the camera branch with depth supervision, then jointly training radar and fusion modules stabilizes learning. Experiments on VoD show that MMF-BEV consistently outperforms unimodal baselines and achieves competitive results against prior fusion methods across all object classes in both the full annotated area and near-range Region of Interest.

</details>


### [191] [AvatarPointillist: AutoRegressive 4D Gaussian Avatarization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04787)
*Hongyu Liu,Xuan Wang,Yating Wang,Zijian Wu,Ziyu Wan,Yue Ma,Runtao Liu,Boyao Zhou,Yujun Shen,Qifeng Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: AvatarPointillist：基于单张肖像图像生成动态4D高斯化身的框架，采用自回归Transformer生成点云用于3D高斯泼溅，实现高质量、可动画的化身生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从单张肖像图像生成高质量、可动画的4D化身是一个具有挑战性的任务。现有方法在生成精度、动态调整能力和动画真实性方面存在局限，需要一种能够自适应构建、支持逼真动画的新范式。

Method: 1. 使用仅解码器Transformer自回归生成点云用于3D高斯泼溅；2. 序列化方法允许基于主体复杂度动态调整点密度和总点数；3. 在点生成过程中联合预测每点的绑定信息以支持动画；4. 专用高斯解码器将点转换为完整可渲染的高斯属性；5. 将解码器条件化于AR生成器的潜在特征以实现阶段间有效交互。

Result: 实验验证AvatarPointillist能够生成高质量、逼真且可控的化身。该方法在生成精度和动画真实性方面表现出色，自回归公式为化身生成提供了新范式。

Conclusion: AvatarPointillist通过自回归点云生成和条件化解码的协同设计，实现了从单张图像生成高质量动态4D高斯化身。该方法代表了化身生成的新范式，代码将开源以促进未来研究。

Abstract: We introduce AvatarPointillist, a novel framework for generating dynamic 4D Gaussian avatars from a single portrait image. At the core of our method is a decoder-only Transformer that autoregressively generates a point cloud for 3D Gaussian Splatting. This sequential approach allows for precise, adaptive construction, dynamically adjusting point density and the total number of points based on the subject's complexity. During point generation, the AR model also jointly predicts per-point binding information, enabling realistic animation. After generation, a dedicated Gaussian decoder converts the points into complete, renderable Gaussian attributes. We demonstrate that conditioning the decoder on the latent features from the AR generator enables effective interaction between stages and markedly improves fidelity. Extensive experiments validate that AvatarPointillist produces high-quality, photorealistic, and controllable avatars. We believe this autoregressive formulation represents a new paradigm for avatar generation, and we will release our code inspire future research.

</details>


### [192] [CLEAR: Unlocking Generative Potential for Degraded Image Understanding in Unified Multimodal Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04780)
*Xiangzhao Hao,Zefeng Zhang,Zhenyu Zhang,Linhao Yu,Yao Chen,Yiqian Zhang,Haiyun Guo,Shuohuan Wang,Yu Sun*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: CLEAR框架通过连接生成与推理能力，提升统一多模态模型在退化图像上的鲁棒性，同时保持干净图像性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实场景中的图像退化（模糊、噪声、压缩、光照不良）严重损害多模态理解。现有统一多模态模型虽然结合了理解和生成能力，但未能利用自身生成能力处理退化输入，主要因为训练机制从未要求模型在推理时调用生成，且标准的解码-重新编码路径不支持有效的联合优化。

Method: CLEAR框架包含三个渐进步骤：1）在退化感知数据集上进行监督微调，建立"先生成后回答"的推理模式；2）潜在表示桥接，用直接可优化的生成-推理连接替代解码-重新编码绕路；3）交错GRPO，在答案正确性奖励下联合优化文本推理和视觉生成的强化学习方法。构建了MMD-Bench基准，涵盖三个退化严重程度和六个标准多模态基准。

Result: 实验表明CLEAR显著提高了退化输入上的鲁棒性，同时保持了干净图像性能。分析进一步揭示，移除像素级重建监督会导致具有更高感知质量的中间视觉状态，表明任务驱动优化与视觉质量自然对齐。

Conclusion: CLEAR通过连接统一多模态模型的生成和推理能力，有效解决了退化图像理解问题。该方法不仅提升了模型在退化条件下的性能，还揭示了任务驱动优化与视觉质量的自然一致性，为多模态模型的鲁棒性改进提供了新思路。

Abstract: Image degradation from blur, noise, compression, and poor illumination severely undermines multimodal understanding in real-world settings. Unified multimodal models that combine understanding and generation within a single architecture are a natural fit for this challenge, as their generative pathway can model the fine-grained visual structure that degradation destroys. Yet these models fail to leverage their own generative capacity on degraded inputs. We trace this disconnect to two compounding factors: existing training regimes never ask the model to invoke generation during reasoning, and the standard decode-reencode pathway does not support effective joint optimization. We present CLEAR, a framework that connects the two capabilities through three progressive steps: (1) supervised fine-tuning on a degradation-aware dataset to establish the generate-then-answer reasoning pattern; (2) a Latent Representation Bridge that replaces the decode-reencode detour with a direct, optimizable connection between generation and reasoning; (3) Interleaved GRPO, a reinforcement learning method that jointly optimizes text reasoning and visual generation under answer-correctness rewards. We construct MMD-Bench, covering three degradation severity levels across six standard multimodal benchmarks. Experiments show that CLEAR substantially improves robustness on degraded inputs while preserving clean-image performance. Our analysis further reveals that removing pixel-level reconstruction supervision leads to intermediate visual states with higher perceptual quality, suggesting that task-driven optimization and visual quality are naturally aligned.

</details>


### [193] [MinerU2.5-Pro: Pushing the Limits of Data-Centric Document Parsing at Scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04771)
*Bin Wang,Tianyao He,Linke Ouyang,Fan Wu,Zhiyuan Zhao,Tao Chu,Yuan Qu,Zhenjiang Jin,Weijun Zeng,Ziyang Miao,Bangrui Xu,Junbo Niu,Mengzhang Cai,Jiantao Qiu,Qintong Zhang,Dongsheng Ma,Yuefeng Sun,Hejun Dong,Wenzheng Zhang,Jutao Xiao,Jiayong Shi,Pengyu Liao,Xiaomeng Zhao,Huaping Zhong,Liqun Wei,Jing Yu,Jie Yang,Wei Li,Shasha Wang,Qianqian Wu,Xuanhe Zhou,Weijia Li,Zhenxiang Li,Zhongying Tu,Jiang Wu,Lijun Wu,Chao Xu,Kai Chen,Wentao Zhang,Yu Qiao,Bowen Zhou,Dahua Lin,Conghui He*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MINERUPro通过数据工程和训练策略优化，在保持1.2B参数架构不变的情况下，将文档解析性能提升至SOTA水平，超越参数规模大200倍的模型


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前文档解析方法主要关注模型架构创新，而训练数据的系统工程研究不足。研究发现不同架构和参数规模的SOTA模型在相同困难样本上表现出一致的失败模式，表明性能瓶颈源于训练数据的共同缺陷而非架构本身

Method: 提出MINERUPro方法，核心是围绕覆盖率、信息量和标注准确性共同设计的数据引擎：1) 多样性和难度感知采样将训练数据从不足1000万扩展到6550万样本并纠正分布偏移；2) 跨模型一致性验证利用异构模型输出一致性评估样本难度并生成可靠标注；3) Judge-and-Refine管道通过渲染-验证迭代校正改进困难样本标注质量。采用三阶段渐进训练策略：大规模预训练、困难样本微调和GRPO对齐

Result: 在OmniDocBench v1.6评估协议上达到95.69分，相比相同架构基线提升2.71分，超越所有现有方法（包括参数规模大200倍以上的模型）。修复了OmniDocBench v1.5中的元素匹配偏差并引入Hard子集

Conclusion: 通过系统性数据工程和训练策略优化，可以在不改变模型架构的情况下显著提升文档解析性能，表明当前SOTA模型的瓶颈主要在于训练数据质量而非架构能力

Abstract: Current document parsing methods compete primarily on model architecture innovation, while systematic engineering of training data remains underexplored. Yet SOTA models of different architectures and parameter scales exhibit highly consistent failure patterns on the same set of hard samples, suggesting that the performance bottleneck stems from shared deficiencies in training data rather than architecture itself. Building on this finding, we present \minerupro, which advances the state of the art solely through data engineering and training strategy optimization while keeping the 1.2B-parameter architecture of \mineru completely fixed. At its core is a Data Engine co-designed around coverage, informativeness, and annotation accuracy: Diversity-and-Difficulty-Aware Sampling expands training data from under 10M to 65.5M samples while correcting distribution shift; Cross-Model Consistency Verification leverages output agreement among heterogeneous models to assess sample difficulty and generate reliable annotations; the Judge-and-Refine pipeline improves annotation quality for hard samples through render-then-verify iterative correction. A three-stage progressive training strategy -- large-scale pre-training, hard sample fine-tuning, and GRPO alignment -- sequentially exploits these data at different quality tiers. On the evaluation front, we fix element-matching biases in OmniDocBench~v1.5 and introduce a Hard subset, establishing the more discriminative OmniDocBench~v1.6 protocol. Without any architectural modification, \minerupro achieves 95.69 on OmniDocBench~v1.6, improving over the same-architecture baseline by 2.71 points and surpassing all existing methods including models with over 200$\times$ more parameters.

</details>


### [194] [Think in Strokes, Not Pixels: Process-Driven Image Generation via Interleaved Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04746)
*Lei Zhang,Junjiao Tian,Zhipeng Fan,Kunpeng Li,Jialiang Wang,Weifeng Chen,Markos Georgopoulos,Felix Juefei-Xu,Yuxiang Bao,Julian McAuley,Manling Li,Zecheng He*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出过程驱动的图像生成方法，通过多步迭代分解合成过程，包含文本规划、视觉草图、文本反思和视觉细化四个阶段，使生成过程显式、可解释且可监督。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类绘画是增量式的：先规划全局布局，绘制粗略草图，检查并细化细节，每个步骤都基于演化的视觉状态。然而，在文本-图像交错数据集上训练的统一多模态模型能否想象中间状态的链式过程？本文旨在探索这一过程驱动的图像生成范式。

Method: 提出过程驱动的图像生成方法，将合成分解为交错的思想和行动推理轨迹。每个迭代包含四个阶段：文本规划（决定视觉状态如何演化）、视觉草图（生成中间图像）、文本反思（评估部分完成的图像）、视觉细化（修正图像）。通过密集的逐步监督解决中间状态模糊性问题，对视觉中间状态强制执行空间和语义一致性，对文本中间状态保持先验视觉知识同时识别和修正违反提示的元素。

Result: 在多个文本到图像生成基准测试中进行了实验验证，证明了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 该方法使图像生成过程变得显式、可解释且可直接监督，实现了类似人类绘画的增量式生成过程。

Abstract: Humans paint images incrementally: they plan a global layout, sketch a coarse draft, inspect, and refine details, and most importantly, each step is grounded in the evolving visual states. However, can unified multimodal models trained on text-image interleaved datasets also imagine the chain of intermediate states? In this paper, we introduce process-driven image generation, a multi-step paradigm that decomposes synthesis into an interleaved reasoning trajectory of thoughts and actions. Rather than generating images in a single step, our approach unfolds across multiple iterations, each consisting of 4 stages: textual planning, visual drafting, textual reflection, and visual refinement. The textual reasoning explicitly conditions how the visual state should evolve, while the generated visual intermediate in turn constrains and grounds the next round of textual reasoning. A core challenge of process-driven generation stems from the ambiguity of intermediate states: how can models evaluate each partially-complete image? We address this through dense, step-wise supervision that maintains two complementary constraints: for the visual intermediate states, we enforce the spatial and semantic consistency; for the textual intermediate states, we preserve the prior visual knowledge while enabling the model to identify and correct prompt-violating elements. This makes the generation process explicit, interpretable, and directly supervisable. To validate proposed method, we conduct experiments under various text-to-image generation benchmarks.

</details>


### [195] [Discovering Failure Modes in Vision-Language Models using RL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04733)
*Kanishk Jain,Qian Yang,Shravan Nayak,Parisa Kordjamshidi,Nishanth Anand,Aishwarya Agrawal*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出基于强化学习的框架自动发现视觉语言模型的失败模式，无需人工干预即可识别模型在特定视觉概念上的盲点


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉语言模型虽然在多模态基准测试中表现良好，但经常误解人类轻松识别的基本视觉概念（如计数、空间推理、视角理解）。现有研究通过人工识别这些弱点，但这种方法成本高、不可扩展且存在人为偏见，往往忽略细微细节而关注显著对象，导致对模型漏洞的理解不完整。

Method: 提出基于强化学习的框架，训练提问者智能体根据候选VLM的响应自适应生成查询以引出错误答案。该方法通过关注细粒度视觉细节和不同技能组合来逐步增加问题复杂度，从而自动发现模型的失败模式。

Result: 该方法成功识别了36种新的失败模式，在这些模式下VLMs表现困难。框架展示了跨不同模型组合的广泛适用性和泛化能力。

Conclusion: 提出的强化学习框架能够自动、系统地发现视觉语言模型的盲点和失败模式，克服了人工识别方法的局限性，为全面评估和改进模型性能提供了有效工具。

Abstract: Vision-language Models (VLMs), despite achieving strong performance on multimodal benchmarks, often misinterpret straightforward visual concepts that humans identify effortlessly, such as counting, spatial reasoning, and viewpoint understanding. Previous studies manually identified these weaknesses and found that they often stem from deficits in specific skills. However, such manual efforts are costly, unscalable, and subject to human bias, which often overlooks subtle details in favor of salient objects, resulting in an incomplete understanding of a model's vulnerabilities. To address these limitations, we propose a Reinforcement Learning (RL)-based framework to automatically discover the failure modes or blind spots of any candidate VLM on a given data distribution without human intervention. Our framework trains a questioner agent that adaptively generates queries based on the candidate VLM's responses to elicit incorrect answers. Our approach increases question complexity by focusing on fine-grained visual details and distinct skill compositions as training progresses, consequently identifying 36 novel failure modes in which VLMs struggle. We demonstrate the broad applicability of our framework by showcasing its generalizability across various model combinations.

</details>


### [196] [Don't Waste Bits! Adaptive KV-Cache Quantization for Lightweight On-Device LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04722)
*Sayed Pedram Haeri Boroujeni,Niloufar Mehrabi,Patrick Woods,Gabriel Hillesheim,Abolfazl Razi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出自适应KV缓存量化方法，通过轻量级控制器动态分配KV缓存的位宽（2/4/8/FP16位），根据token重要性分配不同精度，在减少内存和延迟的同时保持接近FP16的推理精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在移动和边缘设备上部署面临KV缓存的内存和带宽瓶颈，现有固定精度量化方案浪费比特在低重要性token上，同时过度压缩高重要性token，导致不必要的精度损失。

Method: 提取token级特征（频率、质量分数、注意力方差、基于熵的不确定性），输入紧凑的数据驱动控制器，在解码过程中动态选择KV精度（2/4/8/FP16位），实现自适应位宽分配。

Result: 在SmolLM系列模型（135M/360M/1.7B）上验证，相比静态KV量化，在HellaSwag上降低解码延迟17.75%，提升精度7.60点，仅比FP16推理低0.30点，改善了精度-延迟权衡。

Conclusion: 自适应KV缓存量化通过动态位宽分配有效解决了KV缓存的内存带宽瓶颈，在保持接近FP16精度的同时显著减少内存占用和延迟，为边缘设备部署LLM提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable progress across reasoning, generation, and decision-making tasks, yet deploying them on mobile, embedded, and edge devices remains particularly challenging. On-device LLM inference is heavily constrained by the memory and bandwidth overhead of the key-value (KV) cache, which grows linearly with context length and often dominates decoding cost. Existing KV-cache quantization schemes typically rely on fixed precision or hand-crafted heuristics, thereby wasting bits on low-impact tokens while over-compressing informative ones, leading to avoidable accuracy degradation. Inspired by Huffman coding's principle of variable-length allocation, we propose adaptive KV-cache quantization, a learned policy that assigns bit-width proportional to token importance, minimizing expected memory and latency without sacrificing competitive accuracy. Our framework extracts lightweight token-level features, including token frequency, quality score, attention variance, and entropy-based uncertainty, and feeds them into a compact data-driven controller that dynamically selects KV precision from {2-bit, 4-bit, 8-bit, FP16} during decoding. This adaptive precision policy reduces KV memory footprint and latency while improving accuracy compared to static KV quantization and rule-based baselines, and maintaining competitive accuracy close to FP16 inference across standard LLM benchmarks. Extensive experiments across multiple commonsense reasoning benchmarks using SmolLM-135M, SmolLM-360M, and SmolLM-1.7B demonstrate that our controller consistently improves the accuracy-latency trade-off. For instance, with SmolLM-360M on HellaSwag, our method reduces decoding latency (ms/token) by 17.75% relative to static KV quantization, improves accuracy by 7.60 points, and remains within only 0.30 points of FP16 inference.

</details>


### [197] [OpenWorldLib: A Unified Codebase and Definition of Advanced World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04707)
*DataFlow Team,Bohan Zeng,Daili Hua,Kaixin Zhu,Yifan Dai,Bozhou Li,Yuran Wang,Chengzhuo Tong,Yifan Yang,Mingkun Chang,Jianbin Zhao,Zhou Liu,Hao Liang,Xiaochen Ma,Ruichuan An,Junbo Niu,Zimo Meng,Tianyi Bai,Meiyi Qiang,Huanyao Zhang,Zhiyou Xiao,Tianyu Guo,Qinhan Yu,Runhao Zhao,Zhengpin Li,Xinyi Huang,Yisheng Pan,Yiwen Tang,Yang Shi,Yue Ding,Xinlong Chen,Hongcheng Gao,Minglei Shi,Jialong Wu,Zekun Wang,Yuanxing Zhang,Xintao Wang,Pengfei Wan,Yiren Song,Mike Zheng Shou,Wentao Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: OpenWorldLib是一个标准化的先进世界模型推理框架，提出了世界模型的明确定义，并系统分类了其核心能力，旨在实现跨任务模型的统一集成和高效推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 世界模型作为人工智能的重要研究方向，目前缺乏清晰统一的定义，导致研究进展受限。作者旨在通过建立标准化的框架来明确世界模型的概念，促进该领域的系统化发展。

Method: 提出世界模型的新定义：以感知为中心、具备交互和长期记忆能力的模型或框架，用于理解和预测复杂世界。在此基础上，系统分类世界模型的核心能力，并构建OpenWorldLib框架，集成不同任务的模型实现统一推理。

Result: 开发了OpenWorldLib框架，实现了跨任务世界模型的统一集成和高效协同推理。该框架提供了标准化接口，支持模型复用和协作推理。

Conclusion: 通过明确世界模型定义和构建标准化框架，为世界模型研究提供了统一的理论基础和实践工具，并展望了未来研究方向，有望推动该领域的系统化发展。

Abstract: World models have garnered significant attention as a promising research direction in artificial intelligence, yet a clear and unified definition remains lacking. In this paper, we introduce OpenWorldLib, a comprehensive and standardized inference framework for Advanced World Models. Drawing on the evolution of world models, we propose a clear definition: a world model is a model or framework centered on perception, equipped with interaction and long-term memory capabilities, for understanding and predicting the complex world. We further systematically categorize the essential capabilities of world models. Based on this definition, OpenWorldLib integrates models across different tasks within a unified framework, enabling efficient reuse and collaborative inference. Finally, we present additional reflections and analyses on potential future directions for world model research. Code link: https://github.com/OpenDCAI/OpenWorldLib

</details>


### [198] [3D Gaussian Splatting for Annular Dark Field Scanning Transmission Electron Microscopy Tomography Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04693)
*Beiyuan Zhang,Hesong Li,Ruiwen Shao,Ying Fu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出DenZa-Gaussian方法，通过3D高斯溅射技术改进稀疏视角ADF-STEM断层扫描，解决了传统方法在有限视角下的重建质量下降问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ADF-STEM断层扫描需要多视角倾斜系列图像进行3D重建，但增加视角会延长电子束暴露时间，对剂量敏感材料造成损伤，并引入漂移和错位问题。稀疏视角采集在实际中经常需要，但传统ADF-STEM方法在有限视角下性能下降，产生伪影并降低结构保真度。

Method: 论文将3D高斯溅射技术（3D GS）适配到ADF-STEM领域，包含三个关键组件：1）将局部散射强度建模为可学习的标量场denza，解决3DGS与ADF-STEM成像物理不匹配问题；2）引入系数γ稳定不同倾斜角度的散射，通过散射视角归一化确保denza一致性；3）包含2D傅里叶振幅项的损失函数，抑制稀疏视角重建中的缺失楔形伪影。

Result: 在45视角和15视角倾斜系列上的实验表明，DenZa-Gaussian能够产生高保真度的重建结果和2D投影，与原始倾斜图像更吻合，在稀疏视角条件下表现出优越的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: DenZa-Gaussian方法成功解决了ADF-STEM断层扫描中稀疏视角重建的挑战，通过物理感知的3D高斯溅射技术实现了高质量3D重建，平衡了重建保真度与样品保护的需求。

Abstract: Analytical Dark Field Scanning Transmission Electron Microscopy (ADF-STEM) tomography reconstructs nanoscale materials in 3D by integrating multi-view tilt-series images, enabling precise analysis of their structural and compositional features. Although integrating more tilt views improves 3D reconstruction, it requires extended electron exposure that risks damaging dose-sensitive materials and introduces drift and misalignment, making it difficult to balance reconstruction fidelity with sample preservation. In practice, sparse-view acquisition is frequently required, yet conventional ADF-STEM methods degrade under limited views, exhibiting artifacts and reduced structural fidelity. To resolve these issues, in this paper, we adapt 3D GS to this domain with three key components. We first model the local scattering strength as a learnable scalar field, denza, to address the mismatch between 3DGS and ADF-STEM imaging physics. Then we introduce a coefficient $γ$ to stabilize scattering across tilt angles, ensuring consistent denza via scattering view normalization. Finally, We incorporate a loss function that includes a 2D Fourier amplitude term to suppress missing wedge artifacts in sparse-view reconstruction. Experiments on 45-view and 15-view tilt series show that DenZa-Gaussian produces high-fidelity reconstructions and 2D projections that align more closely with original tilts, demonstrating superior robustness under sparse-view conditions.

</details>


### [199] [Synthesis4AD: Synthetic Anomalies are All You Need for 3D Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04658)
*Yihan Sun,Yuqi Cheng,Junjie Zu,Yuxiang Tan,Guoyang Xie,Yucheng Wang,Yunkang Cao,Weiming Shen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Synthesis4AD：利用大规模高保真合成异常进行3D异常检测的端到端范式，通过3D-DefectStudio平台和MPAS引擎生成几何真实的缺陷，结合MLLM解释产品设计信息自动生成异常合成指令，并通过空间分布归一化和几何忠实数据增强提升检测器性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业3D异常检测性能受到异常样本稀缺和长尾分布的根本限制，需要解决数据不足的问题以学习更具判别性的表示。

Method: 1. 构建3D-DefectStudio平台，基于MPAS可控合成引擎注入几何真实的缺陷；2. 利用多模态大语言模型解释产品设计信息并自动生成异常合成指令；3. 引入基于空间分布归一化和几何忠实数据增强的训练流程，减轻Point Transformer架构对绝对坐标的敏感性。

Result: 在Real3D-AD、MulSen-AD和真实工业零件数据集上的广泛实验展示了最先进的性能，MPAS合成方法和3D-DefectStudio交互系统将公开发布。

Conclusion: Synthesis4AD通过大规模高保真合成异常有效解决了工业3D异常检测中的数据稀缺问题，实现了可扩展的知识驱动异常数据生成，显著提升了检测器的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

Abstract: Industrial 3D anomaly detection performance is fundamentally constrained by the scarcity and long-tailed distribution of abnormal samples. To address this challenge, we propose Synthesis4AD, an end-to-end paradigm that leverages large-scale, high-fidelity synthetic anomalies to learn more discriminative representations for 3D anomaly detection. At the core of Synthesis4AD is 3D-DefectStudio, a software platform built upon the controllable synthesis engine MPAS, which injects geometrically realistic defects guided by higher-dimensional support primitives while simultaneously generating accurate point-wise anomaly masks. Furthermore, Synthesis4AD incorporates a multimodal large language model (MLLM) to interpret product design information and automatically translate it into executable anomaly synthesis instructions, enabling scalable and knowledge-driven anomalous data generation. To improve the robustness and generalization of the downstream detector on unstructured point clouds, Synthesis4AD further introduces a training pipeline based on spatial-distribution normalization and geometry-faithful data augmentations, which alleviates the sensitivity of Point Transformer architectures to absolute coordinates and improves feature learning under realistic data variations. Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on Real3D-AD, MulSen-AD, and a real-world industrial parts dataset. The proposed synthesis method MPAS and the interactive system 3D-DefectStudio will be publicly released at https://github.com/hustCYQ/Synthesis4AD.

</details>


### [200] [Training-Free Refinement of Flow Matching with Divergence-based Sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04646)
*Yeonwoo Cha,Jaehoon Yoo,Semin Kim,Yunseo Park,Jinhyeon Kwon,Seunghoon Hong*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Flow Divergence Sampler (FDS) 是一种无需训练的框架，通过计算边际速度场的散度来量化样本间速度冲突，并在每个求解步骤前优化中间状态，从而提升流模型的生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 流模型通过建模边际速度场来学习目标分布，但当不同样本的速度在相同中间状态发生冲突时，平均速度会将样本导向低密度区域，导致生成质量下降。需要解决这种速度冲突问题。

Method: 提出Flow Divergence Sampler (FDS)框架，核心发现是速度冲突的严重程度可以通过边际速度场的散度来量化。FDS利用这一信号在推理过程中引导中间状态朝向冲突较少的区域，作为即插即用模块与标准求解器和预训练流模型兼容。

Result: FDS在各种生成任务中一致提升了生成质量，包括文本到图像合成和逆问题求解，证明了其有效性和通用性。

Conclusion: FDS通过量化边际速度场的散度来检测和缓解样本间速度冲突，提供了一种无需训练的方法来提升流模型的生成质量，具有广泛的适用性。

Abstract: Flow-based models learn a target distribution by modeling a marginal velocity field, defined as the average of sample-wise velocities connecting each sample from a simple prior to the target data. When sample-wise velocities conflict at the same intermediate state, however, this averaged velocity can misguide samples toward low-density regions, degrading generation quality. To address this issue, we propose the Flow Divergence Sampler (FDS), a training-free framework that refines intermediate states before each solver step. Our key finding reveals that the severity of this misguidance is quantified by the divergence of the marginal velocity field that is readily computable during inference with a well-optimized model. FDS exploits this signal to steer states toward less ambiguous regions. As a plug-and-play framework compatible with standard solvers and off-the-shelf flow backbones, FDS consistently improves fidelity across various generation tasks including text-to-image synthesis, and inverse problems.

</details>


### [201] [Preserving Forgery Artifacts: AI-Generated Video Detection at Native Scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04634)
*Zhengcen Li,Chenyang Jiang,Hang Zhao,Shiyang Zhou,Yunyang Mo,Feng Gao,Fan Yang,Qiben Shan,Shaocong Wu,Jingyong Su*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出针对AI生成视频检测的新数据集和框架，解决现有方法因预处理导致高频伪造痕迹丢失的问题，通过原生尺度处理提升检测性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视频生成模型的快速发展导致高度逼真的合成媒体出现，引发虚假信息传播的社会担忧。现有检测方法存在关键局限：依赖固定分辨率调整和裁剪等预处理操作，这些操作不仅丢弃了微妙的高频伪造痕迹，还导致空间扭曲和显著信息丢失。此外，现有方法通常在过时数据集上训练和评估，无法捕捉现代生成模型的复杂性。

Method: 提出综合数据集和新型检测框架：1) 构建大规模数据集，包含来自15个最先进开源和商业生成器的超过140K视频，以及专门用于评估超逼真合成内容的Magic Videos基准；2) 提出基于Qwen2.5-VL Vision Transformer的新型检测框架，该框架原生支持可变空间分辨率和时间长度，这种原生尺度方法有效保留了传统预处理中通常丢失的高频伪影和时空不一致性。

Result: 大量实验表明，该方法在多个基准测试中实现了卓越性能，强调了原生尺度处理的关键重要性，并为AI生成视频检测建立了强大的新基准。

Conclusion: 通过引入大规模数据集和原生尺度检测框架，解决了现有AI生成视频检测方法的关键局限性，为应对日益复杂的合成媒体挑战提供了更有效的解决方案，强调了保留高频伪造痕迹和时空不一致性对于准确检测的重要性。

Abstract: The rapid advancement of video generation models has enabled the creation of highly realistic synthetic media, raising significant societal concerns regarding the spread of misinformation. However, current detection methods suffer from critical limitations. They rely on preprocessing operations like fixed-resolution resizing and cropping. These operations not only discard subtle, high-frequency forgery traces but also cause spatial distortion and significant information loss. Furthermore, existing methods are often trained and evaluated on outdated datasets that fail to capture the sophistication of modern generative models. To address these challenges, we introduce a comprehensive dataset and a novel detection framework. First, we curate a large-scale dataset of over 140K videos from 15 state-of-the-art open-source and commercial generators, along with Magic Videos benchmark designed specifically for evaluating ultra-realistic synthetic content. In addition, we propose a novel detection framework built on the Qwen2.5-VL Vision Transformer, which operates natively at variable spatial resolutions and temporal durations. This native-scale approach effectively preserves the high-frequency artifacts and spatiotemporal inconsistencies typically lost during conventional preprocessing. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance across multiple benchmarks, underscoring the critical importance of native-scale processing and establishing a robust new baseline for AI-generated video detection.

</details>


### [202] [InCTRLv2: Generalist Residual Models for Few-Shot Anomaly Detection and Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04632)
*Jiawen Zhu,Mengjia Niu,Guansong Pang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: InCTRLv2是一个新颖的少样本通用异常检测与分割框架，通过双分支架构结合判别式和单类异常评分学习，利用视觉-语言语义先验实现跨域异常检测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有异常检测方法多为针对特定领域的专家模型，需要大量目标数据集训练，难以泛化到未见数据集。通用异常检测范式旨在学习单一通用模型，无需重新训练即可跨域检测异常。

Method: 在InCTRL基础上构建双分支框架：1) 主分支使用判别式异常评分学习，利用正常和异常数据学习语义引导的异常/正常空间；2) 辅助分支使用单类异常评分学习，仅用正常数据学习语义空间中的广义正常模式。两分支均受大规模视觉-语言模型编码的丰富视觉-文本语义先验指导。

Result: 在十个异常检测数据集上的广泛实验表明，InCTRLv2在各种设置下实现了最先进的异常检测和分割性能。

Conclusion: InCTRLv2通过双分支架构提供异常感知的互补视角，结合判别式和单类学习方法，利用视觉-语言语义先验，为通用异常检测提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: While recent anomaly detection (AD) methods have made substantial progress in recognizing abnormal patterns within specific domains, most of them are specialist models that are trained on large training samples from a specific target dataset, struggling to generalize to unseen datasets. To address this limitation, the paradigm of Generalist Anomaly Detection (GAD) has emerged in recent years, aiming to learn a single generalist model to detect anomalies across diverse domains without retraining. To this end, this work introduces InCTRLv2, a novel few-shot Generalist Anomaly Detection and Segmentation (GADS) framework that significantly extends our previously proposed GAD model, InCTRL. Building on the idea of learning in-context residuals with few-shot normal examples to detect anomalies as in InCTRL, InCTRLv2 introduces two new, complementary perspectives of anomaly perception under a dual-branch framework. This is accomplished by two novel modules upon InCTRL: i) Discriminative Anomaly Score Learning (DASL) with both normal and abnormal data in the main branch, which learns a semantic-guided abnormality and normality space that supports the classification of query samples from both the abnormality and normality perspectives; and ii) One-class Anomaly Score Learning (OASL) using only the normal data, which learns generalized normality patterns in a semantic space via an auxiliary branch, focusing on detecting anomalies through the lens of normality solely. Both branches are guided by rich visual-text semantic priors encoded by large-scale vision-language models. Together, they offer a dual semantic perspective for AD: one emphasizes normal-abnormal discriminations, while the other emphasizes normality-deviated semantics. Extensive experiments on ten AD datasets demonstrate that InCTRLv2 achieves SotA performance in both anomaly detection and segmentation tasks across various settings.

</details>


### [203] [Multimodal Backdoor Attack on VLMs for Autonomous Driving via Graffiti and Cross-Lingual Triggers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04630)
*Jiancheng Wang,Lidan Liang,Yong Wang,Zengzhen Su,Haifeng Xia,Yuanting Yan,Wei Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: GLA提出了一种针对自动驾驶视觉语言模型的新型后门攻击方法，使用涂鸦式视觉触发器和跨语言文本触发器，在低污染率下实现高攻击成功率，同时保持模型在干净任务上的性能甚至有所提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有后门攻击主要依赖单模态、显式且易检测的触发器，难以在自动驾驶场景中构建隐蔽且稳定的攻击通道。自动驾驶视觉语言模型作为安全关键系统的重要组成部分，其安全威胁被低估。

Method: GLA引入两种自然主义触发器：1）通过稳定扩散修复生成的涂鸦式视觉模式，无缝融入城市场景；2）跨语言文本触发器，在保持语义一致性的同时引入分布偏移，构建鲁棒的语言侧触发信号。

Result: 在DriveVLM上的实验表明，GLA仅需10%的污染率即可达到90%的攻击成功率（ASR）和0%的误报率（FPR）。后门不会削弱模型在干净任务上的性能，反而提升了BLEU-1等指标，使传统基于性能下降的检测方法难以识别攻击。

Conclusion: 该研究揭示了自动驾驶视觉语言模型中低估的安全威胁，为安全关键多模态系统中的后门评估提供了新的攻击范式。

Abstract: Visual language model (VLM) is rapidly being integrated into safety-critical systems such as autonomous driving, making it an important attack surface for potential backdoor attacks. Existing backdoor attacks mainly rely on unimodal, explicit, and easily detectable triggers, making it difficult to construct both covert and stable attack channels in autonomous driving scenarios. GLA introduces two naturalistic triggers: graffiti-based visual patterns generated via stable diffusion inpainting, which seamlessly blend into urban scenes, and cross-language text triggers, which introduce distributional shifts while maintaining semantic consistency to build robust language-side trigger signals. Experiments on DriveVLM show that GLA requires only a 10\% poisoning ratio to achieve a 90\% Attack Success Rate (ASR) and a 0\% False Positive Rate (FPR). More insidiously, the backdoor does not weaken the model on clean tasks, but instead improves metrics such as BLEU-1, making it difficult for traditional performance-degradation-based detection methods to identify the attack. This study reveals underestimated security threats in self-driving VLMs and provides a new attack paradigm for backdoor evaluation in safety-critical multimodal systems.

</details>


### [204] [No-reference based automatic parameter optimization for iterative reconstruction using a novel search space aware crow search algorithm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06246)
*Poorya MohammadiNasab,Ander Biguri,Philipp Steininger,Peter Keuschnigg,Lukas Lamminger,Agnieszka Lach,S M Ragib Shahriar Islam,Anna Breger,Clemens Karner,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb,Wolfgang Birkfellner,Sepideh Hatamikia*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于CBCT迭代重建算法的全自动参数优化框架，采用改进的乌鸦搜索算法和混沌对角线性均匀初始化方案，无需参考重建即可确定最优参数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 迭代重建技术能够通过减少投影数量来降低辐射暴露，但通常需要精确调整多个超参数，这些参数对重建质量有重大影响。手动设置这些参数耗时且增加操作人员工作量。

Method: 提出全自动参数优化框架，包含改进的乌鸦搜索算法（具有优越的集合依赖局部搜索机制、搜索空间感知的全局搜索策略、目标驱动的局部-全局搜索平衡）和混沌对角线性均匀初始化方案以加速收敛。

Result: 在三种成像设备和四个真实数据集上评估，结果表明该方法优于手动设置和原始CSA，平均适应度提高4.19%，在CHILL@UK和RPI_AXIS两个无参考学习质量指标上分别提高4.89%和3.82%。定性结果显示能保持精细细节。

Conclusion: 提出的框架在不同比较场景中表现出有效性和鲁棒性，能够自动优化CBCT迭代重建参数，提高重建质量并减少人工干预。

Abstract: Iterative reconstruction technique's ability to reduce radiation exposure by using fewer projections has attracted significant attention. However, these methods typically require a precise tuning of several hyperparameters, which can have a major impact on reconstruction quality. Manually setting these parameters is time-consuming and increases the workload for human operators. In this paper, we introduce a novel fully automatic parameter optimization framework that can be applied to a wide range of Cone-beam computed tomography (CBCT) iterative reconstruction algorithms to determine optimal parameters without requiring a reference reconstruction. The proposed method incorporates a modified crow search algorithm (CSA) featuring a superior set-dependent local search mechanism, a search-space-aware global search strategy, and an objective-driven balance between local and global search. Additionally, to ensure an effective initial population, we propose a chaotic diagonal linear uniform initialization scheme that accelerates algorithm convergence. The performance of the proposed framework was evaluated on three imaging machines and four real datasets, as well as three different iterative reconstruction methods with the highest number of tunable parameters, representing the most challenging senario. The results indicate that the proposed method could outperform manual settings and CSA, with an 4.19% improvement in average fitness and 4.89% and 3.82% improvements on CHILL@UK and RPI_AXIS, respectively, which are two benchmark no-reference learning-based quality metrics. In addition, the qualitative results clearly show the superiority of the proposed method by maintaining fine details sharply. The overall performance of the proposed framework across different comparison scenarios demonstrates its effectiveness and robustness across all cases.

</details>


### [205] [Beyond Semantics: Uncovering the Physics of Fakes via Universal Physical Descriptors for Cross-Modal Synthetic Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04608)
*Mei Qiu,Jianqiang Zhao,Yanyun Qu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于物理特征的AIGC检测方法，通过分析15种物理特征并筛选出5种核心特征，将其与CLIP模型结合，在多个生成图像检测基准上取得了接近完美的准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度伪造检测器通常过度拟合特定生成模型，无法适应快速发展的AIGC技术。需要重新审视区分自然图像与AI生成图像的内在物理特征，并探索如何将这些客观像素级特征整合到多模态模型中以提高检测性能。

Method: 1) 对15种物理特征在20多个由GAN和扩散模型生成的数据集上进行全面探索；2) 提出新颖的特征选择算法，识别出5种具有一致判别能力的核心物理特征（拉普拉斯方差、Sobel统计量、残差噪声方差等）；3) 将这些特征转换为文本编码值，与语义描述结合，指导CLIP中的图像-文本表示学习。

Result: 该方法在多个Genimage基准测试中取得了最先进的性能，在Wukong和SDv1.4等数据集上达到接近完美的准确率（99.8%）。通过将像素级真实性与语义理解相结合，为可信的视觉语言建模开辟了新方向。

Conclusion: 该研究首次将物理基础特征用于可信的视觉语言建模，通过桥接像素级真实性与语义理解，为解决大型多模态模型中的幻觉和文本不准确问题开辟了新方向，为AIGC检测提供了稳定可靠的解决方案。

Abstract: The rapid advancement of AI generated content (AIGC) has blurred the boundaries between real and synthetic images, exposing the limitations of existing deepfake detectors that often overfit to specific generative models. This adaptability crisis calls for a fundamental reexamination of the intrinsic physical characteristics that distinguish natural from AI-generated images. In this paper, we address two critical research questions: (1) What physical features can stably and robustly discriminate AI generated images across diverse datasets and generative architectures? (2) Can these objective pixel-level features be integrated into multimodal models like CLIP to enhance detection performance while mitigating the unreliability of language-based information? To answer these questions, we conduct a comprehensive exploration of 15 physical features across more than 20 datasets generated by various GANs and diffusion models. We propose a novel feature selection algorithm that identifies five core physical features including Laplacian variance, Sobel statistics, and residual noise variance that exhibit consistent discriminative power across all tested datasets. These features are then converted into text encoded values and integrated with semantic captions to guide image text representation learning in CLIP. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple Genimage benchmarks, with near-perfect accuracy (99.8%) on datasets such as Wukong and SDv1.4. By bridging pixel level authenticity with semantic understanding, this work pioneers the use of physically grounded features for trustworthy vision language modeling and opens new directions for mitigating hallucinations and textual inaccuracies in large multimodal models.

</details>


### [206] [Firebolt-VL: Efficient Vision-Language Understanding with Cross-Modality Modulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04579)
*Quoc-Huy Trinh,Mustapha Abdullahi,Bo Zhao,Debesh Jha*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Firebolt-VL：一种高效视觉语言模型，用液态基础模型解码器替代Transformer，通过Token-Grid相关性模块增强视觉定位，实现线性时间推理和细粒度理解


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型计算成本高，难以部署到资源受限场景；现有方法依赖Transformer交叉注意力，二次复杂度影响效率；小规模视觉语言模型难以精确捕捉细粒度视觉区域，导致细粒度推理任务性能下降

Method: 1. 用液态基础模型解码器替代Transformer解码器；2. 提出Token-Grid相关性模块，计算文本token与图像patch的轻量级相关性；3. 通过状态空间模型和FiLM条件进行调制，选择性强调与文本提示相关的视觉区域；4. 实现线性时间推理

Result: 在多个基准测试中，Firebolt-VL实现了准确、细粒度的理解，同时显著提升了效率

Conclusion: Firebolt-VL通过创新的架构设计解决了现有视觉语言模型的效率和细粒度理解问题，为资源受限场景提供了可行的解决方案

Abstract: Recent advances in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have enabled impressive progress in vision-language understanding, yet their high computational cost limits deployment in resource-constrained scenarios such as personal assistants, document understanding, and smart cameras. Most existing methods rely on Transformer-based cross-attention, whose quadratic complexity hinders efficiency. Moreover, small vision-language models often struggle to precisely capture fine-grained, task-relevant visual regions, leading to degraded performance on fine-grained reasoning tasks that limit their effectiveness in the real world. To address these issues, we introduce Firebolt-VL, an efficient vision-language model that replaces the Transformer-based decoder with a Liquid Foundation Model (LFM) decoder. To further enhance visual grounding, we propose a Token-Grid Correlation Module, which computes lightweight correlations between text tokens and image patches and modulates via the state-space model with FiLM conditioning. This enables the model to selectively emphasize visual regions relevant to the textual prompt while maintaining linear-time inference. Experimental results across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that Firebolt-VL achieves accurate, fine-grained understanding with significantly improved efficiency. Our model and code are available at: https://fireboltvl.github.io

</details>


### [207] [PR-IQA: Partial-Reference Image Quality Assessment for Diffusion-Based Novel View Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04576)
*Inseong Choi,Siwoo Lee,Seung-Hun Nam,Soohwan Song*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出PR-IQA框架，用于评估扩散模型生成的稀疏视角新视图，无需真实标签，通过部分质量图和跨注意力完成机制实现跨视角一致性评估，提升3D高斯溅射重建质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型可用于稀疏视角新视图合成，为3D高斯溅射等重建管道生成伪真实视图，但生成的图像存在光度学和几何不一致性，直接用于监督会损害重建质量，需要一种无需真实标签的质量评估方法。

Method: 提出部分参考图像质量评估（PR-IQA）框架：1）在重叠区域计算几何一致的部分质量图；2）通过跨注意力机制结合参考视图上下文，将部分质量图补全为密集的全图像质量图；3）在扩散增强的3DGS管道中，仅使用高质量置信区域进行监督。

Result: PR-IQA在无需真实监督的情况下达到全参考级别的准确性，优于现有IQA方法。质量感知的3DGS方法能更有效过滤不一致性，产生更优的3D重建和新视图合成结果。

Conclusion: PR-IQA框架通过部分参考评估扩散生成视图的质量，无需真实标签，结合跨注意力完成机制确保跨视角一致性，显著提升3D高斯溅射的重建质量和新视图合成效果。

Abstract: Diffusion models are promising for sparse-view novel view synthesis (NVS), as they can generate pseudo-ground-truth views to aid 3D reconstruction pipelines like 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS). However, these synthesized images often contain photometric and geometric inconsistencies, and their direct use for supervision can impair reconstruction. To address this, we propose Partial-Reference Image Quality Assessment (PR-IQA), a framework that evaluates diffusion-generated views using reference images from different poses, eliminating the need for ground truth. PR-IQA first computes a geometrically consistent partial quality map in overlapping regions. It then performs quality completion to inpaint this partial map into a dense, full-image map. This completion is achieved via a cross-attention mechanism that incorporates reference-view context, ensuring cross-view consistency and enabling thorough quality assessment. When integrated into a diffusion-augmented 3DGS pipeline, PR-IQA restricts supervision to high-confidence regions identified by its quality maps. Experiments demonstrate that PR-IQA outperforms existing IQA methods, achieving full-reference-level accuracy without ground-truth supervision. Thus, our quality-aware 3DGS approach more effectively filters inconsistencies, producing superior 3D reconstructions and NVS results. The project page is available at https://kakaomacao.github.io/pr-iqa-project-page/.

</details>


### [208] [Erasure or Erosion? Evaluating Compositional Degradation in Unlearned Text-To-Image Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04575)
*Arian Komaei Koma,Seyed Amir Kasaei,Ali Aghayari,AmirMahdi Sadeghzadeh,Mohammad Hossein Rohban*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 系统评估文本到图像扩散模型概念遗忘方法，发现遗忘效果与组合生成能力之间存在显著权衡


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究主要关注概念遗忘的擦除效果，但对遗忘如何影响模型的整体生成能力缺乏深入理解，需要系统评估遗忘方法在组合生成任务中的表现

Method: 以Stable Diffusion 1.4中的裸露内容移除为案例，使用T2I-CompBench++和GenEval等组合生成基准，系统评估多种最先进的概念遗忘方法，同时结合传统遗忘评估指标

Result: 发现遗忘效果与组合完整性之间存在一致权衡：强擦除方法显著损害属性绑定、空间推理和计数能力；而保持组合结构的方法往往无法提供鲁棒的擦除效果

Conclusion: 当前评估方法存在局限性，需要开发能够明确考虑语义保留的遗忘目标，而不仅仅是目标抑制

Abstract: Post-hoc unlearning has emerged as a practical mechanism for removing undesirable concepts from large text-to-image diffusion models. However, prior work primarily evaluates unlearning through erasure success; its impact on broader generative capabilities remains poorly understood. In this work, we conduct a systematic empirical study of concept unlearning through the lens of compositional text-to-image generation. Focusing on nudity removal in Stable Diffusion 1.4, we evaluate a diverse set of state-of-the-art unlearning methods using T2I-CompBench++ and GenEval, alongside established unlearning benchmarks. Our results reveal a consistent trade-off between unlearning effectiveness and compositional integrity: methods that achieve strong erasure frequently incur substantial degradation in attribute binding, spatial reasoning, and counting. Conversely, approaches that preserve compositional structure often fail to provide robust erasure. These findings highlight limitations of current evaluation practices and underscore the need for unlearning objectives that explicitly account for semantic preservation beyond targeted suppression.

</details>


### [209] [TAPE: A two-stage parameter-efficient adaptation framework for foundation models in OCT-OCTA analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04571)
*Xiaofei Su,Zengshuo Wang,Minghe Sun,Xin Zhao,Mingzhu Sun*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: TAPE是一个两阶段自适应框架，通过参数高效微调解决OCT/OCTA图像分析中的领域偏移和任务不对齐问题，在视网膜层分割任务上实现优越的参数效率和泛化性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有OCT/OCTA图像分析方法依赖大量数据和模型规模，在资源受限的临床环境中难以部署。基于基础模型的迁移学习面临领域偏移和任务不对齐的挑战。

Method: 提出TAPE两阶段自适应框架：第一阶段通过掩码图像建模中的参数高效微调进行领域对齐；第二阶段进行任务拟合用于下游分割任务。应用于通用（MAE）和专用（RETFound）基础模型。

Result: TAPE在视网膜层分割任务上表现出优越的参数效率，并在多种病理条件下实现了最先进的泛化性能。

Conclusion: TAPE框架有效解决了医学图像分析中的领域适应问题，为资源受限的临床环境提供了实用的解决方案，在参数效率和泛化性能方面均优于现有方法。

Abstract: Automated analysis of optical coherence tomography (OCT) and OCT angiography (OCTA) images is critical for robust ophthalmic diagnosis. Existing mainstream methods trained from scratch rely heavily on massive data and model scale, thereby hindering their practical deployment in resource-constrained clinical settings. Although transfer learning based on foundation models (FMs) is promising, it still faces significant challenges: domain shift and task misalignment. To address these, we propose TAPE: A Two-stage Adaptation Framework via Parameter-Efficient Fine-tuning, which strategically decouples adaptation into domain alignment and task fitting for downstream segmentation. The domain adaptation stage notably applies parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) in the context of masked image modeling for medical image domain adaptation, a novel approach to the best of our knowledge. Applying TAPE to retinal layer segmentation on both universal (masked auto-encoder, MAE) and specialized (RETFound) FMs, it demonstrates superior parameter efficiency and achieves state-of-the-art generalization performance across diverse pathologies.

</details>


### [210] [Native-Domain Cross-Attention for Camera-LiDAR Extrinsic Calibration Under Large Initial Perturbations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29414)
*Ni Ou,Zhuo Chen,Xinru Zhang,Junzheng Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出一种外参感知的跨模态注意力框架，直接在图像块和LiDAR点组的原生域中进行对齐，避免3D几何失真，显著提升大外参扰动下的标定精度和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于学习的方法通常将LiDAR点投影到深度图进行特征融合，这会在外参初始化远离真实值时扭曲3D几何并降低性能。需要一种能直接对齐图像和LiDAR原生域的方法。

Method: 提出外参感知的跨注意力框架，将外参假设显式注入到对应关系建模过程中，实现几何一致的跨模态交互，无需依赖投影的2D深度图。

Result: 在KITTI和nuScenes基准测试中，该方法在精度和鲁棒性上均优于现有方法。在大外参扰动下，KITTI达到88%的准确标定率，nuScenes达到99%，显著超过次优基线。

Conclusion: 所提出的外参感知跨注意力框架能够直接对齐图像和LiDAR原生域，避免几何失真，在大外参扰动下实现更准确和鲁棒的相机-LiDAR外参标定。

Abstract: Accurate camera-LiDAR fusion relies on precise extrinsic calibration, which fundamentally depends on establishing reliable cross-modal correspondences under potentially large misalignments. Existing learning-based methods typically project LiDAR points into depth maps for feature fusion, which distorts 3D geometry and degrades performance when the extrinsic initialization is far from the ground truth. To address this issue, we propose an extrinsic-aware cross-attention framework that directly aligns image patches and LiDAR point groups in their native domains. The proposed attention mechanism explicitly injects extrinsic parameter hypotheses into the correspondence modeling process, enabling geometry-consistent cross-modal interaction without relying on projected 2D depth maps. Extensive experiments on the KITTI and nuScenes benchmarks demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in both accuracy and robustness. Under large extrinsic perturbations, our approach achieves accurate calibration in 88% of KITTI cases and 99% of nuScenes cases, substantially surpassing the second-best baseline. We have open sourced our code on https://github.com/gitouni/ProjFusion to benefit the community.

</details>


### [211] [MaskAdapt: Learning Flexible Motion Adaptation via Mask-Invariant Prior for Physics-Based Characters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29272)
*Soomin Park,Eunseong Lee,Kwang Bin Lee,Sung-Hee Lee*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MaskAdapt是一个用于物理人体控制中灵活运动适应的框架，采用两阶段残差学习范式，通过掩码不变性训练基础策略，再训练残差策略进行针对性身体部位修改。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在物理人体控制中，需要一种能够灵活适应不同运动需求的方法，既能保持整体运动的稳定性，又能针对特定身体部位进行精确修改，同时支持多部位组合适应和文本驱动的部分目标跟踪。

Method: 采用两阶段残差学习：第一阶段使用随机身体部位掩码和正则化项训练掩码不变的基础策略，确保在不同掩码条件下动作分布一致；第二阶段在冻结的基础控制器上训练残差策略，仅修改目标身体部位而保持其他部位原有行为。

Result: MaskAdapt展现出强大的鲁棒性和适应性，在掩码观测下产生多样行为，在目标运动适应方面优于先前工作，成功实现了运动组合和文本驱动的部分目标跟踪。

Conclusion: MaskAdapt框架通过两阶段残差学习实现了灵活的运动适应，为物理人体控制提供了有效的解决方案，支持多应用场景并展现出优于现有方法的性能。

Abstract: We present MaskAdapt, a framework for flexible motion adaptation in physics-based humanoid control. The framework follows a two-stage residual learning paradigm. In the first stage, we train a mask-invariant base policy using stochastic body-part masking and a regularization term that enforces consistent action distributions across masking conditions. This yields a robust motion prior that remains stable under missing observations, anticipating later adaptation in those regions. In the second stage, a residual policy is trained atop the frozen base controller to modify only the targeted body parts while preserving the original behaviors elsewhere. We demonstrate the versatility of this design through two applications: (i) motion composition, where varying masks enable multi-part adaptation within a single sequence, and (ii) text-driven partial goal tracking, where designated body parts follow kinematic targets provided by a pre-trained text-conditioned autoregressive motion generator. Through experiments, MaskAdapt demonstrates strong robustness and adaptability, producing diverse behaviors under masked observations and delivering superior targeted motion adaptation compared to prior work.

</details>


<div id='cs.CL'></div>

# cs.CL [[Back]](#toc)

### [212] [Evaluating In-Context Translation with Synchronous Context-Free Grammar Transduction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07320)
*Jackson Petty,Jaulie Goe,Tal Linzen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: LLMs在基于上下文形式语法进行字符串转导任务中表现不佳，准确率随语法规模和句子长度显著下降，形态和书写差异进一步降低性能，主要错误类型包括词汇选择错误、幻觉和未翻译源语言词汇。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低资源语言机器翻译面临数据稀缺挑战，LLMs理论上可以利用上下文语言描述（如教科书、词典）进行翻译，但需要验证LLMs是否能从语法描述推断语言间的映射关系。

Method: 构建同步上下文无关文法来定义形式语言对，模拟自然语言语法、形态和书写特征。在给定文法和源语言句子的条件下，测量LLMs将句子从一个形式语言翻译到另一个的能力，并系统变化文法规模、句子长度、语言特性和书写系统。

Result: 1) LLMs翻译准确率随文法规模和句子长度显著下降；2) 源语言和目标语言在形态和书写表示上的差异会大幅降低模型性能；3) 主要错误类型包括：错误回忆目标语言词汇、幻觉新词汇、以及未翻译源语言词汇。

Conclusion: LLMs从上下文语法描述中推断语言映射的能力有限，这限制了其在低资源语言翻译中仅依赖语言描述（而非大量训练数据）的实用性。模型在复杂语法结构和长距离依赖方面表现尤其脆弱。

Abstract: Low-resource languages pose a challenge for machine translation with large language models (LLMs), which require large amounts of training data. One potential way to circumvent this data dependence is to rely on LLMs' ability to use in-context descriptions of languages, like textbooks and dictionaries. To do so, LLMs must be able to infer the link between the languages' grammatical descriptions and the sentences in question. Here we isolate this skill using a formal analogue of the task: string transduction based on a formal grammar provided in-context. We construct synchronous context-free grammars which define pairs of formal languages designed to model particular aspects of natural language grammar, morphology, and written representation. Using these grammars, we measure how well LLMs can translate sentences from one formal language into another when given both the grammar and the source-language sentence. We vary the size of the grammar, the lengths of the sentences, the syntactic and morphological properties of the languages, and their written script. We note three key findings. First, LLMs' translation accuracy decreases markedly as a function of grammar size and sentence length. Second, differences in morphology and written representation between the source and target languages can strongly diminish model performance. Third, we examine the types of errors committed by models and find they are most prone to recall the wrong words from the target language vocabulary, hallucinate new words, or leave source-language words untranslated.

</details>


### [213] [Dynamic Context Evolution for Scalable Synthetic Data Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07147)
*Ryan Lingo,Rajeev Chhajer*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出动态上下文演化(DCE)框架解决大语言模型跨批次模式崩溃问题，通过三种机制保持输出多样性，无需微调或定制架构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在独立多次提示时会产生重复输出，即跨批次模式崩溃现象。现有方法依赖临时去重和种子轮换，缺乏系统化框架。

Method: 提出动态上下文演化(DCE)框架，包含三种机制：1) 语言化尾部采样(模型自我评估并丢弃明显想法)；2) 语义记忆(维护持久嵌入索引以拒绝跨批次近重复)；3) 自适应提示演化(基于记忆状态和轮换多样性策略重构生成提示)。

Result: 在三个领域(可持续包装概念、教育考试问题、创意写作提示)和两个模型家族(gpt-5-mini和claude-haiku-4-5)的实验中，DCE实现0.0±0.0%崩溃率(对比朴素提示的5.6±2.0%)，产生17-18个HDBSCAN聚类(对比朴素方法的2-17个)，表明更丰富的概念结构。结果通过独立嵌入模型验证，对参数变化稳健。

Conclusion: DCE框架有效解决跨批次模式崩溃问题，去重和提示演化单独不足但联合有效，成本约每1000候选0.50美元，无需微调或定制架构，为保持LLM输出多样性提供系统化解决方案。

Abstract: Large language models produce repetitive output when prompted independently across many batches, a phenomenon we term cross-batch mode collapse: the progressive loss of output diversity when a language model is prompted repeatedly without access to its prior generations. Practitioners have long mitigated this with ad hoc deduplication and seed rotation, but no principled framework exists. We introduce Dynamic Context Evolution (DCE), comprising three mechanisms: (1) verbalized tail sampling (the model labels each idea with a guess about how obvious it is, and obvious ideas are discarded), which filters high-probability candidates via model self-assessment; (2) semantic memory, which maintains a persistent embedding index to reject near-duplicates across batches; and (3) adaptive prompt evolution, which reconstructs the generation prompt each batch using memory state and rotating diversity strategies. In experiments across three domains (sustainable packaging concepts, educational exam questions, and creative writing prompts) and two model families (gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku-4-5), a component ablation across 2-3 random seeds per method shows that DCE achieves 0.0 +/- 0.0% collapse versus 5.6 +/- 2.0% for naive prompting, while producing 17-18 HDBSCAN clusters per seed versus naive's volatile 2-17, indicating reliably richer conceptual structure. These results are validated with an independent embedding model (all-MiniLM-L6-v2) and hold across sensitivity sweeps of the VTS threshold tau and dedup threshold delta. Deduplication and prompt evolution are individually insufficient but jointly effective, at approximately $0.50 per 1,000 candidates using only standard API calls, with no fine-tuning or custom architectures required.

</details>


### [214] [Efficient Learned Data Compression via Dual-Stream Feature Decoupling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07239)
*Huidong Ma,Xinyan Shi,Hui Sun,Xiaofei Yue,Xiaoguang Liu,Gang Wang,Wentong Cai*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出双流多尺度解耦器，将局部与全局上下文解耦，用浅层并行流替代深度串行处理，结合分层门控细化器进行自适应特征精炼，设计并发流并行流水线实现全流水线并行，在压缩比、吞吐量、延迟和内存使用方面均达到最优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 学习型数据压缩在压缩比方面表现优异，但精确概率建模与系统效率之间的平衡仍是挑战。统一单流架构难以同时捕获微观句法和宏观语义特征，需要深度串行堆叠导致延迟增加；异构系统受限于设备速度不匹配，串行处理受阿姆达尔定律限制吞吐量。

Method: 1. 双流多尺度解耦器：将局部上下文与全局上下文解耦，用浅层并行流替代深度串行处理；2. 分层门控细化器：自适应特征精炼和精确概率建模；3. 并发流并行流水线：克服系统瓶颈，实现全流水线并行。

Result: 大量实验表明，该方法在压缩比和吞吐量方面均达到最先进性能，同时保持最低延迟和内存使用。

Conclusion: 提出的双流多尺度解耦架构成功解决了学习型数据压缩中精确概率建模与系统效率的平衡问题，通过并行化设计克服了传统串行处理的瓶颈，实现了性能的全面提升。

Abstract: While Learned Data Compression (LDC) has achieved superior compression ratios, balancing precise probability modeling with system efficiency remains challenging. Crucially, uniform single-stream architectures struggle to simultaneously capture micro-syntactic and macro-semantic features, necessitating deep serial stacking that exacerbates latency. Compounding this, heterogeneous systems are constrained by device speed mismatches, where throughput is capped by Amdahl's Law due to serial processing. To this end, we propose a Dual-Stream Multi-Scale Decoupler that disentangles local and global contexts to replace deep serial processing with shallow parallel streams, and incorporate a Hierarchical Gated Refiner for adaptive feature refinement and precise probability modeling. Furthermore, we design a Concurrent Stream-Parallel Pipeline, which overcomes systemic bottlenecks to achieve full-pipeline parallelism. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in both compression ratio and throughput, while maintaining the lowest latency and memory usage. The code is available at https://github.com/huidong-ma/FADE.

</details>


### [215] [The Impact of Steering Large Language Models with Persona Vectors in Educational Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07102)
*Yongchao Wu,Aron Henriksson*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究首次系统分析了激活导向的人格特质在教育文本生成和自动评分中的影响，发现人格导向会降低答案质量，且不同任务类型和模型架构对人格导向的敏感性差异显著。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管激活导向技术能够在推理时个性化大型语言模型，但其在教育环境中的具体影响尚不明确。研究旨在探究人格向量在短答案生成和自动评分中的效果，特别是在不同任务类型和模型架构下的表现差异。

Method: 在ASAP-SAS基准测试上，针对三种模型（涵盖两种架构）研究了七种人格特质的导向效果。分析了短答案生成质量和自动评分校准偏移，比较了开放式英语语言艺术（ELA）提示与事实性科学提示的差异，以及解释性和论证性任务的敏感性。

Result: 人格导向总体上降低了答案质量，对开放式ELA提示的影响远大于事实性科学提示（解释性和论证性任务的敏感性高达11倍）。评分方面观察到可预测的效价对齐校准偏移：邪恶和不礼貌的评分者评分更严厉，而善良和乐观的评分者评分更宽松。ELA任务对评分者个性化的敏感性是科学任务的2.5-3倍，混合专家模型的校准偏移比密集模型大约6倍。

Conclusion: 这是首次系统研究激活导向人格特质在教育生成和评分中影响的工作，结果表明在教育环境中部署导向模型时，需要任务感知和架构感知的校准策略。

Abstract: Activation-based steering can personalize large language models at inference time, but its effects in educational settings remain unclear. We study persona vectors for seven character traits in short-answer generation and automated scoring on the ASAP-SAS benchmark across three models spanning two architectures. Persona steering lowers answer quality overall, with much larger effects on open-ended English Language Arts (ELA) prompts than on factual science prompts; interpretive and argumentative tasks are up to 11x more sensitive. On the scoring side, we observe predictable valence-aligned calibration shifts: evil and impolite scorers grade more harshly, while good and optimistic scorers grade more leniently. ELA tasks are 2.5-3x more susceptible to scorer personalization than science tasks, and the Mixture-of-Experts model shows roughly 6x larger calibration shifts than the dense models. To our knowledge, this is the first study to systematically examine the effects of activation-steered persona traits in educational generation and scoring, and the results highlight the need for task-aware and architecture-aware calibration when deploying steered models in educational settings.

</details>


### [216] [STRIDE-ED: A Strategy-Grounded Stepwise Reasoning Framework for Empathetic Dialogue Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07100)
*Hongru Ji,Yuyin Fan,Meng Zhao,Xianghua Li,Lianwei Wu,Chao Gao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: STRIDE-ED：基于策略的、可解释的深度推理框架，通过结构化、策略条件化的推理来建模共情对话，结合高质量数据构建和两阶段训练，显著提升共情对话性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有共情对话方法存在三个根本限制：缺乏全面的共情策略框架、缺乏明确的任务对齐多阶段推理、缺乏高质量的策略感知数据，导致无法将共情对话有效建模为复杂的多阶段认知和决策过程。

Method: 1. 提出STRIDE-ED框架：基于策略的、可解释的深度推理框架，通过结构化、策略条件化的推理建模共情对话；2. 开发策略感知数据精炼流水线：整合基于LLM的标注、多模型一致性加权评估和动态采样，构建与共情策略对齐的高质量训练数据；3. 采用两阶段训练范式：结合监督微调和多目标强化学习，使模型行为更好地与目标情感、共情策略和响应格式对齐。

Result: 广泛实验表明，STRIDE-ED能够泛化到多种开源LLM，并在自动指标和人工评估上一致优于现有方法。

Conclusion: STRIDE-ED通过结构化策略条件化推理、高质量数据构建和两阶段训练，有效解决了共情对话建模中的关键挑战，为将共情对话建模为复杂多阶段认知决策过程提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Empathetic dialogue requires not only recognizing a user's emotional state but also making strategy-aware, context-sensitive decisions throughout response generation. However, the lack of a comprehensive empathy strategy framework, explicit task-aligned multi-stage reasoning, and high-quality strategy-aware data fundamentally limits existing approaches, preventing them from effectively modeling empathetic dialogue as a complex, multi-stage cognitive and decision-making process. To address these challenges, we propose STRIDE-ED, a STRategy-grounded, Interpretable, and DEep reasoning framework that models Empathetic Dialogue through structured, strategy-conditioned reasoning. To support effective learning, we develop a strategy-aware data refinement pipeline integrating LLM-based annotation, multi-model consistency-weighted evaluation, and dynamic sampling to construct high-quality training data aligned with empathetic strategies. Furthermore, we adopt a two-stage training paradigm that combines supervised fine-tuning with multi-objective reinforcement learning to better align model behaviors with target emotions, empathetic strategies, and response formats. Extensive experiments demonstrate that STRIDE-ED generalizes across diverse open-source LLMs and consistently outperforms existing methods on both automatic metrics and human evaluations.

</details>


### [217] [Self-Preference Bias in Rubric-Based Evaluation of Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06996)
*José Pombal,Ricardo Rei,André F. T. Martins*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究首次系统分析了LLM作为评估者时的自我偏好偏见在基于评分标准的评估范式中的表现，发现即使在客观标准下，评估者仍会偏袒自身或同族模型的输出，通过多评估者集成可缓解但无法完全消除该偏见。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM-as-a-judge已成为评估LLM输出的主流方法，但评估者存在自我偏好偏见，倾向于偏袒自身或同族模型的输出。这种偏见扭曲了评估结果，阻碍了模型开发，特别是在递归自我改进场景中。需要研究该偏见在基于评分标准的评估范式中的表现，这是一种日益流行的基准测试方法。

Method: 研究使用两种基准：IFEval（具有可编程验证评分标准的基准）和HealthBench（医学聊天基准，具有主观评分标准）。在IFEval中，分析评估者在客观评分标准下的自我偏好偏见；在HealthBench中，研究主观评分标准下的偏见表现。通过量化评估者错误标记评分标准的概率差异来测量偏见程度，并分析驱动偏见的因素。

Result: 1. 在IFEval中，即使评分标准完全客观，自我偏好偏见仍然存在：在生成器失败的评分标准中，评估者对自身输出的错误标记概率可高出50%。2. 多评估者集成有助于缓解但无法完全消除偏见。3. 在HealthBench中，自我偏好偏见可使模型得分偏差高达10分，这在排名前沿模型时可能是决定性差异。4. 负面评分标准、极端评分标准长度和主观主题（如紧急转诊）特别容易受到偏见影响。

Conclusion: 自我偏好偏见在基于评分标准的评估范式中普遍存在，即使在客观标准下也无法避免。这种偏见显著影响模型评估的公正性，特别是在竞争激烈的模型排名中。需要开发更有效的缓解策略，并认识到当前评估方法的局限性，特别是在主观领域和关键应用场景中。

Abstract: LLM-as-a-judge has become the de facto approach for evaluating LLM outputs. However, judges are known to exhibit self-preference bias (SPB): they tend to favor outputs produced by themselves or by models from their own family. This skews evaluations and, thus, hinders model development, especially in settings of recursive self-improvement. We present the first study of SPB in rubric-based evaluation, an increasingly popular benchmarking paradigm where judges issue binary verdicts on individual evaluation criteria, instead of assigning holistic scores or rankings. Using IFEval, a benchmark with programmatically verifiable rubrics, we show that SPB persists even when evaluation criteria are entirely objective: among rubrics where generators fail, judges can be up to 50\% more likely to incorrectly mark them as satisfied when the output is their own. We also find that, similarly to other evaluation paradigms, ensembling multiple judges helps mitigate SPB, but without fully eliminating it. On HealthBench, a medical chat benchmark with subjective rubrics, we observe that SPB skews model scores by up to 10 points, a potentially decisive margin when ranking frontier models. We analyze the factors that drive SPB in this setting, finding that negative rubrics, extreme rubric lengths, and subjective topics like emergency referrals are particularly susceptible.

</details>


### [218] [The AI Skills Shift: Mapping Skill Obsolescence, Emergence, and Transition Pathways in the LLM Era](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06906)
*Rudra Jadhav,Janhavi Danve*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了技能自动化可行性指数(SAFI)，用于评估大型语言模型对263个文本任务(涵盖35种O*NET技能)的自动化潜力，并构建了AI影响矩阵来分类技能风险。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着大型语言模型重塑全球劳动力市场，政策制定者和工作者需要实证数据来了解哪些职业技能最易受自动化影响，以指导劳动力转型和政策制定。

Method: 开发SAFI指数，在LLaMA 3.3 70B、Mistral Large、Qwen 2.5 72B和Gemini 2.5 Flash四个前沿LLM上对263个文本任务进行基准测试，涵盖美国劳工部O*NET分类中的35种技能。结合Anthropic经济指数中的真实AI采用数据，构建AI影响矩阵框架。

Result: 数学(73.2)和编程(71.8)自动化可行性最高，积极倾听(42.2)和阅读理解(45.5)最低；发现"能力-需求倒置"现象；78.7%的AI交互是增强而非自动化；四个模型技能评估结果相似(3.6分差异)。

Conclusion: 文本自动化可行性更多取决于技能本身而非模型选择，AI对劳动力市场的影响主要是增强而非替代，需要针对不同技能风险制定差异化政策。

Abstract: As Large Language Models reshape the global labor market, policymakers and workers need empirical data on which occupational skills may be most susceptible to automation. We present the Skill Automation Feasibility Index (SAFI), benchmarking four frontier LLMs -- LLaMA 3.3 70B, Mistral Large, Qwen 2.5 72B, and Gemini 2.5 Flash -- across 263 text-based tasks spanning all 35 skills in the U.S. Department of Labor's O*NET taxonomy (1,052 total model calls, 0% failure rate). Cross-referencing with real-world AI adoption data from the Anthropic Economic Index (756 occupations, 17,998 tasks), we propose an AI Impact Matrix -- an interpretive framework that positions skills along four quadrants: High Displacement Risk, Upskilling Required, AI-Augmented, and Lower Displacement Risk. Key findings: (1) Mathematics (SAFI: 73.2) and Programming (71.8) receive the highest automation feasibility scores; Active Listening (42.2) and Reading Comprehension (45.5) receive the lowest; (2) a "capability-demand inversion" where skills most demanded in AI-exposed jobs are those LLMs perform least well at in our benchmark; (3) 78.7% of observed AI interactions are augmentation, not automation; (4) all four models converge to similar skill profiles (3.6-point spread), suggesting that text-based automation feasibility may be more skill-dependent than model-dependent.
