On AIME25 with 32K-token generation, TriAttention matches Full Attention reasoning accuracy while achieving 2.5x higher throughput or 10.7x KV memory reduction, whereas leading baselines achieve only about half the accuracy at the same efficiency. TriAttention enables OpenClaw deployment on a single consumer GPU, where long context would otherwise cause out-of-memory with Full Attention.

</details>


### [257] [Context-Agent: Dynamic Discourse Trees for Non-Linear Dialogue](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05552)
*Junan Hu,Shudan Guo,Wenqi Liu,Jianhua Yin,Yinwei Wei*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出Context-Agent框架，将多轮对话历史建模为动态树结构，以解决LLM在非线性对话中的挑战，并引入NTM基准进行评估


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM在处理人类对话时面临根本性挑战，将对话历史视为扁平线性序列的方法与自然话语固有的层次化和分支结构不匹配，导致上下文利用效率低下，在涉及话题转换或指令细化的扩展交互中失去连贯性

Method: 引入Context-Agent框架，将多轮对话历史建模为动态树结构，反映对话的固有非线性特性，使模型能够维护和导航对应不同话题的多个对话分支

Result: 实验表明Context-Agent提高了各种LLM的任务完成率并改善了token效率，强调了结构化上下文管理对于复杂动态对话的价值

Conclusion: 通过将对话历史建模为动态树结构，Context-Agent框架有效解决了LLM在非线性对话中的挑战，提出的NTM基准为评估长视野非线性场景下的模型性能提供了专门工具

Abstract: Large Language Models demonstrate outstanding performance in many language tasks but still face fundamental challenges in managing the non-linear flow of human conversation. The prevalent approach of treating dialogue history as a flat, linear sequence is misaligned with the intrinsically hierarchical and branching structure of natural discourse, leading to inefficient context utilization and a loss of coherence during extended interactions involving topic shifts or instruction refinements. To address this limitation, we introduce Context-Agent, a novel framework that models multi-turn dialogue history as a dynamic tree structure. This approach mirrors the inherent non-linearity of conversation, enabling the model to maintain and navigate multiple dialogue branches corresponding to different topics. Furthermore, to facilitate robust evaluation, we introduce the Non-linear Task Multi-turn Dialogue (NTM) benchmark, specifically designed to assess model performance in long-horizon, non-linear scenarios. Our experiments demonstrate that Context-Agent enhances task completion rates and improves token efficiency across various LLMs, underscoring the value of structured context management for complex, dynamic dialogues. The dataset and code is available at GitHub.

</details>


### [258] [Turbulence-like 5/3 spectral scaling in contextual representations of language as a complex system](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05536)
*Zhongxin Yang,Chun Bao,Yuanwei Bin,Xiang I. A. Yang,Shiyi Chen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 论文发现语言在嵌入空间中表现出幂律谱特征，指数接近5/3，类似于湍流中的Kolmogorov谱，表明语义信息在语言尺度上以尺度无关、自相似的方式整合。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索自然语言作为复杂系统的统计规律性，研究语言在嵌入空间中的多尺度结构特征，量化语言表示的复杂组织模式。

Method: 将文本表示为基于transformer的语言模型生成的高维嵌入空间中的轨迹，使用嵌入步长信号量化标记序列中的尺度依赖性波动，计算功率谱分析。

Result: 在多种语言和语料库中观察到稳健的幂律谱，指数接近5/3，该特征在上下文嵌入中普遍存在，但在静态词嵌入中缺失，且会被标记顺序随机化破坏。

Conclusion: 观察到的缩放反映了多尺度、上下文相关的组织而非单纯的词汇统计，语义信息在语言尺度上以尺度无关、自相似的方式整合，为研究语言表示中的复杂结构提供了定量、模型无关的基准。

Abstract: Natural language is a complex system that exhibits robust statistical regularities. Here, we represent text as a trajectory in a high-dimensional embedding space generated by transformer-based language models, and quantify scale-dependent fluctuations along the token sequence using an embedding-step signal. Across multiple languages and corpora, the resulting power spectrum exhibits a robust power law with an exponent close to $5/3$ over an extended frequency range. This scaling is observed consistently in contextual embeddings from both human-written and AI-generated text, but is absent in static word embeddings and is disrupted by randomization of token order. These results show that the observed scaling reflects multiscale, context-dependent organization rather than lexical statistics alone. By analogy with the Kolmogorov spectrum in turbulence, our findings suggest that semantic information is integrated in a scale-free, self-similar manner across linguistic scales, and provide a quantitative, model-agnostic benchmark for studying complex structure in language representations.

</details>


### [259] [$π^2$: Structure-Originated Reasoning Data Improves Long-Context Reasoning Ability of Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05114)
*Quyet V. Do,Thinh Pham,Nguyen Nguyen,Sha Li,Pratibha Zunjare,Tu Vu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: π²方法通过从维基百科提取表格、生成多跳推理问题、反向翻译推理轨迹构建高质量推理数据，用于提升LLMs的长上下文推理能力


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前大型语言模型在长上下文推理方面存在不足，需要高质量、结构化的推理数据来提升其多跳分析推理能力

Method: 1) 从维基百科提取和扩展表格；2) 基于表格和相关上下文生成多跳分析推理问题，通过双路径代码执行自动确定和验证答案；3) 反向翻译逐步结构化推理轨迹作为问答对的解决方案

Result: 在四个长上下文推理基准测试和自建的π²-Bench上，使用π²数据进行监督微调的GPT-OSS-20B和Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507模型分别获得平均+4.3%和+2.7%的绝对准确率提升；GPT-OSS-20B通过自蒸馏进一步提升+4.4%

Conclusion: π²方法能有效构建高质量推理数据，显著提升LLMs的长上下文推理能力，且支持自蒸馏进一步优化模型性能

Abstract: We study a pipeline that curates reasoning data from initial structured data for improving long-context reasoning in large language models (LLMs). Our approach, $π^2$, constructs high-quality reasoning data through rigorous QA curation: 1) extracting and expanding tables from Wikipedia, 2) from the collected tables and relevant context, generating realistic and multi-hop analytical reasoning questions whose answers are automatically determined and verified through dual-path code execution, and 3) back-translating step-by-step structured reasoning traces as solutions of QA pairs given realistic web-search context. Supervised fine-tuning with \textsc{\small{gpt-oss-20b}} and \textsc{\small{Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507}} on $π^2$ yields consistent improvements across four long-context reasoning benchmarks and our alike $π^2$-Bench, with average absolute accuracy gains of +4.3% and +2.7% respectively. Notably, our dataset facilitates self-distillation, where \textsc{\small{gpt-oss-20b}} even improves its average performance by +4.4% with its own reasoning traces, demonstrating $π^2$'s usefulness. Our code, data, and models are open-source at https://github.com/vt-pi-squared/pi-squared.

</details>


### [260] [Multilingual Language Models Encode Script Over Linguistic Structure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05090)
*Aastha A K Verma,Anwoy Chatterjee,Mehak Gupta,Tanmoy Chakraborty*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 多语言语言模型在共享参数空间中组织不同语言的表征，研究发现这些表征主要围绕表层形式（如正字法）组织，而非抽象语言身份，语言抽象是逐渐出现的而非统一的中间语言。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究多语言语言模型如何在其共享参数空间内组织不同语言的表征，探究是抽象语言身份还是表层形式线索塑造了这些表征。

Method: 使用紧凑的蒸馏模型（Llama-3.2-1B和Gemma-2-2B），通过语言激活概率熵（LAPE）指标分析语言相关单元，并用稀疏自编码器分解激活。进行词序打乱实验和因果干预分析。

Result: 发现语言相关单元强烈依赖于正字法：罗马化导致几乎不相交的表征，既不与原生脚本输入对齐，也不与英语对齐；词序打乱对单元身份影响有限。深层中类型学结构越来越可访问，生成对表层形式扰动不变的单元最敏感。

Conclusion: 多语言语言模型围绕表层形式组织表征，语言抽象是逐渐出现的，不会坍缩为统一的中间语言。生成过程依赖于对表层形式扰动不变的单元，而非仅由类型学对齐识别的单元。

Abstract: Multilingual language models (LMs) organize representations for typologically and orthographically diverse languages into a shared parameter space, yet the nature of this internal organization remains elusive. In this work, we investigate which linguistic properties - abstract language identity or surface-form cues - shape multilingual representations. Focusing on compact, distilled models where representational trade-offs are explicit, we analyze language-associated units in Llama-3.2-1B and Gemma-2-2B using the Language Activation Probability Entropy (LAPE) metric, and further decompose activations with Sparse Autoencoders. We find that these units are strongly conditioned on orthography: romanization induces near-disjoint representations that align with neither native-script inputs nor English, while word-order shuffling has limited effect on unit identity. Probing shows that typological structure becomes increasingly accessible in deeper layers, while causal interventions indicate that generation is most sensitive to units that are invariant to surface-form perturbations rather than to units identified by typological alignment alone. Overall, our results suggest that multilingual LMs organize representations around surface form, with linguistic abstraction emerging gradually without collapsing into a unified interlingua.

</details>


### [261] [Beyond LLM-as-a-Judge: Deterministic Metrics for Multilingual Generative Text Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05083)
*Firoj Alam,Gagan Bhatia,Sahinur Rahman Laskar,Shammur Absar Chowdhury*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: OmniScore是一个基于小型模型（<1B参数）的确定性学习度量家族，用于替代大型语言模型作为文本生成评估的自动评判工具，解决了LLM评估的高成本、提示敏感性和可复现性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型作为文本生成评估的自动评判工具存在成本高、对提示设计、语言和聚合策略高度敏感的问题，严重限制了评估的可复现性，需要一种更稳定、高效的替代方案。

Method: 使用大规模合成监督数据（约564k实例，107种语言）训练小型参数模型（<1B），构建OmniScore度量家族，支持基于参考、基于源文本和混合评估等多种设置的多维度评分。

Result: 在6种语言的问答、翻译和摘要任务上评估显示，OmniScore能够可靠地近似LLM评判行为，同时保持传统模型评分的低延迟和一致性，为前沿LLM提供了高度实用和可扩展的替代方案。

Conclusion: 轻量级、确定性的学习度量（如OmniScore）是替代前沿大型语言模型进行文本生成评估的实用且可扩展的解决方案，解决了LLM评估的成本、敏感性和可复现性问题。

Abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly adopted as automated judges for evaluating generated text, their outputs are often costly, and highly sensitive to prompt design, language, and aggregation strategies, severely, which limits reproducibility. To address these challenges, we propose \textbf{\textit{OmniScore}}, a family of complementary, deterministic learned metrics developed using small size ($<$1B) parameter models. OmniScore approximates LLM-judge behavior while preserving the low latency and consistency of traditional model-based scoring. We trained the models large-scale synthetic supervision ($\sim$564k instances, in \textbf{107 languages}) and evaluated using 8,617 manually annotated instances. The OmniScore family supports reliable, multi-dimensional scores across a variety of settings, including reference-based, source-grounded, and hybrid evaluations. We evaluate these models across question answering (QA), translation, and summarization in \textbf{6 languages}. Our results demonstrate that lightweight, deterministic learned metrics provide a highly practical and scalable alternative to frontier LLMs. Our models and datasets can be found at https://huggingface.co/collections/QCRI/omniscore

</details>


### [262] [DQA: Diagnostic Question Answering for IT Support](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05350)
*Vishaal Kapoor,Mariam Dundua,Sarthak Ahuja,Neda Kordjazi,Evren Yortucboylu,Vaibhavi Padala,Derek Ho,Jennifer Whitted,Rebecca Steinert*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: DQA框架通过维护持久诊断状态和基于根因的检索聚合，显著提升企业IT支持中的多轮诊断问答性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 企业IT支持交互本质上是诊断性的，需要从模糊的用户报告中迭代收集证据以识别根本原因。标准的多轮RAG系统缺乏明确的诊断状态，难以跨轮次积累证据和解决竞争假设。

Method: 引入DQA诊断问答框架，维护持久诊断状态，在根因层面而非单个文档层面聚合检索案例。结合对话查询重写、检索聚合和状态条件响应生成，支持在延迟和上下文约束下的系统化故障排除。

Result: 在150个匿名企业IT支持场景的回放协议评估中，DQA在轨迹级成功标准下平均达到78.7%的成功率，而多轮RAG基线为41.3%，同时将平均轮次从8.4减少到3.9。

Conclusion: DQA通过显式维护诊断状态和基于根因的检索聚合，显著改善了企业IT支持中的多轮诊断性能，在成功率和效率方面都大幅超越标准RAG方法。

Abstract: Enterprise IT support interactions are fundamentally diagnostic: effective resolution requires iterative evidence gathering from ambiguous user reports to identify an underlying root cause. While retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) provides grounding through historical cases, standard multi-turn RAG systems lack explicit diagnostic state and therefore struggle to accumulate evidence and resolve competing hypotheses across turns. We introduce DQA, a diagnostic question-answering framework that maintains persistent diagnostic state and aggregates retrieved cases at the level of root causes rather than individual documents. DQA combines conversational query rewriting, retrieval aggregation, and state-conditioned response generation to support systematic troubleshooting under enterprise latency and context constraints. We evaluate DQA on 150 anonymized enterprise IT support scenarios using a replay-based protocol. Averaged over three independent runs, DQA achieves a 78.7% success rate under a trajectory-level success criterion, compared to 41.3% for a multi-turn RAG baseline, while reducing average turns from 8.4 to 3.9.

</details>


### [263] [Phase-Associative Memory: Sequence Modeling in Complex Hilbert Space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05030)
*Gowrav Vishwakarma,Christopher J. Agostino*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: PAM是一种复值循环序列模型，通过外积在矩阵状态中累积关联，使用共轭内积进行检索，在WikiText-103上达到30.0困惑度，接近匹配的Transformer（27.1）


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决向量状态模型中全息绑定因叠加关联的O(1/√n)容量退化而失败的问题，探索复值叠加和共轭检索作为语言建模计算形式化的选择

Method: 提出相联记忆(PAM)：复值循环序列模型，所有表示均为复值，关联通过外积在矩阵状态S_t∈ℂ^{d×d}中累积，检索通过共轭内积K_t*·Q_t/√d进行

Result: 在WikiText-103上约1亿参数规模，PAM验证困惑度达到30.0，与匹配Transformer（27.1）相差约10%，尽管复值计算带来4倍算术开销且无定制内核

Conclusion: 矩阵状态解决了向量状态模型的容量退化问题；复值叠加和共轭检索架构的竞争力与人类和大型语言模型中语义解释的非经典上下文性证据一致，对语言建模计算形式化选择有启示

Abstract: We present Phase-Associative Memory (PAM), a recurrent sequence model in which all representations are complex-valued, associations accumulate in a matrix state $S_{t}$ $\in$ $\mathbb{C}^{d \times d}$ via outer products, and retrieval operates through the conjugate inner product $K_t^* \cdot Q_t / \sqrt{d}$. At $\sim$100M parameters on WikiText-103, PAM reaches validation perplexity 30.0, within $\sim$10\% of a matched transformer (27.1) trained under identical conditions, despite $4\times$ arithmetic overhead from complex computation and no custom kernels. We trace the experimental path from vector-state models, where holographic binding fails due to the $O(1/\sqrt{n})$ capacity degradation of superposed associations, to the matrix state that resolves it. The competitiveness of an architecture whose native operations are complex-valued superposition and conjugate retrieval is consistent with recent empirical evidence that semantic interpretation in both humans and large language models exhibits non-classical contextuality, and we discuss what this implies for the choice of computational formalism in language modeling.

</details>


### [264] [Early Stopping for Large Reasoning Models via Confidence Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04930)
*Parsa Hosseini,Sumit Nawathe,Mahdi Salmani,Meisam Razaviyayn,Soheil Feizi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出CoDE-Stop方法，利用推理过程中中间答案置信度的动态变化来决定何时停止推理，无需额外训练，可显著减少计算成本


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型推理模型依赖长链思维生成解决复杂问题，但扩展推理会带来巨大计算成本，甚至因过度思考导致性能下降。关键挑战是确定模型何时应停止推理并生成最终答案

Method: 提出CoDE-Stop（Confidence Dynamics Early Stop）方法，基于对中间答案置信度动态变化的观察：正确推理轨迹通常早期达到高置信度答案，而错误推理则产生长且无成果的推理轨迹且置信度动态变化不可靠。该方法利用中间答案置信度动态决定何时终止推理

Result: 在多个推理和科学基准测试中评估CoDE-Stop，相比现有早期停止方法，实现了更好的准确率-计算权衡，相比标准全长推理减少25-50%的总token使用量

Conclusion: CoDE-Stop是一种有效的早期停止方法，无需额外训练即可集成到现有模型中，显著降低推理计算成本，同时提供了对推理过程中置信度动态变化的分析洞察

Abstract: Large reasoning models rely on long chain-of-thought generation to solve complex problems, but extended reasoning often incurs substantial computational cost and can even degrade performance due to overthinking. A key challenge is determining when the model should stop reasoning and produce the final answer. In this work, we study the confidence of intermediate answers during reasoning and observe two characteristic behaviors: correct reasoning trajectories often reach high-confidence answers early, while incorrect rollouts tend to produce long, unproductive reasoning traces and exhibit less reliable confidence dynamics. Motivated by these observations, we propose CoDE-Stop (Confidence Dynamics Early Stop), an early stopping method that leverages the dynamics of intermediate answer confidence to decide when to terminate reasoning, requiring no additional training and easily integrating into existing models. We evaluate CoDE-Stop on diverse reasoning and science benchmarks across multiple models. Compared to prior early stopping methods, it achieves a more favorable accuracy-compute tradeoff and reduces total token usage by 25-50% compared to standard full-length reasoning. In addition, we provide analyses of confidence dynamics during reasoning, offering insights into how confidence changes in both correct and incorrect trajectories.

</details>


### [265] [Rethinking Exploration in RLVR: From Entropy Regularization to Refinement via Bidirectional Entropy Modulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04894)
*Hengrui Gu,Xiaotian Han,Yujing Bian,Kaixiong Zhou*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 论文提出AsymGRPO框架，通过解耦正负rollouts的调节来优化LLM的探索能力，解决RLVR中的受限探索问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 强化学习与可验证奖励（RLVR）显著提升了大型语言模型的推理能力，但面临"受限探索"的根本限制，即策略迅速收敛到狭窄的解集。虽然熵正则化是维持探索的常用方法，但对LLMs效果不佳，存在高超参数敏感性和仅边际性能提升的问题。

Method: 通过推导组相对优势估计的参数化公式和分析熵动态，将策略熵概念分解为"信息熵"（保留多样化解路径）和"伪熵"（侵蚀推理模式）。提出AsymGRPO探索框架，明确解耦正负rollouts的调节，实现对信息熵的保留和伪噪声的抑制的独立控制。

Result: 大量实验表明，AsymGRPO相比强基线实现了优越性能，并展现出与现有熵正则化方法协同的潜力。

Conclusion: 有效探索需要"熵精炼"机制，而非盲目最大化熵。AsymGRPO通过解耦正负rollouts调节，在正rollouts上维持信息熵，在负rollouts上抑制伪熵，从而优化LLM的探索能力。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has significantly advanced the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs). However, it faces a fundamental limitation termed \textit{restricted exploration}, where the policy rapidly converges to a narrow set of solutions. While entropy regularization is a popular approach used to sustain exploration, it often proves unreliable for LLMs, suffering from high hyperparameter sensitivity and yielding only marginal performance gains. Motivated by these inefficiencies, we propose to rethink the relationship between policy entropy and exploration. By deriving a parametric formulation of group-relative advantage estimation and analyzing entropy dynamics, we conceptually decompose policy entropy into \textit{informative entropy}, which preserves diverse solution paths, and \textit{spurious entropy}, which erodes reasoning patterns. Our analysis reveals that, in contrast to blind maximization, effective exploration requires \textit{entropy refinement}-a mechanism implicitly embedded in group-relative advantage estimation that sustains informative entropy on positive rollouts while suppressing spurious entropy on negative ones. Guided by this insight, we propose \textbf{AsymGRPO}, an exploratory framework that explicitly decouples the modulation of positive and negative rollouts. This allows for independent control over the preservation of informative entropy and the suppression of spurious noise. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AsymGRPO achieves superior performance compared to strong baselines and exhibits the potential to synergize with existing entropy regularization methods.

</details>


<div id='q-bio.GN'></div>

# q-bio.GN [[Back]](#toc)

### [266] [Transcriptomic Models for Immunotherapy Response Prediction Show Limited Cross-cohort Generalisability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05478)
*Yuheng Liang,Lucy Chuo,Ahmadreza Argha,Nona Farbehi,Lu Chen,Roohallah Alizadehsani,Mehdi Hosseinzadeh,Amin Beheshti,Thantrira Porntaveetusm,Youqiong Ye,Hamid Alinejad-Rokny*

Main category: q-bio.GN

TL;DR: 系统评估9种转录组学免疫检查点抑制剂响应预测模型，发现其在独立验证队列中预测性能有限，跨队列泛化能力不足，生物学一致性较差


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 免疫检查点抑制剂（ICIs）已改变癌症治疗，但大量患者存在内在或获得性耐药，准确预测治疗前响应是未满足的临床需求。转录组学生物标志物（基于bulk和单细胞RNA测序）为捕捉肿瘤-免疫相互作用提供了有前景的途径，但现有预测模型的跨队列泛化能力尚不明确。

Method: 系统性地对9种最先进的转录组学ICI响应预测模型进行基准测试：5种基于bulk RNA-seq模型（COMPASS、IRNet、NetBio、IKCScore、TNBC-ICI）和4种基于scRNA-seq模型（PRECISE、DeepGeneX、Tres和scCURE）。使用模型开发时未见过的公开独立数据集进行评估，并进行通路水平分析以评估生物学一致性。

Result: 总体预测性能有限：bulk RNA-seq模型在大多数队列中表现接近随机水平，scRNA-seq模型仅显示边际改善。通路分析显示跨模型的生物标志物信号稀疏且不一致。scRNA-seq预测模型在免疫相关通路（如移植排斥）上有所收敛，而bulk RNA-seq模型显示很少的可重复重叠。PRECISE和NetBio识别出最一致的免疫相关主题，而IRNet主要捕获与ICI生物学弱相关的代谢通路。

Conclusion: 当前转录组学ICI预测模型在跨队列稳健性和生物学一致性方面存在局限，强调需要改进领域适应、标准化预处理以及基于生物学的模型设计。

Abstract: Immune checkpoint inhibitors (ICIs) have transformed cancer therapy; yet substantial proportion of patients exhibit intrinsic or acquired resistance, making accurate pre-treatment response prediction a critical unmet need. Transcriptomics-based biomarkers derived from bulk and single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) offer a promising avenue for capturing tumour-immune interactions, yet the cross-cohort generalisability of existing prediction models remains unclear.We systematically benchmark nine state-of-the-art transcriptomic ICI response predictors, five bulk RNA-seq-based models (COMPASS, IRNet, NetBio, IKCScore, and TNBC-ICI) and four scRNA-seq-based models (PRECISE, DeepGeneX, Tres and scCURE), using publicly available independent datasets unseen during model development. Overall, predictive performance was modest: bulk RNA-seq models performed at or near chance level across most cohorts, while scRNA-seq models showed only marginal improvements. Pathway-level analyses revealed sparse and inconsistent biomarker signals across models. Although scRNA-seq-based predictors converged on immune-related programs such as allograft rejection, bulk RNA-seq-based models exhibited little reproducible overlap. PRECISE and NetBio identified the most coherent immune-related themes, whereas IRNet predominantly captured metabolic pathways weakly aligned with ICI biology. Together, these findings demonstrate the limited cross-cohort robustness and biological consistency of current transcriptomic ICI prediction models, underscoring the need for improved domain adaptation, standardised preprocessing, and biologically grounded model design.

</details>


<div id='stat.ME'></div>

# stat.ME [[Back]](#toc)

### [267] [Task Ecologies and the Evolution of World-Tracking Representations in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05469)
*Giulio Valentino Dalla Riva*

Main category: stat.ME

TL;DR: 该论文将语言模型视为进化模型生物，研究自回归下一个词元学习何时会选择世界追踪表征，提出了生态真实性的精确概念和最小复杂度零超额解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究语言模型作为进化模型生物，探究自回归下一个词元学习在什么条件下会选择能够追踪世界状态的表征，建立语言模型生态真实性的理论框架。

Method: 提出贝叶斯最优下一个词元交叉熵分解为不可约条件熵加Jensen-Shannon超额项的理论框架；分析不同Transformer架构（冻结密集、冻结MoE、上下文学习、每任务适应）的适用性；通过条件动态扩展研究模型间选择和训练后恢复机制；进行精确有限生态检查和受控microgpt实验验证。

Result: 理论推导显示超额项在且仅当编码保持训练生态等价类时消失；识别出最小复杂度零超额解为训练等价商划分；预测了两种特征性失败模式：简单性压力优先移除低增益区分，训练最优模型在细化训练生态的部署生态上仍可能产生正超额；实验验证了静态分解、分裂合并阈值、离生态失败模式和双生态救援机制。

Conclusion: 该研究建立了语言模型表征选择的理论框架，将语言模型作为实验室生物用于表征选择理论研究，而非大规模前沿系统建模。框架提供了生态真实性的精确概念，解释了表征选择的条件和失败模式，并为理解语言模型如何发展世界追踪表征提供了理论基础。

Abstract: We study language models as evolving model organisms and ask when autoregressive next-token learning selects for world-tracking representations. For any encoding of latent world states, the Bayes-optimal next-token cross-entropy decomposes into the irreducible conditional entropy plus a Jensen--Shannon excess term. That excess vanishes if and only if the encoding preserves the training ecology's equivalence classes. This yields a precise notion of ecological veridicality for language models and identifies the minimum-complexity zero-excess solution as the quotient partition by training equivalence. We then determine when this fixed-encoding analysis applies to transformer families: frozen dense and frozen Mixture-of-Experts transformers satisfy it, in-context learning does not enlarge the model's separation set, and per-task adaptation breaks the premise. The framework predicts two characteristic failure modes: simplicity pressure preferentially removes low-gain distinctions, and training-optimal models can still incur positive excess on deployment ecologies that refine the training ecology. A conditional dynamic extension shows how inter-model selection and post-training can recover such gap distinctions under explicit heredity, variation, and selection assumptions. Exact finite-ecology checks and controlled microgpt experiments validate the static decomposition, split-merge threshold, off-ecology failure pattern, and two-ecology rescue mechanism in a regime where the relevant quantities are directly observable. The goal is not to model frontier systems at scale, but to use small language models as laboratory organisms for theory about representational selection.

</details>


### [268] [Robust Learning of Heterogeneous Dynamic Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05285)
*Shuoxun Xu,Zijian Guo,Brooke R. Staveland,Robert T. Knight,Lexin Li*

Main category: stat.ME

TL;DR: 提出一种分布鲁棒学习方法，用于建模异质常微分方程系统，通过最大化最坏情况奖励来构建鲁棒动态系统，并开发双层稳定化程序。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有ODE方法主要关注单个系统，未能充分解决从多个异质动态系统中学习共享模式的问题。需要开发能够处理多系统异质性的鲁棒学习方法。

Method: 构建鲁棒动态系统，最大化轨迹导数凸组合形成的uncertainty class上的最坏情况奖励。估计器具有显式加权平均表示，权重通过二次优化平衡多数据源信息。开发双层稳定化程序解决估计不稳定性。

Result: 建立了严格的理论保证：稳定权重的一致性、鲁棒轨迹估计的误差界、点态置信区间的渐近有效性。通过模拟和颅内脑电图数据分析表明，该方法相比替代方案显著提高了泛化性能。

Conclusion: 提出的分布鲁棒学习方法能够有效建模异质ODE系统，通过信息平衡和稳定化处理，在理论和实证上都表现出优越的泛化能力。

Abstract: Ordinary differential equations (ODEs) provide a powerful framework for modeling dynamic systems arising in a wide range of scientific domains. However, most existing ODE methods focus on a single system, and do not adequately address the problem of learning shared patterns from multiple heterogeneous dynamic systems. In this article, we propose a novel distributionally robust learning approach for modeling heterogeneous ODE systems. Specifically, we construct a robust dynamic system by maximizing a worst-case reward over an uncertainty class formed by convex combinations of the derivatives of trajectories. We show the resulting estimator admits an explicit weighted average representation, where the weights are obtained from a quadratic optimization that balances information across multiple data sources. We further develop a bi-level stabilization procedure to address potential instability in estimation. We establish rigorous theoretical guarantees for the proposed method, including consistency of the stabilized weights, error bound for robust trajectory estimation, and asymptotical validity of pointwise confidence interval. We demonstrate that the proposed method considerably improves the generalization performance compared to the alternative solutions through both extensive simulations and the analysis of an intracranial electroencephalogram data.

</details>


### [269] [LLM Evaluation as Tensor Completion: Low Rank Structure and Semiparametric Efficiency](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05460)
*Jiachun Li,David Simchi-Levi,Will Wei Sun*

Main category: stat.ME

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个用于大语言模型评估的半参数推断框架，通过低秩张量补全处理成对比较数据，解决了现有评估平台中噪声、稀疏和非均匀数据的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大语言模型评估平台依赖成对人类判断，这些数据具有噪声大、稀疏且非均匀的特点，但排行榜报告时缺乏充分的不确定性量化。需要建立理论框架来处理这种结构化观测、非均匀采样和成对对比的低秩张量补全问题。

Method: 将LLM评估建模为通过Bradley-Terry-Luce类型模型的成对比较观测的低秩潜在得分张量的半参数推断问题。推导了低秩切空间上的信息算子、有效影响函数和半参数效率界，构建了具有渐近正态性的单步去偏估计器。针对信息算子的各向异性问题，提出了分数白化方法以均衡局部Fisher信息。

Result: 建立了在最优样本复杂度尺度上恢复稳定推断的理论框架，为LLM评估中的不确定性量化提供了原则性方法，同时适用于更广泛的从成对数据进行低秩结构推断的问题。

Conclusion: 该研究为大语言模型评估中的不确定性量化提供了理论基础，通过半参数推断框架解决了低秩张量补全中的各向异性挑战，提出的分数白化方法恢复了最优样本复杂度下的稳定推断。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) evaluation platforms increasingly rely on pairwise human judgments. These data are noisy, sparse, and non-uniform, yet leaderboards are reported with limited uncertainty quantification. We study this as semiparametric inference for a low-rank latent score tensor observed through pairwise comparisons under Bradley-Terry-Luce-type models. This places LLM evaluation in a new tensor completion setting with structured observations, non-uniform sampling, and pairwise contrasts. Our target is a smooth functional $ψ(T^\star)$, including linear estimands such as ability gaps and nonlinear ones such as win probabilities. We derive the information operator on the low-rank tangent space, the efficient influence function, and the semiparametric efficiency bound, then construct a one-step debiased estimator with asymptotic normality. A central challenge is that the information operator is anisotropic and does not commute with the tangent-space projection, creating a bottleneck absent from isotropic models. We introduce a score-whitening method that equalizes local Fisher information and restores stable inference at the optimal sample-complexity scale. Our results provide a principled framework for uncertainty quantification in LLM evaluation and more broadly for inference on low-rank structures from pairwise data.

</details>


<div id='eess.IV'></div>

# eess.IV [[Back]](#toc)

### [270] [A Noise Constrained Diffusion (NC-Diffusion) Framework for High Fidelity Image Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06568)
*Zhenyu Du,Yanbo Gao,Shuai Li,Yiyang Li,Hui Yuan,Mao Ye*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 提出NC-Diffusion框架，通过将量化噪声作为扩散前向过程的噪声，解决扩散模型在图像压缩中的噪声不匹配问题，提高重建保真度和推理效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的图像压缩方法在扩散学习中引入随机噪声，导致重建图像与原始图像存在偏差，压缩效果不理想。需要解决噪声不匹配问题以提高压缩性能。

Method: 1) 提出NC-Diffusion框架，将传统图像压缩中的量化噪声作为扩散前向过程的噪声；2) 构建从真实图像到带量化噪声的初始压缩结果的噪声约束扩散过程；3) 设计自适应频域滤波模块增强U-Net架构中的跳跃连接；4) 提出零样本样本引导增强方法进一步提高保真度。

Result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法相比现有方法取得了最佳性能，显著提高了推理效率并改善了重建图像的高频细节。

Conclusion: NC-Diffusion框架通过解决扩散模型与图像压缩之间的噪声不匹配问题，实现了高保真度的图像压缩，在推理效率和重建质量方面均优于现有方法。

Abstract: With the great success of diffusion models in image generation, diffusion-based image compression is attracting increasing interests. However, due to the random noise introduced in the diffusion learning, they usually produce reconstructions with deviation from the original images, leading to suboptimal compression results. To address this problem, in this paper, we propose a Noise Constrained Diffusion (NC-Diffusion) framework for high fidelity image compression. Unlike existing diffusion-based compression methods that add random Gaussian noise and direct the noise into the image space, the proposed NC-Diffusion formulates the quantization noise originally added in the learned image compression as the noise in the forward process of diffusion. Then a noise constrained diffusion process is constructed from the ground-truth image to the initial compression result generated with quantization noise. The NC-Diffusion overcomes the problem of noise mismatch between compression and diffusion, significantly improving the inference efficiency. In addition, an adaptive frequency-domain filtering module is developed to enhance the skip connections in the U-Net based diffusion architecture, in order to enhance high-frequency details. Moreover, a zero-shot sample-guided enhancement method is designed to further improve the fidelity of the image. Experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that our method can achieve the best performance compared with existing methods.

</details>


### [271] [Adaptive Differential Privacy for Federated Medical Image Segmentation Across Diverse Modalities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06518)
*Puja Saha,Eranga Ukwatta*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 提出自适应差分隐私联邦学习框架ADP-FL，用于医学图像分割，在保证隐私的同时提升模型性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医学数据因隐私法规和机构限制难以集中，且集中训练模型难以泛化到不同临床站点。联邦学习虽能协作训练但不共享原始数据，但加入差分隐私会导致精度下降、收敛不稳定和泛化能力降低

Method: 提出自适应差分隐私联邦学习框架ADP-FL，动态调整隐私机制以平衡隐私-效用权衡，稳定训练过程，提升分割质量和边界精度

Result: 在皮肤病变分割、肾脏肿瘤分割、脑肿瘤分割等多个任务上，ADP-FL相比传统联邦学习和标准差分隐私联邦学习，获得更高的Dice分数、更好的边界描绘、更快的收敛速度和更强的训练稳定性，性能接近相同隐私预算下的非隐私联邦学习

Conclusion: ADP-FL框架在实际联邦设置中实现了高性能、隐私保护的医学图像分割，展示了其实际可行性

Abstract: Large volumes of medical data remain underutilized because centralizing distributed data is often infeasible due to strict privacy regulations and institutional constraints. In addition, models trained in centralized settings frequently fail to generalize across clinical sites because of heterogeneity in imaging protocols and continuously evolving data distributions arising from differences in scanners, acquisition parameters, and patient populations. Federated learning offers a promising solution by enabling collaborative model training without sharing raw data. However, incorporating differential privacy into federated learning, while essential for privacy guarantees, often leads to degraded accuracy, unstable convergence, and reduced generalization. In this work, we propose an adaptive differentially private federated learning (ADP-FL) framework for medical image segmentation that dynamically adjusts privacy mechanisms to better balance the privacy-utility trade-off. The proposed approach stabilizes training, significantly improves Dice scores and segmentation boundary quality, and maintains rigorous privacy guarantees. We evaluated ADP-FL across diverse imaging modalities and segmentation tasks, including skin lesion segmentation in dermoscopic images, kidney tumor segmentation in 3D CT scans, and brain tumor segmentation in multi-parametric MRI. Compared with conventional federated learning and standard differentially private federated learning, ADP-FL consistently achieves higher accuracy, improved boundary delineation, faster convergence, and greater training stability, with performance approaching that of non-private federated learning under the same privacy budgets. These results demonstrate the practical viability of ADP-FL for high-performance, privacy-preserving medical image segmentation in real-world federated settings.

</details>


### [272] [Accelerating 4D Hyperspectral Imaging through Physics-Informed Neural Representation and Adaptive Sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06561)
*Chi-Jui Ho,Harsh Bhakta,Wei Xiong,Nicholas Antipa*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 提出一种基于物理信息神经表示的方法，从稀疏实验测量中高效重建密集空间分辨的2DIR高光谱图像，将采样需求减少至1/32，实验时间缩短32倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高维高光谱成像在二维红外光谱中应用时面临数据采集时间过长的问题，这源于密集的奈奎斯特采样要求和大量信号积累需求，限制了其在空间变化振动耦合研究中的应用。

Method: 采用物理信息神经表示方法，使用多层感知器建模稀疏采样的4D坐标与对应光谱强度之间的关系，从有限观测中恢复密集采样的4D光谱。同时开发了损失感知自适应采样方法，在实验过程中逐步引入潜在信息丰富的样本进行迭代数据收集。

Result: 该方法仅使用1/32的采样预算就能实现高保真光谱恢复，有效减少总实验时间达32倍，能够忠实地恢复实验测量中的振荡和非振荡光谱动力学。

Conclusion: 该框架为加速任何超立方体数据实验提供了可扩展的解决方案，包括多维光谱和高光谱成像，为瞬态生物和材料系统的快速化学成像铺平了道路。

Abstract: High-dimensional hyperspectral imaging (HSI) enables the visualization of ultrafast molecular dynamics and complex, heterogeneous spectra. However, applying this capability to resolve spatially varying vibrational couplings in two-dimensional infrared (2DIR) spectroscopy, a type of coherent multidimensional spectroscopy (CMDS), necessitates prohibitively long data acquisition, driven by dense Nyquist sampling requirements and the need for extensive signal accumulation. To address this challenge, we introduce a physics-informed neural representation approach that efficiently reconstructs dense spatially-resolved 2DIR hyperspectral images from sparse experimental measurements. In particular, we used a multilayer perceptron (MLP) to model the relationship between the sub-sampled 4D coordinates and their corresponding spectral intensities, and recover densely sampled 4D spectra from limited observations. The reconstruction results demonstrate that our method, using a fraction of the samples, faithfully recovers both oscillatory and non-oscillatory spectral dynamics in experimental measurement. Moreover, we develop a loss-aware adaptive sampling method to progressively introduce potentially informative samples for iterative data collection while conducting experiments. Experimental results show that the proposed approach achieves high-fidelity spectral recovery using only $1/32$ of the sampling budget, as opposed to exhaustive sampling, effectively reducing total experiment time by up to 32-fold. This framework offers a scalable solution for accelerating any experiments with hypercube data, including multidimensional spectroscopy and hyperspectral imaging, paving the way for rapid chemical imaging of transient biological and material systems.

</details>


### [273] [Structural Regularities of Cinema SDR-to-HDR Mapping in a Controlled Mastering Workflow: A Pixel-wise Case Study on ASC StEM2](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06276)
*Xin Zhang,Xiaoyi Chen*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 基于ASC StEM2数据集对影院SDR到HDR映射进行实证研究，通过像素级统计分析揭示了SDR和HDR母版在亮度和色彩结构上的稳定对应关系及局部调整模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是使用ASC StEM2这一罕见的同源数据集，在受控的ACES工作流程下，对影院SDR到HDR映射进行定量分析，为结构感知的SDR-to-HDR分析和基于学习的模型设计提供可解释的基准。

Method: 方法包括：1) 使用ASC StEM2数据集（包含EXR场景参考图像和匹配的SDR/HDR影院母版）；2) 对18,580帧测试影片进行像素级统计分析；3) 构建三域比较（EXR源数据、SDR母版、HDR母版）；4) 定义像素级决策图，将图像区域分为EXR更接近的恢复区域和内容自适应调整区域。

Result: 结果显示：1) 亮度维度：SDR和HDR母版呈现高度稳定的全局单调对应关系，几何结构整体一致，仅在自发光高光和特定材质区域出现稀疏结构化偏差；2) 色彩维度：两母版色调基本一致，饱和度呈现阴影抑制、中间调扩展、高光收敛的重新分布模式；3) 82.4%的采样图像区域被分类为EXR更接近的恢复区域，其余17.6%需要局部自适应调整。

Conclusion: 结论是本研究提供了在共享源母版制作条件下，用于结构感知SDR-to-HDR分析和基于学习模型设计的可解释定量基准，而非声称适用于所有影院母版制作流程的通用规律。

Abstract: We present an empirical case study of cinema SDR-to-HDR mapping using ASC StEM2, a rare common-source dataset containing EXR scene-referred images and matched SDR/HDR cinema release masters from the same ACES-based mastering workflow. Based on pixel-wise statistics over all 18,580 frames of the test film, we construct a three-domain comparison involving EXR source data, SDR release masters, and HDR release masters to characterize their luminance and color structural relationships within this controlled workflow. In the luminance dimension, SDR and HDR masters exhibit a highly stable global monotonic correspondence, with geometric structure remaining largely consistent overall; sparse and structured deviations appear in self-luminous highlights and specific material regions. In the color dimension, the two masters remain largely consistent in hue, with saturation exhibiting a redistribution pattern of shadow suppression, midtone expansion, and highlight convergence. Using EXR as a scene-referred anchor, we further define a pixel-level decision map that operationally separates EXR-closer recovery regions from content-adaptive adjustment regions. Under this operational definition, 82.4% of sampled image regions are classified as EXR-closer recovery, while the remainder require localized adaptive adjustment. Rather than claiming a universal law for all cinema mastering pipelines, the study provides an interpretable quantitative baseline for structure-aware SDR-to-HDR analysis and for designing learning-based models under shared-source mastering conditions.

</details>


### [274] [CI-ICM: Channel Importance-driven Learned Image Coding for Machines](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05347)
*Yun Zhang,Junle Liu,Huan Zhang,Zhaoqing Pan,Gangyi Jiang,Weisi Lin*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 提出CI-ICM方法，通过通道重要性驱动的特征优化，提升机器视觉任务在给定比特率下的性能表现


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统以人类视觉为中心的图像压缩方法不适用于机器视觉任务，因为两者具有不同的视觉特性和特征表征需求。需要专门针对机器视觉的压缩方法，在给定比特率约束下最大化机器视觉任务性能。

Method: 1. 通道重要性生成模块：量化机器视觉中的通道重要性，使用通道排序损失函数按重要性降序排列通道。2. 特征通道分组与缩放模块：基于重要性非均匀分组特征通道，调整每组动态范围。3. 通道重要性上下文模块：在不同特征组间分配比特，保护关键通道的保真度。4. 任务特定通道适配模块：自适应增强特征以适应多种下游机器任务。

Result: 在COCO2017数据集上，相比基准编解码器，CI-ICM在目标检测任务上获得16.25%的BD-mAP@50:95增益，在实例分割任务上获得13.72%的增益。消融研究验证了各模块的有效性，计算复杂度分析表明方法的实用性。

Conclusion: 该工作建立了针对机器视觉压缩的特征通道优化方法，弥合了图像编码与机器感知之间的差距，为机器视觉中心的压缩提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Traditional human vision-centric image compression methods are suboptimal for machine vision centric compression due to different visual properties and feature characteristics. To address this problem, we propose a Channel Importance-driven learned Image Coding for Machines (CI-ICM), aiming to maximize the performance of machine vision tasks at a given bitrate constraint. First, we propose a Channel Importance Generation (CIG) module to quantify channel importance in machine vision and develop a channel order loss to rank channels in descending order. Second, to properly allocate bitrate among feature channels, we propose a Feature Channel Grouping and Scaling (FCGS) module that non-uniformly groups the feature channels based on their importance and adjusts the dynamic range of each group. Based on FCGS, we further propose a Channel Importance-based Context (CI-CTX) module to allocate bits among feature groups and to preserve higher fidelity in critical channels. Third, to adapt to multiple machine tasks, we propose a Task-Specific Channel Adaptation (TSCA) module to adaptively enhance features for multiple downstream machine tasks. Experimental results on the COCO2017 dataset show that the proposed CI-ICM achieves BD-mAP@50:95 gains of 16.25$\%$ in object detection and 13.72$\%$ in instance segmentation over the established baseline codec. Ablation studies validate the effectiveness of each contribution, and computation complexity analysis reveals the practicability of the CI-ICM. This work establishes feature channel optimization for machine vision-centric compression, bridging the gap between image coding and machine perception.

</details>


<div id='cs.DB'></div>

# cs.DB [[Back]](#toc)

### [275] [CubeGraph: Efficient Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Spatial and Temporal Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06616)
*Mingyu Yang,Wentao Li,Wei Wang*

Main category: cs.DB

TL;DR: CubeGraph：一种新颖的索引框架，通过分层网格划分空间域并在每个单元内维护向量图，动态缝合相邻单元索引以原生集成向量搜索与任意空间约束，显著提升混合查询性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代RAG系统中结合高维向量相似性搜索与时空过滤的混合查询日益重要。现有系统通常通过将向量索引嵌套在低维空间结构（如R树）中来处理这些工作负载，但这种解耦架构会分割向量空间，迫使查询引擎为每个查询调用多个不相交的子索引，破坏图路由连通性，产生严重的遍历开销，且难以优化复杂空间边界。

Method: 提出CubeGraph框架：1）使用分层网格划分空间域；2）在每个网格单元内维护模块化向量图；3）查询执行时，动态缝合与查询过滤器相交的空间单元对应的相邻立方体级索引；4）通过动态图集成恢复全局连通性，实现统一的单次最近邻遍历。

Result: 在真实世界数据集上的广泛评估表明，CubeGraph显著优于最先进的基线方法，在复杂混合工作负载下提供卓越的查询执行性能、可扩展性和灵活性。

Conclusion: CubeGraph通过原生集成向量搜索与空间约束，解决了现有解耦架构导致的向量空间碎片化和图连通性破坏问题，其动态图缝合机制实现了高效的统一遍历，为现代RAG系统的混合查询提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Hybrid queries combining high-dimensional vector similarity search with spatio-temporal filters are increasingly critical for modern retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems. Existing systems typically handle these workloads by nesting vector indices within low-dimensional spatial structures, such as R-trees. However, this decoupled architecture fragments the vector space, forcing the query engine to invoke multiple disjoint sub-indices per query. This fragmentation destroys graph routing connectivity, incurs severe traversal overhead, and struggles to optimize for complex spatial boundaries. In this paper, we propose CubeGraph, a novel indexing framework designed to natively integrate vector search with arbitrary spatial constraints. CubeGraph partitions the spatial domain using a hierarchical grid, maintaining modular vector graphs within each cell. During query execution, CubeGraph dynamically stitches together adjacent cube-level indices on the fly whenever their spatial cells intersect with the query filter. This dynamic graph integration restores global connectivity, enabling a unified, single-pass nearest-neighbor traversal that eliminates the overhead of fragmented sub-index invocations. Extensive evaluations on real-world datasets demonstrate that CubeGraph significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, offering superior query execution performance, scalability, and flexibility for complex hybrid workloads.

</details>


### [276] [AI-Driven Research for Databases](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06566)
*Audrey Cheng,Harald Ng,Aaron Kabcenell,Peter Bailis,Matei Zaharia,Lin Ma,Xiao Shi,Ion Stoica*

Main category: cs.DB

TL;DR: AI驱动系统研究(ADRS)通过大语言模型自动化数据库性能优化，但面临评估瓶颈。本文提出评估器与解决方案协同进化的方法，在缓冲管理、查询重写和索引选择三个案例中实现了超越现有方法的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代工作负载和硬件的复杂性已超出人类研究和工程能力，传统数据库性能优化方法难以跟上发展。AI驱动系统研究(ADRS)虽能自动化解决方案发现，但面临评估瓶颈：快速生成数百个候选方案需要快速准确的评估反馈，而复杂数据库系统的评估器设计尤为困难。

Method: 提出自动化评估器设计方法，通过评估器与解决方案协同进化来解决ADRS的评估瓶颈。该方法在三个数据库优化案例中应用：缓冲管理、查询重写和索引选择，实现了评估器与优化算法的共同进化。

Result: 协同进化方法成功发现了超越现有最优基准的新算法：确定性查询重写策略实现了高达6.8倍的延迟降低。自动化评估器使ADRS能够生成高度优化的、可部署的代码，为下一代数据系统提供了有效解决方案。

Conclusion: 解决评估瓶颈是释放ADRS潜力的关键。通过评估器与解决方案协同进化，能够自动化设计有效的评估器，从而发现超越现有方法的优化算法，为复杂数据库系统的性能优化提供了可行的自动化路径。

Abstract: As the complexity of modern workloads and hardware increasingly outpaces human research and engineering capacity, existing methods for database performance optimization struggle to keep pace. To address this gap, a new class of techniques, termed AI-Driven Research for Systems (ADRS), uses large language models to automate solution discovery. This approach shifts optimization from manual system design to automated code generation. The key obstacle, however, in applying ADRS is the evaluation pipeline. Since these frameworks rapidly generate hundreds of candidates without human supervision, they depend on fast and accurate feedback from evaluators to converge on effective solutions. Building such evaluators is especially difficult for complex database systems. To enable the practical application of ADRS in this domain, we propose automating the design of evaluators by co-evolving them with the solutions. We demonstrate the effectiveness of this approach through three case studies optimizing buffer management, query rewriting, and index selection. Our automated evaluators enable the discovery of novel algorithms that outperform state-of-the-art baselines (e.g., a deterministic query rewrite policy that achieves up to 6.8x lower latency), demonstrating that addressing the evaluation bottleneck unlocks the potential of ADRS to generate highly optimized, deployable code for next-generation data systems.

</details>


<div id='cs.PL'></div>

# cs.PL [[Back]](#toc)

### [277] [EffiPair: Improving the Efficiency of LLM-generated Code with Relative Contrastive Feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05137)
*Samira Hajizadeh,Suman Jana*

Main category: cs.PL

TL;DR: EffiPair：基于相对对比反馈的推理时迭代优化框架，无需模型微调即可提升LLM生成代码的效率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法依赖单一程序的绝对执行反馈（如运行时分析），成本高且指导性弱，需要更高效的代码效率优化机制

Method: 提出相对对比反馈（RCF）机制，比较同一任务的两个结构相似程序，突出效率差异；在此基础上构建EffiPair框架：生成多个候选方案，识别效率差距大的程序对，总结执行差异为轻量反馈，利用该信号生成更高效解决方案

Result: 在代码效率基准测试中，EffiPair在保持正确性的同时持续提升效率；使用DeepSeek-Chat V3.2时，相比无性能反馈的生成获得1.5倍加速，相比先前工作减少90%以上的token使用

Conclusion: 相对对比反馈比绝对反馈提供更直接的指导，减少分析和提示开销；EffiPair在推理时即可有效优化代码效率，无需模型微调

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) often generate code that is functionally correct but inefficient in runtime and memory. Prior approaches to improving code efficiency typically rely on absolute execution feedback, such as profiling a single program's runtime or memory usage, which is costly and provides weak guidance for refinement. We propose Relative Contrastive Feedback (RCF), an inference-time feedback mechanism that requires no model fine-tuning or parameter updates. RCF compares two structurally similar programs for the same task and highlights the differences associated with better efficiency. Building on this idea, we introduce EffiPair, an inference-time iterative refinement framework that operates entirely at test time by generating multiple candidate solutions, identifying informative program pairs with large efficiency gaps, summarizing their execution differences into lightweight feedback, and using this signal to produce more efficient solutions. By replacing isolated scalar feedback with pairwise contrastive comparisons, EffiPair provides more direct guidance while reducing profiling and prompting overhead. Experiments on code-efficiency benchmarks show that EffiPair consistently improves efficiency while preserving correctness. For instance, with DeepSeek-Chat V3.2, EffiPair achieves up to 1.5x speedup over generation without performance feedback, while reducing token usage by more than 90% compared to prior work.

</details>


<div id='cs.ET'></div>

# cs.ET [[Back]](#toc)

### [278] [Probabilistic Tree Inference Enabled by FDSOI Ferroelectric FETs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05115)
*Pengyu Ren,Xingtian Wang,Boyang Cheng,Jiahui Duan,Giuk Kim,Xuezhong Niu,Halid Mulaosmanovic,Stefan Duenkel,Sven Beyer,X. Sharon Hu,Ningyuan Cao,Kai Ni*

Main category: cs.ET

TL;DR: 提出一种基于FDSOI-FeFET的单片硬件平台，原生支持ACAM和GRNG功能，用于高效实现贝叶斯决策树，在不确定性量化、可解释性和噪声鲁棒性方面表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动驾驶、医疗诊断和金融系统等应用需要具有不确定性量化、可解释性和噪声鲁棒性的机器学习模型。现有贝叶斯决策树的硬件实现存在内存瓶颈、不规则处理模式、集成复杂性和能耗问题，需要更高效的硬件解决方案。

Method: 开发单片FDSOI-FeFET硬件平台，利用FeFET的铁电极化实现紧凑、节能的多位存储用于ACAM，利用栅漏重叠区的带间隧穿和浮体中的空穴存储提供高质量熵源用于GRNG，从而原生支持ACAM和GRNG功能。

Result: 在MNIST数据集上，相比传统决策树，在数据集噪声和设备变化下分类准确率提高超过40%；相比CPU和GPU基线，速度提升超过两个数量级，能效提升超过四个数量级；系统级评估显示该架构具有鲁棒的不确定性估计、可解释性和噪声容忍度。

Conclusion: 该单片FDSOI-FeFET硬件平台为贝叶斯决策树提供了可扩展的高效能硬件解决方案，特别适合资源受限和安全关键环境的应用部署。

Abstract: Artificial intelligence applications in autonomous driving, medical diagnostics, and financial systems increasingly demand machine learning models that can provide robust uncertainty quantification, interpretability, and noise resilience. Bayesian decision trees (BDTs) are attractive for these tasks because they combine probabilistic reasoning, interpretable decision-making, and robustness to noise. However, existing hardware implementations of BDTs based on CPUs and GPUs are limited by memory bottlenecks and irregular processing patterns, while multi-platform solutions exploiting analog content-addressable memory (ACAM) and Gaussian random number generators (GRNGs) introduce integration complexity and energy overheads. Here we report a monolithic FDSOI-FeFET hardware platform that natively supports both ACAM and GRNG functionalities. The ferroelectric polarization of FeFETs enables compact, energy-efficient multi-bit storage for ACAM, and band-to-band tunneling in the gate-to-drain overlap region and subsequent hole storage in the floating body provides a high-quality entropy source for GRNG. System-level evaluations demonstrate that the proposed architecture provides robust uncertainty estimation, interpretability, and noise tolerance with high energy efficiency. Under both dataset noise and device variations, it achieves over 40% higher classification accuracy on MNIST compared to conventional decision trees. Moreover, it delivers more than two orders of magnitude speedup over CPU and GPU baselines and over four orders of magnitude improvement in energy efficiency, making it a scalable solution for deploying BDTs in resource-constrained and safety-critical environments.

</details>


<div id='cs.IR'></div>

# cs.IR [[Back]](#toc)

### [279] [BRIDGE: Multimodal-to-Text Retrieval via Reinforcement-Learned Query Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07201)
*Mohamed Darwish Mounis,Mohamed Mahmoud,Shaimaa Sedek,Mahmoud Abdalla,Mahmoud SalahEldin Kasem,Abdelrahman Abdallah,Hyun-Soo Kang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: BRIDGE系统通过FORGE查询对齐和LENS增强检索，在MM-BRIGHT上超越多模态编码器，证明查询对齐是多模态到文本检索的关键瓶颈


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态检索系统在处理图像-文本查询对纯文本语料库时表现不佳，作者认为瓶颈在于查询本身而非检索器——原始多模态查询将视觉描述、对话噪声和检索意图混杂在一起，系统性降低了嵌入相似性

Method: 提出BRIDGE两组件系统：1) FORGE（专注检索查询生成器）——通过强化学习训练的查询对齐模型，将噪声多模态查询提炼为紧凑、检索优化的搜索字符串；2) LENS（语言增强神经搜索）——在推理密集型检索数据上微调的推理增强密集检索器，处理FORGE生成的意图丰富查询

Result: 在MM-BRIGHT（2,803查询，29个领域）上，BRIDGE达到29.7 nDCG@10，超越所有多模态编码器基线（包括Nomic-Vision的27.6）。当FORGE作为即插即用对齐器应用于Nomic-Vision时，组合系统达到33.3 nDCG@10，超过最佳纯文本检索器（32.2）

Conclusion: 查询对齐是多模态到文本检索的关键瓶颈，BRIDGE系统通过查询对齐和推理增强检索有效解决了这一问题，无需多模态编码器即可超越现有方法

Abstract: Multimodal retrieval systems struggle to resolve image-text queries against text-only corpora: the best vision-language encoder achieves only 27.6 nDCG@10 on MM-BRIGHT, underperforming strong text-only retrievers. We argue the bottleneck is not the retriever but the query -- raw multimodal queries entangle visual descriptions, conversational noise, and retrieval intent in ways that systematically degrade embedding similarity. We present \textbf{BRIDGE}, a two-component system that resolves this mismatch without multimodal encoders. \textbf{FORGE} (\textbf{F}ocused Retrieval Query Generato\textbf{r}) is a query alignment model trained via reinforcement learning, which distills noisy multimodal queries into compact, retrieval-optimized search strings. \textbf{LENS} (\textbf{L}anguage-\textbf{E}nhanced \textbf{N}eural \textbf{S}earch) is a reasoning-enhanced dense retriever fine-tuned on reasoning-intensive retrieval data to handle the intent-rich queries FORGE produces. Evaluated on MM-BRIGHT (2,803 queries, 29 domains), BRIDGE achieves \textbf{29.7} nDCG@10, surpassing all multimodal encoder baselines including Nomic-Vision (27.6). When FORGE is applied as a plug-and-play aligner on top of Nomic-Vision, the combined system reaches \textbf{33.3} nDCG@10 -- exceeding the best text-only retriever (32.2) -- demonstrating that \textit{query alignment} is the key bottleneck in multimodal-to-text retrieval. https://github.com/mm-bright/multimodal-reasoning-retrieval

</details>


### [280] [CASE: Cadence-Aware Set Encoding for Large-Scale Next Basket Repurchase Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06718)
*Yanan Cao,Ashish Ranjan,Sinduja Subramaniam,Evren Korpeoglu,Kaushiki Nag,Kannan Achan*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: CASE模型通过解耦商品级购买节奏学习和跨商品交互，实现显式日历时间建模，在保持生产可扩展性的同时提升重复购买推荐性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 重复购买行为是大规模零售推荐中的主要信号，特别是在高频补货品类中。然而，现有模型将历史表示为按访问顺序索引的离散购物篮事件序列，无法显式建模日历时间流逝或随着购买间隔天数更新商品排名。

Method: CASE将每个商品的购买历史表示为固定时间范围内的日历时间信号，应用共享多尺度时间卷积捕捉重复节奏，并使用诱导集合注意力以亚二次复杂度建模跨商品依赖关系，支持大规模批量推理。

Result: 在三个公共基准测试和一个专有数据集上，CASE在多个截断点持续提升Precision、Recall和NDCG。在生产规模评估中（数千万用户和大型商品目录），CASE在top-5上实现8.6%相对Precision提升和9.9% Recall提升。

Conclusion: 可扩展的节奏感知建模在基准测试和工业环境中都能带来可衡量的性能提升，CASE通过显式日历时间建模有效解决了传统序列模型在重复购买推荐中的局限性。

Abstract: Repurchase behavior is a primary signal in large-scale retail recommendation, particularly in categories with frequent replenishment: many items in a user's next basket were previously purchased and their timing follows stable, item-specific cadences. Yet most next basket repurchase recommendation models represent history as a sequence of discrete basket events indexed by visit order, which cannot explicitly model elapsed calendar time or update item rankings as days pass between purchases. We present CASE (Cadence-Aware Set Encoding for next basket repurchase recommendation), which decouples item-level cadence learning from cross-item interaction, enabling explicit calendar-time modeling while remaining production-scalable. CASE represents each item's purchase history as a calendar-time signal over a fixed horizon, applies shared multi-scale temporal convolutions to capture recurring rhythms, and uses induced set attention to model cross-item dependencies with sub-quadratic complexity, allowing efficient batch inference at scale. Across three public benchmarks and a proprietary dataset, CASE consistently improves Precision, Recall, and NDCG at multiple cutoffs compared to strong next basket prediction baselines. In a production-scale evaluation with tens of millions of users and a large item catalog, CASE achieves up to 8.6% relative Precision and 9.9% Recall lift at top-5, demonstrating that scalable cadence-aware modeling yields measurable gains in both benchmark and industrial settings.

</details>


### [281] [The Unreasonable Effectiveness of Data for Recommender Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06420)
*Youssef Abdou*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 该研究探讨推荐系统中训练数据规模对性能的影响，发现即使数据量达到1亿次交互，传统推荐算法性能仍持续提升，未观察到明显的饱和点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在推荐系统中，收集、存储和处理大规模交互数据的成本日益增加，但尚不清楚何时额外的数据不再带来有意义的性能提升。本研究旨在探究离线推荐性能如何随训练数据集规模增长而变化，以及是否能观察到性能饱和点。

Method: 研究采用可复现的Python评估流程，使用LensKit和RecBole两个成熟工具包，包含11个至少700万次交互的大型公开数据集，评估了10种工具-算法组合。通过绝对分层用户采样，在9个样本规模（从10万到1亿次交互）上训练模型，并测量NDCG@10指标。为比较不同结果组，在每个组内应用最小-最大归一化，并对每个组的最后10-30%阶段进行斜率分析。

Result: 原始NDCG通常随样本规模增加而提升，未观察到饱和点。归一化后显示明显正向趋势：约75%的最大完成样本规模点也达到了该组的最佳观测性能。晚期斜率分析进一步支持这一上升趋势：四分位距完全非负，中位数接近1.0。这表明对于典型用户-物品交互数据上的传统推荐系统，增加训练数据仍然主要是有益的。

Conclusion: 对于典型用户-物品交互数据上的传统推荐系统，增加训练数据仍然主要是有益的，性能持续提升且未观察到饱和点。较弱的缩放行为主要集中在非典型数据集案例和特定算法（RecBole BPR）中。

Abstract: In recommender systems, collecting, storing, and processing large-scale interaction data is increasingly costly in terms of time, energy, and computation, yet it remains unclear when additional data stops providing meaningful gains. This paper investigates how offline recommendation performance evolves as the size of the training dataset increases and whether a saturation point can be observed. We implemented a reproducible Python evaluation workflow with two established toolkits, LensKit and RecBole, included 11 large public datasets with at least 7 million interactions, and evaluated 10 tool-algorithm combinations. Using absolute stratified user sampling, we trained models on nine sample sizes from 100,000 to 100,000,000 interactions and measured NDCG@10. Overall, raw NDCG usually increased with sample size, with no observable saturation point. To make result groups comparable, we applied min-max normalization within each group, revealing a clear positive trend in which around 75% of the points at the largest completed sample size also achieved the group's best observed performance. A late-stage slope analysis over the final 10-30% of each group further supported this upward trend: the interquartile range remained entirely non-negative with a median near 1.0. In summary, for traditional recommender systems on typical user-item interaction data, incorporating more training data remains primarily beneficial, while weaker scaling behavior is concentrated in atypical dataset cases and in the algorithmic outlier RecBole BPR under our setup.

</details>


### [282] [Retrieve-then-Adapt: Retrieval-Augmented Test-Time Adaptation for Sequential Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05379)
*Xing Tang,Jingyang Bin,Ziqiang Cui,Xiaokun Zhang,Fuyuan Lyu,Jingyan Jiang,Dugang Liu,Chen Ma,Xiuqiang He*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出ReAd框架，通过检索相似用户偏好信号实现推荐模型的测试时自适应，解决传统序列推荐模型难以适应实时偏好变化的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统序列推荐模型在历史数据上训练后，在推理阶段难以适应实时偏好变化，主要受分布差异和参数化约束的限制。现有方法如测试时训练、测试时增强和检索增强微调要么计算开销大，要么依赖随机增强策略，要么需要精心设计的两阶段训练范式。

Method: 提出Retrieve-then-Adapt (ReAd)框架：1) 从构建的协同记忆数据库中为测试用户检索协同相似物品；2) 通过轻量级检索学习模块将这些物品整合为信息增强嵌入，捕捉协同信号和预测细化线索；3) 通过融合机制将增强嵌入整合到初始SR预测中进行细化。

Result: 在五个基准数据集上的广泛实验表明，ReAd始终优于现有的序列推荐方法。

Conclusion: ReAd框架通过实现有效增强和高效自适应，解决了序列推荐模型在测试时适应实时偏好变化的关键挑战，为测试时自适应提供了新的解决方案。

Abstract: The sequential recommendation (SR) task aims to predict the next item based on users' historical interaction sequences. Typically trained on historical data, SR models often struggle to adapt to real-time preference shifts during inference due to challenges posed by distributional divergence and parameterized constraints. Existing approaches to address this issue include test-time training, test-time augmentation, and retrieval-augmented fine-tuning. However, these methods either introduce significant computational overhead, rely on random augmentation strategies, or require a carefully designed two-stage training paradigm. In this paper, we argue that the key to effective test-time adaptation lies in achieving both effective augmentation and efficient adaptation. To this end, we propose Retrieve-then-Adapt (ReAd), a novel framework that dynamically adapts a deployed SR model to the test distribution through retrieved user preference signals. Specifically, given a trained SR model, ReAd first retrieves collaboratively similar items for a test user from a constructed collaborative memory database. A lightweight retrieval learning module then integrates these items into an informative augmentation embedding that captures both collaborative signals and prediction-refinement cues. Finally, the initial SR prediction is refined via a fusion mechanism that incorporates this embedding. Extensive experiments across five benchmark datasets demonstrate that ReAd consistently outperforms existing SR methods.

</details>


### [283] [Spike Hijacking in Late-Interaction Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05253)
*Karthik Suresh,Tushar Vatsa,Tracy King,Asim Kadav,Michael Friedrich*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: MaxSim（硬最大相似度）池化在后期交互检索中导致梯度集中，虽然能提升早期区分度，但会降低对文档长度的鲁棒性，存在稀疏性与鲁棒性的权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究MaxSim池化在后期交互检索模型中的结构偏差问题。尽管MaxSim有效，但其赢家通吃的池化规则可能对训练动态产生结构性偏置，需要从梯度路由和鲁棒性角度进行机制性分析。

Method: 1. 在受控合成环境中使用批内对比训练；2. 比较MaxSim与Top-k池化、softmax聚合等平滑替代方案；3. 分析梯度集中程度和文档长度敏感性；4. 在真实多向量检索基准上进行文档长度扫描验证。

Result: 1. MaxSim导致显著更高的补丁级梯度集中；2. 稀疏路由能改善早期区分度，但增加对文档长度的敏感性；3. 随着文档补丁数量增加，MaxSim比平滑变体退化更严重；4. 真实基准实验证实了硬最大池化的脆弱性。

Conclusion: 池化诱导的梯度集中是后期交互检索的结构特性，揭示了稀疏性与鲁棒性的权衡。这些发现为多向量检索系统中硬最大池化的原则性替代方案提供了动机。

Abstract: Late-interaction retrieval models rely on hard maximum similarity (MaxSim) to aggregate token-level similarities. Although effective, this winner-take-all pooling rule may structurally bias training dynamics. We provide a mechanistic study of gradient routing and robustness in MaxSim-based retrieval. In a controlled synthetic environment with in-batch contrastive training, we demonstrate that MaxSim induces significantly higher patch-level gradient concentration than smoother alternatives such as Top-k pooling and softmax aggregation. While sparse routing can improve early discrimination, it also increases sensitivity to document length: as the number of document patches grows, MaxSim degrades more sharply than mild smoothing variants. We corroborate these findings on a real-world multi-vector retrieval benchmark, where controlled document-length sweeps reveal similar brittleness under hard max pooling. Together, our results isolate pooling-induced gradient concentration as a structural property of late-interaction retrieval and highlight a sparsity-robustness tradeoff. These findings motivate principled alternatives to hard max pooling in multi-vector retrieval systems.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [284] [How to sketch a learning algorithm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07328)
*Sam Gunn*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种数据删除方案，能够预测在排除特定训练数据子集后深度学习模型的输出，误差可降至任意小ε，计算和存储开销仅为poly(1/ε)倍


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究训练数据选择对AI模型的影响是解释性、隐私和基础科学的核心问题，关键在于解决数据删除问题：在合理预计算后，快速预测如果从学习算法中排除特定训练数据子集，模型在给定情况下的行为

Method: 基于"稳定性"假设的数据删除方案，采用新的局部草图技术：通过在随机复数方向上计算高阶导数来局部草图化算术电路，利用前向模式自动微分廉价计算这些导数

Result: 提出的方案能够以任意小误差ε预测模型输出，预计算和预测算法仅比常规训练和推理慢poly(1/ε)倍，存储需求为poly(1/ε)个模型

Conclusion: 该工作通过稳定性假设和新的局部草图技术解决了深度学习中的数据删除问题，与先前工作相比，稳定性假设与学习强大AI模型完全兼容，并在microgpt实验中得到了验证

Abstract: How does the choice of training data influence an AI model? This question is of central importance to interpretability, privacy, and basic science. At its core is the data deletion problem: after a reasonable amount of precomputation, quickly predict how the model would behave in a given situation if a given subset of training data had been excluded from the learning algorithm.
  We present a data deletion scheme capable of predicting model outputs with vanishing error $\varepsilon$ in the deep learning setting. Our precomputation and prediction algorithms are only $\mathrm{poly}(1/\varepsilon)$ factors slower than regular training and inference, respectively. The storage requirements are those of $\mathrm{poly}(1/\varepsilon)$ models.
  Our proof is based on an assumption that we call "stability." In contrast to the assumptions made by prior work, stability appears to be fully compatible with learning powerful AI models. In support of this, we show that stability is satisfied in a minimal set of experiments with microgpt. Our code is available at https://github.com/SamSpo1/microgpt-sketch.
  At a technical level, our work is based on a new method for locally sketching an arithmetic circuit by computing higher-order derivatives in random complex directions. Forward-mode automatic differentiation allows cheap computation of these derivatives.

</details>


### [285] [Mixture Proportion Estimation and Weakly-supervised Kernel Test for Conditional Independence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07191)
*Yushi Hirose,Akito Narahara,Takafumi Kanamori*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出基于条件独立性的混合比例估计新方法，不依赖传统不可约性假设，开发矩估计器并分析渐近性质，同时提出弱监督核检验验证假设。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有混合比例估计方法依赖不可约性假设或其变体进行可识别性，但在不可约性不成立时无法工作。需要更一般的假设框架来确保可识别性，特别是在弱监督学习场景中。

Method: 提出基于类标签条件独立性的新假设，确保可识别性；开发矩估计方法，分析其渐近性质；提出弱监督核检验来验证条件独立性假设。

Result: 新估计器相比现有方法性能提升；提出的核检验能有效控制I型和II型错误；方法在不可约性不成立时仍能工作。

Conclusion: 基于条件独立性的混合比例估计方法提供了更一般的可识别性框架，不依赖传统不可约性假设，在弱监督学习中具有广泛应用价值，包括因果发现和公平性评估等场景。

Abstract: Mixture proportion estimation (MPE) aims to estimate class priors from unlabeled data. This task is a critical component in weakly supervised learning, such as PU learning, learning with label noise, and domain adaptation. Existing MPE methods rely on the \textit{irreducibility} assumption or its variant for identifiability. In this paper, we propose novel assumptions based on conditional independence (CI) given the class label, which ensure identifiability even when irreducibility does not hold. We develop method of moments estimators under these assumptions and analyze their asymptotic properties. Furthermore, we present weakly-supervised kernel tests to validate the CI assumptions, which are of independent interest in applications such as causal discovery and fairness evaluation. Empirically, we demonstrate the improved performance of our estimators compared with existing methods and that our tests successfully control both type I and type II errors.\label{key}

</details>


### [286] [Tracking Adaptation Time: Metrics for Temporal Distribution Shift](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07266)
*Lorenzo Iovine,Giacomo Ziffer,Emanuele Della Valle*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出三种互补指标来区分模型适应性与数据内在难度，以更全面评估时间分布偏移下的模型鲁棒性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有指标仅量化性能平均下降，无法捕捉模型如何适应演化数据，导致时间退化常被误解：当准确率下降时，不清楚是模型未能适应还是数据本身变得更难学习

Method: 提出三种互补指标来区分模型适应性与数据内在难度，这些指标共同提供时间分布偏移下模型行为的动态可解释视图

Result: 结果显示这些指标揭示了现有分析隐藏的适应模式，为演化环境中时间鲁棒性提供了更丰富的理解

Conclusion: 提出的指标能够区分模型适应性与数据内在难度，提供对时间分布偏移下模型行为的动态可解释视图，有助于更准确评估时间鲁棒性

Abstract: Evaluating robustness under temporal distribution shift remains an open challenge. Existing metrics quantify the average decline in performance, but fail to capture how models adapt to evolving data. As a result, temporal degradation is often misinterpreted: when accuracy declines, it is unclear whether the model is failing to adapt or whether the data itself has become inherently more challenging to learn. In this work, we propose three complementary metrics to distinguish adaptation from intrinsic difficulty in the data. Together, these metrics provide a dynamic and interpretable view of model behavior under temporal distribution shift. Results show that our metrics uncover adaptation patterns hidden by existing analysis, offering a richer understanding of temporal robustness in evolving environments.

</details>


### [287] [A comparative analysis of machine learning models in SHAP analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07258)
*Justin Lin,Julia Fukuyama*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文探讨了SHAP分析在不同机器学习模型和数据集上的应用，提出了多分类问题的瀑布图泛化方法，旨在帮助分析师更好地理解和解释黑盒模型的预测过程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着大数据和复杂模型的发展，黑盒模型虽然能处理海量数据并学习复杂模式，但缺乏可解释性，使其在高风险场景中不可信。SHAP分析作为可解释AI方法日益流行，但其解释依赖于具体模型，缺乏通用分析流程。

Method: 1. 对多种机器学习模型和数据集进行详细的SHAP分析研究；2. 提出多分类问题中瀑布图（waterfall plot）的新泛化方法；3. 探索SHAP值在不同模型和数据集中的解释差异。

Result: 通过系统研究揭示了SHAP分析在不同模型和数据集中的细节和细微差别，为分析师提供了在这一较少探索领域的实用指导。提出的多分类瀑布图泛化方法扩展了SHAP可视化工具的应用范围。

Conclusion: SHAP分析是解释黑盒模型预测的有力工具，但其解释具有模型依赖性。系统研究不同场景下的SHAP分析有助于分析师更好地利用这一工具，提出的多分类瀑布图泛化方法进一步增强了SHAP的可视化能力。

Abstract: In this growing age of data and technology, large black-box models are becoming the norm due to their ability to handle vast amounts of data and learn incredibly complex data patterns. The deficiency of these methods, however, is their inability to explain the prediction process, making them untrustworthy and their use precarious in high-stakes situations. SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) analysis is an explainable AI method growing in popularity for its ability to explain model predictions in terms of the original features. For each sample and feature in the data set, an associated SHAP value quantifies the contribution of that feature to the prediction of that sample. Analysis of these SHAP values provides valuable insight into the model's decision-making process, which can be leveraged to create data-driven solutions. The interpretation of these SHAP values, however, is model-dependent, so there does not exist a universal analysis procedure. To aid in these efforts, we present a detailed investigation of SHAP analysis across various machine learning models and data sets. In uncovering the details and nuance behind SHAP analysis, we hope to empower analysts in this less-explored territory. We also present a novel generalization of the waterfall plot to the multi-classification problem.

</details>


### [288] [Weaves, Wires, and Morphisms: Formalizing and Implementing the Algebra of Deep Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07242)
*Vincent Abbott,Gioele Zardini*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出用于深度学习模型的范畴论框架，通过轴步长和数组广播范畴形式化广播操作，实现架构的数学精确表达和组合操作


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管深度学习模型运行明确定义的数学函数，但缺乏描述模型架构的正式数学框架。临时符号、图表和伪代码难以处理非线性广播以及组件与组合模型之间的关系

Method: 引入深度学习模型的范畴论框架，通过新颖的轴步长和数组广播范畴形式化广播操作，允许以组合方式精确表达和操作架构的数学函数。将数学定义转化为人类可管理的图表和机器可管理的数据结构

Result: 提供了Python(pyncd)和TypeScript(tsncd)的镜像实现以展示框架的通用性，包含代数构造、图转换、PyTorch编译和图表渲染等功能

Conclusion: 为深度学习模型设计和分析的系统化、形式化方法奠定了基础

Abstract: Despite deep learning models running well-defined mathematical functions, we lack a formal mathematical framework for describing model architectures. Ad-hoc notation, diagrams, and pseudocode poorly handle nonlinear broadcasting and the relationship between individual components and composed models. This paper introduces a categorical framework for deep learning models that formalizes broadcasting through the novel axis-stride and array-broadcasted categories. This allows the mathematical function underlying architectures to be precisely expressed and manipulated in a compositional manner. These mathematical definitions are translated into human manageable diagrams and machine manageable data structures. We provide a mirrored implementation in Python (pyncd) and TypeScript (tsncd) to show the universal aspect of our framework, along with features including algebraic construction, graph conversion, PyTorch compilation and diagram rendering. This lays the foundation for a systematic, formal approach to deep learning model design and analysis.

</details>


### [289] [On the Price of Privacy for Language Identification and Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07238)
*Xiaoyu Li,Andi Han,Jiaojiao Jiang,Junbin Gao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文研究了差分隐私在语言识别和生成任务中的基本成本，发现在近似差分隐私下可达到非私有错误率，在纯差分隐私下错误率指数会降低min{1,ε}倍，且该界限是紧的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着大语言模型越来越多地在敏感用户数据上训练，理解隐私在语言学习中的基本成本变得至关重要。论文旨在研究不可知统计设置下的差分隐私语言识别和生成任务。

Method: 在不可知统计设置下建立差分隐私语言识别和生成的算法，并通过匹配的下界精确量化隐私成本。分析近似(ε,δ)-DP和纯ε-DP两种隐私设置下的性能界限。

Result: 近似(ε,δ)-DP（常数ε>0）可恢复非私有错误率：识别任务为exp(-r(n))（任意r(n)=o(n)），生成任务为exp(-Ω(n))。纯ε-DP下指数会降低min{1,ε}倍，且该界限在常数因子内是紧的。对于生成任务，在温和假设下，上界exp(-min{1,ε}·Ω(n))与下界匹配。

Conclusion: 隐私在语言学习中的成本出人意料地温和：在近似差分隐私下完全不存在成本，在纯差分隐私下仅为指数中的min{1,ε}因子。这为差分隐私语言学习提供了理论基础和最优界限。

Abstract: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly trained on sensitive user data, understanding the fundamental cost of privacy in language learning becomes essential. We initiate the study of differentially private (DP) language identification and generation in the agnostic statistical setting, establishing algorithms and matching lower bounds that precisely quantify the cost of privacy. For both tasks, approximate $(\varepsilon, δ)$-DP with constant $\varepsilon > 0$ recovers the non-private error rates: $\exp(-r(n))$ for identification (for any $r(n) = o(n)$) and $\exp(-Ω(n))$ for generation. Under pure $\varepsilon$-DP, the exponents degrade by a multiplicative factor of $\min\{1, \varepsilon\}$, which we show is tight up to constants. Notably, for generation under pure DP with mild assumptions, the upper bound $\exp(-\min\{1,\varepsilon\} \cdot Ω(n))$ matches the lower bound up to some constants, establishing an optimal rate. Our results show that the cost of privacy in language learning is surprisingly mild: absent entirely under approximate DP, and exactly a $\min\{1,\varepsilon\}$ factor in the exponent under pure DP.

</details>


### [290] [How Does Machine Learning Manage Complexity?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07233)
*Lance Fortnow*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文从计算复杂性角度分析机器学习模型的能力，特别是其建模复杂系统的能力。研究关注可计算分布而非更广泛的样本分布，通过抽象机器学习为产生P/poly可计算分布的过程，展示学习可计算分布如何建模复杂性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器学习模型通常在可采样或更复杂的分布上进行训练，这些分布范围远超过可计算分布。通过专注于可计算分布，机器学习模型可以更好地通过概率管理复杂性。研究旨在从计算复杂性视角理解机器学习模型的能力，特别是其建模复杂系统的能力。

Method: 抽象机器学习过程，将其建模为产生P/poly可计算分布的过程，这些分布具有多项式有界最大熵。通过理论分析展示，如果机器学习模型产生的分布μ最小化与密码学伪随机生成器生成分布的误差，则μ必须接近均匀分布。

Result: 研究结果表明，当机器学习模型试图最小化与密码学伪随机生成器生成分布的误差时，其产生的分布必须接近均匀分布。这展示了学习可计算分布如何建模复杂性，并为理解机器学习模型的能力提供了计算复杂性视角。

Conclusion: 通过计算复杂性视角分析机器学习模型，特别是关注可计算分布而非更广泛的样本分布，可以更好地理解机器学习模型建模复杂系统的能力。研究展示了学习可计算分布如何建模复杂性，为机器学习理论提供了新的分析框架。

Abstract: We provide a computational complexity lens to understand the power of machine learning models, particularly their ability to model complex systems.
  Machine learning models are often trained on data drawn from sampleable or more complex distributions, a far wider range of distributions than just computable ones. By focusing on computable distributions, machine learning models can better manage complexity via probability. We abstract away from specific learning mechanisms, modeling machine learning as producing P/poly-computable distributions with polynomially-bounded max-entropy.
  We illustrate how learning computable distributions models complexity by showing that if a machine learning model produces a distribution $μ$ that minimizes error against the distribution generated by a cryptographic pseudorandom generator, then $μ$ must be close to uniform.

</details>


### [291] [Diffusion Processes on Implicit Manifolds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07213)
*Victor Kawasaki-Borruat,Clara Grotehans,Pierre Vandergheynst,Adam Gosztolai*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种在隐式设置下构建数据流形上扩散过程的方法，仅使用点云样本而无需访问几何基元，通过估计生成元和carré-du-champ来定义环境空间中的SDE，实现内在扩散。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高维数据通常位于低维流形附近，但现有方法需要显式的几何结构（如坐标卡、投影等）。本文旨在仅使用点云样本，在隐式设置下构建流形上的扩散过程，为流形感知的采样、探索和生成建模提供理论基础。

Method: 基于邻近图从数据中估计扩散过程的无穷小生成元及其carré-du-champ（CDC），两者共同编码了目标扩散的局部随机和几何结构。通过这种估计构建数据驱动的随机微分方程（SDE），在环境空间中捕获底层流形的内在扩散。

Result: 证明了随着样本数量增加，诱导过程在概率路径空间上依分布收敛到其光滑流形对应物。提出了称为隐式流形值扩散（IMDs）的构造，并提供了使用Euler-Maruyama积分的数值模拟程序。

Conclusion: 为数据流形上扩散动力学的实际实现提供了严格基础，开辟了流形感知采样、探索和生成建模的新方向，实现了仅从点云样本出发的隐式流形扩散过程构建。

Abstract: High-dimensional data are often modeled as lying near a low-dimensional manifold. We study how to construct diffusion processes on this data manifold in the implicit setting. That is, using only point cloud samples and without access to charts, projections, or other geometric primitives. Our main contribution is a data-driven SDE that captures intrinsic diffusion on the underlying manifold while being defined in ambient space. The construction relies on estimating the diffusion's infinitesimal generator and its carré-du-champ (CDC) from a proximity graph built from the data. The generator and CDC together encode the local stochastic and geometric structure of the intended diffusion. We show that, as the number of samples grows, the induced process converges in law on the space of probability paths to its smooth manifold counterpart. We call this construction Implicit Manifold-valued Diffusions (IMDs), and furthermore present a numerical simulation procedure using Euler-Maruyama integration. This gives a rigorous basis for practical implementations of diffusion dynamics on data manifolds, and opens new directions for manifold-aware sampling, exploration, and generative modeling.

</details>


### [292] [Beyond the Mean: Modelling Annotation Distributions in Continuous Affect Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07198)
*Kosmas Pinitas,Ilias Maglogiannis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出基于Beta分布的分布感知框架，用于连续情感预测，建模标注者共识而非单一真值，捕捉标注不确定性和变异性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 情感标注本质上是主观且认知要求高的任务，产生反映不同标注者感知差异的信号而非单一真值。传统连续情感预测方法将这种变异性压缩为均值或中位数等点估计，丢弃了标注者分歧和不确定性的宝贵信息

Method: 提出基于Beta分布的分布感知框架，模型估计标注分布的均值和标准差，通过矩匹配转换为有效的Beta分布参数。该公式能够以闭式形式恢复高阶分布描述符，包括偏度、峰度和分位数

Result: 在SEWA和RECOLA数据集上使用多模态特征进行评估，实验结果表明基于Beta分布的建模产生的预测分布与经验标注分布高度匹配，同时与传统回归方法相比具有竞争力的性能

Conclusion: 研究强调了在情感计算中建模标注不确定性的重要性，展示了分布感知学习在主观信号分析中的潜力。Beta分布框架能够捕捉情感感知的中心趋势以及标注者响应的变异性、不对称性和不确定性

Abstract: Emotion annotation is inherently subjective and cognitively demanding, producing signals that reflect diverse perceptions across annotators rather than a single ground truth. In continuous affect prediction, this variability is typically collapsed into point estimates such as the mean or median, discarding valuable information about annotator disagreement and uncertainty. In this work, we propose a distribution-aware framework that models annotation consensus using the Beta distribution. Instead of predicting a single affect value, models estimate the mean and standard deviation of the annotation distribution, which are transformed into valid Beta parameters through moment matching. This formulation enables the recovery of higher-order distributional descriptors, including skewness, kurtosis, and quantiles, in closed form. As a result, the model captures not only the central tendency of emotional perception but also variability, asymmetry, and uncertainty in annotator responses. We evaluate the proposed approach on the SEWA and RECOLA datasets using multimodal features. Experimental results show that Beta-based modelling produces predictive distributions that closely match the empirical annotator distributions while achieving competitive performance with conventional regression approaches. These findings highlight the importance of modelling annotation uncertainty in affective computing and demonstrate the potential of distribution-aware learning for subjective signal analysis.

</details>


### [293] [FP4 Explore, BF16 Train: Diffusion Reinforcement Learning via Efficient Rollout Scaling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06916)
*Yitong Li,Junsong Chen,Shuchen Xue,Pengcuo Zeren,Siyuan Fu,Dinghao Yang,Yangyang Tang,Junjie Bai,Ping Luo,Song Han,Enze Xie*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Sol-RL框架，通过FP4量化的两阶段强化学习加速扩散模型对齐训练，在保持训练完整性的同时实现4.64倍加速


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于强化学习的后训练是文本到图像扩散模型对齐的有效方法，但增加rollout规模会带来巨大计算负担，特别是在FLUX.1-12B等大型基础模型上。需要解决效率与训练完整性之间的权衡问题。

Method: 提出Sol-RL（Speed-of-light RL）框架：1）第一阶段使用高吞吐量的NVFP4量化进行大规模候选池生成和对比性子集提取；2）第二阶段对选定样本进行BF16精度重新生成，并仅在这些样本上优化策略。通过解耦候选探索与策略优化，结合算法机制和硬件级吞吐增益。

Result: 在SANA、FLUX.1和SD3.5-L上的实验表明，该框架在保持BF16精度训练完整性的同时，充分利用FP4算术的吞吐增益，在多个指标上实现更优的对齐性能，训练收敛加速最高达4.64倍。

Conclusion: Sol-RL通过算法-硬件协同设计，有效解决了扩散模型强化学习对齐中的计算瓶颈，以低成本实现了大规模rollout扩展，为高效模型对齐提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Reinforcement-Learning-based post-training has recently emerged as a promising paradigm for aligning text-to-image diffusion models with human preferences. In recent studies, increasing the rollout group size yields pronounced performance improvements, indicating substantial room for further alignment gains. However, scaling rollouts on large-scale foundational diffusion models (e.g., FLUX.1-12B) imposes a heavy computational burden. To alleviate this bottleneck, we explore the integration of FP4 quantization into Diffusion RL rollouts. Yet, we identify that naive quantized pipelines inherently introduce risks of performance degradation. To overcome this dilemma between efficiency and training integrity, we propose Sol-RL (Speed-of-light RL), a novel FP4-empowered Two-stage Reinforcement Learning framework. First, we utilize high-throughput NVFP4 rollouts to generate a massive candidate pool and extract a highly contrastive subset. Second, we regenerate these selected samples in BF16 precision and optimize the policy exclusively on them. By decoupling candidate exploration from policy optimization, Sol-RL integrates the algorithmic mechanisms of rollout scaling with the system-level throughput gains of NVFP4. This synergistic algorithm-hardware design effectively accelerates the rollout phase while reserving high-fidelity samples for optimization. We empirically demonstrate that our framework maintains the training integrity of BF16 precision pipeline while fully exploiting the throughput gains enabled by FP4 arithmetic.
