Result: 理论证明：1) neff是匹配频率派和贝叶斯方差的唯一浓度参数；2) 后验标准差以O(1/√neff)衰减；3) 扩展了BQ-CP的随机支配保证；4) HPD阈值提供O(1/√neff)的条件覆盖改进。在空间预测中实例化为地理BQ-CP。

Conclusion: WBCP在保持覆盖保证的同时，为重要性加权设置提供了更丰富的后验不确定性信息，特别适用于空间预测等非i.i.d.场景，通过地理BQ-CP提供可解释的诊断信息。

Abstract: Conformal prediction provides distribution-free prediction intervals with finite-sample coverage guarantees, and recent work by Snell \& Griffiths reframes it as Bayesian Quadrature (BQ-CP), yielding powerful data-conditional guarantees via Dirichlet posteriors over thresholds. However, BQ-CP fundamentally requires the i.i.d. assumption -- a limitation the authors themselves identify. Meanwhile, weighted conformal prediction handles distribution shift via importance weights but remains frequentist, producing only point-estimate thresholds. We propose \textbf{Weighted Bayesian Conformal Prediction (WBCP)}, which generalizes BQ-CP to arbitrary importance-weighted settings by replacing the uniform Dirichlet $\Dir(1,\ldots,1)$ with a weighted Dirichlet $\Dir(\neff \cdot \tilde{w}_1, \ldots, \neff \cdot \tilde{w}_n)$, where $\neff$ is Kish's effective sample size. We prove four theoretical results: (1)~$\neff$ is the unique concentration parameter matching frequentist and Bayesian variances; (2)~posterior standard deviation decays as $O(1/\sqrt{\neff})$; (3)~BQ-CP's stochastic dominance guarantee extends to per-weight-profile data-conditional guarantees; (4)~the HPD threshold provides $O(1/\sqrt{\neff})$ improvement in conditional coverage. We instantiate WBCP for spatial prediction as \emph{Geographical BQ-CP}, where kernel-based spatial weights yield per-location posteriors with interpretable diagnostics. Experiments on synthetic and real-world spatial datasets demonstrate that WBCP maintains coverage guarantees while providing substantially richer uncertainty information.

</details>


### [334] [The Master Key Hypothesis: Unlocking Cross-Model Capability Transfer via Linear Subspace Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06377)
*Rishab Balasubramanian,Pin-Jie Lin,Rituraj Sharma,Anjie Fang,Fardin Abdi,Viktor Rozgic,Zheng Du,Mohit Bansal,Tu Vu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: UNLOCK框架无需训练即可在不同规模模型间迁移后训练能力，通过提取能力方向并在低维潜在子空间中对齐，显著提升推理性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究后训练能力是否可以在不重新训练的情况下跨模型迁移，特别是跨不同模型规模的能力迁移，探索模型能力的可转移性。

Method: 提出Master Key假设，认为模型能力对应低维潜在子空间中的方向，这些方向可通过线性对齐跨模型转移。UNLOCK框架：1) 通过对比能力存在和不存在变体的激活提取能力方向；2) 通过低秩线性变换将方向与目标模型对齐；3) 在推理时应用该方向以激发特定行为。

Result: 在推理行为（包括思维链和数学推理）上的实验显示，无需训练即可实现跨模型规模的显著改进：从Qwen1.5-14B向Qwen1.5-7B迁移CoT推理使MATH准确率提升12.1%；从Qwen3-4B-Base向Qwen3-14B-Base迁移数学推理方向使AGIEval Math准确率从61.1%提升至71.3%，超过14B后训练模型的67.8%。

Conclusion: 迁移成功取决于预训练期间学习的能力，UNLOCK干预通过锐化输出分布朝向成功的推理轨迹来放大潜在能力，验证了Master Key假设，为无训练能力迁移提供了有效框架。

Abstract: We investigate whether post-trained capabilities can be transferred across models without retraining, with a focus on transfer across different model scales. We propose the Master Key Hypothesis, which states that model capabilities correspond to directions in a low-dimensional latent subspace that induce specific behaviors and are transferable across models through linear alignment. Based on this hypothesis, we introduce UNLOCK, a training-free and label-free framework that extracts a capability direction by contrasting activations between capability-present and capability-absent Source variants, aligns it with a Target model through a low-rank linear transformation, and applies it at inference time to elicit the behavior. Experiments on reasoning behaviors, including Chain-of-Thought (CoT) and mathematical reasoning, demonstrate substantial improvements across model scales without training. For example, transferring CoT reasoning from Qwen1.5-14B to Qwen1.5-7B yields an accuracy gain of 12.1% on MATH, and transferring a mathematical reasoning direction from Qwen3-4B-Base to Qwen3-14B-Base improves AGIEval Math accuracy from 61.1% to 71.3%, surpassing the 67.8% achieved by the 14B post-trained model. Our analysis shows that the success of transfer depends on the capabilities learned during pre-training, and that our intervention amplifies latent capabilities by sharpening the output distribution toward successful reasoning trajectories.

</details>


### [335] [Quality-preserving Model for Electronics Production Quality Tests Reduction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06451)
*Noufa Haneefa,Teddy Lazebnik,Einav Peretz-Andersson*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出自适应测试选择框架，结合离线最小成本诊断子集构建与在线Thompson采样多臂老虎机，在PCB组装测试中动态切换完整与简化测试方案，显著降低测试时间同时控制缺陷逃逸风险。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统大批量电子产品制造测试流程固定不变，无法适应故障模式和工艺条件的变化，导致不必要的测试成本。现有数据驱动方法主要优化静态测试子集，无法在线适应变化的缺陷分布，也不能明确控制缺陷逃逸风险。

Method: 提出自适应测试选择框架：1) 离线阶段使用贪心集合覆盖构建最小成本诊断子集；2) 在线阶段采用Thompson采样多臂老虎机，基于滚动过程稳定性信号在完整测试计划和简化测试计划之间动态切换。

Result: 在PCB组装两个阶段（功能电路测试和生产线末端测试）评估28,000块电路板：离线分析识别出零逃逸简化计划，测试时间分别减少18.78%和91.57%。在真实概念漂移的时间验证中，静态简化导致功能电路测试110个逃逸缺陷、生产线末端测试8个逃逸缺陷，而自适应策略通过在不稳定时恢复完整覆盖将逃逸降至零。

Conclusion: 在线学习能够在降低测试负担的同时保持制造质量，为跨生产领域的自适应测试规划提供了实用途径，为企业带来经济和物流双重改进。

Abstract: Manufacturing test flows in high-volume electronics production are typically fixed during product development and executed unchanged on every unit, even as failure patterns and process conditions evolve. This protects quality, but it also imposes unnecessary test cost, while existing data-driven methods mostly optimize static test subsets and neither adapt online to changing defect distributions nor explicitly control escape risk. In this study, we present an adaptive test-selection framework that combines offline minimum-cost diagnostic subset construction using greedy set cover with an online Thompson-sampling multi-armed bandit that switches between full and reduced test plans using a rolling process-stability signal. We evaluate the framework on two printed circuit board assembly stages-Functional Circuit Test and End-of-Line test-covering 28,000 board runs. Offline analysis identified zero-escape reduced plans that cut test time by 18.78% in Functional Circuit Test and 91.57\% in End-of-Line testing. Under temporal validation with real concept drift, static reduction produced 110 escaped defects in Functional Circuit Test and 8 in End-of-Line, whereas the adaptive policy reduced escapes to zero by reverting to fuller coverage when instability emerged in practice. These results show that online learning can preserve manufacturing quality while reducing test burden, offering a practical route to adaptive test planning across production domains, and offering both economic and logistics improvement for companies.

</details>


### [336] [BiScale-GTR: Fragment-Aware Graph Transformers for Multi-Scale Molecular Representation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06336)
*Yi Yang,Ovidiu Daescu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: BiScale-GTR：结合化学片段标记化和自适应多尺度推理的自监督分子表示学习框架，在多个基准测试中实现SOTA性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图Transformer方法存在两个主要问题：1）大多数混合架构仍以GNN为主导，导致表示严重受局部消息传递影响；2）大多数方法仅在单一结构粒度上操作，限制了捕捉跨多个分子尺度的模式的能力

Method: 提出BiScale-GTR框架：1）改进图Byte Pair Encoding（BPE）标记化，生成一致、化学有效、高覆盖率的片段标记；2）采用并行GNN-Transformer架构，将GNN学习的原子级表示池化为片段级嵌入，并与片段标记嵌入融合后进行Transformer推理

Result: 在MoleculeNet、PharmaBench和Long Range Graph Benchmark（LRGB）上展示了最先进的分类和回归任务性能，归因分析显示BiScale-GTR能突出化学上有意义的功能基序

Conclusion: BiScale-GTR通过结合化学基础的片段标记化和自适应多尺度推理，能够联合捕捉局部化学环境、子结构基序和长程分子依赖，为分子表示学习提供了统一框架

Abstract: Graph Transformers have recently attracted attention for molecular property prediction by combining the inductive biases of graph neural networks (GNNs) with the global receptive field of Transformers. However, many existing hybrid architectures remain GNN-dominated, causing the resulting representations to remain heavily shaped by local message passing. Moreover, most existing methods operate at only a single structural granularity, limiting their ability to capture molecular patterns that span multiple molecular scales. We introduce BiScale-GTR, a unified framework for self-supervised molecular representation learning that combines chemically grounded fragment tokenization with adaptive multi-scale reasoning. Our method improves graph Byte Pair Encoding (BPE) tokenization to produce consistent, chemically valid, and high-coverage fragment tokens, which are used as fragment-level inputs to a parallel GNN-Transformer architecture. Architecturally, atom-level representations learned by a GNN are pooled into fragment-level embeddings and fused with fragment token embeddings before Transformer reasoning, enabling the model to jointly capture local chemical environments, substructure-level motifs, and long-range molecular dependencies. Experiments on MoleculeNet, PharmaBench, and the Long Range Graph Benchmark (LRGB) demonstrate state-of-the-art performance across both classification and regression tasks. Attribution analysis further shows that BiScale-GTR highlights chemically meaningful functional motifs, providing interpretable links between molecular structure and predicted properties. Code will be released upon acceptance.

</details>


### [337] [Bridging Theory and Practice in Crafting Robust Spiking Reservoirs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06395)
*Ruggero Freddi,Nicolas Seseri,Diana Nigrisoli,Alessio Basti*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文通过引入鲁棒性区间概念，将临界性理论与实际稳定性联系起来，为脉冲储备池计算提供了一种可靠的参数调优方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 脉冲储备池计算虽然能效高，但由于实验不确定性，难以可靠地将储备池调优至混沌边缘状态。需要将抽象的临界性概念与实际稳定性联系起来。

Method: 引入鲁棒性区间作为操作度量，系统评估LIF架构在静态（MNIST）和时序（合成球轨迹）任务上的表现，分析连接密度β和放电阈值θ对鲁棒性的影响，并在Erdős-Rényi图上进行控制实验。

Result: 鲁棒性区间宽度随β（连接密度）减小而减小，随θ（放电阈值）增加而增加；识别出保持平均场临界点w_crit的(β,θ)对；w_crit始终位于经验高性能区域内。

Conclusion: w_crit可作为参数搜索和微调的鲁棒起始坐标，鲁棒性区间为脉冲储备池计算提供了实用的超参数调优框架，确保在实验不确定性下的稳定性能。

Abstract: Spiking reservoir computing provides an energy-efficient approach to temporal processing, but reliably tuning reservoirs to operate at the edge-of-chaos is challenging due to experimental uncertainty. This work bridges abstract notions of criticality and practical stability by introducing and exploiting the robustness interval, an operational measure of the hyperparameter range over which a reservoir maintains performance above task-dependent thresholds. Through systematic evaluations of Leaky Integrate-and-Fire (LIF) architectures on both static (MNIST) and temporal (synthetic Ball Trajectories) tasks, we identify consistent monotonic trends in the robustness interval across a broad spectrum of network configurations: the robustness-interval width decreases with presynaptic connection density $β$ (i.e., directly with sparsity) and directly with the firing threshold $θ$. We further identify specific $(β, θ)$ pairs that preserve the analytical mean-field critical point $w_{\text{crit}}$, revealing iso-performance manifolds in the hyperparameter space. Control experiments on Erdős-Rényi graphs show the phenomena persist beyond small-world topologies. Finally, our results show that $w_{\text{crit}}$ consistently falls within empirical high-performance regions, validating $w_{\text{crit}}$ as a robust starting coordinate for parameter search and fine-tuning. To ensure reproducibility, the full Python code is publicly available.

</details>


### [338] [In-Place Test-Time Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06169)
*Guhao Feng,Shengjie Luo,Kai Hua,Ge Zhang,Di He,Wenhao Huang,Tianle Cai*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: In-Place TTT：一种无需重新训练即可为LLM赋予测试时训练能力的框架，通过调整MLP块的最终投影矩阵作为快速权重，并采用对齐下一个token预测任务的定制化目标，实现高效的自适应学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统"训练后部署"范式限制了LLM在真实任务中动态适应新信息的能力。现有测试时训练方法存在架构不兼容、计算效率低、目标与语言建模任务不对齐等关键障碍，阻碍了其在当前LLM生态系统中的应用。

Method: 1) 将MLP块的最终投影矩阵作为可适应的快速权重，实现"即插即用"增强；2) 用理论基础的定制化目标替代通用重建目标，明确对齐自回归语言建模的下一个token预测任务；3) 采用高效的块状更新机制，兼容上下文并行。

Result: 实验验证了框架有效性：作为即插即用增强，使4B参数模型在128k上下文任务上获得优越性能；从头预训练时，持续优于竞争性TTT相关方法。消融研究为设计选择提供了深入见解。

Conclusion: In-Place TTT是迈向LLM持续学习范式的重要一步，通过架构兼容性、计算效率和目标对齐的创新，实现了高效的测试时训练能力。

Abstract: The static ``train then deploy" paradigm fundamentally limits Large Language Models (LLMs) from dynamically adapting their weights in response to continuous streams of new information inherent in real-world tasks. Test-Time Training (TTT) offers a compelling alternative by updating a subset of model parameters (fast weights) at inference time, yet its potential in the current LLM ecosystem is hindered by critical barriers including architectural incompatibility, computational inefficiency and misaligned fast weight objectives for language modeling. In this work, we introduce In-Place Test-Time Training (In-Place TTT), a framework that seamlessly endows LLMs with Test-Time Training ability. In-Place TTT treats the final projection matrix of the ubiquitous MLP blocks as its adaptable fast weights, enabling a ``drop-in" enhancement for LLMs without costly retraining from scratch. Furthermore, we replace TTT's generic reconstruction objective with a tailored, theoretically-grounded objective explicitly aligned with the Next-Token-Prediction task governing autoregressive language modeling. This principled objective, combined with an efficient chunk-wise update mechanism, results in a highly scalable algorithm compatible with context parallelism. Extensive experiments validate our framework's effectiveness: as an in-place enhancement, it enables a 4B-parameter model to achieve superior performance on tasks with contexts up to 128k, and when pretrained from scratch, it consistently outperforms competitive TTT-related approaches. Ablation study results further provide deeper insights on our design choices. Collectively, our results establish In-Place TTT as a promising step towards a paradigm of continual learning in LLMs.

</details>


### [339] [Toward Consistent World Models with Multi-Token Prediction and Latent Semantic Enhancement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06155)
*Qimin Zhong,Hao Liao,Haiming Qin,Mingyang Zhou,Rui Mao,Wei Chen,Naipeng Chao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出LSE-MTP方法，通过将多令牌预测锚定到真实隐藏状态轨迹，解决标准MTP中的结构幻觉问题，改善LLM内部世界模型的表示对齐。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前关于LLM是否发展出连贯内部世界模型的争论中，多令牌预测(MTP)虽能学习更结构化表示，但标准MTP存在结构幻觉问题，即离散令牌监督在潜在空间中鼓励违反环境约束的非法捷径。

Method: 提出潜在语义增强多令牌预测(LSE-MTP)，将预测锚定到真实隐藏状态轨迹，通过梯度耦合诱导表示收缩性，从而在离散令牌和连续状态表示之间建立桥梁。

Result: 在合成图和真实世界曼哈顿出租车行程数据集上的实验表明，LSE-MTP有效增强了表示对齐，减少了结构幻觉，并提高了对扰动的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: LSE-MTP通过将多令牌预测与真实隐藏状态轨迹相结合，解决了标准MTP的结构幻觉问题，为LLM发展更连贯的内部世界模型提供了有效方法。

Abstract: Whether Large Language Models (LLMs) develop coherent internal world models remains a core debate. While conventional Next-Token Prediction (NTP) focuses on one-step-ahead supervision, Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) has shown promise in learning more structured representations. In this work, we provide a theoretical perspective analyzing the gradient inductive bias of MTP, supported by empirical evidence, showing that MTP promotes the convergence toward internal belief states by inducing representational contractivity via gradient coupling. However, we reveal that standard MTP often suffers from structural hallucinations, where discrete token supervision encourages illegal shortcuts in latent space that violate environmental constraints. To address this, we propose a novel method Latent Semantic Enhancement MTP (LSE-MTP), which anchors predictions to ground-truth hidden state trajectories. Experiments on synthetic graphs and real-world Manhattan Taxi Ride show that LSE-MTP effectively bridges the gap between discrete tokens and continuous state representations, enhancing representation alignment, reducing structural hallucinations, and improving robustness to perturbations.

</details>


### [340] [Gym-Anything: Turn any Software into an Agent Environment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06126)
*Pranjal Aggarwal,Graham Neubig,Sean Welleck*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Gym-Anything框架可将任意软件转换为交互式计算机使用环境，通过多智能体任务创建CUA-World基准，包含10K+长时程任务，涵盖医疗、天文、工程等领域，显著超越现有基准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有计算机使用智能体研究主要局限于短时程任务和有限软件，缺乏经济价值。创建复杂软件环境需要大量人力和时间，难以规模化。需要一种可扩展的方法来构建具有经济价值的多样化计算机使用环境。

Method: 提出Gym-Anything框架，将环境创建本身构建为多智能体任务：编码智能体编写设置脚本、下载真实数据、配置软件并生成正确设置证据；独立审计智能体根据质量检查清单验证环境设置证据。基于美国GDP数据中的职业分类，将该流程应用于200个软件应用。

Result: 创建了CUA-World基准，包含10,000多个长时程任务，涵盖医疗科学、天文、工程和企业系统等领域，每个任务都配置了真实数据及训练/测试划分。CUA-World-Long子基准包含需要500+步骤的挑战性长时程任务。从训练轨迹中蒸馏出的20亿参数视觉语言模型超越了规模2倍于它的模型。测试时应用相同审计原则，通过VLM审查完成轨迹并提供反馈，将Gemini-3-Flash在CUA-World-Long上的表现从11.5%提升至14.0%。

Conclusion: Gym-Anything框架能够规模化创建复杂软件环境，CUA-World基准为现实计算机使用智能体研究提供了多样化、经济价值高的长时程任务。多智能体环境创建和审计方法有效解决了环境构建的扩展性问题，为未来研究提供了基础设施和基准数据。

Abstract: Computer-use agents hold the promise of assisting in a wide range of digital economic activities. However, current research has largely focused on short-horizon tasks over a limited set of software with limited economic value, such as basic e-commerce and OS-configuration tasks. A key reason is that creating environments for complex software requires significant time and human effort, and therefore does not scale. To address this, we introduce Gym-Anything, a framework for converting any software into an interactive computer-use environment. We frame environment creation itself as a multi-agent task: a coding agent writes setup scripts, downloads real-world data, and configures the software, while producing evidence of correct setup. An independent audit agent then verifies evidence for the environment setup against a quality checklist. Using a taxonomy of economically valuable occupations grounded in U.S. GDP data, we apply this pipeline to 200 software applications with broad occupational coverage. The result is CUA-World, a collection of over 10K long-horizon tasks spanning domains from medical science and astronomy to engineering and enterprise systems, each configured with realistic data along with train and test splits. CUA-World also includes CUA-World-Long, a challenging long-horizon benchmark with tasks often requiring over 500 steps, far exceeding existing benchmarks. Distilling successful trajectories from the training split into a 2B vision-language model outperforms models 2$\times$ its size. We also apply the same auditing principle at test time: a separate VLM reviews completed trajectories and provides feedback on what remains, improving Gemini-3-Flash on CUA-World-Long from 11.5% to 14.0%. We release all code, infrastructure, and benchmark data to facilitate future research in realistic computer-use agents.

</details>


### [341] [Topological Characterization of Churn Flow and Unsupervised Correction to the Wu Flow-Regime Map in Small-Diameter Vertical Pipes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06167)
*Brady Koenig,Sushovan Majhi,Atish Mitra,Abigail Stein,Burt Todd*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文首次提出了基于拓扑学的搅混流数学定义，使用欧拉特征曲面和无监督多核学习框架，在未标记数据上实现了高精度的流型识别，挑战并修正了现有机理模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 搅混流（垂直两相流中的混沌振荡状态）在过去40多年中缺乏定量数学定义。现有机理模型在小直径管道中低估了段塞流的持续性，需要基于拓扑学的新方法来准确定义和识别流型。

Method: 提出欧拉特征曲面（ECS）作为拓扑描述符，将无监督流型发现建模为多核学习问题。结合三种核：ECS时间对齐核（χ(s,t)曲面的L1距离）、振幅统计核（尺度级均值、标准差、最大值、最小值）和气体速度核。框架自动学习各核的权重，无需标记训练数据。

Result: 在蒙大拿理工37个未标记试验中，框架学习到权重β_ECS=0.14，β_amp=0.50，β_ugs=0.36，拓扑特征占总权重64%。ECS推断的段塞/搅混转变点比Wu等人（2017）模型预测高3.81 m/s。在947张德州农工大学图像验证中，搅混流拓扑复杂度比段塞流高1.9倍（p<10^-5）。在45个TAMU伪试验中，无监督框架达到95.6%的四类准确率和100%搅混流召回率，匹配或超过需要数千标记样本的监督基线。

Conclusion: 该工作首次提供了搅混流的数学定义，并证明无监督拓扑描述符能够挑战和修正广泛采用的机理模型，为两相流分析提供了无需标记数据的高效方法。

Abstract: Churn flow-the chaotic, oscillatory regime in vertical two-phase flow-has lacked a quantitative mathematical definition for over $40$ years. We introduce the first topology-based characterization using Euler Characteristic Surfaces (ECS). We formulate unsupervised regime discovery as Multiple Kernel Learning (MKL), blending two complementary ECS-derived kernels-temporal alignment ($L^1$ distance on the $χ(s,t)$ surface) and amplitude statistics (scale-wise mean, standard deviation, max, min)-with gas velocity. Applied to $37$ unlabeled air-water trials from Montana Tech, the self-calibrating framework learns weights $β_{ECS}=0.14$, $β_{amp}=0.50$, $β_{ugs}=0.36$, placing $64\%$ of total weight on topology-derived features ($β_{ECS} + β_{amp}$). The ECS-inferred slug/churn transition lies $+3.81$ m/s above Wu et al.'s (2017) prediction in $2$-in. tubing, quantifying reports that existing models under-predict slug persistence in small-diameter pipes where interfacial tension and wall-to-wall interactions dominate flow. Cross-facility validation on $947$ Texas A&M University images confirms $1.9\times$ higher topological complexity in churn vs. slug ($p < 10^{-5}$). Applied to $45$ TAMU pseudo-trials, the same unsupervised framework achieves $95.6\%$ $4$-class accuracy and $100\%$ churn recall-without any labeled training data-matching or exceeding supervised baselines that require thousands of annotated examples. This work provides the first mathematical definition of churn flow and demonstrates that unsupervised topological descriptors can challenge and correct widely adopted mechanistic models.

</details>


### [342] [Target Policy Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06159)
*Jean Kaddour*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TPO是一种新的强化学习方法，将策略更新的两个核心问题分离：确定哪些完成应获得概率质量，以及如何调整参数实现这一变化，通过构建目标分布并最小化交叉熵来优化策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统策略梯度方法将两个核心问题耦合在一起，导致更新可能因学习率、裁剪和其他优化器选择而过度或不足。需要一种更稳定、更可控的策略优化方法。

Method: TPO将两个问题分离：首先根据评分构建目标分布q_i ∝ p_i^old exp(u_i)，然后通过交叉熵将策略拟合到该目标分布。损失梯度在采样完成logits上为p^θ - q，当策略匹配目标时梯度消失。

Result: 在表格老虎机、Transformer序列任务和十亿参数LLM RLVR上，TPO在简单任务上与PG、PPO、GRPO和DG表现相当，在稀疏奖励任务中显著优于这些方法。

Conclusion: TPO通过分离策略优化的两个核心问题，提供了一种更稳定、更可控的强化学习方法，特别是在稀疏奖励场景下表现出显著优势。

Abstract: In RL, given a prompt, we sample a group of completions from a model and score them. Two questions follow: which completions should gain probability mass, and how should the parameters move to realize that change? Standard policy-gradient methods answer both at once, so the update can overshoot or undershoot depending on the learning rate, clipping, and other optimizer choices. We introduce \emph{Target Policy Optimization} (TPO), which separates the two questions. Given scored completions, TPO constructs a target distribution $q_i \propto p_i^{\,\mathrm{old}} \exp(u_i)$ and fits the policy to it by cross-entropy. The loss gradient on sampled-completion logits is $p^θ- q$, which vanishes once the policy matches the target. On tabular bandits, transformer sequence tasks, and billion-parameter LLM RLVR, TPO matches PG, PPO, GRPO, and DG on easy tasks and substantially outperforms them under sparse reward. Code is available at https://github.com/JeanKaddour/tpo.

</details>


### [343] [Learning $\mathsf{AC}^0$ Under Graphical Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06109)
*Gautam Chandrasekaran,Jason Gaitonde,Ankur Moitra,Arsen Vasilyan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了在具有多项式增长和强空间混合的图模型上学习AC⁰电路的准多项式时间算法，突破了传统学习理论对乘积结构的依赖。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统学习理论（如Linial等人的工作）严重依赖乘积结构假设，这在现实场景中往往不成立。如何为更自然的相关分布获得类似的学习保证是该领域的长期挑战。

Method: 通过新的采样算法，将均匀分布下的低阶多项式逼近结果转移到图模型上，绕过了传统傅里叶分析的局限性。

Result: 为具有多项式增长和强空间混合性质的图模型上的AC⁰电路学习提供了准多项式时间算法，并可扩展到单调函数和半空间等其他函数类。

Conclusion: 该工作突破了学习理论中长期存在的乘积结构限制，为相关分布下的电路学习提供了新的技术途径，具有重要的理论和实际意义。

Abstract: In a landmark result, Linial, Mansour and Nisan (J. ACM 1993) gave a quasipolynomial-time algorithm for learning constant-depth circuits given labeled i.i.d. samples under the uniform distribution. Their work has had a deep and lasting legacy in computational learning theory, in particular introducing the $\textit{low-degree algorithm}$. However, an important critique of many results and techniques in the area is the reliance on product structure, which is unlikely to hold in realistic settings. Obtaining similar learning guarantees for more natural correlated distributions has been a longstanding challenge in the field.
  In particular, we give quasipolynomial-time algorithms for learning $\mathsf{AC}^0$ substantially beyond the product setting, when the inputs come from any graphical model with polynomial growth that exhibits strong spatial mixing. The main technical challenge is in giving a workaround to Fourier analysis, which we do by showing how new sampling algorithms allow us to transfer statements about low-degree polynomial approximation under the uniform setting to graphical models. Our approach is general enough to extend to other well-studied function classes, like monotone functions and halfspaces.

</details>


### [344] [A machine learning framework for uncovering stochastic nonlinear dynamics from noisy data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06081)
*Matteo Bosso,Giovanni Franzese,Kushal Swamy,Maarten Theulings,Alejandro M. Aragón,Farbod Alijani*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种混合符号回归-概率机器学习框架，能够同时恢复系统控制方程的符号形式并推断参数不确定性，无需对函数形式做先验假设。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 真实世界系统建模需要考虑噪声影响，传统符号回归方法忽略不确定性，而高斯过程虽能量化不确定性但无法揭示底层动力学。需要一种能同时处理确定性和随机性成分的方法。

Method: 结合深度符号回归与基于高斯过程的最大似然估计，分别建模确定性动力学和噪声结构。框架无需对函数形式做先验假设，数据效率高（仅需100-1000个数据点）。

Result: 在数值基准测试（谐波、Duffing、van der Pol振荡器）和实验系统（耦合生物振荡器同步）中验证成功，算法能同时识别符号和随机成分，对噪声具有鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 该框架在不确定性固有的领域具有广泛潜力，能够同时理解动力学系统的结构和变异性，为噪声影响下的系统参数和动力学推断提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Modeling real-world systems requires accounting for noise - whether it arises from unpredictable fluctuations in financial markets, irregular rhythms in biological systems, or environmental variability in ecosystems. While the behavior of such systems can often be described by stochastic differential equations, a central challenge is understanding how noise influences the inference of system parameters and dynamics from data. Traditional symbolic regression methods can uncover governing equations but typically ignore uncertainty. Conversely, Gaussian processes provide principled uncertainty quantification but offer little insight into the underlying dynamics. In this work, we bridge this gap with a hybrid symbolic regression-probabilistic machine learning framework that recovers the symbolic form of the governing equations while simultaneously inferring uncertainty in the system parameters. The framework combines deep symbolic regression with Gaussian process-based maximum likelihood estimation to separately model the deterministic dynamics and the noise structure, without requiring prior assumptions about their functional forms. We verify the approach on numerical benchmarks, including harmonic, Duffing, and van der Pol oscillators, and validate it on an experimental system of coupled biological oscillators exhibiting synchronization, where the algorithm successfully identifies both the symbolic and stochastic components. The framework is data-efficient, requiring as few as 100-1000 data points, and robust to noise - demonstrating its broad potential in domains where uncertainty is intrinsic and both the structure and variability of dynamical systems must be understood.

</details>


### [345] [TalkLoRA: Communication-Aware Mixture of Low-Rank Adaptation for Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06291)
*Lin Mu,Haiyang Wang,Li Ni,Lei Sang,Zhize Wu,Peiquan Jin,Yiwen Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TalkLoRA：一种通信感知的MoE-LoRA框架，通过专家间通信改善路由稳定性，提升参数高效微调性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MoE增强的LoRA方法假设专家独立运行，导致路由不稳定和专家主导问题。需要打破专家独立性假设，通过专家间通信改善路由决策。

Method: 提出TalkLoRA框架，引入轻量级Talking Module实现专家子空间间的可控信息交换，生成更鲁棒的全局信号用于路由决策，同时保持参数高效性。

Result: TalkLoRA在多种语言理解和生成任务中一致优于vanilla LoRA和MoELoRA，在相同参数预算下实现更高的参数效率和更平衡的专家路由。

Conclusion: 结构化专家通信是MoE基参数高效适应的原则性和有效增强，TalkLoRA通过专家间通信平滑路由动态，严格泛化现有MoELoRA架构。

Abstract: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) enables parameter-efficient fine-tuning of Large Language Models (LLMs), and recent Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) extensions further enhance flexibility by dynamically combining multiple LoRA experts. However, existing MoE-augmented LoRA methods assume that experts operate independently, often leading to unstable routing, expert dominance. In this paper, we propose \textbf{TalkLoRA}, a communication-aware MoELoRA framework that relaxes this independence assumption by introducing expert-level communication prior to routing. TalkLoRA equips low-rank experts with a lightweight Talking Module that enables controlled information exchange across expert subspaces, producing a more robust global signal for routing. Theoretically, we show that expert communication smooths routing dynamics by mitigating perturbation amplification while strictly generalizing existing MoELoRA architectures. Empirically, TalkLoRA consistently outperforms vanilla LoRA and MoELoRA across diverse language understanding and generation tasks, achieving higher parameter efficiency and more balanced expert routing under comparable parameter budgets. These results highlight structured expert communication as a principled and effective enhancement for MoE-based parameter-efficient adaptation. Code is available at https://github.com/why0129/TalkLoRA.

</details>


### [346] [Gated-SwinRMT: Unifying Swin Windowed Attention with Retentive Manhattan Decay via Input-Dependent Gating](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06014)
*Dipan Maity,Suman Mondal,Arindam Roy*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Gated-SwinRMT是一种混合视觉Transformer，结合了Swin Transformer的移位窗口注意力和Retentive Networks的曼哈顿距离空间衰减，通过输入相关门控增强。提出了两种变体：Sigmoid激活的SWAT和保留Softmax的Retention，在Mini-ImageNet上分别达到80.22%和78.20%的准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 结合Swin Transformer的移位窗口注意力和Retentive Networks的空间衰减机制，通过输入相关门控增强模型表达能力，解决传统注意力机制的计算复杂度和表达能力限制问题。

Method: 将自注意力分解为窗口内连续的宽度方向和高度方向保留传递，使用每头指数衰减掩码提供二维局部先验。提出两种变体：1) Gated-SwinRMT-SWAT使用Sigmoid激活、平衡ALiBi斜率和乘性后激活空间衰减，通过SwiGLU门控值投影；2) Gated-SwinRMT-Retention保留Softmax归一化保留，采用加性对数空间衰减偏置，并引入显式G1 Sigmoid门控。

Result: 在Mini-ImageNet上，Gated-SwinRMT-SWAT达到80.22% top-1准确率，Gated-SwinRMT-Retention达到78.20%，相比RMT基线(73.74%)分别提升6.48pp和4.46pp。在CIFAR-10上，由于小特征图导致自适应窗口机制崩溃为全局注意力，优势压缩至+0.56pp。

Conclusion: Gated-SwinRMT通过结合移位窗口注意力、空间衰减机制和输入相关门控，有效提升了视觉Transformer的性能，特别是在中等分辨率图像上表现显著。但在小分辨率图像上，自适应窗口机制的局限性限制了性能提升。

Abstract: We introduce Gated-SwinRMT, a family of hybrid vision transformers that combine the shifted-window attention of the Swin Transformer with the Manhattan-distance spatial decay of Retentive Networks (RMT), augmented by input-dependent gating. Self-attention is decomposed into consecutive width-wise and height-wise retention passes within each shifted window, where per-head exponential decay masks provide a two-dimensional locality prior without learned positional biases.
  Two variants are proposed. \textbf{Gated-SwinRMT-SWAT} substitutes softmax with sigmoid activation, implements balanced ALiBi slopes with multiplicative post-activation spatial decay, and gates the value projection via SwiGLU; the Normalized output implicitly suppresses uninformative attention scores. \textbf{Gated-SwinRMT-Retention} retains softmax-normalized retention with an additive log-space decay bias and incorporates an explicit G1 sigmoid gate -- projected from the block input and applied after local context enhancement (LCE) but prior to the output projection~$W_O$ -- to alleviate the low-rank $W_V \!\cdot\! W_O$ bottleneck and enable input-dependent suppression of attended outputs.
  We assess both variants on Mini-ImageNet ($224{\times}224$, 100 classes) and CIFAR-10 ($32{\times}32$, 10 classes) under identical training protocols, utilizing a single GPU due to resource limitations. At ${\approx}77$--$79$\,M parameters, Gated-SwinRMT-SWAT achieves $80.22\%$ and Gated-SwinRMT-Retention $78.20\%$ top-1 test accuracy on Mini-ImageNet, compared with $73.74\%$ for the RMT baseline. On CIFAR-10 -- where small feature maps cause the adaptive windowing mechanism to collapse attention to global scope -- the accuracy advantage compresses from $+6.48$\,pp to $+0.56$\,pp.

</details>


### [347] [Model-Based Reinforcement Learning for Control under Time-Varying Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02260)
*Klemens Iten,Bruce Lee,Chenhao Li,Lenart Treven,Andreas Krause,Bhavya Sukhija*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究非平稳动态系统中的强化学习控制问题，提出基于高斯过程模型的持续学习算法，通过自适应数据缓冲机制处理动态变化


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界系统通常存在动态变化（如漂移、磨损、运行条件变化），而传统基于学习的控制方法假设系统动态是平稳的，这一假设在实际中常被违反。需要研究在时变动态下的强化学习控制方法。

Method: 采用持续模型强化学习框架，使用高斯过程动态模型，在频率主义变分预算假设下分析问题。提出实用的乐观模型强化学习算法，包含自适应数据缓冲机制，限制过时数据的影响以保持校准的不确定性。

Result: 分析表明，持续的非平稳性需要明确限制过时数据的影响以保持校准的不确定性和有意义的动态遗憾保证。提出的算法在具有非平稳动态的连续控制基准测试中表现出改进的性能。

Conclusion: 处理非平稳动态系统需要专门的持续学习方法，通过自适应数据管理机制限制过时数据的影响，提出的算法为时变动态下的强化学习控制提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Learning-based control methods typically assume stationary system dynamics, an assumption often violated in real-world systems due to drift, wear, or changing operating conditions. We study reinforcement learning for control under time-varying dynamics. We consider a continual model-based reinforcement learning setting in which an agent repeatedly learns and controls a dynamical system whose transition dynamics evolve across episodes. We analyze the problem using Gaussian process dynamics models under frequentist variation-budget assumptions. Our analysis shows that persistent non-stationarity requires explicitly limiting the influence of outdated data to maintain calibrated uncertainty and meaningful dynamic regret guarantees. Motivated by these insights, we propose a practical optimistic model-based reinforcement learning algorithm with adaptive data buffer mechanisms and demonstrate improved performance on continuous control benchmarks with non-stationary dynamics.

</details>


### [348] [Data Distribution Valuation Using Generalized Bayesian Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05993)
*Cuong N. Nguyen,Cuong V. Nguyen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出广义贝叶斯估值框架，通过基于可迁移性度量的损失函数和广义贝叶斯推断，统一解决数据分布估值问题，并扩展到连续数据流场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究数据分布估值问题，这是一个与经典数据估值相关但不同的新问题，旨在从样本中量化数据分布的价值，可应用于多种实际应用场景。

Method: 提出广义贝叶斯估值框架，利用基于可迁移性度量构建的损失函数进行广义贝叶斯推断，统一解决标注者评估和数据增强等看似无关的实际问题，并扩展到连续数据流设置。

Result: 实验结果表明，该框架在不同真实场景中具有有效性和高效性，能够成功应用于标注者评估和数据增强等实际问题。

Conclusion: 广义贝叶斯估值框架为数据分布估值问题提供了统一解决方案，通过贝叶斯原理增强了框架的适用性，特别是在连续数据流场景中表现出色。

Abstract: We investigate the data distribution valuation problem, which aims to quantify the values of data distributions from their samples. This is a recently proposed problem that is related to but different from classical data valuation and can be applied to various applications. For this problem, we develop a novel framework called Generalized Bayes Valuation that utilizes generalized Bayesian inference with a loss constructed from transferability measures. This framework allows us to solve, in a unified way, seemingly unrelated practical problems, such as annotator evaluation and data augmentation. Using the Bayesian principles, we further improve and enhance the applicability of our framework by extending it to the continuous data stream setting. Our experiment results confirm the effectiveness and efficiency of our framework in different real-world scenarios.

</details>


### [349] [Training Without Orthogonalization, Inference With SVD: A Gradient Analysis of Rotation Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05414)
*Chris Choy*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文通过理论分析解释了为什么在训练时移除SVD正交化（仅在推理时使用）能改善旋转估计，并证明了9D表示优于6D Gram-Schmidt的原因。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 先前研究表明，在训练时移除正交化（仅在推理时应用）能改善深度学习中的旋转估计，经验证据支持使用9D表示配合SVD投影。然而，对于为什么SVD正交化会损害训练，以及为什么在推理时应优先选择SVD而非Gram-Schmidt，理论理解仍不完整。

Method: 对专门用于3×3矩阵和SO(3)投影的SVD正交化进行详细的梯度分析。推导了SVD反向传播雅可比矩阵的精确谱，分析了其秩、奇异值和条件数。同时证明了6D Gram-Schmidt雅可比矩阵具有不对称谱，导致参数接收不等的梯度信号。

Result: SVD反向传播雅可比矩阵的秩为3（与SO(3)维度匹配），非零奇异值为2/(s_i + s_j)，条件数κ = (s_1 + s_2)/(s_2 + s_3)。当预测矩阵远离SO(3)时（如训练早期s_3 ≈ 0），梯度失真最为严重。即使稳定的SVD梯度也会引入梯度方向误差。6D Gram-Schmidt雅可比矩阵具有不对称谱，导致参数接收不等的梯度信号，解释了为什么9D参数化更优。

Conclusion: 该研究为使用直接9D回归进行训练、仅在推理时应用SVD投影的方法提供了理论基础。SVD正交化在训练中会造成可量化的梯度失真，而移除SVD可以避免这种权衡。同时，9D表示优于6D Gram-Schmidt，因为后者会导致不均衡的梯度信号。

Abstract: Recent work has shown that removing orthogonalization during training and applying it only at inference improves rotation estimation in deep learning, with empirical evidence favoring 9D representations with SVD projection. However, the theoretical understanding of why SVD orthogonalization specifically harms training, and why it should be preferred over Gram-Schmidt at inference, remains incomplete. We provide a detailed gradient analysis of SVD orthogonalization specialized to $3 \times 3$ matrices and $SO(3)$ projection. Our central result derives the exact spectrum of the SVD backward pass Jacobian: it has rank $3$ (matching the dimension of $SO(3)$) with nonzero singular values $2/(s_i + s_j)$ and condition number $κ= (s_1 + s_2)/(s_2 + s_3)$, creating quantifiable gradient distortion that is most severe when the predicted matrix is far from $SO(3)$ (e.g., early in training when $s_3 \approx 0$). We further show that even stabilized SVD gradients introduce gradient direction error, whereas removing SVD from the training loop avoids this tradeoff entirely. We also prove that the 6D Gram-Schmidt Jacobian has an asymmetric spectrum: its parameters receive unequal gradient signal, explaining why 9D parameterization is preferable. Together, these results provide the theoretical foundation for training with direct 9D regression and applying SVD projection only at inference.

</details>


### [350] [A Mixture of Experts Foundation Model for Scanning Electron Microscopy Image Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05960)
*Sk Miraj Ahmed,Yuewei Lin,Chuntian Cao,Shinjae Yoo,Xinpei Wu,Won-Il Lee,Nikhil Tiwale,Dan N. Le,Thi Thu Huong Chu,Jiyoung Kim,Kevin G. Yager,Chang-Yong Nam*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 首个SEM图像基础模型，通过自监督Transformer架构预训练多仪器多条件科学显微图像，实现跨材料系统和成像条件的泛化能力，特别在去焦到聚焦图像转换任务中表现出色。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SEM成像受限于任务特定模型和劳动密集型采集过程，限制了其在不同应用中的可扩展性，需要能够跨材料系统和成像条件泛化的基础模型。

Method: 采用自监督Transformer架构，在大规模多仪器、多条件的科学显微图像语料库上进行预训练，学习丰富且可迁移的表征，可微调适应多种下游任务。

Result: 模型在去焦到聚焦图像转换任务中表现出色，无需配对监督即可从去焦输入恢复聚焦细节，在多个评估指标上超越现有最先进技术。

Conclusion: 这项工作为新型可适应SEM模型奠定了基础，通过将基础表征学习与实际成像需求相结合，加速材料发现进程。

Abstract: Scanning Electron Microscopy (SEM) is indispensable in modern materials science, enabling high-resolution imaging across a wide range of structural, chemical, and functional investigations. However, SEM imaging remains constrained by task-specific models and labor-intensive acquisition processes that limit its scalability across diverse applications. Here, we introduce the first foundation model for SEM images, pretrained on a large corpus of multi-instrument, multi-condition scientific micrographs, enabling generalization across diverse material systems and imaging conditions. Leveraging a self-supervised transformer architecture, our model learns rich and transferable representations that can be fine-tuned or adapted to a wide range of downstream tasks. As a compelling demonstration, we focus on defocus-to-focus image translation-an essential yet underexplored challenge in automated microscopy pipelines. Our method not only restores focused detail from defocused inputs without paired supervision but also outperforms state-of-the-art techniques across multiple evaluation metrics. This work lays the groundwork for a new class of adaptable SEM models, accelerating materials discovery by bridging foundational representation learning with real-world imaging needs.

</details>


### [351] [Weight-Informed Self-Explaining Clustering for Mixed-Type Tabular Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05857)
*Lehao Li,Qiang Huang,Yihao Ang,Bryan Kian Hsiang Low,Anthony K. H. Tung,Xiaokui Xiao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: WISE是一个用于混合类型表格数据聚类的自解释框架，统一了表示学习、特征加权、聚类和解释，在无监督透明流程中解决了异质特征对齐、特征相关性评估和可解释性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 混合类型表格数据聚类面临三大挑战：1) 数值型和分类型特征的表示不对齐；2) 特征相关性不均匀且依赖上下文；3) 聚类过程与解释脱节且多为事后解释。现有方法无法同时解决这些问题。

Method: WISE框架包含四个核心组件：1) BEP（带填充的二进制编码）将异质特征对齐到统一稀疏空间；2) LOFO（留一特征出）策略生成多个高质量、多样化的特征加权视图；3) 两阶段权重感知聚类过程聚合替代语义划分；4) DFI（判别性频繁项）提供从实例到聚类一致的特征级解释，具有可加分解保证。

Result: 在六个真实世界数据集上的实验表明，WISE在聚类质量上持续优于经典和神经基线方法，同时保持高效性，并产生忠实、人类可理解的解释，这些解释基于驱动聚类的相同原语。

Conclusion: WISE成功解决了混合类型表格数据聚类的核心挑战，通过统一表示、特征加权、聚类和解释的透明无监督流程，实现了高质量的聚类和内在可解释性，为探索性分析提供了有效工具。

Abstract: Clustering mixed-type tabular data is fundamental for exploratory analysis, yet remains challenging due to misaligned numerical-categorical representations, uneven and context-dependent feature relevance, and disconnected and post-hoc explanation from the clustering process. We propose WISE, a Weight-Informed Self-Explaining framework that unifies representation, feature weighting, clustering, and interpretation in a fully unsupervised and transparent pipeline. WISE introduces Binary Encoding with Padding (BEP) to align heterogeneous features in a unified sparse space, a Leave-One-Feature-Out (LOFO) strategy to sense multiple high-quality and diverse feature-weighting views, and a two-stage weight-aware clustering procedure to aggregate alternative semantic partitions. To ensure intrinsic interpretability, we further develop Discriminative FreqItems (DFI), which yields feature-level explanations that are consistent from instances to clusters with an additive decomposition guarantee. Extensive experiments on six real-world datasets demonstrate that WISE consistently outperforms classical and neural baselines in clustering quality while remaining efficient, and produces faithful, human-interpretable explanations grounded in the same primitives that drive clustering.

</details>


### [352] [World Action Verifier: Self-Improving World Models via Forward-Inverse Asymmetry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01985)
*Yuejiang Liu,Fan Feng,Lingjing Kong,Weifeng Lu,Jinzhou Tang,Kun Zhang,Kevin Murphy,Chelsea Finn,Yilun Du*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: WAV框架通过将状态预测分解为状态合理性和动作可达性两个因素进行独立验证，利用无动作数据和低维特征的不对称性，使世界模型能够自我识别预测错误并改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 通用世界模型需要比策略学习更广泛的鲁棒性，必须对次优动作也能可靠预测，但动作标记的交互数据往往覆盖不足，导致现有方法在未充分探索区域表现不佳。

Method: 将动作条件状态预测分解为状态合理性和动作可达性；利用视频语料库生成多样化子目标；使用稀疏逆模型从状态特征子集推断动作；通过子目标生成、动作推断和前向滚动的循环一致性进行验证。

Result: 在MiniGrid、RoboMimic和ManiSkill的9个任务中，WAV实现了2倍的样本效率提升，下游策略性能提高了18%。

Conclusion: 通过分解验证和利用数据与特征的不对称性，WAV框架显著提升了世界模型的鲁棒性和样本效率，为通用世界模型的实际应用提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: General-purpose world models promise scalable policy evaluation, optimization, and planning, yet achieving the required level of robustness remains challenging. Unlike policy learning, which primarily focuses on optimal actions, a world model must be reliable over a much broader range of suboptimal actions, which are often insufficiently covered by action-labeled interaction data. To address this challenge, we propose World Action Verifier (WAV), a framework that enables world models to identify their own prediction errors and self-improve. The key idea is to decompose action-conditioned state prediction into two factors -- state plausibility and action reachability -- and verify each separately. We show that these verification problems can be substantially easier than predicting future states due to two underlying asymmetries: the broader availability of action-free data and the lower dimensionality of action-relevant features. Leveraging these asymmetries, we augment a world model with (i) a diverse subgoal generator obtained from video corpora and (ii) a sparse inverse model that infers actions from a subset of state features. By enforcing cycle consistency among generated subgoals, inferred actions, and forward rollouts, WAV provides an effective verification mechanism in under-explored regimes, where existing methods typically fail. Across nine tasks spanning MiniGrid, RoboMimic, and ManiSkill, our method achieves 2x higher sample efficiency while improving downstream policy performance by 18%.

</details>


### [353] [EEG-MFTNet: An Enhanced EEGNet Architecture with Multi-Scale Temporal Convolutions and Transformer Fusion for Cross-Session Motor Imagery Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05843)
*Panagiotis Andrikopoulos,Siamak Mehrkanoon*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: EEG-MFTNet：基于EEGNet改进的深度学习模型，通过多尺度时间卷积和Transformer编码器流增强，用于脑电信号中的运动想象解码，在SHU数据集上取得58.9%的平均分类准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 脑机接口为运动障碍患者提供重要支持，但基于脑电信号的运动想象解码面临噪声和跨会话变异性的挑战，需要更准确、鲁棒的解码方法。

Method: 提出EEG-MFTNet模型，基于EEGNet架构，增强多尺度时间卷积和Transformer编码器流，以捕获脑电信号的短程和长程时间依赖性。

Result: 在SHU数据集上使用受试者依赖的跨会话设置进行评估，EEG-MFTNet以58.9%的平均分类准确率优于EEGNet及其近期衍生模型，同时保持低计算复杂度和推理延迟。

Conclusion: EEG-MFTNet展示了实时脑机接口应用的潜力，强调了架构创新在改善运动想象解码中的重要性，为开发更鲁棒、自适应的脑机接口系统做出贡献。

Abstract: Brain-computer interfaces (BCIs) enable direct communication between the brain and external devices, providing critical support for individuals with motor impairments. However, accurate motor imagery (MI) decoding from electroencephalography (EEG) remains challenging due to noise and cross-session variability. This study introduces EEG-MFTNet, a novel deep learning model based on the EEGNet architecture, enhanced with multi-scale temporal convolutions and a Transformer encoder stream. These components are designed to capture both short and long-range temporal dependencies in EEG signals. The model is evaluated on the SHU dataset using a subject-dependent cross-session setup, outperforming baseline models, including EEGNet and its recent derivatives. EEG-MFTNet achieves an average classification accuracy of 58.9% while maintaining low computational complexity and inference latency. The results highlight the model's potential for real-time BCI applications and underscore the importance of architectural innovations in improving MI decoding. This work contributes to the development of more robust and adaptive BCI systems, with implications for assistive technologies and neurorehabilitation.

</details>


### [354] [Modeling Patient Care Trajectories with Transformer Hawkes Processes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05844)
*Saumya Pandey,Varun Chandola*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 基于Transformer Hawkes Process框架，结合Transformer历史编码与Hawkes过程动态，建模患者医疗轨迹，通过逆平方根类别加权解决极端类别不平衡问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 患者医疗利用包含不规则时间戳事件（门诊、住院、急诊），形成个体化护理轨迹。建模这些轨迹对于理解利用模式和预测未来护理需求至关重要，但由于时间不规则性和严重类别不平衡而具有挑战性

Method: 基于Transformer Hawkes Process框架，结合Transformer历史编码与Hawkes过程动态，捕捉事件依赖关系并联合预测事件类型和事件时间。引入不平衡感知训练策略，使用逆平方根类别加权，在不改变数据分布的情况下提高对罕见但临床重要事件的敏感性

Result: 在真实世界数据上的实验证明了改进的性能，并为识别高风险患者群体提供了临床有意义的见解

Conclusion: 该方法成功建模了患者医疗轨迹，解决了时间不规则性和类别不平衡问题，在预测性能和临床洞察方面均表现出色

Abstract: Patient healthcare utilization consists of irregularly time-stamped events, such as outpatient visits, inpatient admissions, and emergency encounters, forming individualized care trajectories. Modeling these trajectories is crucial for understanding utilization patterns and predicting future care needs, but is challenging due to temporal irregularity and severe class imbalance. In this work, we build on the Transformer Hawkes Process framework to model patient trajectories in continuous time. By combining Transformer-based history encoding with Hawkes process dynamics, the model captures event dependencies and jointly predicts event type and time-to-event. To address extreme imbalance, we introduce an imbalance-aware training strategy using inverse square-root class weighting. This improves sensitivity to rare but clinically important events without altering the data distribution. Experiments on real-world data demonstrate improved performance and provide clinically meaningful insights for identifying high-risk patient populations.

</details>


### [355] [Expectation Maximization (EM) Converges for General Agnostic Mixtures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05842)
*Avishek Ghosh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文研究了在非生成式（agnostic）设置下拟合k个参数函数的混合模型问题，提出并分析了梯度EM算法，证明其在适当初始化和分离条件下能指数收敛到总体损失最小化器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 混合线性回归在统计学和机器学习中已有深入研究，但现有工作主要关注生成式模型。最近的研究开始探索非生成式（agnostic）设置，其中不假设数据生成模型，而是直接拟合k条线以最小化损失函数。然而，这些研究主要局限于线性模型和二次损失。本文旨在将这一框架扩展到更广泛的参数函数类别，包括混合线性分类器、混合广义线性回归等，以展示EM类算法在更广泛非生成式问题中的有效性。

Method: 提出并分析梯度EM算法用于拟合k个参数函数的混合模型。该方法适用于任意参数函数配备强凸且光滑的损失函数。算法在适当初始化和分离条件下运行，通过理论分析证明其收敛性质。该框架涵盖了混合线性回归（正则化）、混合线性分类器（混合逻辑回归、混合支持向量机）和混合广义线性回归等多种问题。

Result: 理论分析表明，在适当的初始化和分离条件下，梯度EM算法的迭代以高概率指数收敛到适当定义的总体损失最小化器。这证明了EM类算法在非生成式设置下不仅适用于混合线性回归，还能收敛到更广泛参数函数混合模型的最优解。

Conclusion: 梯度EM算法在非生成式设置下对广泛类别的参数函数混合模型具有有效性和收敛性。该工作扩展了EM算法在非生成式问题中的应用范围，为混合线性分类器、混合广义线性回归等问题提供了理论保证，展示了EM类型算法在超越混合线性回归的更广泛问题中的最优解收敛能力。

Abstract: Mixture of linear regression is well studied in statistics and machine learning, where the data points are generated probabilistically using $k$ linear models. Algorithms like Expectation Maximization (EM) may be used to recover the ground truth regressors for this problem. Recently, in \cite{pal2022learning,ghosh_agnostic} the mixed linear regression problem is studied in the agnostic setting, where no generative model on data is assumed. Rather, given a set of data points, the objective is \emph{fit} $k$ lines by minimizing a suitable loss function. It is shown that a modification of EM, namely gradient EM converges exponentially to appropriately defined loss minimizer even in the agnostic setting.
  In this paper, we study the problem of \emph{fitting} $k$ parametric functions to given set of data points. We adhere to the agnostic setup. However, instead of fitting lines equipped with quadratic loss, we consider any arbitrary parametric function fitting equipped with a strongly convex and smooth loss. This framework encompasses a large class of problems including mixed linear regression (regularized), mixed linear classifiers (mixed logistic regression, mixed Support Vector Machines) and mixed generalized linear regression. We propose and analyze gradient EM for this problem and show that with proper initialization and separation condition, the iterates of gradient EM converge exponentially to appropriately defined population loss minimizers with high probability. This shows the effectiveness of EM type algorithm which converges to \emph{optimal} solution in the non-generative setup beyond mixture of linear regression.

</details>


### [356] [Hidden in the Multiplicative Interaction: Uncovering Fragility in Multimodal Contrastive Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05834)
*Tillmann Rheude,Stefan Hegselmann,Roland Eils,Benjamin Wild*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Gated Symile：通过门控机制改进多模态对比学习，解决Symile在处理不可靠模态时的脆弱性问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Symile等现有多模态对比学习方法将所有模态对称处理，未考虑模态间的可靠性差异。当模态存在错位、信息弱或缺失时，这种对称处理会静默地降低性能，特别是在三模态乘法交互中，单个不可靠模态可能破坏整个乘积项。

Method: 提出Gated Symile，引入基于注意力的对比门控机制。该机制通过将嵌入向量向可学习的中性方向插值来抑制不可靠输入，并在跨模态对齐不可靠时提供显式的NULL选项。门控在每候选基础上自适应调整模态贡献。

Result: 在受控合成基准测试和三个真实世界三模态数据集上，Gated Symile在top-1检索准确率上优于调优良好的Symile和CLIP模型。门控机制有效解决了多模态对比学习在不可靠模态下的脆弱性问题。

Conclusion: 门控机制是实现不完美和多于两个模态下鲁棒多模态对比学习的重要步骤。Gated Symile通过自适应调整模态贡献，提高了多模态对比学习在现实场景中的可靠性。

Abstract: Multimodal contrastive learning is increasingly enriched by going beyond image-text pairs. Among recent contrastive methods, Symile is a strong approach for this challenge because its multiplicative interaction objective captures higher-order cross-modal dependence. Yet, we find that Symile treats all modalities symmetrically and does not explicitly model reliability differences, a limitation that becomes especially present in trimodal multiplicative interactions. In practice, modalities beyond image-text pairs can be misaligned, weakly informative, or missing, and treating them uniformly can silently degrade performance. This fragility can be hidden in the multiplicative interaction: Symile may outperform pairwise CLIP even if a single unreliable modality silently corrupts the product terms. We propose Gated Symile, a contrastive gating mechanism that adapts modality contributions on an attention-based, per-candidate basis. The gate suppresses unreliable inputs by interpolating embeddings toward learnable neutral directions and incorporating an explicit NULL option when reliable cross-modal alignment is unlikely. Across a controlled synthetic benchmark that uncovers this fragility and three real-world trimodal datasets for which such failures could be masked by averages, Gated Symile achieves higher top-1 retrieval accuracy than well-tuned Symile and CLIP models. More broadly, our results highlight gating as a step toward robust multimodal contrastive learning under imperfect and more than two modalities.

</details>


### [357] [Bivariate Causal Discovery Using Rate-Distortion MDL: An Information Dimension Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05829)
*Tiago Brogueira,Mário A. T. Figueiredo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出基于率失真理论的RDMDL方法，改进现有MDL因果发现中对原因变量描述长度的估计，在Tübingen数据集上取得竞争性性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于最小描述长度(MDL)原理的因果发现方法未能正确估计原因变量的描述长度，主要依赖因果机制的描述长度进行决策，需要更准确的描述长度估计方法

Method: 基于率失真理论提出新的原因变量描述长度测量方法：使用直方图密度估计确定代表性失真水平，通过信息维度计算最小所需速率；结合传统因果机制描述方法，构建RDMDL因果发现方法

Result: RDMDL在Tübingen因果发现数据集上表现出竞争性性能

Conclusion: 率失真理论为MDL因果发现中原因变量描述长度的准确估计提供了有效框架，RDMDL方法在真实数据集上验证了其有效性

Abstract: Approaches to bivariate causal discovery based on the minimum description length (MDL) principle approximate the (uncomputable) Kolmogorov complexity of the models in each causal direction, selecting the one with the lower total complexity. The premise is that nature's mechanisms are simpler in their true causal order. Inherently, the description length (complexity) in each direction includes the description of the cause variable and that of the causal mechanism. In this work, we argue that current state-of-the-art MDL-based methods do not correctly address the problem of estimating the description length of the cause variable, effectively leaving the decision to the description length of the causal mechanism. Based on rate-distortion theory, we propose a new way to measure the description length of the cause, corresponding to the minimum rate required to achieve a distortion level representative of the underlying distribution. This distortion level is deduced using rules from histogram-based density estimation, while the rate is computed using the related concept of information dimension, based on an asymptotic approximation. Combining it with a traditional approach for the causal mechanism, we introduce a new bivariate causal discovery method, termed rate-distortion MDL (RDMDL). We show experimentally that RDMDL achieves competitive performance on the Tübingen dataset. All the code and experiments are publicly available at github.com/tiagobrogueira/Causal-Discovery-In-Exchangeable-Data.

</details>


### [358] [Controllable Image Generation with Composed Parallel Token Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05730)
*Jamie Stirling,Noura Al-Moubayed,Chris G. Willcocks,Hubert P. H. Shum*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种理论基础的离散概率生成过程组合方法，解决条件离散生成模型在忠实组合多个输入条件时的困难，显著提升性能并加速推理


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 条件离散生成模型在忠实组合多个输入条件方面存在困难，需要一种理论基础的组合方法来解决这一限制

Method: 推导出离散概率生成过程组合的理论公式，以掩码生成（吸收扩散）为特例，结合VQ-VAE/VQ-GAN的丰富组合词汇，支持训练数据外的新条件组合和概念加权

Result: 在3个数据集（位置CLEVR、关系CLEVR和FFHQ）上平均实现63.4%相对错误率降低，FID平均绝对改善-9.58，推理速度比可比方法快2.3-12倍，并可应用于预训练离散文生图模型

Conclusion: 提出的理论框架有效解决了条件离散生成模型的组合问题，显著提升性能、速度和可控性，为离散生成模型提供了更强大的组合能力

Abstract: Conditional discrete generative models struggle to faithfully compose multiple input conditions. To address this, we derive a theoretically-grounded formulation for composing discrete probabilistic generative processes, with masked generation (absorbing diffusion) as a special case. Our formulation enables precise specification of novel combinations and numbers of input conditions that lie outside the training data, with concept weighting enabling emphasis or negation of individual conditions. In synergy with the richly compositional learned vocabulary of VQ-VAE and VQ-GAN, our method attains a $63.4\%$ relative reduction in error rate compared to the previous state-of-the-art, averaged across 3 datasets (positional CLEVR, relational CLEVR and FFHQ), simultaneously obtaining an average absolute FID improvement of $-9.58$. Meanwhile, our method offers a $2.3\times$ to $12\times$ real-time speed-up over comparable methods, and is readily applied to an open pre-trained discrete text-to-image model for fine-grained control of text-to-image generation.

</details>


### [359] [Optimal-Transport-Guided Functional Flow Matching for Turbulent Field Generation in Hilbert Space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05700)
*Li Kunpeng,Wan Chenguang,Qu Zhisong,Lim Kyungtak,Virginie Grandgirard,Xavier Garbet,Yu Hua,Ong Yew Soon*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出FOT-CFM框架，直接在无限维函数空间中定义生成模型，用于高保真湍流建模，克服传统像素基方法的局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于知识的湍流建模难以捕捉复杂的时空动力学和多尺度间歇性。深度生成模型（如扩散模型和Flow Matching）虽然表现出色，但其离散的像素基本质限制了在湍流计算中的应用，因为湍流数据本质上是函数形式的。

Method: 提出Functional Optimal Transport Conditional Flow Matching (FOT-CFM)框架：1) 将物理场视为无限维希尔伯特空间的元素；2) 在概率测度层面学习分辨率不变的生成动力学；3) 集成最优传输理论，在希尔伯特空间中构建噪声与数据测度之间的确定性直线概率路径；4) 支持无模拟训练并加速采样过程。

Result: 在Navier-Stokes方程、Kolmogorov Flow和Hasegawa-Wakatani方程等混沌动力系统上验证，FOT-CFM在再现高阶湍流统计量和能量谱方面优于现有基线方法，表现出更高的保真度。

Conclusion: FOT-CFM通过在无限维函数空间中直接定义生成框架，成功克服了传统像素基方法的局限性，为湍流建模提供了更自然、更高效的解决方案，在复杂多尺度湍流结构建模方面表现出优越性能。

Abstract: High-fidelity modeling of turbulent flows requires capturing complex spatiotemporal dynamics and multi-scale intermittency, posing a fundamental challenge for traditional knowledge-based systems. While deep generative models, such as diffusion models and Flow Matching, have shown promising performance, they are fundamentally constrained by their discrete, pixel-based nature. This limitation restricts their applicability in turbulence computing, where data inherently exists in a functional form. To address this gap, we propose Functional Optimal Transport Conditional Flow Matching (FOT-CFM), a generative framework defined directly in infinite-dimensional function space. Unlike conventional approaches defined on fixed grids, FOT-CFM treats physical fields as elements of an infinite-dimensional Hilbert space, and learns resolution-invariant generative dynamics directly at the level of probability measures. By integrating Optimal Transport (OT) theory, we construct deterministic, straight-line probability paths between noise and data measures in Hilbert space. This formulation enables simulation-free training and significantly accelerates the sampling process. We rigorously evaluate the proposed system on a diverse suite of chaotic dynamical systems, including the Navier-Stokes equations, Kolmogorov Flow, and Hasegawa-Wakatani equations, all of which exhibit rich multi-scale turbulent structures. Experimental results demonstrate that FOT-CFM achieves superior fidelity in reproducing high-order turbulent statistics and energy spectra compared to state-of-the-art baselines.

</details>


### [360] [Same Graph, Different Likelihoods: Calibration of Autoregressive Graph Generators via Permutation-Equivalent Encodings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05613)
*Laurits Fredsgaard,Aaron Thomas,Michael Riis Andersen,Mikkel N. Schmidt,Mahito Sugiyama*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文研究了自回归图生成器中线性化不确定性(LU)的问题，发现模型倾向于学习训练时的特定线性化顺序而非底层图结构，提出使用线性化不确定性作为更可靠的生成分子质量评估指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自回归图生成器通过顺序构建过程定义似然，但这些似然只有在同一图的所有线性化之间保持一致时才有意义。Segmented Eulerian Neighborhood Trails (SENT)方法虽然能将图转换为可完美解码的序列，但同一图存在多个等效线性化，这导致了线性化不确定性问题。

Method: 使用线性化不确定性(LU)量化等效线性化之间负对数似然(NLL)的差异，通过变异系数计算。在四个线性化策略和两个数据集上训练transformer模型，比较不同线性化下的NLL和预期校准误差(ECE)。在QM9分子图基准上评估NLL和LU与分子稳定性的相关性。

Result: 有偏排序在其原生顺序上获得较低NLL，但在随机排列下预期校准误差高出两个数量级，表明模型学习了训练线性化而非底层图。在QM9上，生成图的NLL与分子稳定性呈负相关(AUC=0.43)，而LU达到AUC=0.85，表明基于排列的评估为生成分子提供了更可靠的质量检查。

Conclusion: 自回归图生成器存在严重的线性化不确定性问题，模型倾向于学习特定的线性化顺序而非图结构本身。线性化不确定性(LU)作为评估指标比传统负对数似然(NLL)更能可靠地反映生成分子的质量，为图生成模型的评估提供了新的视角。

Abstract: Autoregressive graph generators define likelihoods via a sequential construction process, but these likelihoods are only meaningful if they are consistent across all linearizations of the same graph. Segmented Eulerian Neighborhood Trails (SENT), a recent linearization method, converts graphs into sequences that can be perfectly decoded and efficiently processed by language models, but admit multiple equivalent linearizations of the same graph. We quantify violations in assigned negative log-likelihood (NLL) using the coefficient of variation across equivalent linearizations, which we call Linearization Uncertainty (LU). Training transformers under four linearization strategies on two datasets, we show that biased orderings achieve lower NLL on their native order but exhibit expected calibration error (ECE) two orders of magnitude higher under random permutation, indicating that these models have learned their training linearization rather than the underlying graph. On the molecular graph benchmark QM9, NLL for generated graphs is negatively correlated with molecular stability (AUC $=0.43$), while LU achieves AUC $=0.85$, suggesting that permutation-based evaluation provides a more reliable quality check for generated molecules. Code is available at https://github.com/lauritsf/linearization-uncertainty

</details>


### [361] [Channel-wise Retrieval for Multivariate Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05543)
*Junhyeok Kang,Jun Seo,Soyeon Park,Sangjun Han,Seohui Bae,Hyeokjun Choe,Soonyoung Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CRAFT提出了一种通道独立的检索增强时间序列预测框架，通过两阶段检索策略解决现有方法忽略通道异质性的问题，在多个基准测试中取得SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有检索增强预测方法采用通道无关策略，对所有变量应用相同的参考历史片段，忽略了不同通道具有不同周期性和频谱特征的异质性，导致无法有效捕捉长期依赖关系。

Method: CRAFT采用通道独立的检索策略，包含两阶段流程：1) 时域稀疏关系图构建，剪枝不相关候选；2) 频域谱相似性排序，强调主导周期成分并抑制噪声。

Result: 在7个公共基准测试中，CRAFT超越了最先进的预测基线，实现了更高的准确性，同时保持了实用的推理效率。

Conclusion: 通道独立的检索策略能有效处理多变量时间序列中的通道异质性，通过时域剪枝和频域排序的两阶段方法，在保持效率的同时显著提升预测性能。

Abstract: Multivariate time series forecasting often struggles to capture long-range dependencies due to fixed lookback windows. Retrieval-augmented forecasting addresses this by retrieving historical segments from memory, but existing approaches rely on a channel-agnostic strategy that applies the same references to all variables. This neglects inter-variable heterogeneity, where different channels exhibit distinct periodicities and spectral profiles. We propose CRAFT (Channel-wise retrieval-augmented forecasting), a novel framework that performs retrieval independently for each channel. To ensure efficiency, CRAFT adopts a two-stage pipeline: a sparse relation graph constructed in the time domain prunes irrelevant candidates, and spectral similarity in the frequency domain ranks references, emphasizing dominant periodic components while suppressing noise. Experiments on seven public benchmarks demonstrate that CRAFT outperforms state-of-the-art forecasting baselines, achieving superior accuracy with practical inference efficiency.

</details>


### [362] [Top-K Retrieval with Fixed-Size Linear-Attention Completion: Backbone- and KV-Format-Preserving Attention for KV-Cache Read Reduction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05438)
*Yasuto Hoshi,Daisuke Miyashita,Jun Deguchi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种检索-完成注意力模块，在保持骨干权重和KV缓存格式不变的情况下，通过精确计算锚点/检索token的注意力并估计剩余区域的贡献，减少长上下文生成时的KV缓存流量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长上下文生成受限于解码时的KV缓存流量，特别是当KV缓存超出GPU内存时。现有的查询感知检索方法（如Top-K选择）虽然减少了流量，但在对检索子集进行softmax重归一化时，会因注意力质量分布在未检索token上而产生偏差。

Method: 提出检索-完成注意力模块：1）对sink/tail锚点和查询相关的Top-K检索token计算精确注意力；2）使用预填充时计算的固定大小特征图摘要来估计剩余中间区域的分子和分母；3）在未归一化域中相加精确和估计贡献，然后应用单一归一化，无需额外的注意力侧KV读取。

Result: 在长上下文基准测试中，该方法在匹配的token等效读取预算下优于仅使用Top-K选择的方法，在高熵注意力头中增益最大。

Conclusion: 提出的检索-完成注意力模块能够有效减少KV缓存流量，同时通过精确计算和估计相结合的方式避免了传统检索方法中的softmax偏差问题，特别适用于高熵注意力头的长上下文生成任务。

Abstract: Long-context generation is increasingly limited by decode-time key-value (KV) cache traffic, particularly when KV is offloaded beyond GPU memory. Query-aware retrieval (e.g., Top-K selection) reduces this traffic by loading only a subset of KV pairs, but renormalizing the softmax over the subset introduces bias when attention mass is spread over unretrieved tokens. We propose a retrieval-completion attention module that keeps backbone weights and the KV-cache format unchanged. For each query, we compute exact attention over sink/tail anchors and the query-dependent retrieved Top-K tokens, and estimate the remaining mid-region numerator and denominator using a fixed-size feature-map summary computed at prefill time. We add the exact and estimated contributions in the unnormalized domain and apply a single normalization, recovering the missing softmax mass without additional attention-side KV reads. Across long-context benchmarks, the proposed method improves over selection-only Top-K at matched token-equivalent read budgets, with the largest gains in high-entropy heads.

</details>


### [363] [MO-RiskVAE: A Multi-Omics Variational Autoencoder for Survival Risk Modeling in Multiple MyelomaMO-RiskVAE](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06267)
*Zixuan Chen,Heng Zhang,YuPeng Qin,WenPeng Xing,Qiang Wang,Da Wang,Changting Lin,Meng Han*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究系统分析了多模态变分自编码器在生存风险建模中的潜在空间设计选择，发现生存监督训练主要对正则化强度和结构敏感，而非具体散度公式，并提出了改进的MO-RiskVAE模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态变分自编码器在多发性骨髓瘤生存风险建模中显示出强大潜力，但标准潜在正则化策略在生存监督训练下往往无法保留预后相关变异，导致表示不稳定或过度约束。尽管有多种变体提出，但尚不清楚潜在设计的哪些方面在这种设置下从根本上影响性能。

Method: 在统一的MyeVAE框架扩展中，系统隔离研究正则化尺度、后验几何和潜在空间结构，在相同架构和优化协议下进行受控实验。比较KL散度、MMD和HSIC等不同正则化机制，并探索连续-离散混合的Gumbel-Softmax潜在空间结构。

Result: 生存驱动训练主要对潜在正则化的幅度和结构敏感，而非具体散度公式。适度放松KL正则化能持续改善生存区分能力，而MMD和HSIC等替代机制在没有适当缩放时提供有限益处。结构化潜在空间能改善学习表示与生存风险梯度之间的对齐，Gumbel-Softmax混合连续-离散公式能增强连续潜在子空间中的全局风险排序。

Conclusion: 基于这些发现，研究者实例化了鲁棒的多模态生存模型MO-RiskVAE，该模型在不引入额外监督或复杂训练启发式的情况下，持续改善了对原始MyeVAE的风险分层能力。

Abstract: Multimodal variational autoencoders (VAEs) have emerged as a powerful framework for survival risk modeling in multiple myeloma by integrating heterogeneous omics and clinical data. However, when trained under survival supervision, standard latent regularization strategies often fail to preserve prognostically relevant variation, leading to unstable or overly constrained representations. Despite numerous proposed variants, it remains unclear which aspects of latent design fundamentally govern performance in this setting. In this work, we conduct a controlled investigation of latent modeling choices for multimodal survival prediction within a unified extension of the MyeVAE framework. By systematically isolating regularization scale, posterior geometry, and latent space structure under identical architectures and optimization protocols, we show that survival-driven training is primarily sensitive to the magnitude and structure of latent regularization rather than the specific divergence formulation. In particular, moderate relaxation of KL regularization consistently improves survival discrimination, while alternative divergence mechanisms such as MMD and HSIC provide limited benefit without appropriate scaling. We further demonstrate that structuring the latent space can improve alignment between learned representations and survival risk gradients. A hybrid continuous--discrete formulation based on Gumbel--Softmax enhances global risk ordering in the continuous latent subspace, even though stable discrete subtype discovery does not emerge under survival supervision. Guided by these findings, we instantiate a robust multimodal survival model, termed MO-RiskVAE, which consistently improves risk stratification over the original MyeVAE without introducing additional supervision or complex training heuristics.

</details>


### [364] [Cross-Machine Anomaly Detection Leveraging Pre-trained Time-series Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05335)
*Yangmeng Li,Kei Sano,Toshihiro Kitao,Ryoji Anzaki,Yukiya Saitoh,Hironori Moki,Dragan Djurdjanovic*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出跨机器时间序列异常检测框架，通过域不变特征提取器分离机器相关和工况相关特征，提升不同机器间的异常检测泛化能力


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决制造业中相同工艺的不同个体机器间行为差异问题，实现可靠的数据驱动异常检测方法，提高制造过程的韧性和质量

Method: 集成域不变特征提取器和无监督异常检测模块，利用预训练基础模型MOMENT，通过随机森林分类器将嵌入特征解耦为机器相关和工况相关特征

Result: 在三种执行相同操作的不同机器工业数据集上，该方法优于基于原始信号和MOMENT嵌入特征的基线方法，验证了跨机器泛化的有效性

Conclusion: 提出的跨机器时间序列异常检测框架通过分离机器特定特征和工况特征，显著提升了异常检测在不同个体机器间的泛化能力

Abstract: Achieving resilient and high-quality manufacturing requires reliable data-driven anomaly detection methods that are capable of addressing differences in behaviors among different individual machines which are nominally the same and are executing the same processes. To address the problem of detecting anomalies in a machine using sensory data gathered from different individual machines executing the same procedure, this paper proposes a cross-machine time-series anomaly detection framework that integrates a domain-invariant feature extractor with an unsupervised anomaly detection module. Leveraging the pre-trained foundation model MOMENT, the extractor employs Random Forest Classifiers to disentangle embeddings into machine-related and condition-related features, with the latter serving as representations which are invariant to differences between individual machines. These refined features enable the downstream anomaly detectors to generalize effectively to unseen target machines. Experiments on an industrial dataset collected from three different machines performing nominally the same operation demonstrate that the proposed approach outperforms both the raw-signal-based and MOMENT-embedding feature baselines, confirming its effectiveness in enhancing cross-machine generalization.

</details>


### [365] [A Theoretical Framework for Statistical Evaluability of Generative Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05324)
*Shashaank Aiyer,Yishay Mansour,Shay Moran,Han Shao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个评估生成模型的理论框架，分析了测试基度量（如积分概率度量）和Rényi散度的可评估性，发现IPMs可以从有限样本中评估，而Rényi和KL散度则不能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成模型的评估比监督学习更困难，因为生成模型具有开放性特征：不清楚哪些度量指标是合适的，以及这些指标是否可以从有限样本中可靠地评估。需要建立理论框架来理解生成模型评估的基本限制。

Method: 引入理论框架研究两类度量指标：测试基度量（包括积分概率度量IPMs）和Rényi散度。分析这些度量从有限样本中评估的可能性，使用统计学习理论工具如fat-shattering维度。

Result: 1. 对于任何有界测试类的IPMs，可以从有限样本中评估到乘性和加性近似误差；2. 当测试类具有有限fat-shattering维度时，IPMs可以以任意精度评估；3. Rényi和KL散度不能从有限样本中评估，因为它们的值可能由罕见事件决定；4. 分析了困惑度作为评估方法的潜力和局限性。

Conclusion: 生成模型的评估具有根本性挑战，不同度量指标的可评估性不同。IPMs类度量相对容易评估，而散度类度量难以从有限样本中可靠评估。这为生成模型评估的实践提供了理论指导。

Abstract: Statistical evaluation aims to estimate the generalization performance of a model using held-out i.i.d.\ test data sampled from the ground-truth distribution. In supervised learning settings such as classification, performance metrics such as error rate are well-defined, and test error reliably approximates population error given sufficiently large datasets. In contrast, evaluation is more challenging for generative models due to their open-ended nature: it is unclear which metrics are appropriate and whether such metrics can be reliably evaluated from finite samples.
  In this work, we introduce a theoretical framework for evaluating generative models and establish evaluability results for commonly used metrics. We study two categories of metrics: test-based metrics, including integral probability metrics (IPMs), and Rényi divergences. We show that IPMs with respect to any bounded test class can be evaluated from finite samples up to multiplicative and additive approximation errors. Moreover, when the test class has finite fat-shattering dimension, IPMs can be evaluated with arbitrary precision. In contrast, Rényi and KL divergences are not evaluable from finite samples, as their values can be critically determined by rare events. We also analyze the potential and limitations of perplexity as an evaluation method.

</details>


### [366] [LLMs Should Express Uncertainty Explicitly](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05306)
*Junyu Guo,Shangding Gu,Ming Jin,Costas Spanos,Javad Lavaei*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文研究将LLM不确定性作为控制接口，比较了全局置信度表达和推理时不确定性标记两种互补接口，发现它们提供不同但互补的益处


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法将不确定性视为生成后估计的潜在量，而非模型训练表达的信号。作者研究将不确定性作为控制接口，探索如何让LLM更好地表达不确定性以支持决策

Method: 比较两种互补接口：1) 全局接口：模型对其最终答案表达校准的置信度分数；2) 局部接口：模型在推理过程中进入高风险状态时发出明确的<uncertain>标记

Result: 口头置信度显著改善校准，减少过度自信错误，产生最强的自适应RAG控制器，更选择性地使用检索。推理时不确定性信号使先前沉默的失败可见，改善错误答案覆盖率，提供有效的高召回检索触发器。两种接口内部工作方式不同：口头置信度主要细化现有不确定性的解码方式，而推理时信号诱导更广泛的后期层重组

Conclusion: 有效的LLM不确定性应作为任务匹配的通信进行训练：全局置信度用于决定是否信任最终答案，局部信号用于决定何时需要干预。两种接口提供互补的益处

Abstract: Large language models are increasingly used in settings where uncertainty must drive decisions such as abstention, retrieval, and verification. Most existing methods treat uncertainty as a latent quantity to estimate after generation rather than a signal the model is trained to express. We instead study uncertainty as an interface for control. We compare two complementary interfaces: a global interface, where the model verbalizes a calibrated confidence score for its final answer, and a local interface, where the model emits an explicit <uncertain> marker during reasoning when it enters a high-risk state. These interfaces provide different but complementary benefits. Verbalized confidence substantially improves calibration, reduces overconfident errors, and yields the strongest overall Adaptive RAG controller while using retrieval more selectively. Reasoning-time uncertainty signaling makes previously silent failures visible during generation, improves wrong-answer coverage, and provides an effective high-recall retrieval trigger. Our findings further show that the two interfaces work differently internally: verbal confidence mainly refines how existing uncertainty is decoded, whereas reasoning-time signaling induces a broader late-layer reorganization. Together, these results suggest that effective uncertainty in LLMs should be trained as task-matched communication: global confidence for deciding whether to trust a final answer, and local signals for deciding when intervention is needed.

</details>


### [367] [Jeffreys Flow: Robust Boltzmann Generators for Rare Event Sampling via Parallel Tempering Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05303)
*Guang Lin,Christian Moya,Di Qi,Xuda Ye*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Jeffreys Flow生成框架，通过Jeffreys散度蒸馏并行回火轨迹数据，解决Boltzmann生成器中反向KL散度导致的模态崩溃问题，平衡局部精度与全局模态覆盖。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 粗糙能量景观物理系统的采样受罕见事件和亚稳态捕获限制。现有Boltzmann生成器依赖反向Kullback-Leibler散度常导致灾难性模态崩溃，在多模态分布中遗漏特定模态。

Method: 引入Jeffreys Flow生成框架，使用对称Jeffreys散度蒸馏来自并行回火轨迹的经验采样数据。该公式有效平衡局部目标寻求精度与全局模态覆盖。

Result: 最小化Jeffreys散度可抑制模态崩溃，并通过蒸馏经验参考数据结构性纠正固有不准确性。在高度非凸多维基准测试中展示了框架的可扩展性和准确性。

Conclusion: Jeffreys Flow能系统纠正副本交换随机梯度Langevin动力学中的随机梯度偏差，并大幅加速量子热态路径积分蒙特卡洛中的精确重要性采样。

Abstract: Sampling physical systems with rough energy landscapes is hindered by rare events and metastable trapping. While Boltzmann generators already offer a solution, their reliance on the reverse Kullback--Leibler divergence frequently induces catastrophic mode collapse, missing specific modes in multi-modal distributions. Here, we introduce the Jeffreys Flow, a robust generative framework that mitigates this failure by distilling empirical sampling data from Parallel Tempering trajectories using the symmetric Jeffreys divergence. This formulation effectively balances local target-seeking precision with global modes coverage. We show that minimizing Jeffreys divergence suppresses mode collapse and structurally corrects inherent inaccuracies via distillation of the empirical reference data. We demonstrate the framework's scalability and accuracy on highly non-convex multidimensional benchmarks, including the systematic correction of stochastic gradient biases in Replica Exchange Stochastic Gradient Langevin Dynamics and the massive acceleration of exact importance sampling in Path Integral Monte Carlo for quantum thermal states.

</details>


### [368] [Extending Tabular Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models for Time-Series Data Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05257)
*Umang Dobhal,Christina Garcia,Sozo Inoue*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出TabDDPM的时间序列扩展，通过时间适配器和上下文感知嵌入模块增强扩散模型的时间建模能力，生成具有时间一致性的合成传感器数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: TabDDPM虽然能生成高质量异质表格数据，但假设样本独立，无法处理时间序列中的时间依赖性。需要扩展扩散模型以生成具有时间一致性的合成时间序列数据。

Method: 1) 将传感器数据重构为窗口化序列；2) 引入轻量级时间适配器；3) 通过时间步嵌入、条件活动标签和观测/缺失掩码显式建模时间上下文；4) 使用条件扩散过程生成时间连贯序列。

Result: 在WISDM加速度计数据集上，合成时间序列与真实传感器模式高度相似，分类性能相当（宏F1分数0.64，准确率0.71）。通过二元转移矩阵和自相关分析验证了增强的时间真实性、多样性和连贯性。

Conclusion: 扩散模型通过时间推理能力增强后，能为序列数据合成提供有效且适应性强的解决方案，特别有利于少数类表示和保持与真实分布的统计对齐。未来将探索扩展到更长序列和集成更强的时间架构。

Abstract: Diffusion models are increasingly being utilised to create synthetic tabular and time series data for privacy-preserving augmentation. Tabular Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models (TabDDPM) generate high-quality synthetic data from heterogeneous tabular datasets but assume independence between samples, limiting their applicability to time-series domains where temporal dependencies are critical. To address this, we propose a temporal extension of TabDDPM, introducing sequence awareness through the use of lightweight temporal adapters and context-aware embedding modules. By reformulating sensor data into windowed sequences and explicitly modeling temporal context via timestep embeddings, conditional activity labels, and observed/missing masks, our approach enables the generation of temporally coherent synthetic sequences. Compared to baseline and interpolation techniques, validation using bigram transition matrices and autocorrelation analysis shows enhanced temporal realism, diversity, and coherence. On the WISDM accelerometer dataset, the suggested system produces synthetic time-series that closely resemble real world sensor patterns and achieves comparable classification performance (macro F1-score 0.64, accuracy 0.71). This is especially advantageous for minority class representation and preserving statistical alignment with real distributions. These developments demonstrate that diffusion based models provide effective and adaptable solutions for sequential data synthesis when they are equipped for temporal reasoning. Future work will explore scaling to longer sequences and integrating stronger temporal architectures.

</details>


### [369] [Explainable Machine Learning for Sepsis Outcome Prediction Using a Novel Romanian Electronic Health Record Dataset](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04698)
*Andrei-Alexandru Bunea,Ovidiu Ghibea,Dan-Matei Popovici,Ion Daniel,Octavian Andronic*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究开发了用于脓毒症预后预测的可解释机器学习模型，使用罗马尼亚大型急诊医院的12,286例住院数据，在三个分类任务中实现了优异性能（最高AUC=0.983），并通过SHAP分析识别出心血管合并症、尿素水平、血小板计数等关键预测因子，其中嗜酸性粒细胞减少症被确定为未被充分利用的重要标志物。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发可解释的机器学习模型用于脓毒症预后预测，旨在识别临床强预测因子，同时在不同分类任务中达到最先进的结果。研究特别关注在保持临床可解释性的同时捕捉复杂数据分布，并探索特征丰富度与患者覆盖范围之间的权衡。

Method: 使用罗马尼亚大型急诊医院的12,286例住院电子健康记录数据，包括人口统计学、ICD-10诊断和600种实验室检测类型。训练了五种机器学习模型来捕捉复杂分布同时保持临床可解释性。实验使用10-50个最常见实验室检测的子集来探索特征丰富度与患者覆盖范围的权衡。模型性能通过准确率和AUC评估，可解释性使用SHAP分析。

Result: 在三个分类任务中均取得优异性能：死亡vs出院、死亡vs康复、康复vs改善。最高性能出现在死亡vs康复案例研究中（AUC=0.983，准确率=0.93）。SHAP分析识别出多个强预测因子：心血管合并症、尿素水平、天冬氨酸氨基转移酶、血小板计数和嗜酸性粒细胞百分比。嗜酸性粒细胞减少症成为顶级预测因子，表明其作为未被充分利用标志物的价值。

Conclusion: 该研究开发的可解释机器学习模型在脓毒症预后预测中表现出优异性能，识别出多个临床相关预测因子，特别是嗜酸性粒细胞减少症作为未被当前评估标准纳入的重要标志物。高性能表明这些模型在临床环境中的适用性，为脓毒症管理提供了有价值的决策支持工具。

Abstract: We develop and analyze explainable machine learning (ML) models for sepsis outcome prediction using a novel Electronic Health Record (EHR) dataset from 12,286 hospitalizations at a large emergency hospital in Romania. The dataset includes demographics, International Classification of Diseases (ICD-10) diagnostics, and 600 types of laboratory tests. This study aims to identify clinically strong predictors while achieving state-of-the-art results across three classification tasks: (1)deceased vs. discharged, (2)deceased vs. recovered, and (3)recovered vs. ameliorated. We trained five ML models to capture complex distributions while preserving clinical interpretability. Experiments explored the trade-off between feature richness and patient coverage, using subsets of the 10--50 most frequent laboratory tests. Model performance was evaluated using accuracy and area under the curve (AUC), and explainability was assessed using SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP). The highest performance was obtained for the deceased vs. recovered case study (AUC=0.983, accuracy=0.93).
