Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: QED-Nano是一个4B参数的开源模型，通过三阶段训练方法在奥林匹克数学证明问题上达到接近专有模型性能，同时大幅降低推理成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 专有AI系统在复杂证明问题上表现出色但存在三个问题：训练流程不透明、依赖大型内部模型和框架导致运行昂贵、难以复现和研究。本文旨在探索小型开源模型能否在奥林匹克数学证明问题上达到竞争性推理性能。

Method: 三阶段训练方法：1) 监督微调从DeepSeek-Math-V2蒸馏学习良好证明写作风格；2) 基于评分标准的强化学习；3) 扩展强化学习，采用推理缓存将长证明分解为迭代的总结-精炼循环，增强测试时推理能力。

Result: QED-Nano在证明生成性能上超越了包括Nomos-1和GPT-OSS-120B在内的更大开源模型，接近Gemini 3 Pro等专有模型性能，同时推理成本大幅降低。

Conclusion: 小型开源模型通过精心设计的训练方法可以在奥林匹克数学证明问题上达到竞争性性能。作者开源了完整训练流程、模型、数据集和代码，支持开放数学推理的进一步研究。

Abstract: Proprietary AI systems have recently demonstrated impressive capabilities on complex proof-based problems, with gold-level performance reported at the 2025 International Mathematical Olympiad (IMO). However, the training pipelines behind these systems remain largely undisclosed, and their reliance on large "internal" models and scaffolds makes them expensive to run, difficult to reproduce, and hard to study or improve upon. This raises a central question: can small, open models also be trained to achieve competitive reasoning performance on difficult Olympiad-level math? In this paper, we answer this question by building QED-Nano, a 4B model post-trained for Olympiad-level proofs. Our training recipe has three stages: (1) supervised fine-tuning to imbue good proof-writing styles by distilling from DeepSeek-Math-V2, (2) reinforcement learning (RL) with rubric-based rewards, and (3) expanding RL with a reasoning cache, which decomposes long proofs into iterative summarize-and-refine cycles and enables stronger test-time reasoning. QED-Nano surpasses the proof-generation performance of much larger open models, including Nomos-1 and GPT-OSS-120B, and approaches the performance of proprietary models like Gemini 3 Pro, at a fraction of the inference cost. To support further research on open mathematical reasoning, we release the full QED-Nano pipeline, including the QED-Nano and QED-Nano-SFT models, the FineProofs-SFT and FineProofs-RL datasets, and the training and evaluation code.

</details>


<div id='cs.HC'></div>

# cs.HC [[Back]](#toc)

### [482] [BATON: A Multimodal Benchmark for Bidirectional Automation Transition Observation in Naturalistic Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07263)
*Yuhang Wang,Yiyao Xu,Chaoyun Yang,Lingyao Li,Jingran Sun,Hao Zhou*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: BATON数据集填补了自动驾驶控制转移预测的数据空白，通过多模态同步数据（视频、CAN信号、雷达、GPS）支持驾驶行为理解、移交和接管预测任务，发现视觉输入不足，多模态融合显著提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动驾驶系统要求驾驶员持续保持注意力并随时准备接管，这带来了巨大的认知负荷、陡峭的学习曲线和安全风险。预测驾驶员何时移交控制权给自动驾驶系统以及何时接管控制对于设计主动的、上下文感知的人机界面至关重要，但现有数据集很少捕获包括道路场景、驾驶员状态、车辆动力学和路线环境在内的多模态上下文。

Method: 引入BATON大规模自然驾驶数据集，包含127名驾驶员和136.6小时驾驶数据。数据集同步了前视视频、车内视频、解码的CAN总线信号、基于雷达的前车交互和GPS衍生的路线上下文，形成围绕每个控制转移的闭环多模态记录。定义了三个基准任务：驾驶行为理解、移交预测和接管预测，并评估了序列模型、经典分类器和零样本视觉语言模型等基线方法。

Result: 结果显示，仅视觉输入不足以可靠预测控制转移：前视视频捕获道路上下文但不反映驾驶员状态，而车内视频反映驾驶员准备状态但不包含外部场景。结合CAN和路线上下文信号显著优于仅使用视频的设置，表明各模态间具有强互补性。进一步发现接管事件发展更渐进，受益于更长的预测时间范围，而移交事件更依赖于即时上下文线索，揭示了直接影响辅助驾驶系统人机界面设计的不对称性。

Conclusion: BATON数据集填补了自动驾驶控制转移预测的多模态数据空白，证明了多模态融合对于可靠预测控制转移的重要性。研究发现移交和接管事件具有不同的时间动态特征，这对辅助驾驶系统的人机界面设计具有直接指导意义。

Abstract: Existing driving automation (DA) systems on production vehicles rely on human drivers to decide when to engage DA while requiring them to remain continuously attentive and ready to intervene. This design demands substantial situational judgment and imposes significant cognitive load, leading to steep learning curves, suboptimal user experience, and safety risks from both over-reliance and delayed takeover. Predicting when drivers hand over control to DA and when they take it back is therefore critical for designing proactive, context-aware HMI, yet existing datasets rarely capture the multimodal context, including road scene, driver state, vehicle dynamics, and route environment. To fill this gap, we introduce BATON, a large-scale naturalistic dataset capturing real-world DA usage across 127 drivers, and 136.6 hours of driving. The dataset synchronizes front-view video, in-cabin video, decoded CAN bus signals, radar-based lead-vehicle interaction, and GPS-derived route context, forming a closed-loop multimodal record around each control transition. We define three benchmark tasks: driving action understanding, handover prediction, and takeover prediction, and evaluate baselines spanning sequence models, classical classifiers, and zero-shot VLMs. Results show that visual input alone is insufficient for reliable transition prediction: front-view video captures road context but not driver state, while in-cabin video reflects driver readiness but not the external scene. Incorporating CAN and route-context signals substantially improves performance over video-only settings, indicating strong complementarity across modalities. We further find takeover events develop more gradually and benefit from longer prediction horizons, whereas handover events depend more on immediate contextual cues, revealing an asymmetry with direct implications for HMI design in assisted driving systems.

</details>


### [483] [Mixed-Initiative Context: Structuring and Managing Context for Human-AI Collaboration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07121)
*Haichang Li,Qinshi Zhang,Piaohong Wang,Zhicong Lu*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: 提出Mixed-Initiative Context概念，将多轮交互形成的上下文重构为显式、结构化、可操作的对象，实现动态组织管理，并通过Contextify系统探索用户行为与协作体验


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前人机协作中，多轮交互形成的上下文通常被扁平化为时间序列并作为固定整体处理，缺乏沿工作流程的动态组织管理机制。不同上下文在生命周期、结构层次和相关性上差异显著，临时或废弃的对话、并行话题线程会干扰推理，而用户只能通过间接方式影响上下文，缺乏明确可控性

Method: 提出Mixed-Initiative Context概念，将上下文重构为显式、结构化、可操作的交互对象；实现Contextify探测系统，允许上下文结构、范围和内容根据任务需求动态调整；通过用户研究探索用户上下文管理行为、对AI主动性的态度及整体协作体验

Result: 通过Contextify系统实施用户研究，探索了用户在混合主动上下文管理中的行为模式、对AI主动性的接受程度以及整体协作体验的改进效果

Conclusion: Mixed-Initiative Context概念为人机交互社区提供了新的视角，将上下文作为显式、结构化、可操作对象进行动态管理，增强了用户对上下文的控制能力，改善了人机协作体验

Abstract: In the human-AI collaboration area, the context formed naturally through multi-turn interactions is typically flattened into a chronological sequence and treated as a fixed whole in subsequent reasoning, with no mechanism for dynamic organization and management along the collaboration workflow. Yet these contexts differ substantially in lifecycle, structural hierarchy, and relevance. For instance, temporary or abandoned exchanges and parallel topic threads persist in the limited context window, causing interference and even conflict. Meanwhile, users are largely limited to influencing context indirectly through input modifications (e.g., corrections, references, or ignoring), leaving their control neither explicit nor verifiable.
  To address this, we propose Mixed-Initiative Context, which reconceptualizes the context formed across multi-turn interactions as an explicit, structured, and manipulable interactive object. Under this concept, the structure, scope, and content of context can be dynamically organized and adjusted according to task needs, enabling both humans and AI to actively participate in context construction and regulation. To explore this concept, we implement Contextify as a probe system and conduct a user study examining users' context management behaviors, attitudes toward AI initiative, and overall collaboration experience. We conclude by discussing the implications of this concept for the HCI community.

</details>


### [484] [AI and Collective Decisions: Strengthening Legitimacy and Losers' Consent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05368)
*Suyash Fulay,Prerna Ravi,Emily Kubin,Shrestha Mohanty,Michiel Bakker,Deb Roy*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: AI系统通过半结构化访谈收集个人政策经验，可视化展示预测政策支持与经验，提升集体决策的程序合法性，即使参与者未获偏好结果仍能接受


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI在集体决策中主要关注规模和效率，但忽视了程序合法性，特别是"失败者同意"问题——未获偏好结果的参与者是否仍认为决策公平。研究旨在探索AI如何基于参与者的不同经验和信念来支持集体决策，以及接触这些经验是否能增加信任、理解和社会凝聚力

Method: 构建了一个系统：1) 使用半结构化AI访谈员收集政策话题的个人经验；2) 创建交互式可视化，同时显示预测的政策支持和表达的经验。在随机实验(n=181)中，让参与者与可视化互动，所有参与者都遇到与自己偏好相反的决定

Result: 与可视化互动增加了感知合法性、对结果的信任以及对他人的理解，尽管所有参与者都遇到了与自己偏好相反的决定。这表明AI不仅能实现民主过程的规模和效率，还能增加参与者之间的信任和联系

Conclusion: AI可以支持集体决策的程序合法性，通过收集和展示个人经验来增强"失败者同意"。该工具的设计和评估为未来研究提供了方向，强调AI在民主过程中应不仅关注效率和规模，更要关注信任和参与者之间的联系

Abstract: AI is increasingly used to scale collective decision-making, but far less attention has been paid to how such systems can support procedural legitimacy, particularly the conditions shaping losers' consent: whether participants who do not get their preferred outcome still accept it as fair. We ask: (1) how can AI help ground collective decisions in participants' different experiences and beliefs, and (2) whether exposure to these experiences can increase trust, understanding, and social cohesion even when people disagree with the outcome. We built a system that uses a semi-structured AI interviewer to elicit personal experiences on policy topics and an interactive visualization that displays predicted policy support alongside those voiced experiences. In a randomized experiment (n = 181), interacting with the visualization increased perceived legitimacy, trust in outcomes, and understanding of others' perspectives, even though all participants encountered decisions that went against their stated preferences. Our hope is that the design and evaluation of this tool spurs future researchers to focus on how AI can help not only achieve scale and efficiency in democratic processes, but also increase trust and connection between participants.

</details>


### [485] [OGA-AID: Clinician-in-the-loop AI Report Drafting Assistant for Multimodal Observational Gait Analysis in Post-Stroke Rehabilitation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05360)
*Khoi T. N. Nguyen,Nghia D. Nguyen,Hui Yu Koh,Patrick W. H. Kwong,Karen Sui Geok Chua,Ananda Sidarta,Baosheng Yu*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: OGA-AID是一个多智能体LLM系统，用于辅助卒中后步态分析报告生成，通过协调3个专业智能体整合视频、运动捕捉数据和临床资料，在临床医生参与下显著提升报告质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 卒中后步态分析在康复中至关重要，但目前方法耗时且认知负荷高，临床医生需要整合步态视频和运动捕捉数据来撰写结构化报告，这一过程效率低下。

Method: 开发了OGA-AID系统，这是一个临床医生参与的多智能体大语言模型系统，协调3个专业智能体来综合患者运动记录、运动学轨迹和临床资料，生成结构化评估报告。

Result: 在真实患者数据上由专家物理治疗师评估，OGA-AID始终优于单次多模态基线方法，错误率低；在临床医生参与设置中，简短的专家初步笔记进一步降低了与参考评估的误差。

Conclusion: 研究证明了多模态智能体系统用于结构化临床步态评估的可行性，并强调了AI辅助分析与人类临床判断在康复工作流程中的互补关系。

Abstract: Gait analysis is essential in post-stroke rehabilitation but remains time-intensive and cognitively demanding, especially when clinicians must integrate gait videos and motion-capture data into structured reports. We present OGA-AID, a clinician-in-the-loop multi-agent large language model system for multimodal report drafting. The system coordinates 3 specialized agents to synthesize patient movement recordings, kinematic trajectories, and clinical profiles into structured assessments. Evaluated with expert physiotherapists on real patient data, OGA-AID consistently outperforms single-pass multimodal baselines with low error. In clinician-in-the-loop settings, brief expert preliminary notes further reduce error compared to reference assessments. Our findings demonstrate the feasibility of multimodal agentic systems for structured clinical gait assessment and highlight the complementary relationship between AI-assisted analysis and human clinical judgment in rehabilitation workflows.

</details>


<div id='cs.CY'></div>

# cs.CY [[Back]](#toc)

### [486] [Designing Safe and Accountable GenAI as a Learning Companion with Women Banned from Formal Education](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07253)
*Hamayoon Behmanush,Freshta Akhtari,Ingmar Weber,Vikram Kamath Cannanure*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 在性别限制和监控环境下，阿富汗女性使用生成式AI作为学习同伴和职业导师，但面临隐私风险和文化不安全的支持，参与式设计提升了她们的抱负和能动性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在性别限制和监控环境下，女性被排除在正规教育之外，转向在线学习和生成式AI追求教育职业目标，但缺乏对安全、负责任AI支持的理解，特别是在监控、家庭责任和缺乏学习社区的情况下。

Method: 采用远程参与式设计研究，包括招募调查（n=140）和20名阿富汗女性的参与，探讨她们如何设想生成式AI用于学习和就业能力，分析使用模式并提出设计方向。

Result: 参与者将生成式AI视为随时可用的同伴、导师和职业指导来源，而非信息源，但受到隐私风险、文化不安全支持和直接答案互动的限制；参与式设计显著提升了参与者的抱负（p=.01）、感知能动性（p=.01）和感知途径（p=.03）。

Conclusion: 负责任和安全的生成式AI不仅是减少伤害，还能积极帮助女性想象和追求可行的学习和就业未来，需要以安全优先、用户控制、资源约束下的情境化支持以及教学对齐的协助为核心的设计方向。

Abstract: In gender-restrictive and surveilled contexts, where access to formal education may be restricted for women, pursuing education involves safety and privacy risks. When women are excluded from schools and universities, they often turn to online self-learning and generative AI (GenAI) to pursue their educational and career aspirations. However, we know little about what safe and accountable GenAI support is required in the context of surveillance, household responsibilities, and the absence of learning communities. We present a remote participatory design study with 20 women in Afghanistan, informed by a recruitment survey (n = 140), examining how participants envision GenAI for learning and employability. Participants describe using GenAI less as an information source and more as an always-available peer, mentor, and source of career guidance that helps compensate for the absence of learning communities. At the same time, they emphasize that this companionship is constrained by privacy and surveillance risks, contextually unrealistic and culturally unsafe support, and direct-answer interactions that can undermine learning by creating an illusion of progress. Beyond eliciting requirements, envisioning the future with GenAI through participatory design was positively associated with significant increases in participants' aspirations (p=.01), perceived agency (p=.01), and perceived avenues (p=.03). These outcomes show that accountable and safe GenAI is not only about harm reduction but can also actively enable women to imagine and pursue viable learning and employment futures. Building on this, we translate participants' proposals into accountability-focused design directions that center on safety-first interaction and user control, context-grounded support under constrained resources, and offer pedagogically aligned assistance that supports genuine learning rather than quick answers.

</details>


### [487] [The ATOM Report: Measuring the Open Language Model Ecosystem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07190)
*Nathan Lambert,Florian Brand*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 中国开源语言模型在2025年夏季超越美国同行并持续扩大领先优势


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 提供主流开源语言模型的采用情况概览，分析模型构建者分布，为研究人员、创业者和政策顾问提供生态系统关键洞察

Method: 综合研究约1500个主流开源模型（如阿里Qwen、DeepSeek、Meta Llama等），结合Hugging Face下载量、模型衍生品、推理市场份额、性能指标等多维度数据

Result: 中国模型在2025年夏季超越美国模型，并在后续进一步扩大领先优势，形成明显的技术差距

Conclusion: 开源语言模型生态系统呈现中国模型主导的趋势，这对全球AI研究和应用格局具有重要影响

Abstract: We present a comprehensive adoption snapshot of the leading open language models and who is building them, focusing on the ~1.5K mainline open models from the likes of Alibaba's Qwen, DeepSeek, Meta's Llama, that are the foundation of an ecosystem crucial to researchers, entrepreneurs, and policy advisors. We document a clear trend where Chinese models overtook their counterparts built in the U.S. in the summer of 2025 and subsequently widened the gap over their western counterparts. We study a mix of Hugging Face downloads and model derivatives, inference market share, performance metrics and more to make a comprehensive picture of the ecosystem.

</details>


### [488] [Infrastructure First: Enabling Embodied AI for Science in the Global South](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06722)
*Shaoshan Liu,Jie Tang,Marwa S. Hassan,Mohamed H. Sharkawy,Moustafa M. G. Fouda,Tiewei Shang,Zixin Wang*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: EAI4S通过结合感知、推理和机器人行动实现实验室自主实验，对全球南方而言是克服人力限制、提升科研能力的关键基础设施，而非单纯的技术采纳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决全球南方科研机构面临的根本能力约束：实验需求远超过可用人力，需要在人力、电力和连接性有限条件下实现持续可靠的实验自动化。

Method: 提出基础设施优先的方法，强调依赖可靠的边缘计算、能效硬件、模块化机器人系统、本地化数据管道和开放标准，而非仅仅依赖算法能力。

Result: 将自动化从奢侈品转变为必要的科学基础设施，为全球南方机构提供将AI进步转化为持续科研能力和竞争力的具体路径。

Conclusion: EAI4S的主要障碍不是算法能力而是基础设施，需要基础设施优先的方法来确保最先进的模型能够在资源有限的环境中部署，从而缩小全球科研差距。

Abstract: Embodied AI for Science (EAI4S) brings intelligence into the laboratory by uniting perception, reasoning, and robotic action to autonomously run experiments in the physical world. For the Global South, this shift is not about adopting advanced automation for its own sake, but about overcoming a fundamental capacity constraint: too few hands to run too many experiments. By enabling continuous, reliable experimentation under limits of manpower, power, and connectivity, EAI4S turns automation from a luxury into essential scientific infrastructure. The main obstacle, however, is not algorithmic capability. It is infrastructure. Open-source AI and foundation models have narrowed the knowledge gap, but EAI4S depends on dependable edge compute, energy-efficient hardware, modular robotic systems, localized data pipelines, and open standards. Without these foundations, even the most capable models remain trapped in well-resourced laboratories. This article argues for an infrastructure-first approach to EAI4S and outlines the practical requirements for deploying embodied intelligence at scale, offering a concrete pathway for Global South institutions to translate AI advances into sustained scientific capacity and competitive research output.

</details>


### [489] [Restoring Heterogeneity in LLM-based Social Simulation: An Audience Segmentation Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06663)
*Xiaoyou Qin,Zhihong Li,Xiaoxiao Cheng*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 该研究提出受众分割作为恢复LLM社会模拟异质性的系统方法，通过多种分割配置比较发现，增加标识符粒度并不总是改善性能，紧凑配置常优于全面方案，不同选择逻辑在不同保真度维度各有优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM社会模拟实践常将多样性压缩为"平均角色"，掩盖了社会现实中关键的亚群体变异，需要系统方法来恢复模拟中的异质性。

Method: 引入受众分割方法，使用美国气候意见调查数据，比较两个开源LLM（Llama 3.1-70B和Mixtral 8x22B）的六种分割配置，变化标识符粒度、简约性和选择逻辑（理论驱动、数据驱动和工具基础）。

Result: 增加标识符粒度不产生一致改进；中等丰富度可提升性能，但进一步扩展无可靠帮助且可能损害结构和预测保真度。紧凑配置常匹配或优于更全面方案。不同选择逻辑在不同保真度维度各有优势：工具基础选择最佳保持分布形状，数据驱动选择最佳恢复组间结构和标识符-结果关联。

Conclusion: 受众分割是有效LLM社会模拟的核心方法学方法，需要异质性感知评估和方差保持建模策略，没有单一配置在所有维度都占优，性能增益可能伴随其他维度损失。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used to simulate social attitudes and behaviors, offering scalable "silicon samples" that can approximate human data. However, current simulation practice often collapses diversity into an "average persona," masking subgroup variation that is central to social reality. This study introduces audience segmentation as a systematic approach for restoring heterogeneity in LLM-based social simulation. Using U.S. climate-opinion survey data, we compare six segmentation configurations across two open-weight LLMs (Llama 3.1-70B and Mixtral 8x22B), varying segmentation identifier granularity, parsimony, and selection logic (theory-driven, data-driven, and instrument-based). We evaluate simulation performance with a three-dimensional evaluation framework covering distributional, structural, and predictive fidelity. Results show that increasing identifier granularity does not produce consistent improvement: moderate enrichment can improve performance, but further expansion does not reliably help and can worsen structural and predictive fidelity. Across parsimony comparisons, compact configurations often match or outperform more comprehensive alternatives, especially in structural and predictive fidelity, while distributional fidelity remains metric dependent. Identifier selection logic determines which fidelity dimension benefits most: instrument-based selection best preserves distributional shape, whereas data-driven selection best recovers between-group structure and identifier-outcome associations. Overall, no single configuration dominates all dimensions, and performance gains in one dimension can coincide with losses in another. These findings position audience segmentation as a core methodological approach for valid LLM-based social simulation and highlight the need for heterogeneity-aware evaluation and variance-preserving modeling strategies.

</details>


### [490] [Governance and Regulation of Artificial Intelligence in Developing Countries: A Case Study of Nigeria](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06018)
*Uloma Okoro,Tammy Mackenzie,Branislav Radeljic*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 尼日利亚法律专业人士对AI治理的看法研究：关注伦理风险、监管空白和机构准备度，强调需要本地化治理模式而非直接采用外国框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 本研究旨在探讨发展中国家AI治理问题，特别是从法律专业人士的视角了解他们对AI伦理风险、监管框架和机构能力的看法，填补发展中国家AI治理研究的空白。

Method: 采用定性案例研究设计，通过27个半结构化访谈和1个焦点小组讨论（7名参与者）收集数据，参与者来自金融、保险、公司法等多个领域的尼日利亚法律从业者，采用主题分析法识别关键模式。

Result: 研究发现：1) 对数据隐私风险的担忧；2) 缺乏可执行的法律框架；3) 对机构能力信心有限；4) 强调需要本地适应的治理模式而非直接采用外国框架；5) 对AI潜力的乐观态度取决于强有力的法律监督和公共问责。

Conclusion: 研究强调了情境特定、包容性强且能够弥合全球伦理原则与本地现实差距的监管方法的重要性，为政策制定者、监管机构和学者在类似环境中塑造负责任的AI治理提供了实践指导。

Abstract: This study examines the perception of legal professionals on the governance of AI in developing countries, using Nigeria as a case study. The study focused on ethical risks, regulatory gaps, and institutional readiness. The study adopted a qualitative case study design. Data were collected through 27 semi-structured interviews with legal practitioners in Nigeria. A focus group discussion was also held with seven additional legal practitioners across sectors such as finance, insurance, and corporate law. Thematic analysis was employed to identify key patterns in participant responses. Findings showed that there were concerns about data privacy risks and the lack of enforceable legal frameworks. Participants expressed limited confidence in institutional capacity and emphasized the need for locally adapted governance models rather than direct adoption of foreign frameworks. While some expressed optimism about AI's potential, this was conditional on the presence of strong legal oversight and public accountability. The study contributes to the growing discourse on AI governance in developing countries by focusing on the perspectives of legal professionals. It highlights the importance of regulatory approaches that are context-specific, inclusive, and capable of bridging the gap between global ethical principles and local realities. These insights offer practical guidance for policymakers, regulators, and scholars working to shape responsible AI governance in similar environments.

</details>


### [491] [Beyond Symbolic Control: Societal Consequences of AI-Driven Workforce Displacement and the Imperative for Genuine Human Oversight Architectures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.00081)
*Richard J. Mitchell*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 论文分析了AI和机器人系统取代人类劳动的结构性转变，重点关注了"名义人类监督"与"真正人类监督"之间的治理差距，认为这是当前AI治理的主要架构缺陷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI和机器人系统加速取代人类劳动，其社会影响远超传统劳动力市场分析。当前治理框架存在关键缺陷：名义人类监督（形式权威）与真正人类监督（认知访问、技术能力和制度权威）之间存在治理差距，这构成了AI治理的主要架构故障模式。

Method: 采用系统性多领域分析方法，考察经济结构、心理健康、政治稳定、教育、医疗和地缘政治秩序等多个维度的影响。提出了真正人类监督系统的五个架构要求，并分析了治理窗口期（10-15年）。

Result: 识别出当前治理框架（包括欧盟AI法案和NIST AI风险管理框架1.0）中缺乏的关键区分：名义监督与真正监督。劳动替代的社会后果加剧了这一问题，使重要的AI决策权集中在日益狭窄的技术和资本阶层手中。

Conclusion: 当前部署轨迹存在路径依赖的社会、经济和制度锁定风险。必须在10-15年的治理窗口期内建立真正的监督系统，包括认知访问、技术能力、制度权威等五个架构要求，以避免治理失败。

Abstract: The accelerating displacement of human labor by artificial intelligence (AI) and robotic systems represents a structural transformation whose societal consequences extend far beyond conventional labor market analysis. This paper presents a systematic multi-domain examination of the likely effects on economic structure, psychological well-being, political stability, education, healthcare, and geopolitical order. We identify a critical and underexamined dimension of this transition: the governance gap between nominal human oversight of AI systems -- where humans occupy positions of formal authority over AI decisions -- and genuine human oversight, where those humans possess the cognitive access, technical capability, and institutional authority to meaningfully understand, evaluate, and override AI outputs. We argue that this distinction, largely absent from current governance frameworks including the EU AI Act and NIST AI Risk Management Framework 1.0, represents the primary architectural failure mode in deployed AI governance. The societal consequences of labor displacement intensify this problem by concentrating consequential AI decision-making among an increasingly narrow class of technical and capital actors. We propose five architectural requirements for genuine human oversight systems and characterize the governance window -- estimated at 10-15 years -- before current deployment trajectories risk path-dependent social, economic, and institutional lock-in.

</details>


<div id='hep-ex'></div>

# hep-ex [[Back]](#toc)

### [492] [Towards foundation-style models for energy-frontier heterogeneous neutrino detectors via self-supervised pre-training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07037)
*Saúl Alonso-Monsalve,Fabio Cufino,Umut Kose,Anna Mascellani,André Rubbia*

Main category: hep-ex

TL;DR: 提出稀疏ViT框架，通过自监督预训练学习可重用表示，提升高能中微子探测器数据分析性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 加速器中微子物理进入TeV能区，产生密集重叠的探测器信号，传统重建方法难以处理，且标记数据稀缺，需要适应多样下游任务

Method: 稀疏ViT框架，结合掩码自编码器重建和关系体素级目标（层次结构、鬼影识别、粒子识别）进行自监督预训练，共享编码器在分类和回归任务上联合微调

Result: 预训练持续改善中微子味道和粲夸克识别、动量回归和顶点重建；关系目标在拓扑复杂通道中带来额外增益；预训练编码器仅需约10^3标记事件即可达到随机初始化模型10倍数据量的性能；表示可有效迁移到不同探测器技术和能标

Conclusion: 多模态探测器数据的自监督预训练是获得可重用表示的可扩展途径，适用于中微子和粒子探测器分析

Abstract: Accelerator-based neutrino physics is entering an energy-frontier regime in which interactions reach the TeV scale and produce exceptionally dense, overlapping detector signatures. In this regime, event interpretation becomes impractical for conventional reconstruction approaches, particularly when labelled data are scarce and the analysis spans diverse downstream objectives. We present a sparse ViT framework for learning reusable representations from heterogeneous detector data. Self-supervised pre-training combines masked autoencoder reconstruction with relational voxel-level objectives for hierarchy, ghost and particle identification, and the resulting shared encoder is then jointly fine-tuned across classification and regression tasks. Evaluated on simulated events from the proposed FASERCal concept at the LHC, we find that pre-training consistently improves neutrino flavour and charm-quark identification, momentum regression, and vertex reconstruction over training from scratch, with the addition of relational objectives yielding further gains in the most topologically complex channels. Interpretability analyses further show that pre-training yields a more structured latent space, while detector-subsystem ablations recover physically plausible channel-dependent roles for the heterogeneous inputs. A data-efficiency study shows that, with roughly $10^3$ labelled events, the pre-trained encoder already matches the flavour-classification performance of a randomly initialised model trained on an order of magnitude more data. The learned representations also transfer effectively to publicly available benchmarks spanning different detector technologies and energy scales, matching or exceeding published baselines. These results support self-supervised pre-training on multimodal detector data as a scalable route towards reusable representations for neutrino and particle-detector analysis.

</details>


<div id='eess.SY'></div>

# eess.SY [[Back]](#toc)

### [493] [Measurement of Generative AI Workload Power Profiles for Whole-Facility Data Center Infrastructure Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07345)
*Roberto Vercellino,Jared Willard,Gustavo Campos,Weslley da Silva Pereira,Olivia Hull,Matthew Selensky,Juliane Mueller*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种将AI工作负载高分辨率功耗测量与整个数据中心能耗需求关联的方法，通过NLR数据中心测量AI训练、微调和推理任务的功耗，并建立自底向上的数据中心能耗模型，为基础设施规划提供支持。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成式AI的快速发展带来了前所未有的计算需求，导致数据中心能耗显著增加。然而，现有的功耗数据大多是专有的，且报告分辨率不一，这给估算整个设施的能源使用和规划基础设施带来了挑战。

Method: 使用配备NVIDIA H100 GPU的NLR高性能计算数据中心，以0.1秒分辨率测量AI训练、微调和推理任务的功耗。采用MLCommons基准进行模型训练和微调，vLLM基准进行推理，实现可重复和标准化的工作负载分析。然后通过自底向上、事件驱动的数据中心能耗模型将功耗配置文件扩展到整个设施级别。

Result: 创建了公开可用的功耗配置文件数据集，并生成了捕获AI工作负载和用户行为驱动的真实时间波动的整个设施能源配置文件。这些配置文件可用于为电网连接、现场能源生成和分布式微电网的基础设施规划提供信息。

Conclusion: 该研究填补了高分辨率工作负载功耗测量与整个数据中心能耗需求之间的空白，为数据中心基础设施规划提供了实用的工具和方法，有助于应对生成式AI带来的能源挑战。

Abstract: The rapid growth of generative artificial intelligence (AI) has introduced unprecedented computational demands, driving significant increases in the energy footprint of data centers. However, existing power consumption data is largely proprietary and reported at varying resolutions, creating challenges for estimating whole-facility energy use and planning infrastructure. In this work, we present a methodology that bridges this gap by linking high-resolution workload power measurements to whole-facility energy demand. Using NLR's high-performance computing data center equipped with NVIDIA H100 GPUs, we measure power consumption of AI workloads at 0.1-second resolution for AI training, fine-tuning and inference jobs. Workloads are characterized using MLCommons benchmarks for model training and fine-tuning, and vLLM benchmarks for inference, enabling reproducible and standardized workload profiling. The dataset of power consumption profiles is made publicly available. These power profiles are then scaled to the whole-facility-level using a bottom-up, event-driven, data center energy model. The resulting whole-facility energy profiles capture realistic temporal fluctuations driven by AI workloads and user-behavior, and can be used to inform infrastructure planning for grid connection, on-site energy generation, and distributed microgrids.

</details>


### [494] [eVTOL Aircraft Energy Overhead Estimation under Conflict Resolution in High-Density Airspaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06093)
*Alex Zongo,Peng Wei*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: MVP冲突解决算法对eVTOL能耗影响分析：中位数能耗开销低于1.5%，但分布右偏，尾部可达44%；95%分位数3.84-5.3%，建议4-5%储备裕度；开发ML模型预测能耗开销及不确定性边界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究eVTOL在高密度城市空域中战术冲突解决的能量成本，填补现有研究中对此问题缺乏系统量化的空白，为先进空中交通（AAM）的能源约束操作提供定量指导。

Method: 将基于物理的功率模型集成到交通仿真中，分析约71,767个航路段，覆盖10-60架同时飞行飞机的交通密度；开发机器学习模型在任务开始时估计能耗开销，提供点估计和不确定性边界。

Result: MVP去冲突算法具有能源效率：所有密度水平下中位数能耗开销保持在1.5%以下，大部分航段可忽略不计；但分布呈现明显右偏，最高密度下尾部案例可达44%开销；95%分位数范围3.84-5.3%；ML模型预测范围保守，实际结果比声明的置信水平更频繁地落在预测范围内。

Conclusion: MVP算法适用于能源受限的eVTOL操作，4-5%的储备裕度可覆盖绝大多数战术去冲突场景；开发的ML模型为安全关键储备规划提供支持，验证了MVP在先进空中交通中的适用性。

Abstract: Electric vertical takeoff and landing (eVTOL) aircraft operating in high-density urban airspace must maintain safe separation through tactical conflict resolution, yet the energy cost of such maneuvers has not been systematically quantified. This paper investigates how conflict-resolution maneuvers under the Modified Voltage Potential (MVP) algorithm affect eVTOL energy consumption. Using a physics-based power model integrated within a traffic simulation, we analyze approximately 71,767 en route sections within a sector, across traffic densities of 10-60 simultaneous aircraft. The main finding is that MVP-based deconfliction is energy-efficient: median energy overhead remains below 1.5% across all density levels, and the majority of en route flights within the sector incur negligible penalty. However, the distribution exhibits pronounced right-skewness, with tail cases reaching 44% overhead at the highest densities due to sustained multi-aircraft conflicts. The 95th percentile ranges from 3.84% to 5.3%, suggesting that a 4-5% reserve margin accommodates the vast majority of tactical deconfliction scenarios. To support operational planning, we develop a machine learning model that estimates energy overhead at mission initiation. Because conflict outcomes depend on future traffic interactions that cannot be known in advance, the model provides both point estimates and uncertainty bounds. These bounds are conservative; actual outcomes fall within the predicted range more often than the stated confidence level, making them suitable for safety-critical reserve planning. Together, these results validate MVP's suitability for energy-constrained eVTOL operations and provide quantitative guidance for reserve energy determination in Advanced Air Mobility.

</details>


### [495] [Synchronous Observer Design for Landmark-Inertial SLAM with Magnetometer and Intermittent GNSS Measurements](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05156)
*Arkadeep Saha,Pieter van Goor,Ravi Banavar*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种非线性观测器用于地标-惯性SLAM，通过添加间歇性GNSS位置和磁力计测量来克服可观测性限制


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在传统的地标-惯性SLAM中，机器人和地标在惯性系中的绝对位置以及机器人的偏航角是不可观测的，这限制了系统的实用性

Method: 设计非线性观测器，结合间歇性GNSS位置测量和磁力计测量来增强系统可观测性，实现全局状态估计

Result: 所提观测器的全状态误差动力学被证明是几乎全局渐近稳定和局部指数稳定的，并通过仿真验证

Conclusion: 通过添加GNSS和磁力计测量，成功解决了LI-SLAM中的可观测性问题，实现了稳定的全状态估计

Abstract: In Landmark-Inertial Simultaneous Localisation and Mapping (LI-SLAM), the positions of landmarks in the environment and the robot's pose relative to these landmarks are estimated using landmark position measurements, and measurements from the Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU). However, the robot and landmark positions in the inertial frame, and the yaw of the robot, are not observable in LI-SLAM. This paper proposes a nonlinear observer for LI-SLAM that overcomes the observability constraints with the addition of intermittent GNSS position and magnetometer measurements. The full-state error dynamics of the proposed observer is shown to be both almost-globally asymptotically stable and locally exponentially stable, and this is validated using simulations.

</details>


### [496] [Finite-Step Invariant Sets for Hybrid Systems with Probabilistic Guarantees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05102)
*Varun Madabushi,Elizabeth Dietrich,Hanna Krasowski,Maegan Tucker*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种基于采样优化的算法框架，用于计算混合动力系统中周期轨道周围的有限步不变椭球，并提供概率保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Poincare返回映射是分析混合动力系统周期轨道的基本工具，但计算不变集在计算上很困难，特别是当系统动力学只能通过前向仿真获得时。需要一种方法来评估系统对扰动的鲁棒性。

Method: 提出一个算法框架，利用基于采样的优化方法，通过返回映射的采样评估来计算名义周期轨道周围的有限步不变椭球。

Result: 该方法在三个系统上进行了演示：两个低维系统和一个双足行走模型，能够计算有限步不变椭球并满足用户定义的精度阈值。

Conclusion: 该框架为混合动力系统的鲁棒性分析提供了一种实用的计算方法，特别适用于只能通过仿真获取系统信息的情况，并提供了概率保证。

Abstract: Poincare return maps are a fundamental tool for analyzing periodic orbits in hybrid dynamical systems, including legged locomotion, power electronics, and other cyber-physical systems with switching behavior. The Poincare return map captures the evolution of the hybrid system on a guard surface, reducing the stability analysis of a periodic orbit to that of a discrete-time system. While linearization provides local stability information, assessing robustness to disturbances requires identifying invariant sets of the state space under the return dynamics. However, computing such invariant sets is computationally difficult, especially when system dynamics are only available through forward simulation. In this work, we propose an algorithmic framework leveraging sampling-based optimization to compute a finite-step invariant ellipsoid around a nominal periodic orbit using sampled evaluations of the return map. The resulting solution is accompanied by probabilistic guarantees on finite-step invariance satisfying a user-defined accuracy threshold. We demonstrate the approach on two low-dimensional systems and a compass-gait walking model.

</details>


### [497] [Periodic Event-Triggered Explicit Reference Governor for Constrained Attitude Control on SO(3)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04041)
*Satoshi Nakano,Masahiro Suzuki,Misa Ohashi,Noboru Chikami,Shusuke Otabe*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种周期性事件触发显式参考调控器（PET-ERG），用于SO(3)群上的刚体姿态控制，在避免奇异性的同时强制执行输入饱和和几何指向约束，无需在线优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决刚体在特殊正交群SO(3)上的约束姿态控制问题，避免欧拉角等参数化带来的奇异性，同时处理输入饱和和几何指向约束，而不依赖在线优化。

Method: 提出周期性事件触发显式参考调控器（PET-ERG），采用周期性事件触发监督更新机制：仅在采样时刻且满足鲁棒安全条件时更新辅助参考，避免连续时间参考更新，从而实现对流形上级联系统的严格稳定性分析。

Result: 严格建立了闭环系统对几乎所有初始配置的渐近稳定性和指数收敛性。数值仿真验证了所提控制架构的有效性，并展示了约束满足和收敛特性。

Conclusion: PET-ERG方法成功解决了SO(3)上的约束姿态控制问题，通过周期性事件触发机制实现了严格的稳定性分析，避免了连续时间更新和在线优化，为刚体姿态控制提供了一种有效的约束处理方案。

Abstract: This letter addresses the constrained attitude control problem for rigid bodies directly on the special orthogonal group SO(3), avoiding singularities associated with parameterizations such as Euler angles. We propose a novel Periodic Event-Triggered Explicit Reference Governor (PET-ERG) that enforces input saturation and geometric pointing constraints without relying on online optimization. A key feature is a periodic event-triggered supervisory update: the auxiliary reference is updated only at sampled instants when a robust safety condition is met, thereby avoiding continuous-time reference updates and enabling a rigorous stability analysis of the cascade system on the manifold. Through this structured approach, we rigorously establish the asymptotic stability and exponential convergence of the closed-loop system for almost all initial configurations. Numerical simulations validate the effectiveness of the proposed control architecture and demonstrate constraint satisfaction and convergence properties.

</details>


### [498] [Element-based Formation Control: a Unified Perspective from Continuum Mechanics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04027)
*Kun Cao,Lihua Xie*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于连续介质力学变形梯度概念的编队控制统一框架，将编队建模为由单纯形元素组成的离散弹性体，通过定义基于局部变形梯度张量的广义畸变能量，推导出能强制执行平移、旋转、缩放和仿射变换等几何不变性的分布式控制律。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统编队控制方法依赖于图边定义的几何约束，缺乏统一的数学框架。本文旨在建立连接现有刚性基和拉普拉斯基方法的桥梁，提供更通用的编队控制理论框架。

Method: 引入连续介质力学中的变形梯度概念，将编队建模为离散弹性体，由单纯形元素组成。定义基于局部变形梯度张量的广义畸变能量，推导出能强制执行各种几何不变性的分布式控制律家族。

Result: 理论分析表明，该框架连接了刚性基和拉普拉斯基方法：刚性基控制器在数学上等价于最小化变形能量张量的特定投影；建立了能量最小化与拉普拉斯基编队控制的严格联系。2D和3D数值仿真验证了框架的有效性和统一性。

Conclusion: 提出的基于变形梯度的元素框架为编队控制提供了统一的数学基础，能够强制执行多种几何不变性，并作为连接现有主要方法的桥梁，具有理论意义和实际应用价值。

Abstract: This paper establishes a unified element-based framework for formation control by introducing the concept of the deformation gradient from continuum mechanics. Unlike traditional methods that rely on geometric constraints defined on graph edges, we model the formation as a discrete elastic body composed of simplicial elements. By defining a generalized distortion energy based on the local deformation gradient tensor, we derive a family of distributed control laws that can enforce various geometric invariances, including translation, rotation, scaling, and affine transformations. The convergence properties and the features of the proposed controllers are analyzed in detail. Theoretically, we show that the proposed framework serves as a bridge between existing rigidity-based and Laplacian-based approaches. Specifically, we show that rigidity-based controllers are mathematically equivalent to minimizing specific projections of the deformation energy tensor. Furthermore, we establish a rigorous link between the proposed energy minimization and Laplacian-based formation control. Numerical simulations in 2D and 3D validate the effectiveness and the unified nature of the proposed framework.

</details>


### [499] [Risk-Constrained Belief-Space Optimization for Safe Control under Latent Uncertainty](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03868)
*Clinton Enwerem,John S. Baras,Calin Belta*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出了一种风险敏感的信度空间MPPI控制框架，在潜在参数不确定性下优化风险正则化性能，同时通过CVaR约束确保轨迹安全裕度的尾部风险控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 安全关键控制系统常在传感器无法直接解析的潜在不确定性下运行，这种不确定性来自未知物理特性、外部扰动或未观测环境几何，影响动力学、任务可行性和安全裕度。标准方法优化期望性能但对罕见严重后果保护有限，而鲁棒方法保守处理不确定性而未利用其概率结构。

Method: 针对部分观测动态系统，提出风险敏感信度空间MPPI控制框架：系统动力学、成本和安全性约束依赖于作为信度分布维护的潜在参数；控制器在信度下规划，同时在滚动时域上对轨迹安全裕度施加条件风险价值(CVaR)约束；优化风险正则化性能目标，显式约束由潜在参数变异性引起的安全违规尾部风险。

Result: 在基于物理的视觉引导灵巧存储任务仿真中（抓取物体需插入具有位姿不确定性的占用槽中，位姿不确定性超过规定横向间隙要求）：高风险规避配置下达到82%成功率且零接触违规；风险中性配置为55%成功率；机会约束基线为50%成功率；后两者均产生非零外部接触力。

Conclusion: 所提风险约束控制器具有三个特性：(1) CVaR约束蕴含概率安全保证；(2) 当目标中风险权重趋于零时恢复风险中性最优；(3) 通过并集界限论证将每时域保证扩展到重复求解的累积安全性。该方法在潜在参数不确定性下有效平衡性能与安全。

Abstract: Many safety-critical control systems must operate under latent uncertainty that sensors cannot directly resolve at decision time. Such uncertainty, arising from unknown physical properties, exogenous disturbances, or unobserved environment geometry, influences dynamics, task feasibility, and safety margins. Standard methods optimize expected performance and offer limited protection against rare but severe outcomes, while robust formulations treat uncertainty conservatively without exploiting its probabilistic structure. We consider partially observed dynamical systems whose dynamics, costs, and safety constraints depend on a latent parameter maintained as a belief distribution, and propose a risk-sensitive belief-space Model Predictive Path Integral (MPPI) control framework that plans under this belief while enforcing a Conditional Value-at-Risk (CVaR) constraint on a trajectory safety margin over the receding horizon. The resulting controller optimizes a risk-regularized performance objective while explicitly constraining the tail risk of safety violations induced by latent parameter variability. We establish three properties of the resulting risk-constrained controller: (1) the CVaR constraint implies a probabilistic safety guarantee, (2) the controller recovers the risk-neutral optimum as the risk weight in the objective tends to zero, and (3) a union-bound argument extends the per-horizon guarantee to cumulative safety over repeated solves. In physics-based simulations of a vision-guided dexterous stowing task in which a grasped object must be inserted into an occupied slot with pose uncertainty exceeding prescribed lateral clearance requirements, our method achieves 82% success with zero contact violations at high risk aversion, compared to 55% and 50% for a risk-neutral configuration and a chance-constrained baseline, both of which incur nonzero exterior contact forces.

</details>


### [500] [Minimal Information Control Invariance via Vector Quantization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03132)
*Ege Yuceel,Teodor Tchalakov,Sayan Mitra*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于向量量化自编码器的控制代码本学习方法，在保证安全约束下大幅减少控制信号数量，并在12维四旋翼模型上实现157倍代码本压缩


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 安全关键自主系统需要在有限计算和感知资源下满足硬状态约束，但现有学习控制器通常过于复杂。需要研究在采样数据控制下保持集合前向不变性所需的最小控制信号数量

Method: 结合向量量化自编码器联合学习状态空间划分和有限控制代码本，开发基于Lipschitz可达集包络和平方和规划的迭代前向认证算法

Result: 在12维非线性四旋翼模型上，相比均匀网格基线，学习控制器在保持不变性的同时实现了157倍的代码本大小缩减，并实证表征了与安全操作兼容的最小感知分辨率

Conclusion: 该方法通过信息论不变性熵框架，显著降低了安全关键系统的控制复杂度，为有限资源下的安全控制提供了有效解决方案

Abstract: Safety-critical autonomous systems must satisfy hard state constraints under tight computational and sensing budgets, yet learning-based controllers are often far more complex than safe operation requires. To formalize this gap, we study how many distinct control signals are needed to render a compact set forward invariant under sampled-data control, connecting the question to the information-theoretic notion of invariance entropy. We propose a vector-quantized autoencoder that jointly learns a state-space partition and a finite control codebook, and develop an iterative forward certification algorithm that uses Lipschitz-based reachable-set enclosures and sum-of-squares programming. On a 12-dimensional nonlinear quadrotor model, the learned controller achieves a $157\times$ reduction in codebook size over a uniform grid baseline while preserving invariance, and we empirically characterize the minimum sensing resolution compatible with safe operation.

</details>


### [501] [Transfer Learning for Neural Parameter Estimation applied to Building RC Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05904)
*Fabian Raisch,Timo Germann,J. Nathan Kutz,Christoph Goebel,Benjamin Tischler*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于迁移学习的神经参数估计框架，通过预训练-微调范式提升动态系统参数估计精度，无需初始参数猜测


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统动态系统参数估计存在非凸性和对初始参数猜测敏感的问题，现有深度学习方法虽能快速准确估计但未利用跨系统的可迁移知识

Method: 基于预训练-微调范式的迁移学习神经参数估计框架，应用于建筑RC热模型，通过预训练学习通用参数估计模式，再针对特定系统微调

Result: 在8个模拟建筑、1个真实建筑、2种RC模型配置和4种训练数据长度下评估，相比遗传算法和从头训练神经基线，使用12天训练数据性能提升18.6-24.0%，72天数据提升达49.4%

Conclusion: 该方法不仅适用于建筑热模型，还为动态系统参数估计提供了新范式，通过迁移学习显著提升精度并消除对初始参数猜测的依赖

Abstract: Parameter estimation for dynamical systems remains challenging due to non-convexity and sensitivity to initial parameter guesses. Recent deep learning approaches enable accurate and fast parameter estimation but do not exploit transferable knowledge across systems. To address this, we introduce a transfer-learning-based neural parameter estimation framework based on a pretraining-fine-tuning paradigm. This approach improves accuracy and eliminates the need for an initial parameter guess. We apply this framework to building RC thermal models, evaluating it against a Genetic Algorithm and a from-scratch neural baseline across eight simulated buildings, one real-world building, two RC model configurations, and four training data lengths. Results demonstrate an 18.6-24.0% performance improvement with only 12 days of training data and up to 49.4% with 72 days. Beyond buildings, the proposed method represents a new paradigm for parameter estimation in dynamical systems.

</details>


### [502] [Global Geometry of Orthogonal Foliations in the Control Allocation of Signed-Quadratic Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01912)
*Antonio Franchi*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 该研究形式化了具有符号二次驱动映射系统的冗余解析微分拓扑，建立了驱动零空间连续纤维丛的全局拓扑结构，揭示了正交分布的可积性和对数势场分层，为推进器驱动架构的控制分配提供了避免几何秩损失和边界穿越奇点的理论框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机在于形式化分析具有符号二次驱动映射系统的冗余解析微分拓扑结构，特别是针对推进器驱动架构（如多旋翼无人机、海洋和水下航行器）的控制分配问题。传统伪线性静态分配策略会不可避免地与奇异边界超平面相交，导致无限导数动力学奇点，将任务空间分割成指数级数量的奇点分离扇区。需要建立几何框架来避免这些几何秩损失和边界穿越奇点。

Method: 通过分析最小冗余情况，建立了定义非线性驱动零空间的连续纤维丛的全局拓扑。证明了正交于这些纤维的分布是全局可积的，并由精确对数势场控制。该势场将驱动器空间分层，将所有象限划分为横向层，其组合大小遵循严格二项式级数。在这些层内，相邻象限通过称为互易铰链的低维流形连续连接，而层本身由作为纤维全局截面的边界超平面（门户）分隔。

Result: 研究揭示了经典伪线性静态分配策略会不可避免地与奇异边界超平面相交，触发无限导数动力学奇点，并将任务空间分割成指数级数量的奇点分离扇区。相比之下，从正交流形导出的分配器产生连续可微的全局截面，对于横向层仅具有线性数量的扇区，或在两个极值层情况下甚至形成到任务空间的单一全局微分同胚，从而完全避免几何秩损失和边界穿越奇点。

Conclusion: 该研究建立了符号二次驱动映射系统冗余解析的微分拓扑框架，揭示了驱动空间的几何分层结构。理论结果表明，基于正交流形的分配策略能够避免传统方法中的奇点问题，为推进器驱动架构（包括多旋翼无人机、海洋和水下航行器）的控制分配提供了更优的解决方案，实现了连续可微的全局分配，避免了几何秩损失和边界穿越奇点。

Abstract: This work formalizes the differential topology of redundancy resolution for systems governed by signed-quadratic actuation maps. By analyzing the minimally redundant case, the global topology of the continuous fiber bundle defining the nonlinear actuation null-space is established. The distribution orthogonal to these fibers is proven to be globally integrable and governed by an exact logarithmic potential field. This field foliates the actuator space, inducing a structural stratification of all orthants into transverse layers whose combinatorial sizes follow a strictly binomial progression. Within these layers, adjacent orthants are continuously connected via lower-dimensional strata termed reciprocal hinges, while the layers themselves are separated by boundary hyperplanes, or portals, that act as global sections of the fibers. This partition formally distinguishes extremal and transitional layers, which exhibit fundamentally distinct fiber topologies and foliation properties. Through this geometric framework, classical pseudo-linear static allocation strategies are shown to inevitably intersect singular boundary hyperplanes, triggering infinite-derivative kinetic singularities and fragmenting the task space into an exponential number of singularity-separated sectors. In contrast, allocators derived from the orthogonal manifolds yield continuously differentiable global sections with only a linear number of sectors for transversal layers, or can even form a single global diffeomorphism to the task space in the case of the two extremal layers, thus completely avoiding geometric rank-loss and boundary-crossing singularities. These theoretical results directly apply to the control allocation of propeller-driven architectures, including multirotor UAVs, marine, and underwater vehicles.

</details>


### [503] [Neural Robust Control on Lie Groups Using Contraction Methods (Extended Version)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01448)
*Yi Lok Lo,Longhao Qian,Hugh H. T. Liu*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种在Lie群上为动力系统合成鲁棒控制器的学习框架，通过联合训练鲁棒控制收缩度量(RCCM)和神经反馈控制器，在流形上强制执行收缩条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对在Lie群上演化的动力系统，需要开发能够处理流形几何约束的鲁棒控制器，同时确保收缩条件和扰动鲁棒性。

Method: 提出联合学习框架，同时训练鲁棒控制收缩度量(RCCM)和神经反馈控制器；推导了RCCM和神经控制器存在的充分条件；确保流形结构的几何约束得到尊重，并建立扰动相关的管状边界来约束输出轨迹。

Result: 以四旋翼飞行器为案例研究，使用该框架设计了反馈控制器；通过数值仿真评估性能，并与几何控制器进行比较。

Conclusion: 该学习框架能够为Lie群上的动力系统合成鲁棒控制器，有效处理流形几何约束，建立扰动鲁棒性，并在四旋翼控制案例中展示了优于传统几何控制器的性能。

Abstract: In this paper, we propose a learning framework for synthesizing a robust controller for dynamical systems evolving on a Lie group. A robust control contraction metric (RCCM) and a neural feedback controller are jointly trained to enforce contraction conditions on the Lie group manifold. Sufficient conditions are derived for the existence of such an RCCM and neural controller, ensuring that the geometric constraints imposed by the manifold structure are respected while establishing a disturbance-dependent tube that bounds the output trajectories. As a case study, a feedback controller for a quadrotor is designed using the proposed framework. Its performance is evaluated using numerical simulations and compared with a geometric controller.

</details>


### [504] [Bridging Natural Language and Microgrid Dynamics: A Context-Aware Simulator and Dataset](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05429)
*Tinko Sebastian Bartels,Ruixiang Wu,Xinyu Lu,Yikai Lu,Fanzeng Xia,Haoxiang Yang,Yue Chen,Tongxin Li*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: OpenCEM：首个开源数字孪生平台，将非结构化上下文信息与可再生能源动态集成，用于智能能源管理研究


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统能源管理过度依赖数值时间序列，忽略了人类生成上下文（如事件日程、系统日志、用户意图）中的显著预测能力，需要开发能够整合多模态上下文的智能能源管理系统

Method: 开发了OpenCEM模拟器和数据集，包括：1）来自真实光伏-电池微电网安装的精心对齐、语言丰富的数据集；2）能够原生处理多模态上下文的模块化模拟器；采用基于组件的架构和混合数据驱动与物理建模能力

Result: 创建了首个开源数字孪生平台，提供了高保真环境用于开发和验证新型控制算法和预测模型，特别是那些利用大语言模型的算法；通过实际案例展示了其实用性，包括上下文感知负载预测和在线最优电池充电控制策略实施

Conclusion: OpenCEM平台通过整合丰富上下文信息与可再生能源动态，为下一代智能、可持续和真正上下文感知的能源系统研究提供了重要工具，有望加速该领域的研究进展

Abstract: Addressing the critical need for intelligent, context-aware energy management in renewable systems, we introduce the OpenCEM Simulator and Dataset: the first open-source digital twin explicitly designed to integrate rich, unstructured contextual information with quantitative renewable energy dynamics. Traditional energy management relies heavily on numerical time series, thereby neglecting the significant predictive power embedded in human-generated context (e.g., event schedules, system logs, user intentions). OpenCEM bridges this gap by offering a unique platform comprising both a meticulously aligned, language-rich dataset from a real-world PV-and-battery microgrid installation and a modular simulator capable of natively processing this multi-modal context. The OpenCEM Simulator provides a high-fidelity environment for developing and validating novel control algorithms and prediction models, particularly those leveraging Large Language Models. We detail its component-based architecture, hybrid data-driven and physics-based modelling capabilities, and demonstrate its utility through practical examples, including context-aware load forecasting and the implementation of online optimal battery charging control strategies. By making this platform publicly available, OpenCEM aims to accelerate research into the next generation of intelligent, sustainable, and truly context-aware energy systems.

</details>


### [505] [Scalar Federated Learning for Linear Quadratic Regulator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05088)
*Mohammadreza Rostami,Shahriar Talebi,Solmaz S. Kia*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: ScalarFedLQR：一种通信高效的联邦算法，用于异构智能体线性二次调节器（LQR）控制的模型无关学习，通过标量投影将每个智能体的上行通信从O(d)减少到O(1)。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在联邦LQR控制中，多个异构智能体需要学习一个共同策略，但传统的联邦方法需要每个智能体传输高维梯度信息（O(d)通信开销），这在资源受限的分布式系统中效率低下。因此需要开发通信高效的算法来减少通信负担。

Method: 基于分解投影梯度机制，每个智能体仅通信一个局部零阶梯度估计的标量投影。服务器聚合这些标量消息来重构全局下降方向。该方法的关键在于投影引起的近似误差随着参与智能体数量的增加而减小，从而实现有利的缩放规律。

Result: 在标准正则条件下，所有迭代保持稳定，平均LQR成本线性快速下降。数值结果表明，与全梯度联邦LQR相比，性能相当但通信量大幅减少。更大的智能体群组能够实现更准确的梯度恢复、更大的步长和更快的线性收敛。

Conclusion: ScalarFedLQR通过标量投影机制实现了通信高效的联邦LQR学习，将每个智能体的上行通信从O(d)减少到O(1)，同时保持线性收敛性能。该方法特别适合大规模异构智能体系统，展示了通信效率与学习性能之间的有利权衡。

Abstract: We propose ScalarFedLQR, a communication-efficient federated algorithm for model-free learning of a common policy in linear quadratic regulator (LQR) control of heterogeneous agents. The method builds on a decomposed projected gradient mechanism, in which each agent communicates only a scalar projection of a local zeroth-order gradient estimate. The server aggregates these scalar messages to reconstruct a global descent direction, reducing per-agent uplink communication from O(d) to O(1), independent of the policy dimension. Crucially, the projection-induced approximation error diminishes as the number of participating agents increases, yielding a favorable scaling law: larger fleets enable more accurate gradient recovery, admit larger stepsizes, and achieve faster linear convergence despite high dimensionality. Under standard regularity conditions, all iterates remain stabilizing and the average LQR cost decreases linearly fast. Numerical results demonstrate performance comparable to full-gradient federated LQR with substantially reduced communication.

</details>


<div id='cs.CE'></div>

# cs.CE [[Back]](#toc)

### [506] [XR-CareerAssist: An Immersive Platform for Personalised Career Guidance Leveraging Extended Reality and Multimodal AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06901)
*N. D. Tantaroudas,A. J. McCracken,I. Karachalios,E. Papatheou,V. Pastrikakis*

Main category: cs.CE

TL;DR: XR-CareerAssist是一个结合扩展现实(XR)和多种人工智能模块的沉浸式多语言职业指导平台，通过语音交互、机器翻译、对话助手、视觉语言模型和文本转语音等技术提供个性化职业发展体验。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统职业指导平台依赖静态文本界面，缺乏互动性和用户参与度，且忽视职业发展的叙事维度。现有计算机辅助职业指导系统自1960年代发展以来，在交互性方面仍有局限。

Method: 平台整合了自动语音识别(ASR)用于语音交互、跨英语/希腊语/法语/意大利语的神经机器翻译、基于Langchain的对话式培训助手、基于BLIP的视觉语言模型用于职业可视化、以及通过交互式3D虚拟形象提供的AWS Polly文本转语音。职业轨迹通过10万+匿名职业档案生成的动态桑基图呈现。系统使用Unity开发，面向Meta Quest 3，后端服务托管在AWS上。

Result: 埃克塞特大学23名参与者的试点评估显示：语音识别准确率达95.6%，整体用户满意度78.3%，系统响应性获得91.3%的积极评价。反馈信息改进了运动舒适度、音频清晰度和文本可读性。

Conclusion: XR-CareerAssist展示了XR与AI融合如何创造更具吸引力、可访问性和有效性的职业发展工具。五个AI模块在单一沉浸式环境中的集成提供了多模态交互体验，使其区别于现有职业指导平台。

Abstract: Conventional career guidance platforms rely on static, text-driven interfaces that struggle to engage users or deliver personalised, evidence-based insights. Although Computer-Assisted Career Guidance Systems have evolved since the 1960s, they remain limited in interactivity and pay little attention to the narrative dimensions of career development. We introduce XR-CareerAssist, a platform that unifies Extended Reality (XR) with several Artificial Intelligence (AI) modules to deliver immersive, multilingual career guidance. The system integrates Automatic Speech Recognition for voice-driven interaction, Neural Machine Translation across English, Greek, French, and Italian, a Langchain-based conversational Training Assistant for personalised dialogue, a BLIP-based Vision-Language model for career visualisations, and AWS Polly Text-to-Speech delivered through an interactive 3D avatar. Career trajectories are rendered as dynamic Sankey diagrams derived from a repository of more than 100,000 anonymised professional profiles. The application was built in Unity for Meta Quest 3, with backend services hosted on AWS. A pilot evaluation at the University of Exeter with 23 participants returned 95.6% speech recognition accuracy, 78.3% overall user satisfaction, and 91.3% favourable ratings for system responsiveness, with feedback informing subsequent improvements to motion comfort, audio clarity, and text legibility. XR-CareerAssist demonstrates how the fusion of XR and AI can produce more engaging, accessible, and effective career development tools, with the integration of five AI modules within a single immersive environment yielding a multimodal interaction experience that distinguishes it from existing career guidance platforms.

</details>


### [507] [INTERACT: An AI-Driven Extended Reality Framework for Accesible Communication Featuring Real-Time Sign Language Interpretation and Emotion Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05605)
*Nikolaos D. Tantaroudas,Andrew J. McCracken,Ilias Karachalios,Evangelos Papatheou*

Main category: cs.CE

TL;DR: INTERACT是一个AI驱动的XR平台，集成实时语音转文字、国际手语3D虚拟人渲染、多语言翻译和情感识别功能，旨在为听障和多语言用户提供沉浸式无障碍视频会议体验。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 全球有超过4.3亿人患有听力障碍，预计到2050年将超过7亿人。现有无障碍解决方案成本高、可用性有限且存在物流障碍，而扩展现实技术为沉浸式包容性通信提供了新可能。

Method: 基于CORTEX2框架，在Meta Quest 3头显上部署的AI驱动XR平台。集成Whisper进行语音识别、NLLB进行多语言翻译、RoBERTa进行情感分类、Google MediaPipe进行手势提取，实现国际手语3D虚拟人渲染。

Result: 两阶段试点评估显示：92%用户满意度，转录准确率超过85%，情感检测精度90%，整体体验平均评分4.6/5.0，90%参与者愿意参与进一步测试。

Conclusion: INTERACT展示了在提升教育、文化和专业场景无障碍性方面的强大潜力，为听障和多语言用户提供了创新的沉浸式通信解决方案。

Abstract: Video conferencing has become central to professional collaboration, yet most platforms offer limited support for deaf, hard-of-hearing, and multilingual users. The World Health Organisation estimates that over 430 million people worldwide require rehabilitation for disabling hearing loss, a figure projected to exceed 700 million by 2050. Conventional accessibility measures remain constrained by high costs, limited availability, and logistical barriers, while Extended Reality (XR) technologies open new possibilities for immersive and inclusive communication. This paper presents INTERACT (Inclusive Networking for Translation and Embodied Real-Time Augmented Communication Tool), an AI-driven XR platform that integrates real-time speech-to-text conversion, International Sign Language (ISL) rendering through 3D avatars, multilingual translation, and emotion recognition within an immersive virtual environment. Built on the CORTEX2 framework and deployed on Meta Quest 3 headsets, INTERACT combines Whisper for speech recognition, NLLB for multilingual translation, RoBERTa for emotion classification, and Google MediaPipe for gesture extraction. Pilot evaluations were conducted in two phases, first with technical experts from academia and industry, and subsequently with members of the deaf community. The trials reported 92% user satisfaction, transcription accuracy above 85%, and 90% emotion-detection precision, with a mean overall experience rating of 4.6 out of 5.0 and 90% of participants willing to take part in further testing. The results highlight strong potential for advancing accessibility across educational, cultural, and professional settings. An extended version of this work, including full pilot data and implementation details, has been published as an Open Research Europe article [Tantaroudas et al., 2026a].

</details>


### [508] [AI-Driven Modular Services for Accessible Multilingual Education in Immersive Extended Reality Settings: Integrating Speech Processing, Translation, and Sign Language Rendering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05591)
*N. D. Tantaroudas,A. J. McCracken,I. Karachalios,E. Papatheou*

Main category: cs.CE

TL;DR: 该研究开发了一个集成六种AI服务的模块化平台，用于在XR环境中实现多语言无障碍语言教学，包括语音识别、翻译、语音合成、情感分类、对话摘要和国际手语渲染。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为在扩展现实(XR)环境中创建无障碍、多语言的语言教学解决方案，满足欧盟数字无障碍目标，需要整合多种AI服务来处理不同模态的语言信息。

Method: 构建模块化平台集成六种AI服务：OpenAI Whisper语音识别、Meta NLLB多语言翻译、AWS Polly语音合成、RoBERTa情感分类、flan t5 base samsum对话摘要、Google MediaPipe国际手语渲染。处理国际手语手势记录获取手部关键点坐标，映射到VR环境中的3D虚拟形象动画。进行技术基准测试，包括语音合成提供商比较和多语言翻译模型评估。

Result: 技术评估确认平台适合实时XR部署。AWS Polly在语音合成中延迟最低且价格有竞争力。EuroLLM 1.7B Instruct变体在BLEU分数上超越NLLB。平台能够协调跨模态AI服务，实现无障碍多语言教学。

Conclusion: 该模块化平台证明了在XR环境中协调跨模态AI服务进行无障碍多语言语言教学的可行性。模块化设计允许独立扩展和适应不同教育场景，为实现欧盟数字无障碍目标提供了基础。

Abstract: This work introduces a modular platform that brings together six AI services, automatic speech recognition via OpenAI Whisper, multilingual translation through Meta NLLB, speech synthesis using AWS Polly, emotion classification with RoBERTa, dialogue summarisation via flan t5 base samsum, and International Sign (IS) rendering through Google MediaPipe. A corpus of IS gesture recordings was processed to derive hand landmark coordinates, which were subsequently mapped onto three dimensional avatar animations inside a virtual reality (VR) environment. Validation comprised technical benchmarking of each AI component, including comparative assessments of speech synthesis providers and multilingual translation models (NLLB 200 and EuroLLM 1.7B variants). Technical evaluations confirmed the suitability of the platform for real time XR deployment. Speech synthesis benchmarking established that AWS Polly delivers the lowest latency at a competitive price point. The EuroLLM 1.7B Instruct variant attained a higher BLEU score, surpassing NLLB. These findings establish the viability of orchestrating cross modal AI services within XR settings for accessible, multilingual language instruction. The modular design permits independent scaling and adaptation to varied educational contexts, providing a foundation for equitable learning solutions aligned with European Union digital accessibility goals.

</details>


<div id='nlin.CD'></div>

# nlin.CD [[Back]](#toc)

### [509] [Anticipating tipping in spatiotemporal systems with machine learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06454)
*Smita Deb,Zheng-Meng Zhai,Mulugeta Haile,Ying-Cheng Lai*

Main category: nlin.CD

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种结合非负矩阵分解降维和参数自适应储备池计算的框架，用于准确预测复杂时空动力系统中的临界转变（tipping）及其精确时间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 预测复杂时空动力系统中的临界转变（tipping）及其精确时间是一个重要但尚未解决的开放问题，这对于提供足够的预警时间以采取缓解措施至关重要。现有的机器学习方法主要应用于低维随机微分方程系统，难以处理复杂的时空数据。

Method: 采用非负矩阵分解对时空数据进行降维处理，然后将降维后的数据作为输入，利用参数自适应储备池计算框架来预测临界转变的发生时间和精确时间。

Result: 该方法能够在狭窄的预测窗口内准确识别多种时空动力系统的临界转变时间，包括CMIP5气候预测数据。该框架对常见的预测挑战具有鲁棒性，并显著降低了处理完整时空数据的计算开销。

Conclusion: 结合非负矩阵分解降维和参数自适应储备池计算的框架能够有效预测复杂时空系统中的临界转变及其精确时间，为气候预测等实际应用提供了可行的预警工具。

Abstract: In nonlinear dynamical systems, tipping refers to a critical transition from one steady state to another, typically catastrophic, steady state, often resulting from a saddle-node bifurcation. Recently, the machine-learning framework of parameter-adaptable reservoir computing has been applied to predict tipping in systems described by low-dimensional stochastic differential equations. However, anticipating tipping in complex spatiotemporal dynamical systems remains a significant open problem. The ability to forecast not only the occurrence but also the precise timing of such tipping events is crucial for providing the actionable lead time necessary for timely mitigation. By utilizing the mathematical approach of non-negative matrix factorization to generate dimensionally reduced spatiotemporal data as input, we exploit parameter-adaptable reservoir computing to accurately anticipate tipping. We demonstrate that the tipping time can be identified within a narrow prediction window across a variety of spatiotemporal dynamical systems, as well as in CMIP5 (Coupled Model Intercomparison Project 5) climate projections. Furthermore, we show that this reservoir-computing framework, utilizing reduced input data, is robust against common forecasting challenges and significantly alleviates the computational overhead associated with processing full spatiotemporal data.

</details>


<div id='math.OC'></div>

# math.OC [[Back]](#toc)

### [510] [Continuous-Time Dynamics of the Difference-of-Convex Algorithm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06926)
*Yi-Shuai Niu*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 该论文研究了光滑DC分解下凸差算法(DCA)的连续时间结构，将经典DCA解释为非线性自治系统的显式欧拉离散化，提出了阻尼DCA方案，并分析了其收敛性及与Bregman几何的联系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究DCA算法的连续时间结构，通过将经典DCA解释为非线性系统的离散化，为理解DCA的收敛行为提供新的几何视角，并基于此开发改进的阻尼方案。

Method: 将经典DCA重新解释为非线性自治系统的显式欧拉离散化，提出阻尼DCA方案（也是Bregman正则化变体），分析其极限情况下的Hessian-Riemannian梯度流，并建立收敛性理论框架。

Result: 证明了阻尼方案的单调下降性、渐近临界性、KL收敛性（有界条件下）以及度量DC-PL不等式下的全局线性收敛率；建立了极限流的精确能量恒等式、有界轨迹的渐近临界性、度量相对误差界下的显式全局收敛率、KL假设下的有限长度和单点收敛性，以及非退化局部极小值附近的局部指数收敛性。

Conclusion: 揭示了全局-局部权衡：半松弛方案在框架内提供最佳可证明全局保证，而全步长方案在非退化极小值附近局部最快；不同DC分解通过凸分量生成的度量诱导不同的连续动力学，为分解质量提供了几何准则，并将DCA与Bregman几何联系起来。

Abstract: We study the continuous-time structure of the difference-of-convex algorithm (DCA) for smooth DC decompositions with a strongly convex component. In dual coordinates, classical DCA is exactly the full-step explicit Euler discretization of a nonlinear autonomous system. This viewpoint motivates a damped DCA scheme, which is also a Bregman-regularized DCA variant, and whose vanishing-step limit yields a Hessian-Riemannian gradient flow generated by the convex part of the decomposition. For the damped scheme we prove monotone descent, asymptotic criticality, Kurdyka-Lojasiewicz convergence under boundedness, and a global linear rate under a metric DC-PL inequality. For the limiting flow we establish an exact energy identity, asymptotic criticality of bounded trajectories, explicit global rates under metric relative error bounds, finite-length and single-point convergence under a Kurdyka-Lojasiewicz hypothesis, and local exponential convergence near nondegenerate local minima. The analysis also reveals a global-local tradeoff: the half-relaxed scheme gives the best provable global guarantee in our framework, while the full-step scheme is locally fastest near a nondegenerate minimum. Finally, we show that different DC decompositions of the same objective induce different continuous dynamics through the metric generated by the convex component, providing a geometric criterion for decomposition quality and linking DCA with Bregman geometry.

</details>


### [511] [A Generalized Sinkhorn Algorithm for Mean-Field Schrödinger Bridge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06531)
*Asmaa Eldesoukey,Yongxin Chen,Abhishek Halder*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出一种求解平均场薛定谔桥问题的Sinkhorn型递归算法，通过推广Hopf-Cole变换处理非局部相互作用带来的非凸性挑战


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 平均场薛定谔桥问题在指导具有非局部相互作用的扩散过程到达目标分布方面具有重要应用，但非局部相互作用导致问题非凸，计算困难，需要新的求解方法

Method: 推广Hopf-Cole变换处理平均场薛定谔桥问题，并基于此设计Sinkhorn型递归算法求解相关的积分-偏微分方程组

Result: 在相互作用势函数满足温和假设条件下，证明了所提算法的收敛性保证，并通过具有排斥和吸引相互作用的数值算例验证了理论贡献

Conclusion: 提出的算法为求解具有非局部相互作用的平均场薛定谔桥问题提供了有效的计算框架，能够处理标准薛定谔桥无法建模的多智能体系统交互

Abstract: The mean-field Schrödinger bridge (MFSB) problem concerns designing a minimum-effort controller that guides a diffusion process with nonlocal interaction to reach a given distribution from another by a fixed deadline. Unlike the standard Schrödinger bridge, the dynamical constraint for MFSB is the mean-field limit of a population of interacting agents with controls. It serves as a natural model for large-scale multi-agent systems. The MFSB is computationally challenging because the nonlocal interaction makes the problem nonconvex. We propose a generalization of the Hopf-Cole transform for MFSB and, building on it, design a Sinkhorn-type recursive algorithm to solve the associated system of integro-PDEs. Under mild assumptions on the interaction potential, we discuss convergence guarantees for the proposed algorithm. We present numerical examples with repulsive and attractive interactions to illustrate the theoretical contributions.

</details>


### [512] [Stochastic Auto-conditioned Fast Gradient Methods with Optimal Rates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06525)
*Yao Ji,Guanghui Lan*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出随机自条件快速梯度法（stochastic AC-FGM），在无需先验知识的情况下实现随机复合凸优化的最优加速率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随机复合凸优化中，在不知道问题参数（如Lipschitz常数、迭代时域、噪声水平）的情况下实现最优加速率是一个核心挑战。现有参数无关随机方法要么无法达到加速率，要么依赖限制性假设（如有界域、有界梯度、已知迭代时域或严格次高斯噪声）。

Method: 提出随机自条件快速梯度法（stochastic AC-FGM），这是确定性自条件快速梯度法的随机变体。该方法完全自适应于Lipschitz常数、迭代时域和噪声水平，无需线搜索程序即可实现自适应步长选择和自适应小批量大小调整。

Result: 在标准有界条件方差假设下，随机AC-FGM实现了最优迭代复杂度O(1/√ε)和最优样本复杂度O(1/ε²)。

Conclusion: 随机AC-FGM解决了将参数无关加速方法扩展到随机设置的开放问题，在无需先验知识的情况下实现了随机复合凸优化的最优加速率。

Abstract: Achieving optimal rates for stochastic composite convex optimization without prior knowledge of problem parameters remains a central challenge. In the deterministic setting, the auto-conditioned fast gradient method has recently been proposed to attain optimal accelerated rates without line-search procedures or prior knowledge of the Lipschitz smoothness constant, providing a natural prototype for parameter-free acceleration. However, extending this approach to the stochastic setting has proven technically challenging and remains open. Existing parameter-free stochastic methods either fail to achieve accelerated rates or rely on restrictive assumptions, such as bounded domains, bounded gradients, prior knowledge of the iteration horizon, or strictly sub-Gaussian noise. To address these limitations, we propose a stochastic variant of the auto-conditioned fast gradient method, referred to as stochastic AC-FGM. The proposed method is fully adaptive to the Lipschitz constant, the iteration horizon, and the noise level, enabling both adaptive stepsize selection and adaptive mini-batch sizing without line-search procedures. Under standard bounded conditional variance assumptions, we show that stochastic AC-FGM achieves the optimal iteration complexity of $O(1/\sqrt{\varepsilon})$ and the optimal sample complexity of $O(1/\varepsilon^2)$.

</details>


### [513] [Value Mirror Descent for Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06039)
*Zhichao Jia,Guanghui Lan*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出了一种新的值优化方法VMD，将镜像下降融入值迭代框架，在确定性和随机设置下均获得理论保证，样本复杂度达到最优或接近最优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 值迭代类方法在强化学习中已有广泛研究，在生成采样模型下比策略优化方法具有更优的样本复杂度。然而，现有方法缺乏生成策略与最优策略之间Bregman散度的有界性保证，这对于离线训练后的在线持续学习很重要。

Method: 提出值镜像下降(VMD)方法，将凸优化中的镜像下降技术整合到经典值迭代框架中。对于确定性设置，使用VMD；对于随机设置，开发了包含方差缩减的随机变体SVMD。方法支持一般凸正则化器，并在强凸正则化器下获得改进性能。

Result: 确定性设置中VMD线性收敛；随机设置中SVMD在一般凸正则化器下达到接近最优样本复杂度$\tilde{O}(|S||A|(1-γ)^{-3}ε^{-2})$，在强凸正则化器下达到$\tilde{O}(|S||A|(1-γ)^{-5}ε^{-1})$。生成策略与最优策略之间的Bregman散度在整个迭代过程中保持有界，且策略收敛到最优策略。

Conclusion: VMD方法及其分析为RL和优化文献提供了新贡献，特别在保持策略Bregman散度有界性方面具有优势，这对离线训练后的在线学习应用具有重要意义。

Abstract: Value iteration-type methods have been extensively studied for computing a nearly optimal value function in reinforcement learning (RL). Under a generative sampling model, these methods can achieve sharper sample complexity than policy optimization approaches, particularly in their dependence on the discount factor. In practice, they are often employed for offline training or in simulated environments. In this paper, we consider discounted Markov decision processes with state space S, action space A, discount factor $γ\in(0,1)$ and costs in $[0,1]$. We introduce a novel value optimization method, termed value mirror descent (VMD), which integrates mirror descent from convex optimization into the classical value iteration framework. In the deterministic setting with known transition kernels, we show that VMD converges linearly. For the stochastic setting with a generative model, we develop a stochastic variant, SVMD, which incorporates variance reduction commonly used in stochastic value iteration-type methods. For RL problems with general convex regularizers, SVMD attains a near-optimal sample complexity of $\tilde{O}(|S||A|(1-γ)^{-3}ε^{-2})$. Moreover, we establish that the Bregman divergence between the generated and optimal policies remains bounded throughout the iterations. This property is absent in existing stochastic value iteration-type methods but is important for enabling effective online (continual) learning following offline training. Under a strongly convex regularizer, SVMD achieves sample complexity of $\tilde{O}(|S||A|(1-γ)^{-5}ε^{-1})$, improving performance in the high-accuracy regime. Furthermore, we prove convergence of the generated policy to the optimal policy. Overall, the proposed method, its analysis, and the resulting guarantees, constitute new contributions to the RL and optimization literature.

</details>


### [514] [Intrinsic perturbation scale for certified oracle objectives with epigraphic information](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05678)
*Karim Bounja,Boujemaâ Achchab,Abdeljalil Sakat*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出一种基于认证包络信息的自然位移控制方法，用于目标函数极小值集的扰动分析


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于目标函数扰动的局部一致值控制方法需要额外结构假设且无法从有限点信息中获得认证，需要更自然、可认证的位移控制框架

Method: 使用认证包络提供的柱状局部垂直包络控制替代传统局部一致值控制，在集合二次增长条件下分析极小值集的位移

Result: 在无外在假设条件下，获得了经典的平方根位移估计（最优指数1/2），适用于非唯一极小值的情况

Conclusion: 通过认证包络信息实现的柱状局部垂直包络控制为极小值集扰动分析提供了更自然、可认证的框架，在集合二次增长条件下获得最优位移估计

Abstract: We introduce a natural displacement control for minimizer sets of oracle objectives equipped with certified epigraphic information. Formally, we replace the usual local uniform value control of objective perturbations - uncertifiable from finite pointwise information without additional structure - by the strictly weaker requirement of a cylinder-localized vertical epigraphic control, naturally provided by certified envelopes. Under set-based quadratic growth (allowing nonunique minimizers), this yields the classical square-root displacement estimate with optimal exponent 1/2, without any extrinsic assumption.

</details>


### [515] [Optimal Centered Active Excitation in Linear System Identification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05518)
*Kaito Ito,Alexandre Proutiere*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出一种基于最优中心噪声激励的线性系统辨识主动学习算法，该算法在达到最小样本复杂度的同时允许高效计算系统矩阵估计


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线性系统辨识中，如何设计主动学习算法以最小化样本复杂度并实现高效计算是一个重要问题。现有方法在样本复杂度与计算效率之间往往存在权衡，需要开发既能达到理论最优样本复杂度又具有计算效率的算法

Method: 基于普通最小二乘法和半定规划，提出主动学习算法，采用最优中心噪声激励策略。首先建立任何主动学习算法达到预定精度和置信水平所需样本复杂度的下界，然后推导所提算法的样本复杂度上界

Result: 所提算法的样本复杂度上界与任何算法的下界相匹配（相差通用常数因子），建立了紧致的样本复杂度界限。这些界限易于解释，并明确显示了其对状态维度等系统参数的依赖关系

Conclusion: 该算法在理论上达到了最小样本复杂度，同时允许高效计算系统矩阵估计，为线性系统辨识提供了理论最优且计算可行的主动学习解决方案

Abstract: We propose an active learning algorithm for linear system identification with optimal centered noise excitation. Notably, our algorithm, based on ordinary least squares and semidefinite programming, attains the minimal sample complexity while allowing for efficient computation of an estimate of a system matrix. More specifically, we first establish lower bounds of the sample complexity for any active learning algorithm to attain the prescribed accuracy and confidence levels. Next, we derive a sample complexity upper bound of the proposed algorithm, which matches the lower bound for any algorithm up to universal factors. Our tight bounds are easy to interpret and explicitly show their dependence on the system parameters such as the state dimension.

</details>


### [516] [An Actor-Critic Framework for Continuous-Time Jump-Diffusion Controls with Normalizing Flows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05398)
*Liya Guo,Ruimeng Hu,Xu Yang,Yi Zhu*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出基于演员-评论家框架的网格自由求解器，用于解决具有时间非齐次跳跃扩散动态的熵正则化随机控制和博弈问题，使用条件归一化流参数化策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 金融经济中连续时间随机控制问题常具有时间非齐次性、跳跃不连续性和高维特性，传统方法难以计算最优策略，需要开发能处理这些复杂特征的数值方法。

Method: 构建基于时间非齐次小q函数和适当占用测度的演员-评论家框架，使用条件归一化流参数化演员策略，支持时间依赖的漂移、波动率和跳跃项，实现精确似然评估和熵正则化。

Result: 在时间非齐次线性二次控制、Merton投资组合优化和多智能体投资组合博弈等基准问题上验证，方法能稳定学习跳跃不连续性，准确逼近最优随机策略，在维度和智能体数量方面具有良好的可扩展性。

Conclusion: 该方法为具有时间非齐次跳跃扩散动态的熵正则化控制和博弈问题提供了有效的网格自由求解器，能处理复杂金融经济应用中的时间依赖、不连续性和高维挑战。

Abstract: Continuous-time stochastic control with time-inhomogeneous jump-diffusion dynamics is central in finance and economics, but computing optimal policies is difficult under explicit time dependence, discontinuous shocks, and high dimensionality. We propose an actor-critic framework that serves as a mesh-free solver for entropy-regularized control problems and stochastic games with jumps. The approach is built on a time-inhomogeneous little q-function and an appropriate occupation measure, yielding a policy-gradient representation that accommodates time-dependent drift, volatility, and jump terms. To represent expressive stochastic policies in continuous-action spaces, we parameterize the actor using conditional normalizing flows, enabling flexible non-Gaussian policies while retaining exact likelihood evaluation for entropy regularization and policy optimization. We validate the method on time-inhomogeneous linear-quadratic control, Merton portfolio optimization, and a multi-agent portfolio game, using explicit solutions or high-accuracy benchmarks. Numerical results demonstrate stable learning under jump discontinuities, accurate approximation of optimal stochastic policies, and favorable scaling with respect to dimension and number of agents.

</details>


### [517] [Implicit Primal-Dual Interior-Point Methods for Quadratic Programming](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.00364)
*Jon Arrizabalaga,Zachary Manchester*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出一种新的原始-对偶内点法求解二次规划，通过构造性方法隐式满足互补条件，避免显式KKT方程，使用softplus函数改善数值特性，保证KKT系统谱有界，消除病态性问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统原始-对偶内点法在求解二次规划时面临的主要限制是：在解附近KKT系统会变得病态（ill-conditioned），这限制了方法的数值稳定性和求解精度，特别是对于大规模问题

Method: 1. 不将互补条件作为KKT条件中的显式方程处理，而是通过构造性方法隐式满足；2. 引入辅助变量，通过回缩映射（retraction map）将其与对偶变量和松弛变量关联；3. 证明softplus函数相比常用的指数映射具有更好的数值特性；4. 确保得到的KKT系统谱有界

Result: 1. 消除了原始-对偶方法最紧迫的限制：解附近的病态性；2. 便于底层线性系统的求解：无需每次迭代都计算分解，支持无分解方法（如间接求解器）；3. 允许在低精度算术中实现高精度求解；4. 为内点法开辟了新机会，特别是大规模问题的高精度求解

Conclusion: 该新方法通过隐式满足互补条件和保证KKT系统谱有界，有效解决了传统原始-对偶内点法的病态性问题，为大规模优化问题的高精度求解提供了新的技术途径

Abstract: This paper introduces a new method for solving quadratic programs using primal-dual interior-point methods. Instead of handling complementarity as an explicit equation in the Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT) conditions, we ensure that complementarity is implicitly satisfied by construction. This is achieved by introducing an auxiliary variable and relating it to the duals and slacks via a retraction map. Specifically, we prove that the softplus function has favorable numerical properties compared to the commonly used exponential map. The resulting KKT system is guaranteed to be spectrally bounded, thereby eliminating the most pressing limitation of primal-dual methods: ill-conditioning near the solution. These attributes facilitate the solution of the underlying linear system, either by removing the need to compute factorizations at every iteration, enabling factorization-free approaches like indirect solvers, or allowing the solver to achieve high accuracy in low-precision arithmetic. Consequently, this novel perspective opens new opportunities for interior-point methods, especially for solving large-scale problems to high precision.

</details>


<div id='physics.plasm-ph'></div>

# physics.plasm-ph [[Back]](#toc)

### [518] [Plasma GraphRAG: Physics-Grounded Parameter Selection for Gyrokinetic Simulations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06279)
*Ruichen Zhang,Feda AlMuhisen,Chenguang Wan,Zhisong Qu,Kunpeng Li,Youngwoo Cho,Kyungtak Lim,Virginie Grandgirard,Xavier Garbet*

Main category: physics.plasm-ph

TL;DR: Plasma GraphRAG：结合图检索增强生成与LLM的自动化等离子体模拟参数选择框架


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前等离子体模拟参数选择依赖手动文献调研，效率低且不一致，需要自动化、基于物理的解决方案

Method: 构建领域知识图谱，结合图检索增强生成技术，通过结构化检索实现基于实体关系的参数范围识别

Result: 在五个评估指标上优于传统RAG：整体质量提升超10%，幻觉率降低达25%

Conclusion: Plasma GraphRAG不仅提高模拟可靠性，还为复杂数据密集型领域的科学发现加速提供了方法论

Abstract: Accurate parameter selection is fundamental to gyrokinetic plasma simulations, yet current practices rely heavily on manual literature reviews, leading to inefficiencies and inconsistencies. We introduce Plasma GraphRAG, a novel framework that integrates Graph Retrieval-Augmented Generation (GraphRAG) with large language models (LLMs) for automated, physics-grounded parameter range identification. By constructing a domain-specific knowledge graph from curated plasma literature and enabling structured retrieval over graph-anchored entities and relations, Plasma GraphRAG enables LLMs to generate accurate, context-aware recommendations. Extensive evaluations across five metrics, comprehensiveness, diversity, grounding, hallucination, and empowerment, demonstrate that Plasma GraphRAG outperforms vanilla RAG by over $10\%$ in overall quality and reduces hallucination rates by up to $25\%$. {Beyond enhancing simulation reliability, Plasma GraphRAG offers a methodology for accelerating scientific discovery across complex, data-rich domains.

</details>


<div id='cs.MA'></div>

# cs.MA [[Back]](#toc)

### [519] [Logical Robots: Declarative Multi-Agent Programming in Logica](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06629)
*Evgeny Skvortsov,Yilin Xia,Ojaswa Garg,Shawn Bowers,Bertram Ludäscher*
