Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: Logical Robots是一个基于逻辑编程语言Logica的交互式多机器人仿真平台，通过声明式逻辑谓词定义机器人行为，将底层反应式控制与高层规划统一在单一编程环境中。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为多机器人系统提供一个统一的编程框架，使底层反应式控制和高层规划能够在同一逻辑编程环境中协同工作，简化复杂多机器人行为的开发与探索。

Method: 使用逻辑编程语言Logica，通过声明式逻辑谓词定义机器人行为。这些谓词将来自模拟雷达阵列和共享内存的观测映射到期望的电机输出，实现从感知到动作的转换。

Result: 开发了一个交互式多智能体仿真平台，能够在单一逻辑编程环境中同时支持低层反应式控制和高层规划，为探索多机器人行为提供了连贯的框架。

Conclusion: 基于逻辑编程的声明式方法为多机器人系统提供了一个统一的编程范式，能够有效整合不同层次的机器人行为控制，简化复杂多智能体系统的开发过程。

Abstract: We present Logical Robots, an interactive multi-agent simulation platform where autonomous robot behavior is specified declaratively in the logic programming language Logica. Robot behavior is defined by logical predicates that map observations from simulated radar arrays and shared memory to desired motor outputs. This approach allows low-level reactive control and high-level planning to coexist within a single programming environment, providing a coherent framework for exploring multi-agent robot behavior.

</details>


### [520] [Strategic Persuasion with Trait-Conditioned Multi-Agent Systems for Iterative Legal Argumentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07028)
*Philipp D. Siedler*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 论文提出了战略法庭框架，这是一个多智能体模拟环境，其中由基于特质的大型语言模型智能体组成的控辩双方进行迭代式法律论证。研究通过实验发现异质团队优于同质配置，并开发了基于强化学习的特质协调器来动态生成辩护策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有博弈论模型通常抽象掉通过话语运作的说服机制，而法律、外交和谈判等对抗性领域中的战略互动是通过语言介导的。需要建立一个能够捕捉语言作为战略行动空间的框架，以研究多智能体环境中的适应性说服。

Method: 提出战略法庭框架：一个多智能体模拟环境，控辩团队由基于特质的LLM智能体组成，进行迭代式回合制法律论证。智能体通过9个可解释特质实例化，分为4种原型。在10个合成法律案件和84种三特质团队配置中进行了超过7000次模拟试验，使用DeepSeek-R1和Gemini 2.5 Pro。进一步引入了基于强化学习的特质协调器，动态生成针对案件和对手团队的特质。

Result: 异质团队（具有互补特质）持续优于同质配置；适中的互动深度产生更稳定的判决；某些特质（特别是定量和魅力特质）对说服成功贡献不成比例。基于强化学习的特质协调器发现的策略优于静态、人工设计的特质组合。

Conclusion: 语言可以被视为一级战略行动空间，这些发现为构建能够在多智能体环境中进行适应性说服的自主智能体奠定了基础。战略法庭框架为研究语言介导的战略互动提供了系统方法。

Abstract: Strategic interaction in adversarial domains such as law, diplomacy, and negotiation is mediated by language, yet most game-theoretic models abstract away the mechanisms of persuasion that operate through discourse. We present the Strategic Courtroom Framework, a multi-agent simulation environment in which prosecution and defense teams composed of trait-conditioned Large Language Model (LLM) agents engage in iterative, round-based legal argumentation. Agents are instantiated using nine interpretable traits organized into four archetypes, enabling systematic control over rhetorical style and strategic orientation.
  We evaluate the framework across 10 synthetic legal cases and 84 three-trait team configurations, totaling over 7{,}000 simulated trials using DeepSeek-R1 and Gemini~2.5~Pro. Our results show that heterogeneous teams with complementary traits consistently outperform homogeneous configurations, that moderate interaction depth yields more stable verdicts, and that certain traits (notably quantitative and charismatic) contribute disproportionately to persuasive success. We further introduce a reinforcement-learning-based Trait Orchestrator that dynamically generates defense traits conditioned on the case and opposing team, discovering strategies that outperform static, human-designed trait combinations.
  Together, these findings demonstrate how language can be treated as a first-class strategic action space and provide a foundation for building autonomous agents capable of adaptive persuasion in multi-agent environments.

</details>


### [521] [Governance-Aware Agent Telemetry for Closed-Loop Enforcement in Multi-Agent AI Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05119)
*Anshul Pathak,Nishant Jain*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: GAAT架构通过扩展OpenTelemetry、实时策略检测、分级干预和加密溯源，实现多智能体系统中遥测收集与策略执行的闭环


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有企业多智能体AI系统每小时产生数千次智能体间交互，但现有可观测性工具仅捕获依赖关系而不强制执行任何策略。OpenTelemetry和Langfuse等工具收集遥测数据，但将治理视为下游分析问题而非实时执行目标，导致"观察但不行动"的差距，策略违规只能在损害发生后被检测到。

Method: 提出治理感知智能体遥测(GAAT)参考架构，包含四个核心组件：1)治理遥测模式(GTS)，扩展OpenTelemetry并添加治理属性；2)实时策略违规检测引擎，使用OPA兼容的声明性规则，延迟低于200毫秒；3)治理执行总线(GEB)，提供分级干预措施；4)可信遥测平面，提供加密溯源功能。

Result: GAAT架构填补了多智能体系统中遥测收集与自动化策略执行之间的闭环，将策略违规检测从事后分析转变为实时执行，解决了"观察但不行动"的问题。

Conclusion: GAAT为多智能体系统提供了一种将治理直接集成到遥测基础设施中的方法，通过实时策略执行、分级干预和加密溯源，实现了从被动观察到主动治理的转变，提高了企业AI系统的安全性和合规性。

Abstract: Enterprise multi-agent AI systems produce thousands of inter-agent interactions per hour, yet existing observability tools capture these dependencies without enforcing anything. OpenTelemetry and Langfuse collect telemetry but treat governance as a downstream analytics concern, not a real-time enforcement target. The result is an "observe-but-do-not-act" gap where policy violations are detected only after damage is done.
  We present Governance-Aware Agent Telemetry (GAAT), a reference architecture that closes the loop between telemetry collection and automated policy enforcement for multi-agent systems. GAAT introduces (1) a Governance Telemetry Schema (GTS) extending OpenTelemetry with governance attributes; (2) a real-time policy violation detection engine using OPA-compatible declarative rules under sub-200 ms latency; (3) a Governance Enforcement Bus (GEB) with graduated interventions; and (4) a Trusted Telemetry Plane with cryptographic provenance.

</details>


<div id='stat.ML'></div>

# stat.ML [[Back]](#toc)

### [522] [Gaussian Approximation for Asynchronous Q-learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07323)
*Artemy Rubtsov,Sergey Samsonov,Vladimir Ulyanov,Alexey Naumov*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 该论文推导了异步Q学习算法中Polyak-Ruppert平均迭代在高维中心极限定理下的收敛速率，使用多项式步长，在均匀几何遍历马尔可夫链假设下，获得超矩形类上高达n^{-1/6}log^4(nSA)的收敛速率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究异步Q学习算法中Polyak-Ruppert平均迭代的高维中心极限定理收敛速率，为强化学习算法的统计推断提供理论保证。

Method: 采用多项式步长k^{-ω}（ω∈(1/2,1]）的异步Q学习算法，假设状态-动作-下一状态三元组序列形成均匀几何遍历马尔可夫链，证明高维中心极限定理，特别针对超矩形类建立收敛速率。

Result: 在超矩形类上获得高达n^{-1/6}log^4(nSA)的收敛速率，其中n为样本数，S和A分别为状态和动作数量。同时证明了高维中心极限定理并给出了算法最后迭代的高阶矩边界。

Conclusion: 该工作为异步Q学习算法的Polyak-Ruppert平均迭代提供了高维中心极限定理的理论保证，推导了收敛速率并建立了相关技术工具，对强化学习的统计推断具有重要意义。

Abstract: In this paper, we derive rates of convergence in the high-dimensional central limit theorem for Polyak-Ruppert averaged iterates generated by the asynchronous Q-learning algorithm with a polynomial stepsize $k^{-ω},\, ω\in (1/2, 1]$. Assuming that the sequence of state-action-next-state triples $(s_k, a_k, s_{k+1})_{k \geq 0}$ forms a uniformly geometrically ergodic Markov chain, we establish a rate of order up to $n^{-1/6} \log^{4} (nS A)$ over the class of hyper-rectangles, where $n$ is the number of samples used by the algorithm and $S$ and $A$ denote the numbers of states and actions, respectively. To obtain this result, we prove a high-dimensional central limit theorem for sums of martingale differences, which may be of independent interest. Finally, we present bounds for high-order moments for the algorithm's last iterate.

</details>


### [523] [The Theory and Practice of Highly Scalable Gaussian Process Regression with Nearest Neighbours](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07267)
*Robert Allison,Tomasz Maciazek,Anthony Stephenson*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 该论文为最近邻高斯过程（NNGP/GPnn）回归建立了理论框架，证明了其在大样本下的统计性质，包括点预测收敛、一致性、最优收敛速率，并解释了其对超参数调优的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高斯过程回归在训练规模上具有立方复杂度，限制了其在大规模数据集上的应用。最近邻高斯过程（NNGP/GPnn）方法通过仅使用每个测试点的最近邻进行预测，在实践中表现出色，但缺乏完整的理论支撑。

Method: 建立NNGP/GPnn回归的理论框架，在温和的正则性假设下，推导三个关键预测指标（均方误差MSE、校准系数CAL、负对数似然NLL）的几乎必然点极限。研究L2风险，证明普遍一致性，并展示风险达到Stone的最小最大速率。证明MSE在紧致超参数集上的一致收敛性及其对超参数导数的渐近消失。

Result: 证明了NNGP/GPnn回归的几乎必然点收敛、普遍一致性，风险达到最优收敛速率n^{-2α/(2p+d)}。MSE在紧致超参数集上一致收敛，且其对长度尺度、核尺度、噪声方差的导数渐近消失，解释了该方法对超参数调优的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 该研究为NNGP/GPnn提供了严格的统计理论基础，证明其作为全高斯过程模型的高度可扩展且原则性的替代方案的有效性，解决了大规模高斯过程回归的计算瓶颈问题。

Abstract: Gaussian process ($GP$) regression is a widely used non-parametric modeling tool, but its cubic complexity in the training size limits its use on massive data sets. A practical remedy is to predict using only the nearest neighbours of each test point, as in Nearest Neighbour Gaussian Process ($NNGP$) regression for geospatial problems and the related scalable $GPnn$ method for more general machine-learning applications. Despite their strong empirical performance, the large-$n$ theory of $NNGP/GPnn$ remains incomplete. We develop a theoretical framework for $NNGP$ and $GPnn$ regression. Under mild regularity assumptions, we derive almost sure pointwise limits for three key predictive criteria: mean squared error ($MSE$), calibration coefficient ($CAL$), and negative log-likelihood ($NLL$). We then study the $L_2$-risk, prove universal consistency, and show that the risk attains Stone's minimax rate $n^{-2α/(2p+d)}$, where $α$ and $p$ capture regularity of the regression problem. We also prove uniform convergence of $MSE$ over compact hyper-parameter sets and show that its derivatives with respect to lengthscale, kernel scale, and noise variance vanish asymptotically, with explicit rates. This explains the observed robustness of $GPnn$ to hyper-parameter tuning. These results provide a rigorous statistical foundation for $NNGP/GPnn$ as a highly scalable and principled alternative to full $GP$ models.

</details>


### [524] [Amortized Filtering and Smoothing with Conditional Normalizing Flows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07169)
*Tiangang Cui,Xiaodong Feng,Chenlong Pei,Xiaoliang Wan,Tao Zhou*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: AFSF：基于条件归一化流的统一摊销框架，用于高维非线性动力系统的贝叶斯滤波和平滑


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高维非线性动力系统的贝叶斯滤波和平滑是科学和工程中的基础但具有挑战性的问题，需要开发能够处理复杂动态的有效方法。

Method: 提出AFSF框架，使用循环编码器将观测历史映射到固定维度的摘要统计量，基于此共享表示学习前向流（近似滤波分布）和后向流（近似后向转移核），通过标准后向递归恢复整个轨迹的平滑分布。

Result: AFSF能够准确近似滤波分布和平滑路径，支持训练范围外的时间序列外推，通过共享摘要统计量实现隐式正则化，并开发了基于流的粒子滤波变体用于替代滤波和诊断。

Conclusion: AFSF为高维非线性动力系统的贝叶斯滤波和平滑提供了一个统一、有效的摊销框架，通过条件归一化流和共享表示学习实现了准确的状态估计和轨迹平滑。

Abstract: Bayesian filtering and smoothing for high-dimensional nonlinear dynamical systems are fundamental yet challenging problems in many areas of science and engineering. In this work, we propose AFSF, a unified amortized framework for filtering and smoothing with conditional normalizing flows. The core idea is to encode each observation history into a fixed-dimensional summary statistic and use this shared representation to learn both a forward flow for the filtering distribution and a backward flow for the backward transition kernel. Specifically, a recurrent encoder maps each observation history to a fixed-dimensional summary statistic whose dimension does not depend on the length of the time series. Conditioned on this shared summary statistic, the forward flow approximates the filtering distribution, while the backward flow approximates the backward transition kernel. The smoothing distribution over an entire trajectory is then recovered by combining the terminal filtering distribution with the learned backward flow through the standard backward recursion. By learning the underlying temporal evolution structure, AFSF also supports extrapolation beyond the training horizon. Moreover, by coupling the two flows through shared summary statistics, AFSF induces an implicit regularization across latent state trajectories and improves trajectory-level smoothing. In addition, we develop a flow-based particle filtering variant that provides an alternative filtering procedure and enables ESS-based diagnostics when explicit model factors are available. Numerical experiments demonstrate that AFSF provides accurate approximations of both filtering distributions and smoothing paths.

</details>


### [525] [A Data-Informed Variational Clustering Framework for Noisy High-Dimensional Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06864)
*Wan Ping Chen*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: DIVI是一个数据驱动的变分聚类框架，针对高维噪声数据，结合全局特征门控和基于分裂的自适应结构增长，实现稳定的聚类、特征相关性学习和模型复杂度自适应扩展。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在高维噪声设置下进行聚类具有挑战性，特别是当只有少量维度具有信息性且聚类数量未知时。传统的基于似然的方法在这种场景下可能不稳定或对噪声维度过于敏感。

Method: DIVI结合了全局特征门控和基于分裂的自适应结构增长，使用信息性先验初始化来稳定优化，以可微分方式学习特征相关性，并在局部诊断显示欠拟合时才扩展模型复杂度。

Result: DIVI在严重特征噪声下表现具有竞争力，计算上可行，产生可解释的特征门控行为，同时在挑战性设置中表现出保守的增长和可识别的失败模式。

Conclusion: DIVI最好被视为一个实用的变分聚类框架，用于处理噪声高维数据，而不是一个完全贝叶斯的生成解决方案。

Abstract: Clustering in high-dimensional settings with severe feature noise remains challenging, especially when only a small subset of dimensions is informative and the final number of clusters is not specified in advance. In such regimes, partition recovery, feature relevance learning, and structural adaptation are tightly coupled, and standard likelihood-based methods can become unstable or overly sensitive to noisy dimensions. We propose DIVI, a data-informed variational clustering framework that combines global feature gating with split-based adaptive structure growth. DIVI uses informative prior initialization to stabilize optimization, learns feature relevance in a differentiable manner, and expands model complexity only when local diagnostics indicate underfit. Beyond clustering performance, we also examine runtime scalability and parameter sensitivity in order to clarify the computational and practical behavior of the framework. Empirically, we find that DIVI performs competitively under severe feature noise, remains computationally feasible, and yields interpretable feature-gating behavior, while also exhibiting conservative growth and identifiable failure regimes in challenging settings. Overall, DIVI is best viewed as a practical variational clustering framework for noisy high-dimensional data rather than as a fully Bayesian generative solution.

</details>


### [526] [Efficient machine unlearning with minimax optimality](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05669)
*Jingyi Xie,Linjun Zhang,Sai Li*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出一种用于机器遗忘的统计框架，针对通用损失函数建立理论保证，特别针对平方损失开发了遗忘最小二乘法（ULS），证明了其在仅使用预训练估计器、遗忘样本和少量剩余数据子样本时的极小极大最优性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为满足GDPR等法规要求并减轻有偏或损坏数据的影响，需要高效的数据移除方法。机器遗忘领域旨在消除特定数据子集的影响而无需完全重新训练，但需要建立理论框架和保证。

Method: 提出机器遗忘的统计框架，针对通用损失函数建立理论保证。特别针对平方损失开发了遗忘最小二乘法（ULS），该方法仅需预训练估计器、遗忘样本和少量剩余数据子样本。理论分析显示估计误差可分解为oracle项和遗忘成本项。

Result: 证明了ULS在估计剩余数据模型参数时的极小极大最优性。估计误差由oracle项和遗忘成本组成，后者取决于遗忘比例和遗忘模型偏差。建立了无需完全重新训练的渐近有效推断程序。数值实验和实际应用显示该方法性能接近重新训练，但所需数据访问量显著减少。

Conclusion: 提出的统计框架为机器遗忘提供了理论基础，ULS方法在仅使用有限信息的情况下实现了接近重新训练的性能，为合规数据移除提供了高效解决方案，同时支持统计推断而无需完全重新训练。

Abstract: There is a growing demand for efficient data removal to comply with regulations like the GDPR and to mitigate the influence of biased or corrupted data. This has motivated the field of machine unlearning, which aims to eliminate the influence of specific data subsets without the cost of full retraining. In this work, we propose a statistical framework for machine unlearning with generic loss functions and establish theoretical guarantees. For squared loss, especially, we develop Unlearning Least Squares (ULS) and establish its minimax optimality for estimating the model parameter of remaining data when only the pre-trained estimator, forget samples, and a small subsample of the remaining data are available. Our results reveal that the estimation error decomposes into an oracle term and an unlearning cost determined by the forget proportion and the forget model bias. We further establish asymptotically valid inference procedures without requiring full retraining. Numerical experiments and real-data applications demonstrate that the proposed method achieves performance close to retraining while requiring substantially less data access.

</details>


### [527] [Hierarchical Contrastive Learning for Multimodal Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05462)
*Huichao Li,Junhan Yu,Doudou Zhou*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: HCL框架通过层次化对比学习解决多模态表示学习中部分共享信息的建模问题，避免传统二值化共享-私有分解的局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统多模态表示学习采用共享-私有二分法，将所有潜在信息视为完全共享或完全私有。这种二元视图存在不足：许多因素仅由部分模态共享，忽略这种部分共享会导致过度对齐无关信号并掩盖互补信息。

Method: 提出层次化对比学习(HCL)框架，结合层次化潜变量公式、结构稀疏性和结构感知对比目标。该框架学习全局共享、部分共享和模态特定的表示，仅对齐真正共享潜在因素的模态。

Result: 在潜变量不相关条件下，证明了层次分解的可识别性，建立了加载矩阵的恢复保证，推导了下游预测的参数估计和超额风险界限。模拟实验显示能准确恢复层次结构并有效选择任务相关组件。在多模态电子健康记录上，HCL产生更具信息量的表示并持续改善预测性能。

Conclusion: HCL框架通过建模多模态数据中的层次共享结构，克服了传统二分法的局限性，在理论和实证上都表现出优越性，为多模态表示学习提供了更精细的分解方法。

Abstract: Multimodal representation learning is commonly built on a shared-private decomposition, treating latent information as either common to all modalities or specific to one. This binary view is often inadequate: many factors are shared by only subsets of modalities, and ignoring such partial sharing can over-align unrelated signals and obscure complementary information. We propose Hierarchical Contrastive Learning (HCL), a framework that learns globally shared, partially shared, and modality-specific representations within a unified model. HCL combines a hierarchical latent-variable formulation with structural sparsity and a structure-aware contrastive objective that aligns only modalities that genuinely share a latent factor. Under uncorrelated latent variables, we prove identifiability of the hierarchical decomposition, establish recovery guarantees for the loading matrices, and derive parameter estimation and excess-risk bounds for downstream prediction. Simulations show accurate recovery of hierarchical structure and effective selection of task-relevant components. On multimodal electronic health records, HCL yields more informative representations and consistently improves predictive performance.

</details>


### [528] [MEC: Machine-Learning-Assisted Generalized Entropy Calibration for Semi-Supervised Mean Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05446)
*Se Yoon Lee,Jae Kwang Kim*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出MEC方法，一种基于交叉拟合和校准加权的预测驱动推理变体，通过重标定标记样本改善效率，在模型误设下更稳健，达到半参数效率界


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高质量标签获取成本高，而未标记协变量丰富，需要半监督推理方法进行可靠的不确定性量化。现有预测驱动推理(PPI)方法在小标记样本上训练机器学习预测器提高效率，但在模型误设下可能损失效率，且标签重用会导致覆盖失真

Method: 提出机器学习辅助的广义熵校准(MEC)，是PPI的交叉拟合、校准加权变体。通过基于Bregman投影的原理性校准框架重加权标记样本，使其更好地与目标总体对齐。该方法对预测器的仿射变换具有稳健性，通过用更弱的投影误差条件替代原始预测误差条件来放宽有效性要求

Result: MEC在比现有PPI变体更弱的假设下达到半参数效率界。在模拟和真实数据应用中，MEC实现接近名义水平的覆盖，且比CF-PPI和原始PPI获得更紧的置信区间

Conclusion: MEC方法通过校准加权机制改善了半监督推理的效率和稳健性，在模型误设情况下仍能保持良好性能，为预测驱动推理提供了更可靠的替代方案

Abstract: Obtaining high-quality labels is costly, whereas unlabeled covariates are often abundant, motivating semi-supervised inference methods with reliable uncertainty quantification. Prediction-powered inference (PPI) leverages a machine-learning predictor trained on a small labeled sample to improve efficiency, but it can lose efficiency under model misspecification and suffer from coverage distortions due to label reuse. We introduce Machine-Learning-Assisted Generalized Entropy Calibration (MEC), a cross-fitted, calibration-weighted variant of PPI. MEC improves efficiency by reweighting labeled samples to better align with the target population, using a principled calibration framework based on Bregman projections. This yields robustness to affine transformations of the predictor and relaxes requirements for validity by replacing conditions on raw prediction error with weaker projection-error conditions. As a result, MEC attains the semiparametric efficiency bound under weaker assumptions than existing PPI variants. Across simulations and a real-data application, MEC achieves near-nominal coverage and tighter confidence intervals than CF-PPI and vanilla PPI.

</details>


### [529] [Individual-heterogeneous sub-Gaussian Mixture Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05337)
*Huan Qing*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出个体异质性亚高斯混合模型及高效谱方法，解决传统高斯混合模型同质性假设不适用于现实数据的问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统高斯混合模型假设簇内同质性，但现实数据中观测值通常具有不同的尺度或强度，存在异质性，需要更灵活的模型来捕捉这种个体差异

Method: 提出个体异质性亚高斯混合模型，为每个观测值分配独立的异质性参数；基于该模型设计高效谱方法，在温和分离条件下实现真实聚类标签的精确恢复

Result: 理论证明在特征数远大于样本数的高维设置下，该方法仍能实现精确聚类恢复；数值实验显示在合成和真实数据上均优于现有聚类算法，包括经典高斯混合模型方法

Conclusion: 个体异质性亚高斯混合模型及其谱方法为处理现实数据中的异质性提供了有效框架，在高维情况下仍保持理论保证和实际性能优势

Abstract: The classical Gaussian mixture model assumes homogeneity within clusters, an assumption that often fails in real-world data where observations naturally exhibit varying scales or intensities. To address this, we introduce the individual-heterogeneous sub-Gaussian mixture model, a flexible framework that assigns each observation its own heterogeneity parameter, thereby explicitly capturing the heterogeneity inherent in practical applications. Built upon this model, we propose an efficient spectral method that provably achieves exact recovery of the true cluster labels under mild separation conditions, even in high-dimensional settings where the number of features far exceeds the number of samples. Numerical experiments on both synthetic and real data demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms existing clustering algorithms, including those designed for classical Gaussian mixture models.

</details>


<div id='eess.SP'></div>

# eess.SP [[Back]](#toc)

### [530] [Learned Elevation Models as a Lightweight Alternative to LiDAR for Radio Environment Map Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05520)
*Ljupcho Milosheski,Fedja Močnik,Mihael Mohorčič,Carolina Fortuna*

Main category: eess.SP

TL;DR: 提出一种无需3D数据的两阶段框架，通过卫星RGB图像预测高程图，结合天线参数进行无线环境地图估计


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 下一代无线系统（如6G）在高频段工作，信号传播对环境因素高度敏感。现有方法需要昂贵的3D环境数据（如LiDAR点云），这些数据获取成本高、体积大且在动态环境中快速过时。

Method: 提出两阶段框架：第一阶段使用学习估计器从卫星RGB图像直接预测高程图；第二阶段将高程图与天线参数一起输入到无线环境地图估计器中。该方法在推理时无需3D数据。

Result: 在现有基于CNN的无线环境地图估计架构上，该方法相比仅使用图像的基线方法将RMSE提高了最多7.8%，在相同输入特征空间下运行且推理时无需3D数据。

Conclusion: 该方法为可扩展的无线环境建模提供了实用替代方案，消除了推理时对3D数据的需求，降低了成本并提高了实用性。

Abstract: Next-generation wireless systems such as 6G operate at higher frequency bands, making signal propagation highly sensitive to environmental factors such as buildings and vege- tation. Accurate Radio Environment Map (REM) estimation is therefore increasingly important for effective network planning and operation. Existing methods, from ray-tracing simulators to deep learning generative models, achieve promising results but require detailed 3D environment data such as LiDAR-derived point clouds, which are costly to acquire, several gigabytes per km2 in size, and quickly outdated in dynamic environments. We propose a two-stage framework that eliminates the need for 3D data at inference time: in the first stage, a learned estimator predicts elevation maps directly from satellite RGB imagery, which are then fed alongside antenna parameters into the REM estimator in the second stage. Across existing CNN- based REM estimation architectures, the proposed approach improves RMSE by up to 7.8% over image-only baselines, while operating on the same input feature space and requiring no 3D data during inference, offering a practical alternative for scalable radio environment modelling.

</details>


<div id='cs.MS'></div>

# cs.MS [[Back]](#toc)

### [531] [$k$-server-bench: Automating Potential Discovery for the $k$-Server Conjecture](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07240)
*Kirill Brilliantov,Etienne Bamas,Emmanuel Abbé*

Main category: cs.MS

TL;DR: 提出基于k-server猜想的代码挑战，要求发现满足大规模图结构线性不等式系统的势函数，作为开放数学发现的基准测试


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为自动化、开放式数学发现创建代码基准，基于k-server猜想这一竞争分析中的核心开放问题，同时为k-server社区提供测试新假设的工具

Method: 设计基于k-server猜想的势函数发现任务，要求满足大规模图结构线性不等式系统；评估方法可靠但不完备：违反不等式可明确反驳候选函数，但满足所有不等式不构成证明

Result: 在已解决的k=3情况下，现有智能体方法能解决非平凡实例；在开放的k=4情况下，能减少现有势函数的违反数量但未完全解决任务；任务具有挑战性但可能在当前方法能力范围内

Conclusion: 该任务既可作为k-server研究的实用工具，也可作为代码发现智能体的有效基准，解决了现有开放式代码基准的早期饱和问题和朴素随机基线与方法间的弱分离问题

Abstract: We introduce a code-based challenge for automated, open-ended mathematical discovery based on the $k$-server conjecture, a central open problem in competitive analysis. The task is to discover a potential function satisfying a large graph-structured system of simple linear inequalities. The resulting evaluation procedure is sound but incomplete: any violated inequality definitively refutes a candidate, whereas satisfying all inequalities does not by itself constitute a proof of the corresponding conjecture's special case. Nevertheless, a candidate that passes all constraints would be strong evidence toward a valid proof and, to the best of our knowledge, no currently known potential achieves this under our formulation in the open $k=4$ circle case. As such, a successful candidate would already be an interesting contribution to the $k$-server conjecture, and could become a substantial theoretical result when paired with a full proof.
  Experiments on the resolved $k=3$ regime show that current agentic methods can solve nontrivial instances, and in the open $k=4$ regime they reduce the number of violations relative to existing potentials without fully resolving the task. Taken together, these results suggest that the task is challenging but plausibly within reach of current methods.
  Beyond its relevance to the $k$-server community, where the developed tooling enables researchers to test new hypotheses and potentially improve on the current record, the task also serves as a useful \emph{benchmark} for developing code-based discovery agents. In particular, our $k=3$ results show that it mitigates important limitations of existing open-ended code-based benchmarks, including early saturation and the weak separation between naive random baselines and more sophisticated methods.

</details>


<div id='cs.AR'></div>

# cs.AR [[Back]](#toc)

### [532] [CBM-Dual: A 65-nm Fully Connected Chaotic Boltzmann Machine Processor for Dual Function Simulated Annealing and Reservoir Computing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06808)
*Kanta Yoshioka,Soshi Hirayae,Yuichiro Tanaka,Yuichi Katori,Takashi Morie,Hakaru Tamukoh*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: CBM-Dual是首个硅验证的数字混沌动力学处理器，支持模拟退火和储层计算，用于自主边缘AI的实时决策和轻量级适应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决数字混沌动力学处理器的高计算和面积成本问题，为自主边缘AI提供实时决策和轻量级适应能力。

Method: 提出：1）利用神经元翻转率低的特性设计CBM专用调度器，减少99%乘累加操作；2）高效乘法分割方案，减少59%面积；采用1024神经元全连接混沌玻尔兹曼机。

Result: 65nm工艺制造（12mm²），实现同时异构任务执行和领先的能效：模拟退火领域提升25-54倍，储层计算领域提升4.5倍。

Conclusion: CBM-Dual是首个硅验证的双模数字混沌处理器，通过创新的调度和乘法分割技术显著降低计算和面积成本，为边缘AI提供高效解决方案。

Abstract: This paper presents CBM-Dual, the first silicon-proven digital chaotic dynamics processor (CDP) supporting both simulated annealing (SA) and reservoir computing (RC). CBM-Dual enables real-time decision-making and lightweight adaptation for autonomous Edge AI, employing the largest-scale fully connected 1024-neuron chaotic Boltzmann machine (CBM). To address the high computational and area costs of digital CDPs, we propose: 1) a CBM-specific scheduler that exploits an inherently low neuron flip rate to reduce multiply-accumulate operations by 99%, and 2) an efficient multiply splitting scheme that reduces the area by 59%. Fabricated in 65nm (12mm$^2$), CBM-Dual achieves simultaneous heterogeneous task execution and state-of-the-art energy efficiency, delivering $\times$25-54 and $\times$4.5 improvements in the SA and RC fields, respectively.

</details>


### [533] [DHFP-PE: Dual-Precision Hybrid Floating Point Processing Element for AI Acceleration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04507)
*Shubham Kumar,Vijay Pratap Sharma,Vaibhav Neema,Santosh Kumar Vishvakarma*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: 提出一种支持FP8和FP4格式的全流水线双精度浮点MAC处理引擎，采用创新的比特划分技术实现单4比特乘法器复用，在28nm工艺下达到1.94GHz频率、0.00396mm²面积和2.13mW功耗，相比现有设计减少60.4%面积和86.6%功耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人工智能和边缘计算中低精度算术的快速普及，对能效高且灵活的浮点乘累加单元产生了强烈需求。现有设计在支持多种低精度格式时存在硬件利用率低和功耗高的问题。

Method: 采用全流水线架构，支持FP8格式（E4M3、E5M2）和FP4格式（E2M1、E1M2）。核心创新是比特划分技术，使单个4比特乘法器既能作为标准4x4乘法器用于FP8运算，又能作为两个并行2x2乘法器用于2比特操作数，实现100%硬件利用率且无需重复逻辑。

Result: 在28nm工艺下实现：工作频率1.94GHz，面积0.00396mm²，功耗2.13mW。相比最先进设计，面积减少60.4%，功耗降低86.6%。

Conclusion: 该设计成功解决了低精度浮点MAC单元在能效和灵活性方面的挑战，通过创新的比特划分技术实现了硬件高效复用，为AI和边缘计算应用提供了高性能、低功耗的解决方案。

Abstract: The rapid adoption of low-precision arithmetic in artificial intelligence and edge computing has created a strong demand for energy-efficient and flexible floating-point multiply-accumulate (MAC) units. This paper presents a fully pipelined dual-precision floating-point MAC processing engine supporting FP8 formats (E4M3, E5M2) and FP4 formats (E2M1, E1M2), specifically optimized for low-power and high-throughput AI workloads. The proposed architecture employs a novel bit-partitioning technique that enables a single 4-bit unit multiplier to operate either as a standard 4x4 multiplier for FP8 or as two parallel 2x2 multipliers for 2-bit operands, achieving 100 percent hardware utilization without duplicating logic. Implemented in 28 nm technology, the proposed processing engine achieves an operating frequency of 1.94 GHz with an area of 0.00396 mm^2 and power consumption of 2.13 mW, resulting in up to 60.4 percent area reduction and 86.6 percent power savings compared to state-of-the-art designs.

</details>


<div id='cs.GR'></div>

# cs.GR [[Back]](#toc)

### [534] [Splats under Pressure: Exploring Performance-Energy Trade-offs in Real-Time 3D Gaussian Splatting under Constrained GPU Budgets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07177)
*Muhammad Fahim Tajwar,Arthur Wuhrlin,Bhojan Anand*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 研究通过GPU降频和功耗限制模拟不同性能等级，分析3D高斯泼溅在边缘设备上的实时渲染可行性，探索部署在能耗受限环境中的性能-能耗权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）在边缘客户端实时渲染的可行性，特别是在不同高斯泼溅数量和GPU计算预算下的性能表现。目标是确定客户端3DGS渲染的实际下限，评估其在能耗受限环境（如独立头显和瘦客户端）中的部署潜力。

Method: 采用基于仿真的方法，在单个高端GPU上通过系统性地降低GPU核心频率和应用功耗限制，模拟不同GPU性能等级。在不同性能点上，测量不同复杂度场景、渲染管道和优化方案下的帧率、运行时行为和功耗，分析FPS-功耗曲线、每帧能耗和性能功耗比等关系。

Result: 该方法能够近似模拟从嵌入式、移动级设备到高端消费级系统的多样化GPU类别的性能边界，为边缘部署的3DGS系统提供性能-能耗权衡的早期见解。

Conclusion: 通过GPU性能仿真分析，可以探索3DGS在边缘设备上的实时渲染可行性，为能耗受限环境中的部署提供性能-能耗权衡指导，有助于评估边缘部署3DGS系统的实际可行性。

Abstract: We investigate the feasibility of real-time 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) rasterisation on edge clients with varying Gaussian splat counts and GPU computational budgets. Instead of evaluating multiple physical devices, we adopt an emulation-based approach that approximates different GPU capability tiers on a single high-end GPU. By systematically under-clocking the GPU core frequency and applying power caps, we emulate a controlled range of floating-point performance levels that approximate different GPU capability tiers. At each point in this range, we measure frame rate, runtime behaviour, and power consumption across scenes of varying complexity, pipelines, and optimisations, enabling analysis of power-performance relationships such as FPS-power curves, energy per frame, and performance per watt. This method allows us to approximate the performance envelope of a diverse class of GPUs, from embedded and mobile-class devices to high-end consumer-grade systems.
  Our objective is to explore the practical lower bounds of client-side 3DGS rasterisation and assess its potential for deployment in energy-constrained environments, including standalone headsets and thin clients. Through this analysis, we provide early insights into the performance-energy trade-offs that govern the viability of edge-deployed 3DGS systems.

</details>


<div id='eess.AS'></div>

# eess.AS [[Back]](#toc)

### [535] [Active noise cancellation on open-ear smart glasses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05519)
*Kuang Yuan,Freddy Yifei Liu,Tong Xiao,Yiwen Song,Chengyi Shen,Saksham Bhutani,Justin Chan,Swarun Kumar*

Main category: eess.AS

TL;DR: 首个针对开放式智能眼镜的实时主动降噪系统，使用眼镜框架上的麦克风阵列和开放式扬声器，无需耳道密封即可实现环境噪声抑制


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 智能眼镜作为日益普及的可穿戴平台，音频是其关键交互方式。但开放式扬声器设计在嘈杂环境中存在听力挑战，且与传统主动降噪技术不兼容，因为传统ANC需要耳道内或入口处的误差麦克风来测量残余声音

Method: 开发了低延迟计算流程：使用分布在眼镜框架周围的8个麦克风阵列估计耳朵处的噪声，实时生成反噪声信号。构建了定制眼镜原型，并在100-1000Hz频率范围内（环境噪声集中区域）的8种移动环境下进行用户研究评估

Result: 在100-1000Hz频率范围内，无校准情况下平均噪声降低9.6dB，经过简短用户特定校准后达到11.2dB的噪声降低

Conclusion: 成功实现了首个针对开放式智能眼镜的实时主动降噪系统，无需耳道密封即可有效抑制环境噪声，为智能眼镜在嘈杂环境中的音频交互提供了实用解决方案

Abstract: Smart glasses are becoming an increasingly prevalent wearable platform, with audio as a key interaction modality. However, hearing in noisy environments remains challenging because smart glasses are equipped with open-ear speakers that do not seal the ear canal. Furthermore, the open-ear design is incompatible with conventional active noise cancellation (ANC) techniques, which rely on an error microphone inside or at the entrance of the ear canal to measure the residual sound heard after cancellation. Here we present the first real-time ANC system for open-ear smart glasses that suppresses environmental noise using only microphones and miniaturized open-ear speakers embedded in the glasses frame. Our low-latency computational pipeline estimates the noise at the ear from an array of eight microphones distributed around the glasses frame and generates an anti-noise signal in real-time to cancel environmental noise. We develop a custom glasses prototype and evaluate it in a user study across 8 environments under mobility in the 100--1000 Hz frequency range, where environmental noise is concentrated. We achieve a mean noise reduction of 9.6 dB without any calibration, and 11.2 dB with a brief user-specific calibration.

</details>


<div id='q-bio.QM'></div>

# q-bio.QM [[Back]](#toc)

### [536] [ToxReason: A Benchmark for Mechanistic Chemical Toxicity Reasoning via Adverse Outcome Pathway](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06264)
*Jueon Park,Wonjune Jang,Chanhwi Kim,Yein Park,Jaewoo Kang*

Main category: q-bio.QM

TL;DR: ToxReason：基于不良结局通路（AOP）的毒性推理基准，评估器官水平毒性预测及机制推理能力，发现预测性能与可靠推理不必然相关，推理感知训练可提升机制推理和毒性预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大语言模型在分子毒性预测中缺乏对复杂生物学机制的推理能力评估，现有基准无法系统评估机制推理能力，模型可能生成流畅但生物学不真实的解释，难以判断毒性预测是否基于有效机制。

Method: 提出ToxReason基准，基于不良结局通路（AOP）框架，整合实验药物-靶点相互作用证据与毒性标签，要求模型从分子起始事件（MIE）到不良结局（AO）推断毒性结果及其潜在机制，评估多种大语言模型的毒性预测性能和推理质量。

Result: 评估发现强预测性能不一定意味着可靠推理，推理感知训练能改善机制推理能力，进而提升毒性预测性能。

Conclusion: 毒性建模需要将推理能力整合到评估和训练中，以实现可信赖的毒性预测，强调机制推理对于可靠毒性预测的重要性。

Abstract: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have enabled molecular reasoning for property prediction. However, toxicity arises from complex biological mechanisms beyond chemical structure, necessitating mechanistic reasoning for reliable prediction. Despite its importance, current benchmarks fail to systematically evaluate this capability. LLMs can generate fluent but biologically unfaithful explanations, making it difficult to assess whether predicted toxicities are grounded invalid mechanisms. To bridge this gap, we introduce ToxReason, a benchmark grounded in the Adverse Outcome Pathway (AOP) that evaluates organ-level toxicity reasoning across multiple organs. ToxReason integrates experimental drug-target interaction evidence with toxicity labels, requiring models to infer both toxic outcomes and their underlying mechanisms from Molecular Initiating Event (MIE) to Adverse Outcome (AO). Using ToxReason, we evaluate toxicity prediction performance and reasoning quality across diverse LLMs. We find that strong predictive performance does not necessarily imply reliable reasoning. Furthermore, we show that reasoning-aware training improves mechanistic reasoning and, consequently, toxicity prediction performance. Together, these results underscore the necessity of integrating reasoning into both evaluation and training for trustworthy toxicity modeling.

</details>


### [537] [From Exposure to Internalization: Dual-Stream Calibration for In-context Clinical Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06262)
*Chuang Zhao,Hongke Zhao,Xiaofang Zhou,Xiaomeng Li*

Main category: q-bio.QM

TL;DR: Dual-Stream Calibration (DSC) 是一种测试时训练框架，通过语义校准流和结构校准流的协同对齐，实现临床推理中的深度上下文内化，超越传统知识暴露方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法（微调、上下文学习、检索增强生成）在临床推理中往往只实现表面知识暴露，缺乏对个体病例细微差异的深度上下文内化能力，无法动态调整模型内部表示以适应推理时的具体情境。

Method: 提出双流校准（DSC）框架：1）语义校准流通过最小化熵来内化语义锚点，强制对核心证据进行深思熟虑的反思；2）结构校准流通过迭代元学习目标吸收潜在推理依赖关系，在测试时使用专门支持集训练，弥合外部证据与内部逻辑之间的差距。

Result: 在13个临床数据集上进行验证，DSC在三种不同任务范式上均表现出优越性，持续超越从训练依赖模型到测试时学习框架的各种最先进基线方法。

Conclusion: DSC将推理范式从被动的基于注意力的匹配转变为对潜在推理空间的主动细化，实现了从表面知识暴露到深度上下文内化的转变，为临床推理提供了更强大的框架。

Abstract: Contextual clinical reasoning demands robust inference grounded in complex, heterogeneous clinical records. While state-of-the-art fine-tuning, in-context learning (ICL), and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) enable knowledge exposure, they often fall short of genuine contextual internalization: dynamically adjusting a model's internal representations to the subtle nuances of individual cases at inference time. To address this, we propose Dual-Stream Calibration (DSC), a test-time training framework that transcends superficial knowledge exposure to achieve deep internalization during inference. DSC facilitates input internalization by synergistically aligning two calibration streams. Unlike passive context exposure, the Semantic Calibration Stream enforces a deliberative reflection on core evidence, internalizing semantic anchors by minimizing entropy to stabilize generative trajectories. Simultaneously, the Structural Calibration Stream assimilates latent inferential dependencies through an iterative meta-learning objective. By training on specialized support sets at test-time, this stream enables the model to bridge the gap between external evidence and internal logic, synthesizing fragmented data into a coherent response. Our approach shifts the reasoning paradigm from passive attention-based matching to an active refinement of the latent inferential space. Validated against thirteen clinical datasets, DSC demonstrates superiority across three distinct task paradigms, consistently outstripping state-of-the-art baselines ranging from training-dependent models to test-time learning frameworks.

</details>


<div id='hep-ph'></div>

# hep-ph [[Back]](#toc)

### [538] [Learning to Unscramble Feynman Loop Integrals with SAILIR](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05034)
*David Shih*

Main category: hep-ph

TL;DR: SAILIR：基于自监督Transformer的IBP约化新方法，通过逐步分类器引导约化，解决了传统Laporta算法内存随复杂度快速增长的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统IBP约化方法（如Laporta算法）需要求解大型方程组，内存消耗随积分复杂度快速增长，成为高能物理精确计算的主要瓶颈。

Method: 提出SAILIR方法：使用基于Transformer的分类器，通过自监督训练在合成数据上学习逐步约化；采用加扰/解扰过程生成训练数据，结合波束搜索和高度并行化、异步的单次约化策略。

Result: 在双圈三角盒拓扑上测试，与Kira对比16个不同复杂度积分：SAILIR墙钟时间较慢，但每个工作进程内存消耗基本恒定；最复杂积分仅需Kira 40%内存，约化时间相当。

Conclusion: SAILIR展示了克服Laporta方法内存瓶颈的新范式，为当前难以处理的精确计算开辟了可能性，实现了任意高权重积分的有限内存约化。

Abstract: Integration-by-parts (IBP) reduction of Feynman integrals to master integrals is a key computational bottleneck in precision calculations in high-energy physics. Traditional approaches based on the Laporta algorithm require solving large systems of equations, leading to memory consumption that grows rapidly with integral complexity. We present SAILIR (Self-supervised AI for Loop Integral Reduction), a new machine learning approach in which a transformer-based classifier guides the reduction of integrals one step at a time in a fully online fashion. The classifier is trained in an entirely self-supervised manner on synthetic data generated by a scramble/unscramble procedure: known reduction identities are applied in reverse to build expressions of increasing complexity, and the classifier learns to undo these steps. When combined with beam search and a highly parallelized, asynchronous, single-episode reduction strategy, SAILIR can reduce integrals of arbitrarily high weight with bounded memory. We benchmark SAILIR on the two-loop triangle-box topology, comparing against the state-of-the-art IBP reduction code Kira across 16 integrals of varying complexity. While SAILIR is slower in wall-clock time, its per-worker memory consumption remains approximately flat regardless of integral complexity, in contrast to Kira whose memory grows rapidly with complexity. For the most complex integrals considered here, SAILIR uses only 40\% of the memory of Kira while achieving comparable reduction times. This demonstrates a fundamentally new paradigm for IBP reduction in which the memory bottleneck of Laporta-based approaches could be entirely overcome, potentially opening the door to precision calculations that are currently intractable.

</details>


<div id='cs.GT'></div>

# cs.GT [[Back]](#toc)

### [539] [Beyond Pessimism: Offline Learning in KL-regularized Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06738)
*Yuheng Zhang,Claire Chen,Nan Jiang*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 提出一种无悲观主义算法，在KL正则化两人零和博弈中实现Õ(1/n)样本复杂度，优于先前Õ(1/√n)的结果


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离线KL正则化零和博弈学习依赖悲观价值估计处理分布偏移，只能获得Õ(1/√n)统计速率，需要开发更高效的算法

Method: 基于KL正则化最佳响应的平滑性和纳什均衡的斜对称稳定性，开发无悲观主义算法框架，并提出高效自博弈策略优化算法

Result: 首次在KL正则化零和博弈中实现Õ(1/n)样本复杂度，无需悲观主义；自博弈算法在线性迭代次数内达到相同统计速率

Conclusion: 通过利用KL正则化的结构特性，可以在零和博弈中实现快速Õ(1/n)收敛，为离线强化学习提供更高效的算法框架

Abstract: We study offline learning in KL-regularized two-player zero-sum games, where policies are optimized under a KL constraint to a fixed reference policy. Prior work relies on pessimistic value estimation to handle distribution shift, yielding only $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/\sqrt n)$ statistical rates. We develop a new pessimism-free algorithm and analytical framework for KL-regularized games, built on the smoothness of KL-regularized best responses and a stability property of the Nash equilibrium induced by skew symmetry. This yields the first $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/n)$ sample complexity bound for offline learning in KL-regularized zero-sum games, achieved entirely without pessimism. We further propose an efficient self-play policy optimization algorithm and prove that, with a number of iterations linear in the sample size, it achieves the same fast $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/n)$ statistical rate as the minimax estimator.

</details>


### [540] [Revisiting Fairness Impossibility with Endogenous Behavior](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06378)
*Elizabeth Maggie Penn,John W. Patty*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 该论文研究算法分类决策中的公平性问题，特别关注分类后果（如罚款、刑期、福利水平）如何引发行为反应，以及在战略响应环境下经典公平性不可能定理的变化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有算法公平性文献通常假设行为固定，将群体间的行为差异视为外生环境特征，忽略了分类后果（stakes）对行为的影响。现实中，人们会根据分类后果调整行为，这种战略响应会影响公平性评估。

Method: 构建两阶段设计：首先，分类器在统计性能上实现跨群体标准化；然后，调整分类后果以诱导可比的行为模式。这需要在相同分类决策下对不同群体施加不同的后果。

Result: 在战略响应环境中，错误率平衡与预测准确性之间的经典不兼容性消失，但代价是引入了不同形式的差异化处理。分类后果成为主要设计变量，与统计公平标准相互作用产生新的权衡。

Conclusion: 战略环境中的公平性不能仅通过算法如何将数据映射到决策来评估。必须将分类的人类后果作为主要设计变量，引入规范标准来指导其使用，并认识到这些后果与统计公平标准之间的相互作用会产生新的权衡。

Abstract: In many real-world settings, institutions can and do adjust the consequences attached to algorithmic classification decisions, such as the size of fines, sentence lengths, or benefit levels. We refer to these consequences as the stakes associated with classification. These stakes can give rise to behavioral responses to classification, as people adjust their actions in anticipation of how they will be classified. Much of the algorithmic fairness literature evaluates classification outcomes while holding behavior fixed, treating behavioral differences across groups as exogenous features of the environment. Under this assumption, the stakes of classification play no role in shaping outcomes.
  We revisit classic impossibility results in algorithmic fairness in a setting where people respond strategically to classification. We show that, in this environment, the well-known incompatibility between error-rate balance and predictive parity disappears, but only by potentially introducing a qualitatively different form of unequal treatment. Concretely, we construct a two-stage design in which a classifier first standardizes its statistical performance across groups, and then adjusts stakes so as to induce comparable patterns of behavior. This requires treating groups differently in the consequences attached to identical classification decisions. Our results demonstrate that fairness in strategic settings cannot be assessed solely by how algorithms map data into decisions. Rather, our analysis treats the human consequences of classification as primary design variables, introduces normative criteria governing their use, and shows that their interaction with statistical fairness criteria generates qualitatively new tradeoffs. Our aim is to make these tradeoffs precise and explicit.

</details>


### [541] [Polynomial-Time Algorithm for Thiele Voting Rules with Voter Interval Preferences](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05953)
*Pasin Manurangsi,Krzysztof Sornat*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 提出了在选民区间域上计算任意Thiele投票规则下最优委员会的多项式时间算法，解决了10年未决的开放性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决Elkind和Lackner（IJCAI 2015）以及Peters（AAAI 2018）提出的关于在选民区间域上为任意Thiele规则计算最优委员会的10年未决开放性问题。

Method: 基于区间族凹性定理的新结构结果，利用拉格朗日松弛优化框架，将整数线性规划中的基数约束移至目标函数，在选民区间域上约束矩阵完全单模，可在多项式时间内求解。

Result: 成功开发出在选民区间域上计算任意Thiele投票规则（包括广义Thiele规则）最优委员会的多项式时间算法，证明了最优总Thiele分数是委员会规模的凹函数。

Conclusion: 该研究解决了计算社会选择中长期存在的开放性问题，为选民区间域上的委员会选举提供了高效算法，并通过人机协作（特别是使用Gemini Deep Think）获得了关键的结构定理。

Abstract: We present a polynomial-time algorithm for computing an optimal committee of size $k$ under any given Thiele voting rule for elections on the Voter Interval domain (i.e., when voters can be ordered so that each candidate is approved by a consecutive voters). Our result extends to the Generalized Thiele rule, in which each voter has an individual weight (scoring) sequence. This resolves a 10-year-old open problem that was originally posed for Proportional Approval Voting and later extended to every Thiele rule (Elkind and Lackner, IJCAI 2015; Peters, AAAI 2018).
  Our main technical ingredient is a new structural result -- a concavity theorem for families of intervals. It shows that, given two solutions of different sizes, one can construct a solution of any intermediate size whose score is at least the corresponding linear interpolation of the two scores. As a consequence, on Voter Interval profiles, the optimal total Thiele score is a concave function of the committee size. We exploit this concavity within an optimization framework based on a Lagrangian relaxation of a natural integer linear program formulation, obtained by moving the cardinality constraint into the objective. On Voter Interval profiles, the resulting constraint matrix is totally unimodular, so it can be solved in polynomial time.
  Our main algorithm and its proof were obtained via human--AI collaboration. In particular, a slightly simplified version of the main structural theorem used by the algorithm was obtained in a single call to Gemini Deep Think.

</details>


### [542] [JD-BP: A Joint-Decision Generative Framework for Auto-Bidding and Pricing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05845)
*Linghui Meng,Chun Gan,Shengsheng Niu,Chengcheng Zhang,Chenchen Li,Chuan Yang,Yi Mao,Xin Zhu,Jie He,Zhangang Lin,Ching Law*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: JD-BP是一个联合生成式决策框架，通过同时输出竞价值和定价修正项来优化实时竞价策略，解决模型预测误差和反馈延迟导致的效率问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的自动竞价服务在关键绩效指标约束下优化实时竞价策略，但模型预测误差和反馈延迟等不确定性会导致竞价策略偏离事后最优，造成分配效率低下。

Method: 提出JD-BP联合生成式决策框架：1）同时输出竞价值和定价修正项；2）设计无记忆的Return-to-Go机制；3）提出轨迹增强算法从基础竞价策略生成联合竞价-定价轨迹；4）采用基于能量的直接偏好优化方法和交叉注意力模块增强联合学习性能。

Result: 在AuctionNet数据集上的离线实验显示JD-BP达到最先进性能。在京东的在线A/B测试中，广告收入增加4.70%，目标成本改善6.48%。

Conclusion: JD-BP通过联合优化竞价和定价修正，有效解决了自动竞价中的不确定性挑战，在实际应用中显著提升了广告收入和成本效率。

Abstract: Auto-bidding services optimize real-time bidding strategies for advertisers under key performance indicator (KPI) constraints such as target return on investment and budget. However, uncertainties such as model prediction errors and feedback latency can cause bidding strategies to deviate from ex-post optimality, leading to inefficient allocation. To address this issue, we propose JD-BP, a Joint generative Decision framework for Bidding and Pricing. Unlike prior methods, JD-BP jointly outputs a bid value and a pricing correction term that acts additively with the payment rule such as GSP. To mitigate adverse effects of historical constraint violations, we design a memory-less Return-to-Go that encourages future value maximizing of bidding actions while the cumulated bias is handled by the pricing correction. Moreover, a trajectory augmentation algorithm is proposed to generate joint bidding-pricing trajectories from a (possibly arbitrary) base bidding policy, enabling efficient plug-and-play deployment of our algorithm from existing RL/generative bidding models. Finally, we employ an Energy-Based Direct Preference Optimization method in conjunction with a cross-attention module to enhance the joint learning performance of bidding and pricing correction. Offline experiments on the AuctionNet dataset demonstrate that JD-BP achieves state-of-the-art performance. Online A/B tests at JD.com confirm its practical effectiveness, showing a 4.70% increase in ad revenue and a 6.48% improvement in target cost.

</details>


### [543] [Incentive-Aware Multi-Fidelity Optimization for Generative Advertising in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06263)
*Jiayuan Liu,Barry Wang,Jiarui Gan,Tonghan Wang,Leon Xie,Mingyu Guo,Vincent Conitzer*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 提出IAMFM框架，将VCG激励机制与多保真度优化结合，在广告商策略行为和随机生成高成本约束下优化赞助配置，最大化期望社会福利。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型响应中的生成式广告面临两个严格约束：广告商的策略行为（strategic behavior）和随机生成的高成本（high cost of stochastic generations）。需要在这些约束下优化赞助配置。

Method: 提出激励感知多保真度机制（IAMFM），将Vickrey-Clarke-Groves（VCG）激励机制与多保真度优化耦合。引入两种算法实例化（基于淘汰和基于模型），并提出Active Counterfactual Optimization作为"热启动"方法，重用优化数据实现高效支付计算。

Result: 提供近似策略证明性和个体理性的形式保证，建立激励对齐、预算约束生成过程的通用方法。实验表明IAMFM在不同预算下优于单保真度基线。

Conclusion: IAMFM为LLM响应中的生成式广告提供了一个统一的激励感知框架，通过结合VCG激励机制和多保真度优化，在预算约束下实现社会福利最大化，同时保证计算可行性和激励兼容性。

Abstract: Generative advertising in large language model (LLM) responses requires optimizing sponsorship configurations under two strict constraints: the strategic behavior of advertisers and the high cost of stochastic generations. To address this, we propose the Incentive-Aware Multi-Fidelity Mechanism (IAMFM), a unified framework coupling Vickrey-Clarke-Groves (VCG) incentives with Multi-Fidelity Optimization to maximize expected social welfare. We compare two algorithmic instantiations (elimination-based and model-based), revealing their budget-dependent performance trade-offs. Crucially, to make VCG computationally feasible, we introduce Active Counterfactual Optimization, a "warm-start" approach that reuses optimization data for efficient payment calculation. We provide formal guarantees for approximate strategy-proofness and individual rationality, establishing a general approach for incentive-aligned, budget-constrained generative processes. Experiments demonstrate that IAMFM outperforms single-fidelity baselines across diverse budgets.

</details>


### [544] [On the Exploitability of FTRL Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05129)
*Yiheng Su,Emmanouil-Vasileios Vlatakis-Gkaragkounis*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: FTRL学习器在零和博弈中具有固有的可剥削性，其剥削程度与学习器的次优行动数量成正比，且非陡峭正则化器允许对手通过有限时间消除次优行动来最大化剥削


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究FTRL学习器在零和博弈中的可剥削性，挑战先前认为剥削性是特定实例化产物的观点，证明这是FTRL家族的固有特性

Method: 分析固定对手和交替对手两种场景：对于固定对手，建立剥削程度与学习器次优行动数量成正比的规律；对于交替对手，在随机博弈中证明高概率的剥削保证；区分非陡峭和陡峭正则化器的不同行为

Result: 1) 固定对手下，剥削程度为Ω(N/η)，与次优行动数量N成正比；2) 交替对手下，在随机博弈中可获得Ω(ηT/poly(n,m))的剥削盈余；3) 非陡峭正则化器允许对手通过有限时间消除次优行动来最大化剥削，而陡峭正则化器仅引入可忽略的修正

Conclusion: FTRL学习器在零和博弈中具有固有的可剥削性，剥削程度取决于次优行动数量和正则化器类型；论文提出了易感性度量来量化哪些正则化器最容易受到策略操纵，并讨论了双边收益不确定性下的影响

Abstract: In this paper we investigate the exploitability of a Follow-the-Regularized-Leader (FTRL) learner with constant step size $η$ in $n\times m$ two-player zero-sum games played over $T$ rounds against a clairvoyant optimizer. In contrast with prior analysis, we show that exploitability is an inherent feature of the FTRL family, rather than an artifact of specific instantiations. First, for fixed optimizer, we establish a sweeping law of order $Ω(N/η)$, proving that exploitation scales to the number of the learner's suboptimal actions $N$ and vanishes in their absence. Second, for alternating optimizer, a surplus of $Ω(ηT/\mathrm{poly}(n,m))$ can be guaranteed regardless of the equilibrium structure, with high probability, in random games. Our analysis uncovers once more the sharp geometric dichotomy: non-steep regularizers allow the optimizer to extract maximum surplus via finite-time elimination of suboptimal actions, whereas steep ones introduce a vanishing correction that may delay exploitation. Finally, we discuss whether this leverage persists under bilateral payoff uncertainty and we propose susceptibility measure to quantify which regularizers are most vulnerable to strategic manipulation.

</details>


<div id='math.MG'></div>

# math.MG [[Back]](#toc)

### [545] [Bistable Quad-Nets Composed of Four-Bar Linkages](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.00527)
*Gudrun Szewieczek,Daniel Huczala,Martin Pfurner,Hans-Peter Schröcker*

Main category: math.MG

TL;DR: 研究由空间四杆机构组成的双稳态机械结构，这些结构在Study二次曲面中可解释为四边形网格，通过几何构造从欧氏空间的无穷小柔性四边形网格出发，应用Whiteley去平均化方法构建双稳态结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究双稳态机械结构（具有两种不同稳定构型）的设计方法，特别是由空间四杆机构组成的结构。传统方法常依赖数值优化，本文旨在提供一种纯几何构造方法，将问题置于离散微分几何框架中，实现无需数值优化的可控设计。

Method: 提出纯几何构造方法：从欧氏空间中的无穷小柔性四边形网格出发，应用Whiteley去平均化技术。该方法将双稳态结构解释为Study二次曲面中的四边形网格，利用离散微分几何框架，可以从已知的四边形网格类（如离散极小曲面）构造双稳态结构。

Result: 证明了此类双稳态结构存在任意大规模的可能性；提出的构造方法不依赖数值优化，能够控制轴位置和snap角度；可以将双稳态结构与离散微分几何中的已知四边形网格类（如离散极小曲面）联系起来。

Conclusion: 通过将双稳态机械结构问题置于离散微分几何框架中，提供了一种系统性的纯几何构造方法。该方法不仅证明了任意大规模双稳态结构的存在性，而且实现了对结构参数的可控设计，为机械工程和材料科学中的双稳态结构设计提供了新的理论工具。

Abstract: We study mechanical structures composed of spatial four-bar linkages that are bistable, that is, they allow for two distinct configurations. They have an interpretation as quad nets in the Study quadric which can be used to prove existence of arbitrarily large structures of this type. We propose a purely geometric construction of such examples, starting from infinitesimally flexible quad nets in Euclidean space and applying Whiteley de-averaging. This point of view situates the problem within the broader framework of discrete differential geometry and enables the construction of bistable structures from well-known classes of quad nets, such as discrete minimal surfaces. The proposed construction does not rely on numerical optimization and allows control over axis positions and snap angles.

</details>


<div id='cs.NE'></div>

# cs.NE [[Back]](#toc)

### [546] [The Traveling Thief Problem with Time Windows: Benchmarks and Heuristics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06724)
*Helen Yuliana Angmalisang,Frank Neumann*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文研究了带时间窗口约束的旅行小偷问题（TTP-TW），这是一个结合了旅行商问题和小偷背包问题的多组件优化问题，考虑了现实世界中物品只能在特定时间间隔内收集的限制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统优化问题通常孤立研究，但现实世界问题往往需要多个优化组件之间的相互依赖。旅行小偷问题（TTP）是一个广泛研究的多组件问题，本文引入时间窗口约束，使TTP更贴近现实场景，因为现实中物品只能在给定时间间隔内收集。

Method: 1) 研究现有TTP和带时间窗口的旅行商问题（TSP-TW）方法的适应性；2) 为TTP-TW设计新的启发式算法；3) 基于现有TTP实例创建带时间窗口的新基准测试实例；4) 通过实验评估不同方法的性能。

Result: 实验研究表明，新设计的算法在广泛的基准测试实例上优于其他方法，证明了新启发式方法对TTP-TW问题的有效性。

Conclusion: 本文成功引入了带时间窗口约束的TTP变体，开发了有效的启发式算法，并建立了相应的基准测试集，为这一更贴近现实的多组件优化问题提供了解决方案和评估框架。

Abstract: While traditional optimization problems were often studied in isolation, many real-world problems today require interdependence among multiple optimization components. The traveling thief problem (TTP) is a multi-component problem that has been widely studied in the literature. In this paper, we introduce and investigate the TTP with time window constraints which provides a TTP variant highly relevant to real-world situations where good can only be collected at given time intervals. We examine adaptions of existing approaches for TTP and the Traveling Salesperson Problem (TSP) with time windows to this new problem and evaluate their performance. Furthermore, we provide a new heuristic approach for the TTP with time windows. To evaluate algorithms for TTP with time windows, we introduce new TTP benchmark instances with time windows based on TTP instances existing in the literature. Our experimental investigations evaluate the different approaches and show that the newly designed algorithm outperforms the other approaches on a wide range of benchmark instances.

</details>


<div id='quant-ph'></div>

# quant-ph [[Back]](#toc)

### [547] [Unsharp Measurement with Adaptive Gaussian POVMs for Quantum-Inspired Image Processing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04685)
*Debashis Saikia,Bikash K. Behera,Mayukha Pal,Prasanta K. Panigrahi*

Main category: quant-ph

TL;DR: 提出基于量子测量的灰度图像概率变换框架，使用自适应POVM直接作用于像素强度，通过高斯模型构建测量算子，引入锐化参数γ控制测量定位程度，参数k控制变换分辨率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图像处理方法主要集中于分割或阈值化，本文旨在开发一种基于量子测量理论的概率变换框架，直接作用于像素强度值，实现数据自适应的图像变换。

Method: 将强度值嵌入有限维希尔伯特空间，基于图像直方图的高斯模型构建数据自适应测量算子，定义强度可观测量非锐测量，通过测量结果期望值重建图像。引入非线性锐化参数γ控制从非锐测量到投影测量的连续过渡，参数k控制高斯中心数量从而控制变换分辨率。

Result: 在标准基准图像上的实验结果表明，该方法能够实现有效的数据自适应变换，同时保持结构信息，在概率平滑和强度结构定位之间实现平衡。

Conclusion: 提出的量子测量框架为灰度图像变换提供了新的概率方法，通过自适应POVM和可控锐化参数实现了结构保持的数据自适应变换，展示了量子测量理论在图像处理中的潜力。

Abstract: We propose a quantum measurement-based framework for probabilistic transformation of grayscale images using adaptive positive operator-valued measures (POVMs). In contrast, to existing approaches that are largely centered around segmentation or thresholding, the transformation is formulated here as a measurement-induced process acting directly on pixel intensities. The intensity values are embedded in a finite-dimensional Hilbert space, which allows the construction of data-adaptive measurement operators derived from Gaussian models of the image histogram. These operators naturally define an unsharp measurement of the intensity observable, with the reconstructed image obtained through expectation values of the measurement outcomes. To control the degree of measurement localization, we introduce a nonlinear sharpening transformation with a sharpening parameter, $γ$, that induces a continuous transition from unsharp measurements to projective measurements. This transition reflects an inherent trade-off between probabilistic smoothing and localization of intensity structures. In addition to the nonlinear sharpening parameter, we introduce another parameter $k$ (number of gaussian centers) which controls the resolution of the image during the transformation. Experimental results on standard benchmark images show that the proposed method gives effective data-adaptive transformations while preserving structural information.

</details>


<div id='cs.RO'></div>

# cs.RO [[Back]](#toc)

### [548] [RoSHI: A Versatile Robot-oriented Suit for Human Data In-the-Wild](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07331)
*Wenjing Margaret Mao,Jefferson Ng,Luyang Hu,Daniel Gehrig,Antonio Loquercio*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: RoSHI是一种混合可穿戴系统，融合低成本稀疏IMU和Project Aria眼镜，通过第一人称视角感知在全局坐标系中估计穿戴者的完整3D姿态和身体形状。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩展机器人学习需要包含丰富长时交互的人类数据，现有数据收集方法在便携性、遮挡鲁棒性和全局一致性之间存在权衡。RoSHI旨在通过融合IMU和第一人称视角SLAM来解决这些限制。

Method: 结合低成本稀疏IMU（提供遮挡鲁棒性和高速运动跟踪）与Project Aria眼镜（通过第一人称SLAM锚定长时运动并稳定上身姿态），在全局坐标系中估计完整3D姿态和身体形状。

Result: 在敏捷活动数据集上，RoSHI通常优于其他第一人称基线方法，与最先进的第三人称基线（SAM3D）性能相当。系统记录的运动数据适用于真实世界人形机器人策略学习。

Conclusion: RoSHI提供了一种便携、鲁棒且全局一致的人类运动捕捉解决方案，能够为机器人学习收集高质量的野外交互数据。

Abstract: Scaling up robot learning will likely require human data containing rich and long-horizon interactions in the wild. Existing approaches for collecting such data trade off portability, robustness to occlusion, and global consistency. We introduce RoSHI, a hybrid wearable that fuses low-cost sparse IMUs with the Project Aria glasses to estimate the full 3D pose and body shape of the wearer in a metric global coordinate frame from egocentric perception. This system is motivated by the complementarity of the two sensors: IMUs provide robustness to occlusions and high-speed motions, while egocentric SLAM anchors long-horizon motion and stabilizes upper body pose. We collect a dataset of agile activities to evaluate RoSHI. On this dataset, we generally outperform other egocentric baselines and perform comparably to a state-of-the-art exocentric baseline (SAM3D). Finally, we demonstrate that the motion data recorded from our system are suitable for real-world humanoid policy learning. For videos, data and more, visit the project webpage: https://roshi-mocap.github.io/

</details>


### [549] [TAMEn: Tactile-Aware Manipulation Engine for Closed-Loop Data Collection in Contact-Rich Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07335)
*Longyan Wu,Jieji Ren,Chenghang Jiang,Junxi Zhou,Shijia Peng,Ran Huang,Guoying Gu,Li Chen,Hongyang Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: TAMEn是一个触觉感知的机器人操作引擎，通过跨形态可穿戴接口实现闭环数据收集，结合高精度运动捕捉和便携VR跟踪的双模态采集，显著提升了接触丰富的双手操作任务成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 手持式数据收集方法在实现接触丰富的双手操作时面临硬件适应性差、数据效率低、缺乏在线可行性检查导致重放性差，以及无法收集执行过程中的交互恢复数据等关键挑战。

Method: 提出TAMEn系统：1）跨形态可穿戴接口适配异构夹爪；2）双模态采集管道：精度模式（运动捕捉）用于高保真演示，便携模式（VR跟踪）用于野外采集和触觉可视化恢复遥操作；3）金字塔结构数据体系整合大规模触觉预训练、任务特定双手演示和人机交互恢复数据。

Result: 可行性感知管道显著提高了演示重放性；提出的视觉-触觉学习框架将多样双手操作任务的成功率从34%提升到75%；硬件和数据集已开源。

Conclusion: TAMEn通过硬件适应性设计、双模态数据采集和闭环策略优化，有效解决了接触丰富双手操作的数据收集挑战，为视觉-触觉操作研究提供了可复现的基础设施。

Abstract: Handheld paradigms offer an efficient and intuitive way for collecting large-scale demonstration of robot manipulation. However, achieving contact-rich bimanual manipulation through these methods remains a pivotal challenge, which is substantially hindered by hardware adaptability and data efficacy. Prior hardware designs remain gripper-specific and often face a trade-off between tracking precision and portability. Furthermore, the lack of online feasibility checking during demonstration leads to poor replayability. More importantly, existing handheld setups struggle to collect interactive recovery data during robot execution, lacking the authentic tactile information necessary for robust policy refinement. To bridge these gaps, we present TAMEn, a tactile-aware manipulation engine for closed-loop data collection in contact-rich tasks. Our system features a cross-morphology wearable interface that enables rapid adaptation across heterogeneous grippers. To balance data quality and environmental diversity, we implement a dual-modal acquisition pipeline: a precision mode leveraging motion capture for high-fidelity demonstrations, and a portable mode utilizing VR-based tracking for in-the-wild acquisition and tactile-visualized recovery teleoperation. Building on this hardware, we unify large-scale tactile pretraining, task-specific bimanual demonstrations, and human-in-the-loop recovery data into a pyramid-structured data regime, enabling closed-loop policy refinement. Experiments show that our feasibility-aware pipeline significantly improves demonstration replayability, and that the proposed visuo-tactile learning framework increases task success rates from 34% to 75% across diverse bimanual manipulation tasks. We further open-source the hardware and dataset to facilitate reproducibility and support research in visuo-tactile manipulation.

</details>


### [550] [An RTK-SLAM Dataset for Absolute Accuracy Evaluation in GNSS-Degraded Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07151)
*Wei Zhang,Vincent Ress,David Skuddis,Uwe Soergel,Norbert Haala*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 论文指出RTK-SLAM系统中标准评估指标ATE的SE(3)对齐会吸收全局漂移和系统误差，导致轨迹看起来比实际更准确，不适合评估RTK-SLAM的全局精度。作者提出了新的数据集和评估方法，通过将RTK仅作为系统输入、全站仪作为独立真值来暴露这一差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RTK-SLAM系统结合了SLAM和RTK GNSS定位，承诺提供相对一致性和全局参考坐标。然而，标准评估指标ATE通过SE(3)对齐会吸收全局漂移和系统误差，导致轨迹看起来比实际更准确，这掩盖了RTK-SLAM在实际应用中的真实全局精度问题。

Method: 1) 提出新的数据集收集方法：使用手持RTK-SLAM设备采集两个场景数据，关键设计原则是RTK接收器仅作为系统输入，而地面真值通过大地测量全站仪独立建立；2) 开发评估方法：同时报告直接全局精度和SE(3)对齐的相对精度，以明确显示差距；3) 评估多种RTK-SLAM系统：包括激光雷达-惯性、视觉-惯性、激光雷达-视觉-惯性系统以及独立RTK。

Result: 1) SE(3)对齐可能低估绝对定位误差高达76%；2) RTK-SLAM在开阔天空条件下能达到厘米级绝对精度；3) 在室内环境中，RTK-SLAM保持分米级全局精度，而独立RTK则退化到数十米级误差；4) 数据集、校准文件和评估脚本已公开提供。

Conclusion: 标准ATE评估指标通过SE(3)对齐会掩盖RTK-SLAM系统的真实全局精度问题。提出的新数据集和评估方法能够更准确地评估RTK-SLAM的全局性能，揭示了SE(3)对齐可能显著低估绝对误差。RTK-SLAM在开阔天空条件下表现优异，在室内也能保持较好的全局精度，而独立RTK在室内环境性能大幅下降。

Abstract: RTK-SLAM systems integrate simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) with real-time kinematic (RTK) GNSS positioning, promising both relative consistency and globally referenced coordinates for efficient georeferenced surveying. A critical and underappreciated issue is that the standard evaluation metric, Absolute Trajectory Error (ATE), first fits an optimal rigid-body transformation between the estimated trajectory and reference before computing errors. This so-called SE(3) alignment absorbs global drift and systematic errors, making trajectories appear more accurate than they are in practice, and is unsuitable for evaluating the global accuracy of RTK-SLAM. We present a geodetically referenced dataset and evaluation methodology that expose this gap. A key design principle is that the RTK receiver is used solely as a system input, while ground truth is established independently via a geodetic total station. This separation is absent from all existing datasets, where GNSS typically serves as (part of) the ground truth. The dataset is collected with a handheld RTK-SLAM device, comprising two scenes. We evaluate LiDAR-inertial, visual-inertial, and LiDAR-visual-inertial RTK-SLAM systems alongside standalone RTK, reporting direct global accuracy and SE(3)-aligned relative accuracy to make the gap explicit. Results show that SE(3) alignment can underestimate absolute positioning error by up to 76\%. RTK-SLAM achieves centimeter-level absolute accuracy in open-sky conditions and maintains decimeter-level global accuracy indoors, where standalone RTK degrades to tens of meters. The dataset, calibration files, and evaluation scripts are publicly available at https://rtk-slam-dataset.github.io/.

</details>


### [551] [Robust Quadruped Locomotion via Evolutionary Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07224)
*Brian McAteer,Karl Mason*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究比较了深度强化学习与进化强化学习方法在四足机器人行走任务中的表现，发现结合进化搜索的CEM-TD3在训练和迁移到未见过地形时表现最佳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度强化学习在四足机器人运动控制中已取得显著成果，但在仿真环境中训练的策略在环境变化时往往难以迁移。本研究旨在通过结合梯度策略优化和群体驱动的进化搜索，提高策略的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

Method: 研究评估了四种方法：标准深度强化学习算法DDPG和TD3，以及两种结合交叉熵方法的变体CEM-DDPG和CEM-TD3。所有智能体在平坦地形上训练，然后在平坦地形和未训练过的崎岖地形上进行测试。

Result: 在平坦地形上，TD3表现最佳（平均奖励5927.26），但CEM-TD3在整体训练和评估中表现最好（17611.41）。在崎岖地形迁移测试中，深度强化学习方法性能急剧下降（DDPG: -1016.32, TD3: -99.73），而进化变体保留了大部分能力，CEM-TD3表现最强（平均奖励19574.33）。

Conclusion: 结合进化搜索可以减少过拟合并提高运动控制任务的策略鲁棒性，特别是在部署条件与训练条件不同的情况下。进化强化学习方法在未见过地形上的迁移能力显著优于标准深度强化学习方法。

Abstract: Deep reinforcement learning has recently achieved strong results in quadrupedal locomotion, yet policies trained in simulation often fail to transfer when the environment changes. Evolutionary reinforcement learning aims to address this limitation by combining gradient-based policy optimisation with population-driven exploration. This work evaluates four methods on a simulated walking task: DDPG, TD3, and two Cross-Entropy-based variants CEM-DDPG and CEM-TD3. All agents are trained on flat terrain and later tested both on this domain and on a rough terrain not encountered during training. TD3 performs best among the standard deep RL baselines on flat ground with a mean reward of 5927.26, while CEM-TD3 achieves the highest rewards overall during training and evaluation 17611.41. Under the rough-terrain transfer test, performance of the deep RL methods drops sharply. DDPG achieves -1016.32 and TD3 achieves -99.73, whereas the evolutionary variants retain much of their capability. CEM-TD3 records the strongest transfer performance with a mean reward of 19574.33. These findings suggest that incorporating evolutionary search can reduce overfitting and improve policy robustness in locomotion tasks, particularly when deployment conditions differ from those seen during training.

</details>


### [552] [Genie Sim PanoRecon: Fast Immersive Scene Generation from Single-View Panorama](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07105)
*Zhijun Li,Yongxin Su,Di Yang,Jichao Wang,Zheyuan Xing,Qian Wang,Maoqing Yao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Genie Sim PanoRecon：基于前馈高斯溅射的快速全景3D重建系统，用于机器人操作仿真


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为机器人操作仿真提供高保真、低成本的3D场景重建，支持LLM驱动的仿真平台进行具身合成数据生成和评估

Method: 将全景输入分解为六个非重叠立方体贴图面并行处理，采用深度感知融合策略和无训练深度注入模块确保跨视图几何一致性，生成连贯的3D高斯表示

Result: 系统能在数秒内重建逼真3D场景，已集成到Genie Sim平台，为操作任务提供可扩展的背景环境

Conclusion: 提出的前馈高斯溅射管道实现了快速、高质量的3D场景重建，有效支持机器人操作仿真和合成数据生成

Abstract: We present Genie Sim PanoRecon, a feed-forward Gaussian-splatting pipeline that delivers high-fidelity, low-cost 3D scenes for robotic manipulation simulation. The panorama input is decomposed into six non-overlapping cube-map faces, processed in parallel, and seamlessly reassembled. To guarantee geometric consistency across views, we devise a depth-aware fusion strategy coupled with a training-free depth-injection module that steers the monocular feed-forward network to generate coherent 3D Gaussians. The whole system reconstructs photo-realistic scenes in seconds and has been integrated into Genie Sim - a LLM-driven simulation platform for embodied synthetic data generation and evaluation - to provide scalable backgrounds for manipulation tasks. For code details, please refer to: https://github.com/AgibotTech/genie_sim/tree/main/source/geniesim_world.

</details>


### [553] [Flow Motion Policy: Manipulator Motion Planning with Flow Matching Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07084)
*Davood Soleymanzadeh,Xiao Liang,Minghui Zheng*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Flow Motion Policy是一种基于流匹配的开放式端到端神经运动规划器，通过建模可行路径的分布来捕获规划数据集的固有多模态性，支持推理时最佳N采样优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有开放式端到端神经运动规划器通常为给定工作空间生成单一固定路径，无法利用其开放式结构进行推理时优化，且未充分处理规划任务固有的多模态特性。

Method: 采用流匹配方法的随机生成公式，建模可行路径的分布；通过推理时最佳N采样生成多个端到端候选路径，规划后评估碰撞状态，执行首个无碰撞解决方案。

Result: 相比代表性采样基和神经运动规划方法，Flow Motion Policy提高了规划成功率和效率，验证了随机生成策略在端到端运动规划和推理时优化中的有效性。

Conclusion: 流匹配的随机生成公式能有效捕获规划数据集的固有多模态性，开放式端到端神经运动规划器通过推理时最佳N采样可显著提升机器人操作臂的运动规划性能。

Abstract: Open-loop end-to-end neural motion planners have recently been proposed to improve motion planning for robotic manipulators. These methods enable planning directly from sensor observations without relying on a privileged collision checker during planning. However, many existing methods generate only a single path for a given workspace across different runs, and do not leverage their open-loop structure for inference-time optimization. To address this limitation, we introduce Flow Motion Policy, an open-loop, end-to-end neural motion planner for robotic manipulators that leverages the stochastic generative formulation of flow matching methods to capture the inherent multi-modality of planning datasets. By modeling a distribution over feasible paths, Flow Motion Policy enables efficient inference-time best-of-$N$ sampling. The method generates multiple end-to-end candidate paths, evaluates their collision status after planning, and executes the first collision-free solution. We benchmark the Flow Motion Policy against representative sampling-based and neural motion planning methods. Evaluation results demonstrate that Flow Motion Policy improves planning success and efficiency, highlighting the effectiveness of stochastic generative policies for end-to-end motion planning and inference-time optimization. Experimental evaluation videos are available via this \href{https://zh.engr.tamu.edu/wp-content/uploads/sites/310/2026/03/FMP-Website.mp4}{link}.

</details>


### [554] [AEROS: A Single-Agent Operating Architecture with Embodied Capability Modules](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07039)
*Xue Qin,Simin Luan,Cong Yang,Zhijun Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: AEROS框架将机器人建模为单一持久智能主体，通过可安装的具身能力模块扩展能力，实现模块化扩展、可组合执行和系统级安全


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人系统缺乏统一的原则性抽象来组织智能、能力和执行，要么采用耦合技能的单一架构，要么分解为松散协调的模块或多智能体，缺乏一致的身份和控制权限模型

Method: 提出AEROS框架，将机器人建模为单一持久智能主体，通过具身能力模块提供能力，每个ECM封装可执行技能、模型和工具，执行约束和安全保证由策略分离的运行时强制执行

Result: 在PyBullet仿真中，Franka Panda 7-DOF机械臂的8个实验显示：AEROS在三个任务中达到100%成功率，策略层完全阻止无效动作，运行时优势跨任务泛化，ECM运行时加载后100%成功

Conclusion: AEROS提供了一种统一机器人智能、能力和执行的原则性抽象，通过单一持久主体和可安装能力模块实现了模块化扩展、可组合执行和一致的系统级安全

Abstract: Robotic systems lack a principled abstraction for organizing intelligence, capabilities, and execution in a unified manner. Existing approaches either couple skills within monolithic architectures or decompose functionality into loosely coordinated modules or multiple agents, often without a coherent model of identity and control authority. We argue that a robot should be modeled as a single persistent intelligent subject whose capabilities are extended through installable packages. We formalize this view as AEROS (Agent Execution Runtime Operating System), in which each robot corresponds to one persistent agent and capabilities are provided through Embodied Capability Modules (ECMs). Each ECM encapsulates executable skills, models, and tools, while execution constraints and safety guarantees are enforced by a policy-separated runtime. This separation enables modular extensibility, composable capability execution, and consistent system-level safety. We evaluate a reference implementation in PyBullet simulation with a Franka Panda 7-DOF manipulator across eight experiments covering re-planning, failure recovery, policy enforcement, baseline comparison, cross-task generality, ECM hot-swapping, ablation, and failure boundary analysis. Over 100 randomized trials per condition, AEROS achieves 100% task success across three tasks versus baselines (BehaviorTree.CPP-style and ProgPrompt-style at 92--93%, flat pipeline at 67--73%), the policy layer blocks all invalid actions with zero false acceptances, runtime benefits generalize across tasks without task-specific tuning, and ECMs load at runtime with 100% post-swap success.

</details>


### [555] [KITE: Keyframe-Indexed Tokenized Evidence for VLM-Based Robot Failure Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07034)
*Mehdi Hosseinzadeh,King Hang Wong,Feras Dayoub*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: KITE是一个无需训练、基于关键帧锚定、布局接地的前端系统，可将长机器人执行视频转换为紧凑、可解释的标记化证据，供视觉语言模型使用，支持机器人故障分析任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在处理长机器人执行视频时面临挑战，需要一种结构化、可解释的前端系统来提取关键信息，以支持故障检测、识别、定位、解释和修正等任务。

Method: KITE通过提取运动显著的关键帧，结合开放词汇检测，为每个关键帧生成示意性鸟瞰图表示，编码相对物体布局、坐标轴、时间戳和检测置信度，并与机器人配置和场景上下文标记序列化为统一提示。

Result: 在RoboFAC基准测试中，KITE与Qwen2.5-VL结合在无需训练设置下显著优于原始Qwen2.5-VL，特别是在模拟故障检测、识别和定位方面提升明显，同时与RoboFAC调优基线保持竞争力。QLoRA微调进一步提升了解释和修正质量。

Conclusion: KITE作为结构化、可解释的前端系统，能够有效支持机器人故障分析，在模拟和真实双臂机器人场景中均展示了实用性和泛化能力。

Abstract: We present KITE, a training-free, keyframe-anchored, layout-grounded front-end that converts long robot-execution videos into compact, interpretable tokenized evidence for vision-language models (VLMs). KITE distills each trajectory into a small set of motion-salient keyframes with open-vocabulary detections and pairs each keyframe with a schematic bird's-eye-view (BEV) representation that encodes relative object layout, axes, timestamps, and detection confidence. These visual cues are serialized with robot-profile and scene-context tokens into a unified prompt, allowing the same front-end to support failure detection, identification, localization, explanation, and correction with an off-the-shelf VLM. On the RoboFAC benchmark, KITE with Qwen2.5-VL substantially improves over vanilla Qwen2.5-VL in the training-free setting, with especially large gains on simulation failure detection, identification, and localization, while remaining competitive with a RoboFAC-tuned baseline. A small QLoRA fine-tune further improves explanation and correction quality. We also report qualitative results on real dual-arm robots, demonstrating the practical applicability of KITE as a structured and interpretable front-end for robot failure analysis. Code and models are released on our project page: https://m80hz.github.io/kite/

</details>


### [556] [Differentiable Environment-Trajectory Co-Optimization for Safe Multi-Agent Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06972)
*Zhan Gao,Gabriele Fadini,Stelian Coros,Amanda Prorok*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种双层优化框架，将环境配置作为决策变量与智能体动作联合优化，以实现安全导航。通过可微优化方法迭代求解下层轨迹优化和上层环境配置优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统多智能体导航方法将环境视为固定约束，忽略了环境配置对智能体性能的影响。本文旨在探索环境配置作为决策变量的潜力，通过联合优化环境和智能体动作来提升导航安全性。

Method: 1. 建立双层优化问题：下层子问题优化智能体轨迹以最小化导航成本，上层子问题优化环境配置以最大化导航安全性。2. 开发可微优化方法：使用内点法迭代求解下层问题，梯度上升法求解上层问题。3. 通过KKT条件和隐函数定理计算智能体轨迹对环境参数的梯度，实现双层结构的可微性。4. 提出新的导航安全度量标准，并通过测度理论证明其有效性。

Result: 实验在仓库物流到城市交通等多种安全关键导航场景中验证了框架的有效性。结果表明，优化后的环境能够提供导航引导，同时提高智能体的安全性和效率。

Conclusion: 将环境配置作为决策变量与智能体动作联合优化的方法能够显著提升多智能体导航的安全性和效率。提出的双层优化框架和可微优化方法为解决安全关键导航问题提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: The environment plays a critical role in multi-agent navigation by imposing spatial constraints, rules, and limitations that agents must navigate around. Traditional approaches treat the environment as fixed, without exploring its impact on agents' performance. This work considers environment configurations as decision variables, alongside agent actions, to jointly achieve safe navigation. We formulate a bi-level problem, where the lower-level sub-problem optimizes agent trajectories that minimize navigation cost and the upper-level sub-problem optimizes environment configurations that maximize navigation safety. We develop a differentiable optimization method that iteratively solves the lower-level sub-problem with interior point methods and the upper-level sub-problem with gradient ascent. A key challenge lies in analytically coupling these two levels. We address this by leveraging KKT conditions and the Implicit Function Theorem to compute gradients of agent trajectories w.r.t. environment parameters, enabling differentiation throughout the bi-level structure. Moreover, we propose a novel metric that quantifies navigation safety as a criterion for the upper-level environment optimization, and prove its validity through measure theory. Our experiments validate the effectiveness of the proposed framework in a variety of safety-critical navigation scenarios, inspired from warehouse logistics to urban transportation. The results demonstrate that optimized environments provide navigation guidance, improving both agents' safety and efficiency.

</details>


### [557] [Learning-Based Strategy for Composite Robot Assembly Skill Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06949)
*Khalil Abuibaid,Aleksandr Sidorenko,Achim Wagner,Martin Ruskowski*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于残差强化学习的技能封装策略，用于解决工业机器人孔轴装配中的接触丰富任务挑战


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业机器人在接触丰富的装配任务中面临几何公差、摩擦变化和不确定接触动力学的挑战，特别是位置控制机械臂难以适应这些不确定性

Method: 采用残差强化学习（RRL）实现技能封装，将装配过程表示为具有明确前置、后置和不变条件的复合技能，在保持整体技能结构不变的同时，允许在接触丰富交互中进行残差精调

Result: 在MuJoCo仿真环境中使用UR5e机器人和Robotiq夹爪，通过SAC和JAX训练，验证了该方法能够实现鲁棒的装配技能执行

Conclusion: 提出的基于残差强化学习的技能封装策略为工业自动化提供了可重用、模块化且鲁棒的解决方案，特别适用于接触丰富的装配任务

Abstract: Contact-rich robotic skills remain challenging for industrial robots due to tight geometric tolerances, frictional variability, and uncertain contact dynamics, particularly when using position-controlled manipulators. This paper presents a reusable and encapsulated skill-based strategy for peg-in-hole assembly, in which adaptation is achieved through Residual Reinforcement Learning (RRL). The assembly process is represented using composite skills with explicit pre-, post-, and invariant conditions, enabling modularity, reusability, and well-defined execution semantics across task variations. Safety and sample efficiency are promoted through RRL by restricting adaptation to residual refinements within each skill during contact-rich interactions, while the overall skill structure and execution flow remain invariant. The proposed approach is evaluated in MuJoCo simulation on a UR5e robot equipped with a Robotiq gripper and trained using SAC and JAX. Results demonstrate that the proposed formulation enables robust execution of assembly skills, highlighting its suitability for industrial automation.

</details>


### [558] [Sustainable Transfer Learning for Adaptive Robot Skills](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06943)
*Khalil Abuibaid,Vinit Hegiste,Nigora Gafur,Achim Wagner,Martin Ruskowski*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 研究探索了不同机器人平台间的策略迁移，使用强化学习在钉孔任务上训练策略，比较了零样本迁移、微调和从头训练的效果，发现微调能显著提高性能并减少训练时间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从零开始学习机器人技能耗时且低效，而重用数据能促进可持续性并提高样本效率。本研究旨在探索不同机器人平台间的策略迁移，减少重复训练需求。

Method: 使用强化学习在钉孔任务上训练两个不同机器人的策略，然后进行策略迁移评估，包括零样本迁移、微调和从头训练三种方式。

Result: 零样本迁移导致较低的成功率和相对较长的任务执行时间，而微调能显著提高性能且需要更少的训练步数，优于从头训练。
