Conclusion: 策略迁移结合适应技术能提高样本效率和泛化能力，减少大量重新训练的需求，支持可持续的机器人学习。

Abstract: Learning robot skills from scratch is often time-consuming, while reusing data promotes sustainability and improves sample efficiency. This study investigates policy transfer across different robotic platforms, focusing on peg-in-hole task using reinforcement learning (RL). Policy training is carried out on two different robots. Their policies are transferred and evaluated for zero-shot, fine-tuning, and training from scratch. Results indicate that zero-shot transfer leads to lower success rates and relatively longer task execution times, while fine-tuning significantly improves performance with fewer training time-steps. These findings highlight that policy transfer with adaptation techniques improves sample efficiency and generalization, reducing the need for extensive retraining and supporting sustainable robotic learning.

</details>


### [559] [Towards Multi-Object Nonprehensile Transportation via Shared Teleoperation: A Framework Based on Virtual Object Model Predictive Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06932)
*Xinyang Fan,Zhaoyang Chen,Shu Xin,Yi Ren,Zainan Jiang,Fenglei Ni,Hong Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出共享遥操作框架，人类与机器人共享位置控制，机器人自主管理托盘方向以满足动态约束，实现多物体非抓取运输


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多物体非抓取遥操作运输需要同时进行轨迹跟踪和托盘方向控制。现有方法存在模型依赖、参数不确定和多物体适应性差等问题

Method: 1) 基于虚拟对象(VO)的理论动态约束分析简化轨迹规划约束；2) MPC轨迹平滑算法强制执行实时约束并协调用户跟踪与方向控制；3) 共享遥操作框架：人类与机器人共享位置控制，机器人自主管理方向

Result: 稳定操纵9个物体，加速度达2.4 m/s²；相比基线方法，滑动距离减少72.45%，翻倒率从13.9%降至0%，在复杂场景中表现出鲁棒适应性

Conclusion: 提出的共享遥操作框架有效解决了多物体非抓取运输中的轨迹跟踪和方向控制问题，显著提升了操作稳定性和适应性

Abstract: Multi-object nonprehensile transportation in teleoperation demands simultaneous trajectory tracking and tray orientation control. Existing methods often struggle with model dependency, uncertain parameters, and multi-object adaptability. We propose a shared teleoperation framework where humans and robots share positioning control, while the robot autonomously manages orientation to satisfy dynamic constraints. Key contributions include: 1) A theoretical dynamic constraint analysis utilizing a novel virtual object (VO)-based method to simplify constraints for trajectory planning. 2) An MPC-based trajectory smoothing algorithm that enforces real-time constraints and coordinates user tracking with orientation control. 3) Validations demonstrating stable manipulation of nine objects at accelerations up to 2.4 m/s2. Compared to the baseline, our approach reduces sliding distance by 72.45% and eliminates tip-overs (0% vs. 13.9%), proving robust adaptability in complex scenarios.

</details>


### [560] [RichMap: A Reachability Map Balancing Precision, Efficiency, and Flexibility for Rich Robot Manipulation Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06778)
*Yupu Lu,Yuxiang Ma,Jia Pan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: RichMap是一种高精度可达性地图表示方法，在保持结构灵活性的同时，通过改进经典网格结构实现了接近紧凑地图形式的性能，支持机器人操作任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 需要一种既能保持结构灵活性，又能实现高效性能的可达性地图表示方法，以支持多样化的机器人操作任务。

Method: 通过改进经典网格结构，利用S²（或SO(3)）的理论容量边界确保严格覆盖，采用异步流水线进行高效构建，并扩展应用框架包括最大均值差异（MMD）度量和基于能量的扩散策略迁移指导。

Result: 实现了高预测准确率（>98%）、低误报率（1-2%）、快速大批量查询（约15μs/查询），在方块推动实验中跨具身场景实现了高达26%的性能提升。

Conclusion: RichMap在效率与灵活性之间取得了良好平衡，为机器人操作任务提供了有效的可达性地图表示，并通过扩展应用框架展示了在跨具身场景中的实用价值。

Abstract: This paper presents RichMap, a high-precision reachability map representation designed to balance efficiency and flexibility for versatile robot manipulation tasks. By refining the classic grid-based structure, we propose a streamlined approach that achieves performance close to compact map forms (e.g., RM4D) while maintaining structural flexibility. Our method utilizes theoretical capacity bounds on $\mathbb{S}^2$ (or $SO(3)$) to ensure rigorous coverage and employs an asynchronous pipeline for efficient construction. We validate the map against comprehensive metrics, pursuing high prediction accuracy ($>98\%$), low false positive rates ($1\sim2\%$), and fast large-batch query ($\sim$15 $μ$s/query). We extend the framework applications to quantify robot workspace similarity via maximum mean discrepancy (MMD) metrics and demonstrate energy-based guidance for diffusion policy transfer, achieving up to $26\%$ improvement for cross-embodiment scenarios in the block pushing experiment.

</details>


### [561] [Train-Small Deploy-Large: Leveraging Diffusion-Based Multi-Robot Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06598)
*Siddharth Singh,Soumee Guha,Qing Chang,Scott Acton*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于扩散模型的多机器人路径规划方法，能够在训练时使用少量机器人，部署时泛化到更多机器人，实现"训练小、部署大"的范式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于学习的多机器人路径规划方法难以扩展到变化的机器人数量，特别是部署时机器人数量增加的情况。训练固定数量机器人的方法无法泛化到更多机器人，而训练大量机器人又计算昂贵。解析方法则难以扩展或处理动态环境变化。

Method: 提出基于扩散模型的规划器，能够处理动态变化的机器人数量。方法采用共享的扩散模型规划器，结合专用的智能体间注意力计算和时间卷积，实现"训练小、部署大"的范式。

Result: 该方法在训练时使用有限数量的机器人，在部署时能够有效泛化到更多机器人，并保持良好精度。在多种场景下验证了方法的有效性，并与现有多智能体强化学习技术和启发式控制方法进行了性能比较。

Conclusion: 基于扩散模型的规划器能够解决多机器人路径规划中的数量扩展问题，通过"训练小、部署大"的范式，实现了对动态变化机器人数量的有效泛化，为可扩展的多机器人系统提供了有前景的解决方案。

Abstract: Learning based multi-robot path planning methods struggle to scale or generalize to changes, particularly variations in the number of robots during deployment. Most existing methods are trained on a fixed number of robots and may tolerate a reduced number during testing, but typically fail when the number increases. Additionally, training such methods for a larger number of agents can be both time consuming and computationally expensive. However, analytical methods can struggle to scale computationally or handle dynamic changes in the environment. In this work, we propose to leverage a diffusion model based planner capable of handling dynamically varying number of agents. Our approach is trained on a limited number of agents and generalizes effectively to larger numbers of agents during deployment. Results show that integrating a single shared diffusion model based planner with dedicated inter-agent attention computation and temporal convolution enables a train small deploy-large paradigm with good accuracy. We validate our method across multiple scenarios and compare the performance with existing multi-agent reinforcement learning techniques and heuristic control based methods.

</details>


### [562] [BiDexGrasp: Coordinated Bimanual Dexterous Grasps across Object Geometries and Sizes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06589)
*Mu Lin,Yi-Lin Wei,Jiaxuan Chen,Yuhao Lin,Shuoyu Chen,Jiangran Lyu,Jiayi Chen,Yansong Tang,He Wang,Wei-Shi Zheng*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: BiDexGrasp：包含大规模双手灵巧抓取数据集和生成模型，通过两阶段合成策略构建数据集，并提出双手协调和几何尺寸自适应抓取生成框架


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 双手灵巧抓取是机器人学的基础和前景领域，但其发展受到缺乏全面数据集和强大生成模型的限制

Method: 1. 数据集构建：提出双手抓取合成流水线，采用两阶段策略（基于区域的高效抓取初始化和解耦的力闭合抓取优化）；2. 生成模型：提出双手协调和几何尺寸自适应抓取生成框架，包含双手协调模块和几何尺寸自适应抓取生成策略

Result: 构建了大规模双手灵巧抓取数据集，包含6351个尺寸30-80cm的多样化物体，970万标注抓取数据；在仿真和真实世界实验中证明了数据合成流水线和生成框架的优越性能

Conclusion: BiDexGrasp通过创新的数据集构建方法和生成模型，有效解决了双手灵巧抓取领域的数据和模型瓶颈，为机器人双手操作提供了有力支持

Abstract: Bimanual dexterous grasping is a fundamental and promising area in robotics, yet its progress is constrained by the lack of comprehensive datasets and powerful generation models. In this work, we propose BiDexGrasp, consists of a large-scale bimanual dexterous grasp dataset and a novel generation model. For dataset, we propose a novel bimanual grasp synthesis pipeline to efficiently annotate physically feasible data for dataset construction. This pipeline addresses the challenges of high-dimensional bimanual grasping through a two-stage synthesis strategy of efficient region-based grasp initialization and decoupled force-closure grasp optimization. Powered by this pipeline, we construct a large-scale bimanual dexterous grasp dataset, comprising 6351 diverse objects with sizes ranging from 30 to 80 cm, along with 9.7 million annotated grasp data. Based on this dataset, we further introduce a bimanual-coordinated and geometry-size-adaptive dexterous grasping generation framework. The framework lies in two key designs: a bimanual coordination module and a geometry-size-adaptive grasp generation strategy to generate coordinated and high-quality grasps on unseen objects. Extensive experiments conducted in both simulation and real world demonstrate the superior performance of our proposed data synthesis pipeline and learned generative framework.

</details>


### [563] [Uncertainty Estimation for Deep Reconstruction in Actuatic Disaster Scenarios with Autonomous Vehicles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06387)
*Samuel Yanes Luis,Alejandro Casado Pérez,Alejandro Mendoza Barrionuevo,Dame Seck Diop,Sergio Toral Marín,Daniel Gutiérrez Reina*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 比较四种不确定性量化方法在稀疏观测环境标量场重建中的性能，发现证据深度学习在精度、校准和推理成本方面表现最佳


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自主水下车辆进行环境监测时，需要从稀疏观测中准确重建标量场，同时进行可靠的不确定性量化，以支持主动感知策略如信息路径规划

Method: 比较高斯过程、蒙特卡洛dropout、深度集成和证据深度学习四种方法，在三种代表性传感器模态下进行标量场重建和不确定性分解

Result: 证据深度学习在所有传感器配置下实现最佳重建精度和不确定性校准，且推理成本最低；高斯过程受限于平稳核假设，在观测密度增加时变得不可行

Conclusion: 证据深度学习是实时自主车辆部署中不确定性感知场重建的首选方法，在精度、校准和计算效率方面均优于其他方法

Abstract: Accurate reconstruction of environmental scalar fields from sparse onboard observations is essential for autonomous vehicles engaged in aquatic monitoring. Beyond point estimates, principled uncertainty quantification is critical for active sensing strategies such as Informative Path Planning, where epistemic uncertainty drives data collection decisions. This paper compares Gaussian Processes, Monte Carlo Dropout, Deep Ensembles, and Evidential Deep Learning for simultaneous scalar field reconstruction and uncertainty decomposition under three perceptual models representative of real sensor modalities. Results show that Evidential Deep Learning achieves the best reconstruction accuracy and uncertainty calibration across all sensor configurations at the lowest inference cost, while Gaussian Processes are fundamentally limited by their stationary kernel assumption and become intractable as observation density grows. These findings support Evidential Deep Learning as the preferred method for uncertainty-aware field reconstruction in real-time autonomous vehicle deployments.

</details>


### [564] [Designing Privacy-Preserving Visual Perception for Robot Navigation Based on User Privacy Preferences](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06382)
*Xuying Huang,Sicong Pan,Delphine Reinhardt,Maren Bennewitz*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于用户隐私偏好的机器人视觉导航隐私保护方法，通过用户研究发现用户偏好视觉抽象化和低分辨率保护机制，并推导出用户可配置的距离-分辨率隐私策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 移动服务机器人视觉导航需要摄像头，但会捕获隐私敏感信息引发用户担忧。现有隐私保护方法主要基于技术考虑，缺乏对用户隐私偏好的基础研究。

Method: 采用以用户为中心的设计方法，通过两个用户研究调查用户隐私偏好如何指导隐私保护视觉感知设计。

Result: 研究发现用户偏好隐私保护的视觉抽象和捕获时低分辨率保护机制；用户偏好的RGB分辨率取决于期望的隐私级别和机器人导航时的接近程度。

Conclusion: 基于研究发现，推导出用户可配置的距离-分辨率隐私策略，为隐私保护的机器人视觉导航提供用户导向的设计框架。

Abstract: Visual navigation is a fundamental capability of mobile service robots, yet the onboard cameras required for such navigation can capture privacy-sensitive information and raise user privacy concerns. Existing approaches to privacy-preserving navigation-oriented visual perception have largely been driven by technical considerations, with limited grounding in user privacy preferences. In this work, we propose a user-centered approach to designing privacy-preserving visual perception for robot navigation. To investigate how user privacy preferences can inform such design, we conducted two user studies. The results show that users prefer privacy-preserving visual abstractions and capture-time low-resolution preservation mechanisms: their preferred RGB resolution depends both on the desired privacy level and robot proximity during navigation. Based on these findings, we further derive a user-configurable distance-to-resolution privacy policy for privacy-preserving robot visual navigation.

</details>


### [565] [Occlusion Handling by Pushing for Enhanced Fruit Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06341)
*Ege Gursoy,Dana Kulić,Andrea Cherubini*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种农业机器人视觉遮挡清除方法，结合深度学习、传统图像处理和3D霍夫变换来检测被遮挡水果、估计遮挡部分、识别遮挡树枝，并用机械臂推开树枝以提高水果可见性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 农业机器人中，水果被树枝和树叶遮挡会导致错误定位或无法采摘。需要清除遮挡以提高水果可见性。

Method: 使用RGB-D相机和机械臂系统：1）在RGB图像中检测被遮挡水果，通过深度学习生成模型在深度空间估计遮挡部分；2）用传统图像处理技术确定推开方向；3）引入3D霍夫变换扩展检测点云中的直线段，识别主要遮挡树枝；4）用机械臂推开树枝清除遮挡。

Result: 在不同光照条件和多种水果（苹果、柠檬、橙子）的真实数据上验证了感知方法，实现了可见性提升和成功清除遮挡。通过真实机器人树枝推开演示展示了实际应用。

Conclusion: 该方法成功结合了深度学习、传统图像处理和3D霍夫变换，有效解决了农业机器人中水果遮挡问题，提高了水果可见性和采摘成功率。

Abstract: In agricultural robotics, effective observation and localization of fruits present challenges due to occlusions caused by other parts of the tree, such as branches and leaves. These occlusions can result in false fruit localization or impede the robot from picking the fruit. The objective of this work is to push away branches that block the fruit's view to increase their visibility. Our setup consists of an RGB-D camera and a robot arm. First, we detect the occluded fruit in the RGB image and estimate its occluded part via a deep learning generative model in the depth space. The direction to push to clear the occlusions is determined using classic image processing techniques. We then introduce a 3D extension of the 2D Hough transform to detect straight line segments in the point cloud. This extension helps detect tree branches and identify the one mainly responsible for the occlusion. Finally, we clear the occlusion by pushing the branch with the robot arm. Our method uses a combination of deep learning for fruit appearance estimation, classic image processing for push direction determination, and 3D Hough transform for branch detection. We validate our perception methods through real data under different lighting conditions and various types of fruits (i.e. apple, lemon, orange), achieving improved visibility and successful occlusion clearance. We demonstrate the practical application of our approach through a real robot branch pushing demonstration.

</details>


### [566] [Learning-Guided Force-Feedback Model Predictive Control with Obstacle Avoidance for Robotic Deburring](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06133)
*Krzysztof Wojciechowski,Ege Gursoy,Arthur Haffemayer,Sebastien Kleff,Vincent Bonnet,Florent Lamiraux,Nicolas Mansard*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一个结合力反馈MPC与扩散运动先验的框架，用于解决接触丰富的工业去毛刺任务中的精确力控和避障问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统MPC在扭矩控制机器人中广泛应用，但通常忽略实时力反馈，难以处理碰撞约束下的接触丰富工业任务。去毛刺任务需要精确工具插入、稳定力调节和避障的圆周运动，这超出了标准MPC的能力范围。

Method: 提出一个集成力反馈MPC与扩散运动先验的框架。扩散模型作为运动策略的记忆，提供跨多个任务实例的鲁棒初始化和适应，而MPC确保安全执行，包括显式力跟踪、扭矩可行性和碰撞避免。

Result: 在扭矩控制机械臂上进行工业去毛刺任务验证。实验展示了可靠的工具插入、精确的法向力跟踪，以及在难以到达的配置和障碍约束下的圆周去毛刺运动。

Conclusion: 这是首次将扩散运动先验与力反馈MPC集成，用于碰撞感知、接触丰富的工业任务，为解决复杂工业操作提供了有效框架。

Abstract: Model Predictive Control (MPC) is widely used for torque-controlled robots, but classical formulations often neglect real-time force feedback and struggle with contact-rich industrial tasks under collision constraints. Deburring in particular requires precise tool insertion, stable force regulation, and collision-free circular motions in challenging configurations, which exceeds the capability of standard MPC pipelines. We propose a framework that integrates force-feedback MPC with diffusion-based motion priors to address these challenges. The diffusion model serves as a memory of motion strategies, providing robust initialization and adaptation across multiple task instances, while MPC ensures safe execution with explicit force tracking, torque feasibility, and collision avoidance. We validate our approach on a torque-controlled manipulator performing industrial deburring tasks. Experiments demonstrate reliable tool insertion, accurate normal force tracking, and circular deburring motions even in hard-to-reach configurations and under obstacle constraints. To our knowledge, this is the first integration of diffusion motion priors with force-feedback MPC for collision-aware, contact-rich industrial tasks.

</details>


### [567] [Intuitive Human-Robot Interaction: Development and Evaluation of a Gesture-Based User Interface for Object Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06073)
*Bijan Kavousian,Oliver Petrovic,Werner Herfs*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于手势的用户界面，使用指向和点击手势进行物体选择，通过实验评估准确性和选择时间


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 手势是人类之间自然的交流形式，可以用于人机交互，特别是人机协作中的物体选择任务

Method: 开发基于手势的用户界面，使用指向和点击手势进行物体选择，并通过20名参与者的实验进行评估

Result: 实验评估了准确性和选择时间，展示了高效协作的潜力

Conclusion: 基于手势的界面在人机协作中具有潜力，能够实现高效的物体选择

Abstract: Gestures are a natural form of communication between humans and can also be leveraged for human-robot interaction. This work presents a gesture-based user interface for object selection using pointing and click gestures. An experiment with 20 participants evaluates accuracy and selection time, demonstrating the potential for efficient collaboration.

</details>


### [568] [HiPolicy: Hierarchical Multi-Frequency Action Chunking for Policy Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06067)
*Jiyao Zhang,Zimu Han,Junhan Wang,Xionghao Wu,Shihong Lin,Jinzhou Li,Hongwei Fan,Ruihai Wu,Dongjiang Li,Hao Dong*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: HiPolicy：一种分层多频率动作分块框架，通过联合预测不同频率的动作序列来同时捕获粗粒度高层规划和精确反应性运动，解决了模仿学习中长时依赖建模与细粒度闭环控制之间的权衡问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人模仿学习面临一个基本权衡：建模长时依赖与实现细粒度闭环控制之间的冲突。现有的固定频率动作分块方法难以同时实现这两个目标，需要一种能够兼顾高层规划和精细控制的解决方案。

Method: 提出HiPolicy分层多频率动作分块框架：1）联合预测不同频率的动作序列，分别捕获粗粒度高层计划和精确反应性运动；2）从历史观测中提取并融合与每个频率对齐的分层特征，用于多频率分块生成；3）引入基于熵的引导执行机制，根据动作不确定性自适应平衡长时规划和细粒度控制。

Result: 在多样化的模拟基准测试和真实世界操作任务上的实验表明，HiPolicy可以无缝集成到现有的2D和3D生成策略中，在显著提高执行效率的同时，持续提升性能表现。

Conclusion: HiPolicy通过分层多频率动作分块方法有效解决了模仿学习中长时依赖建模与细粒度控制之间的权衡问题，为机器人策略学习提供了一种既能进行高层规划又能实现精细控制的统一框架。

Abstract: Robotic imitation learning faces a fundamental trade-off between modeling long-horizon dependencies and enabling fine-grained closed-loop control. Existing fixed-frequency action chunking approaches struggle to achieve both. Building on this insight, we propose HiPolicy, a hierarchical multi-frequency action chunking framework that jointly predicts action sequences at different frequencies to capture both coarse high-level plans and precise reactive motions. We extract and fuse hierarchical features from history observations aligned to each frequency for multi-frequency chunk generation, and introduce an entropy-guided execution mechanism that adaptively balances long-horizon planning with fine-grained control based on action uncertainty. Experiments on diverse simulated benchmarks and real-world manipulation tasks show that HiPolicy can be seamlessly integrated into existing 2D and 3D generative policies, delivering consistent improvements in performance while significantly enhancing execution efficiency.

</details>


### [569] [A Co-Design Framework for High-Performance Jumping of a Five-Bar Monoped with Actuator Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06025)
*Aastha Mishra,Aman Singh,Shishir Kolathaya*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一个五杆闭环单足机器人的协同设计框架，联合优化机械设计、电机/变速箱参数和控制参数，用于动态跳跃任务，目标是最小化机械能耗的同时最大化跳跃距离。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有协同设计研究大多关注连杆尺寸和传动比优化，忽略了详细的执行器设计（特别是电机和变速箱参数优化），且主要局限于串联开链机构。需要开发一个能同时优化机械设计、执行器参数和控制参数的框架，以提升腿式机器人的性能。

Method: 采用两阶段优化方法：1) 执行器优化阶段生成从传动比到执行器质量、效率和峰值扭矩的映射；2) 协同设计优化阶段使用CMA-ES算法联合优化机器人设计和控制参数。应用于平面闭环五杆单足机器人，目标函数为最大化跳跃距离同时最小化机械能耗。

Result: 仿真结果显示，与基准设计相比，跳跃距离提高了约42%，机械能耗降低了15.8%。证明了该框架在识别高性能、高能效平面跳跃机器人的最优设计、执行器和控制参数方面的有效性。

Conclusion: 提出的协同设计框架成功整合了详细的执行器优化，显著提升了平面闭环五杆单足机器人的跳跃性能和能效。该方法可扩展到其他机器人系统，为高性能腿式机器人的设计提供了有效工具。

Abstract: The performance of legged robots depends strongly on both mechanical design and control, motivating co-design approaches that jointly optimize these parameters. However, most existing co-design studies focus on optimizing link dimensions and transmission ratios while neglecting detailed actuator design, particularly motor and gearbox parameter optimization, and are largely limited to serial open-chain mechanisms. In this work, we present a co-design framework for a planar closed-chain five-bar monoped that jointly optimizes mechanical design, motor and gearbox parameters, and control parameters for dynamic jumping. The objective is to maximize jump distance while minimizing mechanical energy consumption. The framework uses a two-stage optimization approach, where actuator optimization generates a mapping from gear ratio to actuator mass, efficiency, and peak torque, which is then used in co-design optimization of the robot design and control using CMA-ES. Simulation results show an improvement of approximately 42% in jump distance and a 15.8% reduction in mechanical energy consumption compared to a nominal design, demonstrating the effectiveness of the proposed framework in identifying optimal design, actuator, and control parameters for high-performance and energy-efficient planar jumping.

</details>


### [570] [Force Polytope-Based Cant-Angle Selection for Tilting Hexarotor UAVs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05998)
*Alberto Piccina,Massimiliano Bertoni,Angelo Cenedese,Giulia Michieletto*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种用于星形相互依赖倾斜六旋翼无人机的轻量级控制框架，通过离线计算的零力矩力多面体查找表优化倾斜角选择，在物理交互任务中实现高效平滑控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 倾斜多旋翼无人机的主要优势在于可执行力矩的动态可变性，这对物理交互任务至关重要。倾斜角选择需要优化以确保高性能，同时避免突变并保持现实可行性。

Method: 使用离线计算的零力矩力多面体查找表来识别期望控制力下的可行倾斜角，并通过平衡效率和光滑性选择最优倾斜角。该框架与几何全姿态控制器集成。

Result: 计算时间显著减少，姿态跟踪性能改善，执行效率具有竞争力。在Simscape中进行的完整墙壁检查任务物理仿真进一步证实了该策略在交互场景中的可行性。

Conclusion: 提出的轻量级控制框架通过优化倾斜角选择，在星形相互依赖倾斜六旋翼无人机的物理交互任务中实现了高效、平滑且可行的控制性能。

Abstract: From a maneuverability perspective, the main advantage of tilting multirotor UAVs lies in the dynamic variability of the feasible executable wrench, which represents a key asset for physical interaction tasks. Accordingly, cant-angle selection should be optimized to ensure high performance while avoiding abrupt variations and preserving real-world feasibility. In this context, this work proposes a lightweight control framework for star-shaped interdependent cant-tilting hexarotor UAVs performing interaction tasks. The method uses an offline-computed look-up table of zero-moment force polytopes to identify feasible cant angles for a desired control force and select the optimal one by balancing efficiency and smoothness. The framework is integrated with a geometric full-pose controller and validated through Monte Carlo simulations in MATLAB/Simulink and compared against a baseline strategy. The results show a significant reduction in computation time, together with improved pose-tracking performance and competitive actuation efficiency. A final physics-based simulation of a complete wall inspection task in Simscape further confirms the feasibility of the proposed strategy in interacting scenarios.

</details>


### [571] [Automating Manual Tasks through Intuitive Robot Programming and Cognitive Robotics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05978)
*Bijan Kavousian,Petar Tesic,Oliver Petrovic,Christian Brecher*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于自然语言和手势的机器人编程框架，利用LLM和CV技术将人类自然交互转化为机器人程序，通过系统反馈确保安全性和用户接受度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统机器人编程需要专业技术知识，限制了普通用户的使用。受人类自然交互启发，旨在开发直观的终端用户编程方法，降低机器人编程门槛

Method: 结合大型语言模型（LLMs）和计算机视觉（CV），将自然语言指令和辅助手势翻译成机器人程序。系统通过澄清问题和视觉表示提供反馈，允许用户审查和调整生成的程序

Result: 开发了一个能够理解自然交互并生成可调整机器人程序的系统。通过反馈机制确保程序的安全性和透明度，提高用户接受度

Conclusion: 提出的框架成功实现了直观的终端用户机器人编程，将人类自然交互转化为可执行的机器人指令，通过交互式反馈机制保证了系统的安全性和用户友好性

Abstract: This paper presents a novel concept for intuitive end-user programming of robots, inspired by natural interaction between humans. Natural language and supportive gestures are translated into robot programs using large language models (LLMs) and computer vision (CV). Through equally natural system feedback in the form of clarification questions and visual representations, the generated program can be reviewed and adjusted, thereby ensuring safety, transparency, and user acceptance.

</details>


### [572] [You're Pushing My Buttons: Instrumented Learning of Gentle Button Presses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05954)
*Raman Talwar,Remko Proesmans,Thomas Lips,Andreas Verleysen,Francis wyffels*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 使用指尖麦克风采集音频作为接触事件检测，通过仪器化按钮状态信号作为特权监督微调音频编码器，结合模仿学习策略，在推理时仅使用视觉和音频，实现接触丰富操作策略学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从摄像头和本体感知学习接触丰富的操作很困难，因为接触事件只能部分观测。研究训练时仪器化（物体传感器化）是否能提高策略性能而不产生部署时依赖。

Method: 以按钮按压为测试平台，使用指尖麦克风捕捉接触相关音频。使用仪器化的按钮状态信号作为特权监督，微调音频编码器成为接触事件检测器。将得到的表示与模仿学习结合，采用三种策略，使策略在推理时仅使用视觉和音频。

Result: 按钮按压成功率在不同方法间相似，但仪器化引导的音频表示始终减少接触力。这些结果支持仪器化作为学习接触丰富操作策略的实用训练时辅助目标。

Conclusion: 训练时仪器化可以作为有效的辅助目标，通过音频表示改进接触事件检测，减少操作中的接触力，而不需要在部署时依赖额外传感器。

Abstract: Learning contact-rich manipulation is difficult from cameras and proprioception alone because contact events are only partially observed. We test whether training-time instrumentation, i.e., object sensorisation, can improve policy performance without creating deployment-time dependencies. Specifically, we study button pressing as a testbed and use a microphone fingertip to capture contact-relevant audio. We use an instrumented button-state signal as privileged supervision to fine-tune an audio encoder into a contact event detector. We combine the resulting representation with imitation learning using three strategies, such that the policy only uses vision and audio during inference. Button press success rates are similar across methods, but instrumentation-guided audio representations consistently reduce contact force. These results support instrumentation as a practical training-time auxiliary objective for learning contact-rich manipulation policies.

</details>


### [573] [Dialogue based Interactive Explanations for Safety Decisions in Human Robot Collaboration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05896)
*Yifan Xu,Xiao Zhan,Akilu Yunusa Kaltungo,Ming Shan Ng,Tsukasa Ishizawa,Kota Fujimoto,Clara Cheung*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于对话的框架，用于解释人机协作中的安全决策，将解释与基于约束的安全评估紧密结合，支持因果、对比和反事实查询。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着机器人在共享安全关键环境中运行，仅安全行动已不足够，还需向人类协作伙伴解释安全决策的合理性。当前人机协作中，停止或切换模式等行为常由内部安全约束触发，这些约束对附近工作人员不透明。

Method: 提出基于对话的交互式安全决策解释框架，将解释与基于约束的安全评估紧密结合，使对话基于与行为选择相同的状态和约束表示。解释直接从记录的决策轨迹中推导，支持因果、对比和反事实查询。反事实推理在固定认证安全参数下有界评估，确保交互探索不放松操作保证。

Result: 在建筑机器人场景中实例化该框架，提供结构化操作轨迹，展示约束感知对话如何澄清安全干预并支持协调任务恢复。

Conclusion: 通过将解释视为安全控制的操作接口，这项工作为人机协作中交互式、安全感知的自主性提供了设计视角。

Abstract: As robots increasingly operate in shared, safety critical environments, acting safely is no longer sufficient robots must also make their safety decisions intelligible to human collaborators. In human robot collaboration (HRC), behaviours such as stopping or switching modes are often triggered by internal safety constraints that remain opaque to nearby workers. We present a dialogue based framework for interactive explanation of safety decisions in HRC. The approach tightly couples explanation with constraint based safety evaluation, grounding dialogue in the same state and constraint representations that govern behaviour selection. Explanations are derived directly from the recorded decision trace, enabling users to pose causal ("Why?"), contrastive ("Why not?"), and counterfactual ("What if?") queries about safety interventions. Counterfactual reasoning is evaluated in a bounded manner under fixed, certified safety parameters, ensuring that interactive exploration does not relax operational guarantees. We instantiate the framework in a construction robotics scenario and provide a structured operational trace illustrating how constraint aware dialogue clarifies safety interventions and supports coordinated task recovery. By treating explanation as an operational interface to safety control, this work advances a design perspective for interactive, safety aware autonomy in HRC.

</details>


### [574] [BiCoord: A Bimanual Manipulation Benchmark towards Long-Horizon Spatial-Temporal Coordination](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05831)
*Xingyu Peng,Chen Gao,Liankai Jin,Annan Li,Si Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: BiCoord是一个用于长时域紧密协调双手机器人操作的基准测试，包含需要连续臂间依赖和动态角色交换的多样化任务，并提出了从时间、空间和时空角度评估协调性的量化指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有双手机器人操作基准测试（如RoboTwin和RLBench2）主要关注短时域和松散协调的任务，无法捕捉真实世界双手机器人行为中固有的时空耦合特性，因此需要建立能够评估长时域紧密协调操作的基准测试。

Method: 提出BiCoord基准测试，包含多样化的长时域紧密协调任务，这些任务需要连续的双臂间依赖和动态角色交换。同时设计了一套量化指标，从时间、空间和时空三个维度系统评估双手机器人协调性。

Result: 实验结果表明，代表性操作策略（如DP、RDT、Pi0和OpenVLA-OFT）在长时域高度耦合任务上表现不佳，揭示了实现长时域紧密协调任务的基本挑战。

Conclusion: BiCoord为研究长时域协作操作提供了基础，能够激发未来对协调感知机器人学习的研究，所有数据集、代码和补充材料均已公开。

Abstract: Bimanual manipulation, i.e., the coordinated use of two robotic arms to complete tasks, is essential for achieving human-level dexterity in robotics. Recent simulation benchmarks, e.g., RoboTwin and RLBench2, have advanced data-driven learning for bimanual manipulation. However, existing tasks are short-horizon and only loosely coordinated, failing to capture the spatial-temporal coupling inherent in real-world bimanual behaviors. To address this gap, we introduce BiCoord, a benchmark for long-horizon and tightly coordinated bimanual manipulation. Specifically, BiCoord comprises diverse tasks that require continuous inter-arm dependency and dynamic role exchange across multiple sub-goals. Also, we propose a suite of quantitative metrics that evaluate coordination from temporal, spatial, and spatial-temporal perspectives, enabling systematic measurement of bimanual cooperation. Experimental results show that representative manipulation policies, e.g., DP, RDT, Pi0, and OpenVLA-OFT, struggle with long-duration and highly coupled tasks, revealing fundamental challenges in achieving long-horizon and tight coordination tasks. We hope BiCoord can serve as a foundation for studying long-horizon cooperative manipulation and inspire future research on coordination-aware robotic learning. All datasets, codes and supplements could be found at https://buaa-colalab.github.io/BiCoord/.

</details>


### [575] [Precise Aggressive Aerial Maneuvers with Sensorimotor Policies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05828)
*Tianyue Wu,Guangtong Xu,Zihan Wang,Junxiao Lin,Tianyang Chen,Yuze Wu,Zhichao Han,Zhiyang Liu,Fei Gao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 使用强化学习训练传感器-运动策略，实现四旋翼无人机在SE(3)约束下穿越狭窄缝隙的精确激进机动


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 轻量级机载传感器实现精确激进机动是充分发挥无人机机动性的关键瓶颈，特别是通过狭窄缝隙扩展系统可达区域的能力。最具代表性的问题是在SE(3)约束下四旋翼穿越狭窄缝隙，需要利用瞬时倾斜姿态和机架不对称性

Method: 开发传感器-运动策略，将机载视觉和本体感觉直接映射到低级控制命令。使用强化学习在仿真中进行端到端策略蒸馏，通过基于模型规划器生成的轨迹初始化策略缓解模型无关RL在受限解空间中的探索困难。采用精心设计的仿真到真实迁移方法

Result: 方法使四旋翼能够在5厘米间隙下以高达90度倾斜角穿越矩形缝隙，无需知道缝隙位置或方向。未经动态缝隙训练的策略能够反应性地穿越移动缝隙。在密集布置狭窄缝隙的挑战性轨道上验证了方法有效性，并展示了策略对几何多样缝隙的适应性

Conclusion: 提出的策略学习方法实现了四旋翼无人机在SE(3)约束下穿越狭窄缝隙的高精度激进机动，具有高重复性和灵活性，无需依赖手动定义的穿越姿态和视觉特征

Abstract: Precise aggressive maneuvers with lightweight onboard sensors remains a key bottleneck in fully exploiting the maneuverability of drones. Such maneuvers are critical for expanding the systems' accessible area by navigating through narrow openings in the environment. Among the most relevant problems, a representative one is aggressive traversal through narrow gaps with quadrotors under SE(3) constraints, which require the quadrotors to leverage a momentary tilted attitude and the asymmetry of the airframe to navigate through gaps. In this paper, we achieve such maneuvers by developing sensorimotor policies directly mapping onboard vision and proprioception into low-level control commands. The policies are trained using reinforcement learning (RL) with end-to-end policy distillation in simulation. We mitigate the fundamental hardness of model-free RL's exploration on the restricted solution space with an initialization strategy leveraging trajectories generated by a model-based planner. Careful sim-to-real design allows the policy to control a quadrotor through narrow gaps with low clearances and high repeatability. For instance, the proposed method enables a quadrotor to navigate a rectangular gap at a 5 cm clearance, tilted at up to 90-degree orientation, without knowledge of the gap's position or orientation. Without training on dynamic gaps, the policy can reactively servo the quadrotor to traverse through a moving gap. The proposed method is also validated by training and deploying policies on challenging tracks of narrow gaps placed closely. The flexibility of the policy learning method is demonstrated by developing policies for geometrically diverse gaps, without relying on manually defined traversal poses and visual features.

</details>


### [576] [Hazard Management in Robot-Assisted Mammography Support](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05749)
*Ioannis Stefanakos,Roisin Bradley,Radu Calinescu,Beverley Townsend,Tianyuan Wang,Jihong Zhu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种用于MammoBot辅助机器人系统的危险管理方法，结合SHARD和STPA分析技术，识别临床环境中人机交互的安全风险。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人和具身AI系统在临床环境中具有改善护理质量和可及性的潜力，但与脆弱患者的近距离物理接触引入了重大安全风险。需要确保从早期开发阶段就考虑安全性。

Method: 采用利益相关者引导的过程建模，结合软件危险分析与设计解决方案(SHARD)和系统理论过程分析(STPA)。与临床医生、机器人专家和患者代表协作定义机器人辅助工作流程，SHARD识别技术和程序偏差，STPA分析用户交互引起的不安全控制行为。

Result: 分析显示许多危险并非源于组件故障，而是来自时间不匹配、过早行动和系统状态误解。这些危险被转化为细化和额外的安全要求，约束系统行为并减少对正确人类时机或解释的依赖。

Conclusion: 该工作展示了一种结构化且可追溯的安全驱动设计方法，对临床环境中的辅助机器人系统具有潜在适用性。

Abstract: Robotic and embodied-AI systems have the potential to improve accessibility and quality of care in clinical settings, but their deployment in close physical contact with vulnerable patients introduces significant safety risks. This paper presents a hazard management methodology for MammoBot, an assistive robotic system designed to support patients during X-ray mammography. To ensure safety from early development stages, we combine stakeholder-guided process modelling with Software Hazard Analysis and Resolution in Design (SHARD) and System-Theoretic Process Analysis (STPA). The robot-assisted workflow is defined collaboratively with clinicians, roboticists, and patient representatives to capture key human-robot interactions. SHARD is applied to identify technical and procedural deviations, while STPA is used to analyse unsafe control actions arising from user interaction. The results show that many hazards arise not from component failures, but from timing mismatches, premature actions, and misinterpretation of system state. These hazards are translated into refined and additional safety requirements that constrain system behaviour and reduce reliance on correct human timing or interpretation alone. The work demonstrates a structured and traceable approach to safety-driven design with potential applicability to assistive robotic systems in clinical environments.

</details>


### [577] [GraspSense: Physically Grounded Grasp and Grip Planning for a Dexterous Robotic Hand via Language-Guided Perception and Force Maps](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05697)
*Elizaveta Semenyakina,Ivan Snegirev,Mariya Lezina,Miguel Altamirano Cabrera,Safina Gulyamova,Dzmitry Tsetserukou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于局部容许接触载荷地图的抓取选择与力调节管道，将灵巧操作从纯几何问题重构为物理基础的抓取选择与执行联合规划问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有抓取规划器通常将物体表面视为结构均匀的，但接触薄弱区域即使几何上完美也可能损坏物体。需要物理基础的接触策略来考虑物体空间非均匀的机械特性

Method: 1) 使用SAM3D重建物体3D几何；2) 物理信息几何分析计算力地图，编码每个表面位置在不发生变形时的最大横向接触力；3) 基于几何有效性和任务目标一致性筛选抓取候选；4) 使用力地图感知准则对可比候选重新排序；5) 阻抗控制器根据接触点局部容许力缩放每个手指刚度

Result: 在纸杯、塑料杯和玻璃杯上的验证表明，该方法能一致选择结构更强的接触区域，并将抓握力保持在安全范围内

Conclusion: 该工作将灵巧操作从纯几何问题重构为物理基础的抓取选择与抓握执行联合规划问题，为未来人形系统提供安全可靠的抓取策略

Abstract: Dexterous robotic manipulation requires more than geometrically valid grasps: it demands physically grounded contact strategies that account for the spatially non-uniform mechanical properties of the object. However, existing grasp planners typically treat the surface as structurally homogeneous, even though contact in a weak region can damage the object despite a geometrically perfect grasp. We present a pipeline for grasp selection and force regulation in a five-fingered robotic hand, based on a map of locally admissible contact loads. From an operator command, the system identifies the target object, reconstructs its 3D geometry using SAM3D, and imports the model into Isaac Sim. A physics-informed geometric analysis then computes a force map that encodes the maximum lateral contact force admissible at each surface location without deformation. Grasp candidates are filtered by geometric validity and task-goal consistency. When multiple candidates are comparable under classical metrics, they are re-ranked using a force-map-aware criterion that favors grasps with contacts in mechanically admissible regions. An impedance controller scales the stiffness of each finger according to the locally admissible force at the contact point, enabling safe and reliable grasp execution. Validation on paper, plastic, and glass cups shows that the proposed approach consistently selects structurally stronger contact regions and keeps grip forces within safe bounds. In this way, the work reframes dexterous manipulation from a purely geometric problem into a physically grounded joint planning problem of grasp selection and grip execution for future humanoid systems.

</details>


### [578] [Dynamic Control Allocation for Dual-Tilt UAV Platforms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05677)
*Marcello Sorge,Federico Ciresola,Giulia Michieletto,Angelo Cenedese*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文研究六旋翼无人机的动态控制分配，采用双倾斜旋翼设计，提出分层控制结构，考虑执行器饱和影响，并通过数值仿真验证


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究六旋翼无人机在轨迹跟踪任务中的动态控制分配问题，特别关注双倾斜旋翼平台（每个旋翼可沿两个正交轴独立倾斜）的控制性能优化，旨在解决执行器饱和对控制性能的影响

Method: 提出分层控制结构：高层控制器生成跟踪任务所需的力矩，控制分配法则确保执行器产生相应力矩。分配器对执行器集施加一阶期望动力学，利用系统冗余通过目标函数优化执行器状态。明确建模执行器饱和，并研究旋翼倾斜角的作用，通过在目标函数中施加非对称形状

Result: 通过数值仿真验证了分配策略的有效性，提供了执行器饱和对控制性能影响的理论分析，展示了旋翼倾斜角在优化控制性能中的作用

Conclusion: 该研究为双倾斜六旋翼无人机提供了一种有效的动态控制分配方法，能够处理执行器饱和问题，并通过优化旋翼倾斜角提升控制性能，为复杂无人机控制系统的设计提供了理论依据

Abstract: This paper focuses on dynamic control allocation for a hexarotor UAV platform, considering a trajectory tracking task as as case study. It is assumed that the platform is dual-tilting, meaning that it is able to tilt each propeller independently during flight, along two orthogonal axis. We present a hierarchical control structure composed of a high-level controller generating the required wrench for the tracking task, and a control allocation law ensuring that the actuators produce such wrench. The allocator imposes desired first-order dynamics on the actuators set, and exploits system redundancy to optimize the actuators state with respect to a given objective function. Unlike other studies on the subject, we explicitly model actuator saturation and provide theoretical insights on its effect on control performances. We also investigate the role of propeller tilt angles, by imposing asymmetric shapes in the objective function. Numerical simulations are presented to validate the allocation strategy.

</details>


### [579] [Rectified Schrödinger Bridge Matching for Few-Step Visual Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05673)
*Wuyang Luan,Junhui Li,Weiguang Zhao,Wenjian Zhang,Tieru Wu,Rui Ma*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: RSBM框架通过共享速度场结构和熵正则化参数ε控制，在3步积分内实现高效视觉导航，平衡多模态覆盖与路径平直度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于扩散模型和薛定谔桥的生成策略需要数十个积分步骤，高方差随机传输阻碍了实时机器人控制，需要更高效的导航策略

Method: 提出Rectified Schrödinger Bridge Matching (RSBM)，利用标准薛定谔桥(ε=1)和确定性最优传输(ε→0)之间的共享速度场结构，通过熵正则化参数ε控制平衡，基于学习条件先验缩短传输距离

Result: 标准桥需要≥10步收敛，RSBM仅用3个积分步骤就达到94%余弦相似度和92%成功率，无需蒸馏或多阶段训练

Conclusion: RSBM通过速度场结构不变性和降低条件速度方差，显著缩小了高保真生成策略与低延迟需求之间的差距，为具身AI提供高效导航方案

Abstract: Visual navigation is a core challenge in Embodied AI, requiring autonomous agents to translate high-dimensional sensory observations into continuous, long-horizon action trajectories. While generative policies based on diffusion models and Schrödinger Bridges (SB) effectively capture multimodal action distributions, they require dozens of integration steps due to high-variance stochastic transport, posing a critical barrier for real-time robotic control. We propose Rectified Schrödinger Bridge Matching (RSBM), a framework that exploits a shared velocity-field structure between standard Schrödinger Bridges ($\varepsilon=1$, maximum-entropy transport) and deterministic Optimal Transport ($\varepsilon\to 0$, as in Conditional Flow Matching), controlled by a single entropic regularization parameter $\varepsilon$. We prove two key results: (1) the conditional velocity field's functional form is invariant across the entire $\varepsilon$-spectrum (Velocity Structure Invariance), enabling a single network to serve all regularization strengths; and (2) reducing $\varepsilon$ linearly decreases the conditional velocity variance, enabling more stable coarse-step ODE integration. Anchored to a learned conditional prior that shortens transport distance, RSBM operates at an intermediate $\varepsilon$ that balances multimodal coverage and path straightness. Empirically, while standard bridges require $\geq 10$ steps to converge, RSBM achieves over 94% cosine similarity and 92% success rate in merely 3 integration steps -- without distillation or multi-stage training -- substantially narrowing the gap between high-fidelity generative policies and the low-latency demands of Embodied AI.

</details>


### [580] [Leaderless Collective Motion in Affine Formation Control over the Complex Plane](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05648)
*Jesus Bautista,Enric Morella,Lili Wang,Hector Garcia de Marina*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种通过修改拉普拉斯矩阵权重实现仿射编队集体机动的方法，能够产生参考构型的时变仿射变换，支持平移、旋转、缩放和剪切等多种集体运动模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统领导者-跟随者策略限制了机器人集群的集体运动能力，需要一种无领导者方案使智能体能够保持不同且可能时变的速度，实现更广泛的集体运动模式。

Method: 通过修改用于实现静态编队的原始拉普拉斯矩阵权重，设计新的拉普拉斯矩阵特征向量和特征值来定义集体运动；使用复数表示二维仿射编队中的所有相关信息，简化分析和设计。

Result: 理论分析提供了控制集体运动的解析解，能够实现参考形状的所有线性组合（平移、旋转、缩放和剪切）；通过最多20个智能体的仿真验证了理论结果。

Conclusion: 提出的无领导者仿射编队方法能够实现更灵活的集体机动，通过修改拉普拉斯矩阵权重和复数表示，为二维仿射编队提供了可分析的设计框架。

Abstract: We propose a method for the collective maneuvering of affine formations in the plane by modifying the original weights of the Laplacian matrix used to achieve static formations of robot swarms. Specifically, the resulting collective motion is characterized as a time-varying affine transformation of a reference configuration, or shape. Unlike the traditional leader-follower strategy, our leaderless scheme allows agents to maintain distinct and possibly time-varying velocities, enabling a broader range of collective motions, including all the linear combinations of translations, rotations, scaling and shearing of a reference shape. Our analysis provides the analytic solution governing the resulting collective motion, explicitly designing the eigenvectors and eigenvalues that define this motion as a function of the modified weights in the new Laplacian matrix. To facilitate a more tractable analysis and design of affine formations in 2D, we propose the use of complex numbers to represent all relevant information. Simulations with up to 20 agents validate the theoretical results.

</details>


### [581] [Grounding Hierarchical Vision-Language-Action Models Through Explicit Language-Action Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05614)
*Theodor Wulff,Federico Tavella,Rahul Singh Maharjan,Manith Adikari,Angelo Cangelosi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种新颖的训练框架，通过对比模型显式地对齐分层视觉-语言-动作模型中的子任务描述与视觉观察和动作空间，使用离线偏好学习优化多模态对齐，在LanguageTable数据集上实现与全监督微调相当的性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实现机器人透明度对于有效的人机协作至关重要，需要机器人的自然语言通信与其动作保持一致，并明确基于任务和环境进行基础。现有的分层视觉-语言-动作模型虽然能生成语言和低级动作，但在训练过程中未考虑这些模态之间的显式对齐，存在关键空白

Method: 提出新颖的训练框架，显式地将分层VLA子任务描述基于视觉观察和动作空间进行基础。使用对比模型评估生成语言与相应动作轨迹之间的对齐程度，通过离线偏好学习直接对不同语言-轨迹配对进行排序，从而优化分层VLA的基础对齐

Result: 在LanguageTable数据集（人类语言标注轨迹的基准数据集）上应用该框架，获得了与完全监督微调相当的性能，同时最小化了昂贵数据标注的需求，为多模态基础表示提供了重要见解

Conclusion: 该框架填补了现有分层VLA模型在多模态对齐方面的关键空白，通过显式的基础对齐和离线偏好学习，实现了高效的机器人透明度，为人机协作中的自然语言通信与动作一致性提供了有效的解决方案

Abstract: Achieving robot transparency is a critical step toward effective human-robot collaboration. To be transparent, a robot's natural language communication must be consistent with its actions and explicitly grounded in the task and environment. Existing hierarchical Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models can generate language (e.g., through chain-of-thought) and low-level actions. However, current work does not consider explicit alignment between these modalities during training. To address this crucial gap, we propose a novel training framework that explicitly grounds hierarchical VLA sub-task descriptions with respect to the visual observation and action space. Our framework uses a contrastive model to assess the alignment between generated language and corresponding action trajectories. This contrastive model enables direct ranking of different language-trajectory pairs based on their alignment, allowing us to refine the grounding of our hierarchical VLA through offline preference learning. We apply our framework to the LanguageTable dataset, a benchmark dataset of human language-annotated trajectories, and provide critical insights into multimodal grounding representations, all while establishing a strong baseline that achieves performance comparable to fully supervised fine-tuning and minimizing the need for costly data annotations.

</details>


### [582] [Control Architecture and experimental validation of a Novel Surgical Robotic Instrument](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05610)
*Doina Pisla,Ionut Zima,Calin Vaida,Andrei Cailean,Marius Miclaus,Adrian Pisla,Andrei Caprariu,Vasile Bulbucan,Bogdan Gherman,Damien Chablat*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 开发用于微创手术的4自由度柔性腹腔镜器械控制架构，集成远端弯曲、独立头部旋转、轴旋转和夹持器功能，保持10mm直径与标准套管兼容


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 微创手术虽能减少患者创伤和恢复时间，但传统腹腔镜器械运动范围有限，需要开发更灵活的器械来改善手术操作

Method: 设计4自由度柔性腹腔镜器械控制架构，包括远端弯曲、独立头部旋转、轴旋转和夹持器；采用Raspberry Pi 5和Motoron控制器实现驱动单元和SpaceMouse遥操作；推导剪刀连杆机构的解析模型并进行参数化

Result: 预测的钳口开度与CAD测量值（MAE 0.13°）和OptiTrack运动捕捉（MAE 1.43°）相符；与ATHENA并联机器人集成在模拟胰腺手术中得到验证

Conclusion: 成功开发了4自由度柔性腹腔镜器械控制架构，通过实验验证了其准确性和与机器人系统的集成能力，为改善微创手术器械灵活性提供了有效解决方案

Abstract: Minimally invasive surgery (MIS) reduces patient trauma and shortens recovery time; however, conventional laparoscopic instruments remain constrained by limited range of movements. This work presents the control architecture of a 4-DOF flexible laparoscopic instrument integrating distal bending, independent distal head rotation, shaft rotation, and a gripper, while maintaining a 10 mm diameter compatible with standard trocars. The actuation unit and SpaceMouse teleoperation are implemented on Raspberry Pi 5 with Motoron controllers. An analytical scissor-linkage model is derived and parameterized. The predicted jaw opening corresponds to CAD measurements (MAE 0.13{\textdegree}) and OptiTrack motion capture (MAE 1.43{\textdegree}). Integration with the ATHENA parallel robot is validated through a simulated pancreatic surgery procedure.

</details>


### [583] [Referring-Aware Visuomotor Policy Learning for Closed-Loop Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05544)
*Jiahua Ma,Yiran Qin,Xin Wen,Yixiong Li,Yuyu Sun,Yulan Guo,Liang Lin,Ruimao Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: ReV是一个用于机器人操作的视觉运动策略学习框架，通过耦合扩散头和轨迹转向策略，能够在不重新训练的情况下适应意外情况，仅需稀疏的参考点即可实时重新规划轨迹。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决机器人操作中视觉运动策略学习的一个基本问题：如何增强在分布外执行错误或动态重新规划轨迹时的鲁棒性，同时模型仅依赖于原始专家演示进行训练。

Method: 提出Referring-Aware Visuomotor Policy (ReV)闭环框架，包含全局扩散头和局部扩散头。全局扩散头生成全局一致但时间稀疏的动作锚点序列，并确定参考点的精确时间位置；局部扩散头基于当前时间位置自适应插值相邻锚点。通过轨迹转向策略集成稀疏参考点，仅通过对专家演示应用针对性扰动进行训练。

Result: 无需额外数据或微调方案，ReV在具有挑战性的模拟和现实世界任务中实现了更高的成功率。

Conclusion: ReV框架能够通过稀疏参考点实时适应意外情况，仅使用原始专家演示进行训练，显著提高了机器人操作策略的鲁棒性和适应性。

Abstract: This paper addresses a fundamental problem of visuomotor policy learning for robotic manipulation: how to enhance robustness in out-of-distribution execution errors or dynamically re-routing trajectories, where the model relies solely on the original expert demonstrations for training. We introduce the Referring-Aware Visuomotor Policy (ReV), a closed-loop framework that can adapt to unforeseen circumstances by instantly incorporating sparse referring points provided by a human or a high-level reasoning planner. Specifically, ReV leverages the coupled diffusion heads to preserve standard task execution patterns while seamlessly integrating sparse referring via a trajectory-steering strategy. Upon receiving a specific referring point, the global diffusion head firstly generates a sequence of globally consistent yet temporally sparse action anchors, while identifies the precise temporal position for the referring point within this sequence. Subsequently, the local diffusion head adaptively interpolates adjacent anchors based on the current temporal position for specific tasks. This closed-loop process repeats at every execution step, enabling real-time trajectory replanning in response to dynamic changes in the scene. In practice, rather than relying on elaborate annotations, ReV is trained only by applying targeted perturbations to expert demonstrations. Without any additional data or fine-tuning scheme, ReV achieve higher success rates across challenging simulated and real-world tasks.

</details>


### [584] [Simulation-Driven Evolutionary Motion Parameterization for Contact-Rich Granular Scooping with a Soft Conical Robotic Hand](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05531)
*Yongliang Wang,Cristian C. Beltran-Hernandez,Tomoya Takahashi,Masashi Hamaya*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 开发基于物理的软锥形机械手仿真模型，结合进化策略优化舀取轨迹，实现无需复杂传感的自适应舀取


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软体机器人末端执行器在舀取任务中能自适应容器形状，但因其柔顺性和复杂变形行为带来的控制复杂性限制了实际应用，需要解决这一挑战

Method: 提出基于物理的软锥形机械手仿真模型，准确模拟从平板到自适应锥形结构的变形行为，结合进化策略框架自动优化舀取轨迹，无需手动参数调整

Result: 通过仿真和真实机器人实验验证优化轨迹，结果展示出强泛化能力，成功解决了现有方法难以应对的一系列挑战性任务

Conclusion: 基于物理的仿真模型结合进化策略优化能有效解决软体机器人舀取任务的控制复杂性，实现自适应舀取并拓展应用范围

Abstract: Tool-based scooping is vital in robot-assisted tasks, enabling interaction with objects of varying sizes, shapes, and material states. Recent studies have shown that flexible, reconfigurable soft robotic end-effectors can adapt their shape to maintain consistent contact with container surfaces during scooping, improving efficiency compared to rigid tools. These soft tools can adjust to varying container sizes and materials without requiring complex sensing or control. However, the inherent compliance and complex deformation behavior of soft robotics introduce significant control complexity that limits practical applications. To address this challenge, this paper presents the development of a physics-based simulation model of a deformable soft conical robotic hand that captures its passive reconfiguration dynamics and enables systematic trajectory optimization for scooping tasks. We propose a novel physics-based simulation approach that accurately models the soft tool's morphing behavior from flat sheets to adaptive conical structures, combined with an evolutionary strategy framework that automatically optimizes scooping trajectories without manual parameter tuning. We validate the optimized trajectories through both simulation and real-robot experiments. The results demonstrate strong generalization and successfully address a range of challenging tasks previously beyond the reach of existing approaches. Videos of our experiments are available online: https://sites.google.com/view/scoopsh

</details>


### [585] [MARS-Dragonfly: Agile and Robust Flight Control of Modular Aerial Robot Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05499)
*Rui Huang,Zhiqian Cai,Siyu Tang,Pengxuan Wei,Lidong Li,Xin Chen,Wenhan Cao,Zhenyu Zhang,Lin Zhao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种模块化空中机器人系统(MARS)的新型控制框架，通过虚拟四旋翼抽象和两阶段预测分配管道，解决了现有方法在规模化时产生的姿态误差累积和振荡问题，实现了敏捷飞行和稳定对接/分离。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MARS控制算法依赖简化的准静态模型和基于规则的分配，会产生不连续和无界的电机指令，随着无人机单元数量增加导致姿态误差累积，在对接、分离和航点跟踪时产生严重振荡。

Method: 1) 设计紧凑机械系统实现被动对接、无检测被动锁定和磁辅助分离；2) 引入力-扭矩等效和多面体约束的虚拟四旋翼模型，显式建模可行力矩集；3) 优化最大化控制权限的偏航角；4) 设计两阶段预测分配管道：约束预测跟踪器计算虚拟输入，动态分配器映射到各模块产生平滑电机指令。

Result: 在超过10种配置的仿真和真实实验中展示了稳定对接、锁定和分离，以及有效的控制性能。首次在真实世界中实现MARS的敏捷飞行和运输，峰值俯仰角达40度，平均位置误差0.0896米。

Conclusion: 提出的虚拟四旋翼抽象和两阶段预测分配管道解决了MARS规模化控制问题，实现了稳定对接/分离和敏捷飞行，为模块化空中机器人系统提供了有效的控制框架。

Abstract: Modular Aerial Robot Systems (MARS) comprise multiple drone units with reconfigurable connected formations, providing high adaptability to diverse mission scenarios, fault conditions, and payload capacities. However, existing control algorithms for MARS rely on simplified quasi-static models and rule-based allocation, which generate discontinuous and unbounded motor commands. This leads to attitude error accumulation as the number of drone units scales, ultimately causing severe oscillations during docking, separation, and waypoint tracking. To address these limitations, we first design a compact mechanical system that enables passive docking, detection-free passive locking, and magnetic-assisted separation using a single micro servo. Second, we introduce a force-torque-equivalent and polytope-constraint virtual quadrotor that explicitly models feasible wrench sets. Together, these abstractions capture the full MARS dynamics and enable existing quadrotor controllers to be applied across different configurations. We further optimize the yaw angle that maximizes control authority to enhance agility. Third, building on this abstraction, we design a two-stage predictive-allocation pipeline: a constrained predictive tracker computes virtual inputs while respecting force/torque bounds, and a dynamic allocator maps these inputs to individual modules with balanced objectives to produce smooth, trackable motor commands. Simulations across over 10 configurations and real-world experiments demonstrate stable docking, locking, and separation, as well as effective control performance. To our knowledge, this is the first real-world demonstration of MARS achieving agile flight and transport with 40 deg peak pitch while maintaining an average position error of 0.0896 m. The video is available at: https://youtu.be/yqjccrIpz5o

</details>


### [586] [JailWAM: Jailbreaking World Action Models in Robot Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05498)
*Hanqing Liu,Songping Wang,Jiahuan Long,Jiacheng Hou,Jialiang Sun,Chao Li,Yang Yang,Wei Peng,Xu Liu,Tingsong Jiang,Wen Yao,Yao Mu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出首个针对世界动作模型（WAM）的越狱攻击框架JailWAM，通过视觉轨迹映射、风险判别器和双路径验证策略，在仿真环境中实现84.2%攻击成功率，并构建安全评估基准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 世界动作模型（WAM）具有强大的物理交互能力，但现有研究极少关注其安全漏洞，特别是对越狱攻击的脆弱性。这种安全缺口可能直接威胁人身安全、财产安全和环境安全，需要系统性的安全评估框架。

Method: 提出JailWAM框架，包含三个核心组件：1）视觉轨迹映射，将异构动作空间统一为视觉轨迹表示；2）风险判别器，作为高召回率筛选工具识别破坏性行为；3）双路径验证策略，先通过单图像视频动作生成进行粗筛，再通过全闭环物理仿真进行全面验证。同时构建JailWAM-Bench评估基准。

Result: 在RoboTwin仿真环境中，JailWAM框架高效暴露物理漏洞，在最新LingBot-VA模型上达到84.2%的攻击成功率。基于该框架可构建鲁棒的防御机制，为设计安全可靠的机器人控制系统提供技术方案。

Conclusion: JailWAM是首个专门针对WAM的越狱攻击和评估框架，通过系统性的安全分类和评估方法，填补了WAM安全研究的重要空白，为物理交互AI系统的安全对齐提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: The World Action Model (WAM) can jointly predict future world states and actions, exhibiting stronger physical manipulation capabilities compared with traditional models. Such powerful physical interaction ability is a double-edged sword: if safety is ignored, it will directly threaten personal safety, property security and environmental safety. However, existing research pays extremely limited attention to the critical security gap: the vulnerability of WAM to jailbreak attacks. To fill this gap, we define the Three-Level Safety Classification Framework to systematically quantify the safety of robotic arm motions. Furthermore, we propose JailWAM, the first dedicated jailbreak attack and evaluation framework for WAM, which consists of three core components: (1) Visual-Trajectory Mapping, which unifies heterogeneous action spaces into visual trajectory representations and enables cross-architectural unified evaluation; (2) Risk Discriminator, which serves as a high-recall screening tool that optimizes the efficiency-accuracy trade-off when identifying destructive behaviors in visual trajectories; (3) Dual-Path Verification Strategy, which first conducts rapid coarse screening via a single-image-based video-action generation module, and then performs efficient and comprehensive verification through full closed-loop physical simulation. In addition, we construct JailWAM-Bench, a benchmark for comprehensively evaluating the safety alignment performance of WAM under jailbreak attacks. Experiments in RoboTwin simulation environment demonstrate that the proposed framework efficiently exposes physical vulnerabilities, achieving an 84.2% attack success rate on the state-of-the-art LingBot-VA. Meanwhile, robust defense mechanisms can be constructed based on JailWAM, providing an effective technical solution for designing safe and reliable robot control systems.

</details>


### [587] [Synergizing Efficiency and Reliability for Continuous Mobile Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05430)
*Chengkai Wu,Ruilin Wang,Yixin Zeng,Jiayuan Wang,Mingjie Zhang,Guiyong Zheng,Qun Niu,Juepeng Zheng,Jun Ma,Boyu Zhou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一个统一框架，通过可靠性感知轨迹规划和相位依赖切换控制器，实现移动机器人在不确定环境中的高效可靠连续操作


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类能够无缝融合预期规划和即时反馈，在连续移动操作任务中实现高效可靠。但机器人复制这种行为面临根本挑战：长时域规划与实时反应性之间的冲突，以及过度追求效率会损害可靠性（影响稳定感知、补偿潜力，增加意外接触风险）

Method: 1) 可靠性感知轨迹规划器：将可靠执行的关键要素嵌入时空优化，生成高效且可靠性有保障的全局轨迹；2) 相位依赖切换控制器：在全局轨迹跟踪（追求效率）和任务误差补偿（保证可靠性）之间无缝切换；3) 分层初始化策略：促进复杂长时域规划问题的在线重规划

Result: 真实世界评估表明，该方法能在不确定性（动态扰动、感知和控制误差）下高效可靠完成连续任务。相比最先进基线，在保持最高效率的同时，任务成功率提升26.67%--81.67%。框架可泛化到具有不同末端执行器约束的任务

Conclusion: 提出的统一框架成功协同了效率和可靠性，实现了连续移动操作。通过将可靠性要素嵌入规划、设计自适应切换控制、采用分层初始化，解决了长时域规划与实时反应性的冲突。该方法在不确定环境中表现出优越性能，为机器人连续操作提供了有效解决方案

Abstract: Humans seamlessly fuse anticipatory planning with immediate feedback to perform successive mobile manipulation tasks without stopping, achieving both high efficiency and reliability. Replicating this fluid and reliable behavior in robots remains fundamentally challenging, not only due to conflicts between long-horizon planning and real-time reactivity, but also because excessively pursuing efficiency undermines reliability in uncertain environments: it impairs stable perception and the potential for compensation, while also increasing the risk of unintended contact. In this work, we present a unified framework that synergizes efficiency and reliability for continuous mobile manipulation. It features a reliability-aware trajectory planner that embeds essential elements for reliable execution into spatiotemporal optimization, generating efficient and reliability-promising global trajectories. It is coupled with a phase-dependent switching controller that seamlessly transitions between global trajectory tracking for efficiency and task-error compensation for reliability. We also investigate a hierarchical initialization that facilitates online replanning despite the complexity of long-horizon planning problems. Real-world evaluations demonstrate that our approach enables efficient and reliable completion of successive tasks under uncertainty (e.g., dynamic disturbances, perception and control errors). Moreover, the framework generalizes to tasks with diverse end-effector constraints. Compared with state-of-the-art baselines, our method consistently achieves the highest efficiency while improving the task success rate by 26.67\%--81.67\%. Comprehensive ablation studies further validate the contribution of each component. The source code will be released.

</details>


### [588] [AnyImageNav: Any-View Geometry for Precise Last-Meter Image-Goal Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05351)
*Yijie Deng,Shuaihang Yuan,Yi Fang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: AnyImageNav是一个无需训练的系统，将图像目标导航从粗粒度定位提升到精确6-DoF姿态恢复，通过语义-几何级联方法实现目标图像与观测的密集像素级对应，显著提高了导航成功率和姿态精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统图像目标导航仅评估1米范围内的粗粒度成功标准，这对于需要精确姿态的下游任务（如抓取）不足。需要开发能够恢复目标图像精确6-DoF相机姿态的系统。

Method: 提出语义-几何级联方法：1）语义相关性信号指导探索并作为接近门控；2）当当前视图与目标图像高度相关时，调用3D多视图基础模型；3）模型通过自认证循环进行精确姿态恢复，将目标图像视为几何查询进行密集像素级对应注册。

Result: 在Gibson数据集上达到93.1%的导航成功率，HM3D上达到82.6%；姿态恢复精度显著提升：Gibson上位置误差0.27m、朝向误差3.41度，HM3D上0.21m/1.23度，比基线方法提升5-10倍。

Conclusion: AnyImageNav成功将图像目标导航扩展到精确姿态恢复领域，通过训练免费的语义-几何级联方法实现了状态最先进的性能，为需要精确定位的下游任务提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Image Goal Navigation (ImageNav) is evaluated by a coarse success criterion, the agent must stop within 1m of the target, which is sufficient for finding objects but falls short for downstream tasks such as grasping that require precise positioning. We introduce AnyImageNav, a training-free system that pushes ImageNav toward this more demanding setting. Our key insight is that the goal image can be treated as a geometric query: any photo of an object, a hallway, or a room corner can be registered to the agent's observations via dense pixel-level correspondences, enabling recovery of the exact 6-DoF camera pose. Our method realizes this through a semantic-to-geometric cascade: a semantic relevance signal guides exploration and acts as a proximity gate, invoking a 3D multi-view foundation model only when the current view is highly relevant to the goal image; the model then self-certifies its registration in a loop for an accurate recovered pose. Our method sets state-of-the-art navigation success rates on Gibson (93.1%) and HM3D (82.6%), and achieves pose recovery that prior methods do not provide: a position error of 0.27m and heading error of 3.41 degrees on Gibson, and 0.21m / 1.23 degrees on HM3D, a 5-10x improvement over adapted baselines.

</details>


### [589] [ExpressMM: Expressive Mobile Manipulation Behaviors in Human-Robot Interactions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05320)
*Souren Pashangpour,Haitong Wang,Matthew Lisondra,Goldie Nejat*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: ExpressMM框架结合高层语言引导规划器和低层视觉-语言-动作策略，为移动机械臂生成可中断的协作任务中表达性行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有表达性机器人行为方法多采用预编程或模仿学习，未充分考虑协作任务中用户可能中断、修改或重定向机器人动作的人机交互场景。

Method: 开发ExpressMM框架：高层基于视觉语言模型进行感知和对话推理的语言引导规划器，结合低层视觉-语言-动作策略生成表达性行为；支持可中断交互以适应用户更新的指令。

Result: 在移动机械臂协助人类完成协作装配场景中演示ExpressMM；观众评估问卷显示，表达性行为帮助观察者清晰理解机器人动作意图，支持社交适当且可理解的交互；参与者认为机器人对协作任务有用，行为可预测且安全。

Conclusion: ExpressMM框架成功实现了协作任务中可中断的表达性机器人行为，提升了人机交互的清晰度、可预测性和安全性，为人类中心环境中移动机械臂的社交智能交互提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Mobile manipulators are increasingly deployed in human-centered environments to perform tasks. While completing such tasks, they should also be able to communicate their intent to the people around them using expressive robot behaviors. Prior work on expressive robot behaviors has used preprogrammed or learning-from-demonstration- based expressive motions and large language model generated high-level interactions. The majority of these existing approaches have not considered human-robot interactions (HRI) where users may interrupt, modify, or redirect a robot's actions during task execution. In this paper, we develop the novel ExpressMM framework that integrates a high-level language-guided planner based on a vision-language model for perception and conversational reasoning with a low-level vision-language-action policy to generate expressive robot behaviors during collaborative HRI tasks. Furthermore, ExpressMM supports interruptible interactions to accommodate updated or redirecting instructions by users. We demonstrate ExpressMM on a mobile manipulator assisting a human in a collaborative assembly scenario and conduct audience-based evaluation of live HRI demonstrations. Questionnaire results show that the ExpressMM-enabled expressive behaviors helped observers clearly interpret the robot's actions and intentions while supporting socially appropriate and understandable interactions. Participants also reported that the robot was useful for collaborative tasks and behaved in a predictable and safe manner during the demonstrations, fostering positive perceptions of the robot's usefulness, safety, and predictability during the collaborative tasks.

</details>


### [590] [Instantaneous Planning, Control and Safety for Navigation in Unknown Underwater Spaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05310)
*Veejay Karthik,Udit Ekansh,Tejal Bedmutha,Shivam Vishwakarma,Rohan Deshpande,Leena Vachhani*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种集成规划与控制框架，利用实时传感器数据动态生成AUV闭环轨迹，在未知水下环境中实现鲁棒避障和增强机动性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 水下自主航行器在未知环境中面临能见度差、信号传输弱、水流动态变化等挑战，导致全局定位不准确、通信不可靠、避障困难。传感器噪声引入不确定性，使规划与控制复杂化

Method: 基于预设计反馈控制器的运动规划方法，利用实时传感器数据动态诱导闭环AUV轨迹，减少在线优化计算复杂度，增强复杂水下空间的操作安全性

Result: 通过ROS Gazebo仿真在RexRov AUV上验证了方法的有效性。与基于PID的跟踪方法相比表现更优，并量化了AUV进入目标通信范围时的航位推算定位误差

Conclusion: 提出的集成规划与控制框架能够有效应对水下环境挑战，实现鲁棒避障和增强机动性，为AUV在未知复杂水下环境中的自主导航提供了可行解决方案

Abstract: Navigating autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs) in unknown environments is significantly challenging due to poor visibility, weak signal transmission, and dynamic water currents. These factors pose challenges in accurate global localization, reliable communication, and obstacle avoidance. Local sensing provides critical real time environmental data to enable online decision making. However, the inherent noise in underwater sensor measurements introduces uncertainty, complicating planning and control. To address these challenges, we propose an integrated planning and control framework that leverages real time sensor data to dynamically induce closed loop AUV trajectories, ensuring robust obstacle avoidance and enhanced maneuverability in tight spaces.
  By planning motion based on pre designed feedback controllers, the approach reduces the computational complexity needed for carrying out online optimizations and enhances operational safety in complex underwater spaces. The proposed method is validated through ROS Gazebo simulations on the RexRov AUV, demonstrating its efficacy. Its performance is evaluated by comparison against PID based tracking methods, and quantifying localization errors in dead reckoning as the AUV transitions into the target communication range.

</details>


### [591] [Semantic analysis of behavior in a DNA-functionalized molecular swarm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05277)
*Tom Bachard,Gong Yiming,Ibuki Kawamata,Akira Kakugo,Nathanael Aubert-Kato*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 将语义嵌入应用于分子群体行为学习，通过DNA功能化增强微管-驱动蛋白系统的控制，提取语义原子匹配预期行为，提升模拟实验可解释性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为分子群体系统提供更丰富的特征集以优化系统性能，增强模拟实验的可解释性，使其更可靠地用于体外系统设计和优化

Method: 将语义嵌入应用于标准分子群体系统（微管-驱动蛋白），通过DNA功能化增加额外控制，扩展微管模型包含这种相互作用，从模拟结果中提取语义原子

Result: 提取的语义原子与预期行为匹配，模拟中每帧的分解准确描述了外部控制值的预期影响，为模拟实验可解释性提供相关线索

Conclusion: 语义嵌入方法能有效学习分子群体行为范围，增强系统控制能力，提高模拟实验的可解释性和可靠性，有助于体外系统设计和优化

Abstract: In this paper, we propose applying semantic embedding to learn the range of behaviors exhibited by molecular swarms, thereby providing a richer set of features to optimize such systems. Specifically, we consider a standard molecular swarm where the individuals are cytoskeletal filaments (called microtubules) propelled by surface-adhered kinesin motors, with the addition of DNA functionalization for further control. We extend a microtubule model with that additional interaction and show that the extracted semantic atoms from simulation results match the expected behaviors. Moreover, the decomposition of each frame in the simulations accurately describes the expected impact of the external control values. Those results provide relevant leads towards the explainability of simulated experiments, making them more reliable for designing and optimizing in-vitro systems.

</details>


### [592] [ZipFold: Modular Actuators for Scaleable Adaptive Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05260)
*Niklas Hagemann,Daniela Rus*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种基于3D打印塑料条折叠和拉链式结构的可展开驱动器，实现可逆的尺寸和刚度变换，应用于自适应行走机器人。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有形状变换系统通常采用特定机制，难以扩展、重新配置或跨应用移植，需要一种紧凑、易制造的可展开驱动器来实现可逆的尺寸和刚度变换。

Method: 通过柔性3D打印塑料条的复合折叠和拉链式结构形成方形截面可展开梁，实现紧凑（柔性）和展开（准刚性）状态之间的平滑连续转换。

Result: 表征了驱动器的机械性能，并演示了由四个模块组成的自适应行走机器人集成系统，展示了模块组合实现多样形状和刚度变换的能力。

Conclusion: 该可展开驱动器提供了一种紧凑、易制造的解决方案，能够实现可逆的尺寸和刚度变换，为自适应机器人系统提供了新的设计思路。

Abstract: There is a growing need for robots that can change their shape, size and mechanical properties to adapt to evolving tasks and environments. However, current shape-changing systems generally utilize bespoke, system-specific mechanisms that can be difficult to scale, reconfigure or translate from one application to another. This paper introduces a compact, easy-to-fabricate deployable actuator that achieves reversible scale and stiffness transformations through compound folding and zipping of flexible 3D-printed plastic strips into square-section deployable beams. The simple actuation method allows for smooth, continuous transitions between compact (flexible) and expanded (quasi-rigid) states, facilitating diverse shape and stiffness transformations when modules are combined into larger assemblies. The actuator's mechanical performance is characterized and an integrated system involving a four-module adaptive walking robot is demonstrated.

</details>


### [593] [RoboPlayground: Democratizing Robotic Evaluation through Structured Physical Domains](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05226)
*Yi Ru Wang,Carter Ung,Evan Gubarev,Christopher Tan,Siddhartha Srinivasa,Dieter Fox*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: RoboPlayground：一个语言驱动的机器人操作评估框架，允许用户通过自然语言定义可执行的任务规范，解决了传统固定基准测试的局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统机器人操作系统评估主要依赖少数专家定义的固定基准测试，任务实例、约束和成功标准预定义且难以扩展。这种范式限制了评估的参与范围，并掩盖了策略对用户定义的任务意图、约束和成功概念变化的响应能力。

Method: 提出RoboPlayground框架，允许用户在结构化物理域中使用自然语言编写可执行的操作任务。自然语言指令被编译为可复现的任务规范，包含明确的资产定义、初始化分布和成功谓词。每个指令定义了一个结构化任务家族，支持受控的语义和行为变化，同时保持可执行性和可比性。

Result: 1. 用户研究表明，语言驱动界面比基于编程和代码辅助的基线更易用且认知负荷更低；2. 在语言定义的任务家族上评估学习策略揭示了固定基准测试中不明显的泛化失败；3. 任务多样性随贡献者多样性而非任务数量扩展，支持通过众包贡献持续增长评估空间。

Conclusion: RoboPlayground通过语言驱动的任务规范框架，使机器人操作评估更加民主化、可扩展和语义丰富，能够揭示传统基准测试中隐藏的泛化问题，并支持通过多样化用户贡献持续扩展评估空间。

Abstract: Evaluation of robotic manipulation systems has largely relied on fixed benchmarks authored by a small number of experts, where task instances, constraints, and success criteria are predefined and difficult to extend. This paradigm limits who can shape evaluation and obscures how policies respond to user-authored variations in task intent, constraints, and notions of success. We argue that evaluating modern manipulation policies requires reframing evaluation as a language-driven process over structured physical domains. We present RoboPlayground, a framework that enables users to author executable manipulation tasks using natural language within a structured physical domain. Natural language instructions are compiled into reproducible task specifications with explicit asset definitions, initialization distributions, and success predicates. Each instruction defines a structured family of related tasks, enabling controlled semantic and behavioral variation while preserving executability and comparability. We instantiate RoboPlayground in a structured block manipulation domain and evaluate it along three axes. A user study shows that the language-driven interface is easier to use and imposes lower cognitive workload than programming-based and code-assist baselines. Evaluating learned policies on language-defined task families reveals generalization failures that are not apparent under fixed benchmark evaluations. Finally, we show that task diversity scales with contributor diversity rather than task count alone, enabling evaluation spaces to grow continuously through crowd-authored contributions. Project Page: https://roboplayground.github.io

</details>


### [594] [Bilinear Model Predictive Control Framework of the OncoReach, a Tendon-Driven Steerable Stylet for Brachytherapy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05111)
*Pejman Kheradmand,Behnam Moradkhani,Mir Masoud Ale Ali,Keith Sowards,Scott R. Silva,Yash Chitalia*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于肌腱驱动可转向导丝的仿射线性模型预测控制框架，该导丝与标准近距离放射治疗针集成，通过仿真和物理实验验证了固定目标定位和移动目标轨迹跟踪的可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有可转向针的建模和控制方法主要针对定制针设计开发，不适用于与商用临床针兼容的导丝。需要开发适用于标准近距离放射治疗针的肌腱驱动可转向导丝的控制框架，以实现避开敏感解剖结构的弯曲轨迹。

Method: 提出仿射线性模型预测控制框架，建立具有三个虚拟输入（插入速度和两个弯曲率）的几何仿射线性模型，并将其映射到物理可实现的输入（插入速度和相应的肌腱张力）。通过图像尖端跟踪在组织模拟体模材料中进行仿真和物理插入实验验证。

Result: 开环模型验证的估计误差低于2mm（插入针长的3%），闭环固定目标跟踪误差低至1.45mm（插入长度的1.7%）。但在某些弯曲方向实验中显示出较大位置误差，达到8.3mm（插入长度的7.8%）。

Conclusion: 结果证明了临床兼容可转向近距离放射治疗系统固定目标定位和移动目标轨迹跟踪的可行性，同时强调了未来在校准和传感方面需要改进的领域。

Abstract: Steerable needles have the potential to improve interstitial brachytherapy by enabling curved trajectories that avoid sensitive anatomical structures. However, existing modeling and control approaches are primarily developed for custom needle designs and are not directly applicable to stylets compatible with commercially available clinical needles. This paper presents a bilinear model predictive control (MPC) framework for a tendon-driven steerable stylet integrated with a standard brachytherapy needle. \textcolor{black}{A geometric bilinear model is formulated with three virtual inputs (an insertion speed and two bending rates) which are mapped to physically realizable inputs consisting of the insertion speed and the associated tendon tensions.} The approach is validated through simulations and physical insertion experiments in tissue-mimicking phantom material using image-based tip tracking. While open-loop model validation yielded estimation errors below $2$~mm, corresponding to $3\%$ of the inserted needle length, and closed-loop fixed-target tracking achieved an error as low as $1.45$~mm, corresponding to $1.7\%$ of the inserted length, experiments showed larger position errors in certain bending directions, reaching $8.3$~mm, or $7.8\%$ of the inserted length. Overall, the results demonstrate the feasibility of fixed-target positioning and moving-target trajectory tracking for clinically compatible steerable brachytherapy systems, while highlighting necessary areas for future improvements in calibration and sensing.

</details>


### [595] [GaussFly: Contrastive Reinforcement Learning for Visuomotor Policies in 3D Gaussian Fields](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05062)
*Yuhang Zhang,Mingsheng Li,Yujing Shang,Zhuoyuan Yu,Chao Yan,Jiaping Xiao,Mir Feroskhan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: GaussFly：一种通过3D高斯溅射重建和对比表征学习实现鲁棒视觉运动策略学习的框架，有效解决无人机视觉控制中的样本效率和仿真到现实迁移问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于单目视觉的端到端学习方法存在样本效率低、仿真到现实差距大的问题，主要原因是高维RGB观测直接映射到动作命令，以及仿真与物理域之间的视觉差异

Method: 采用"真实-仿真-真实"范式，将表征学习与策略优化解耦：1) 使用3D高斯溅射(3DGS)结合显式几何约束重建训练场景实现高保真实到仿真转换；2) 利用这些逼真仿真环境进行对比表征学习，从渲染的RGB图像中提取紧凑、抗噪声的潜在特征；3) 使用预训练编码器提供低维特征输入，降低视觉运动策略的计算负担并增强其抗视觉噪声能力

Result: 在仿真和真实环境中的广泛实验表明，GaussFly相比基线方法具有更优的样本效率和渐近性能，能够实现鲁棒的零样本策略迁移到未见过的真实世界环境，有效弥合仿真到现实差距

Conclusion: GaussFly框架通过解耦表征学习和策略优化，结合3D高斯溅射重建和对比表征学习，成功解决了自主飞行器视觉运动策略学习中的样本效率低和仿真到现实差距大的长期挑战

Abstract: Learning visuomotor policies for Autonomous Aerial Vehicles (AAVs) relying solely on monocular vision is an attractive yet highly challenging paradigm. Existing end-to-end learning approaches directly map high-dimensional RGB observations to action commands, which frequently suffer from low sample efficiency and severe sim-to-real gaps due to the visual discrepancy between simulation and physical domains. To address these long-standing challenges, we propose GaussFly, a novel framework that explicitly decouples representation learning from policy optimization through a cohesive real-to-sim-to-real paradigm. First, to achieve a high-fidelity real-to-sim transition, we reconstruct training scenes using 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) augmented with explicit geometric constraints. Second, to ensure robust sim-to-real transfer, we leverage these photorealistic simulated environments and employ contrastive representation learning to extract compact, noise-resilient latent features from the rendered RGB images. By utilizing this pre-trained encoder to provide low-dimensional feature inputs, the computational burden on the visuomotor policy is significantly reduced while its resistance against visual noise is inherently enhanced. Extensive experiments in simulated and real-world environments demonstrate that GaussFly achieves superior sample efficiency and asymptotic performance compared to baselines. Crucially, it enables robust and zero-shot policy transfer to unseen real-world environments with complex textures, effectively bridging the sim-to-real gap.

</details>


### [596] [StarVLA: A Lego-like Codebase for Vision-Language-Action Model Developing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05014)
*StarVLA Community*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: StarVLA是一个开源的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）研究代码库，提供模块化架构、可复用训练策略和统一评估接口，旨在解决当前VLA方法在架构、代码库和评估协议上的碎片化问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前VLA方法在架构、代码库和评估协议上存在碎片化问题，阻碍了方法的系统性比较和可复现性。需要统一的框架来整合感知、语言理解和动作能力，支持多模态基础模型（包括视觉语言模型和世界模型）的研究。

Method: StarVLA采用模块化的骨干-动作头架构，支持VLM骨干（如Qwen-VL）和世界模型骨干（如Cosmos）以及多种动作解码范式。提供可复用的训练策略（跨具身学习和多模态协同训练）和统一的评估接口，整合多个主要基准测试。

Result: StarVLA提供了完全可复现的单基准训练方案，在多个基准测试（LIBERO、SimplerEnv、RoboTwin~2.0、RoboCasa-GR1、BEHAVIOR-1K）上匹配或超越了现有方法，支持仿真和真实机器人部署。

Conclusion: StarVLA是目前最全面的开源VLA框架之一，能够降低现有方法复现和新方法原型开发的障碍。该框架正在积极维护和扩展，有望推动VLA研究的标准化和可复现性。

Abstract: Building generalist embodied agents requires integrating perception, language understanding, and action, which are core capabilities addressed by Vision-Language-Action (VLA) approaches based on multimodal foundation models, including recent advances in vision-language models and world models. Despite rapid progress, VLA methods remain fragmented across incompatible architectures, codebases, and evaluation protocols, hindering principled comparison and reproducibility. We present StarVLA, an open-source codebase for VLA research. StarVLA addresses these challenges in three aspects. First, it provides a modular backbone--action-head architecture that supports both VLM backbones (e.g., Qwen-VL) and world-model backbones (e.g., Cosmos) alongside representative action-decoding paradigms, all under a shared abstraction in which backbone and action head can each be swapped independently. Second, it provides reusable training strategies, including cross-embodiment learning and multimodal co-training, that apply consistently across supported paradigms. Third, it integrates major benchmarks, including LIBERO, SimplerEnv, RoboTwin~2.0, RoboCasa-GR1, and BEHAVIOR-1K, through a unified evaluation interface that supports both simulation and real-robot deployment. StarVLA also ships simple, fully reproducible single-benchmark training recipes that, despite minimal data engineering, already match or surpass prior methods on multiple benchmarks with both VLM and world-model backbones. To our best knowledge, StarVLA is one of the most comprehensive open-source VLA frameworks available, and we expect it to lower the barrier for reproducing existing methods and prototyping new ones. StarVLA is being actively maintained and expanded; we will update this report as the project evolves. The code and documentation are available at https://github.com/starVLA/starVLA.

</details>


### [597] [Outlier-Robust Nonlinear Moving Horizon Estimation using Adaptive Loss Functions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04862)
*Nestor Deniz,Guido Sanchez,Fernando Auat Cheein,Leonardo Giovanini*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于MHE的自适应鲁棒损失函数框架，通过自适应鲁棒损失函数减少异常值影响，并加入正则化项避免朴素解，优先拟合未受污染数据并降低污染数据权重。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统MHE方法对异常值敏感，需要开发能够自适应调整鲁棒性的方法，在存在异常值时保持鲁棒性，在无异常值时保持传统L2损失的优势。

Method: 提出自适应鲁棒损失函数框架，包含自适应鲁棒损失函数和正则化项；损失函数形状通过调优参数控制，以调整对异常值的鲁棒性；优先拟合未受污染数据，降低污染数据权重。

Result: 仿真结果表明，该方法在仅几次迭代中就能实现自适应，当测量值无异常值时，传统L2行为占主导地位。

Conclusion: 所提出的自适应鲁棒损失函数框架有效平衡了鲁棒性和效率，在存在异常值时提供鲁棒估计，在无异常值时保持传统方法的性能。

Abstract: In this work, we propose an adaptive robust loss function framework for MHE, integrating an adaptive robust loss function to reduce the impact of outliers with a regularization term that avoids naive solutions. The proposed approach prioritizes the fitting of uncontaminated data and downweights the contaminated ones. A tuning parameter is incorporated into the framework to control the shape of the loss function for adjusting the estimator's robustness to outliers. The simulation results demonstrate that adaptation occurs in just a few iterations, whereas the traditional behaviour $\mathrm{L_2}$ predominates when the measurements are free of outliers.

</details>
