*Mingao Tan,Yiyang Li,Shanze Wang,Xinming Zhang,Wei Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: FSUNav提出了一种大脑-小脑架构，用于快速、安全、通用的零样本目标导航，通过整合视觉语言模型与强化学习局部规划器，支持异构机器人平台和开放词汇语义泛化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前视觉语言导航方法存在异构机器人兼容性差、实时性能不足、导航安全性低等问题，且难以支持开放词汇语义泛化和多模态任务输入，需要一种更通用、安全、高效的解决方案。

Method: 提出大脑-小脑架构：1) 小脑模块采用基于深度强化学习的高频端到端通用局部规划器，支持异构机器人平台；2) 大脑模块构建三层推理模型，利用视觉语言模型实现端到端检测与验证机制，支持零样本开放词汇目标导航和多模态输入。

Result: 在MP3D、HM3D和OVON基准测试中，FSUNav在物体导航、实例图像导航和任务导航方面达到最先进性能，显著优于现有方法。真实世界异构机器人平台部署验证了其鲁棒性和实用性。

Conclusion: FSUNav通过创新的大脑-小脑架构成功解决了视觉语言导航中的异构兼容性、实时性、安全性和开放词汇泛化等关键挑战，为通用机器人导航提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Current vision-language navigation methods face substantial bottlenecks regarding heterogeneous robot compatibility, real-time performance, and navigation safety. Furthermore, they struggle to support open-vocabulary semantic generalization and multimodal task inputs. To address these challenges, this paper proposes FSUNav: a Cerebrum-Cerebellum architecture for fast, safe, and universal zero-shot goal-oriented navigation, which innovatively integrates vision-language models (VLMs) with the proposed architecture. The cerebellum module, a high-frequency end-to-end module, develops a universal local planner based on deep reinforcement learning, enabling unified navigation across heterogeneous platforms (e.g., humanoid, quadruped, wheeled robots) to improve navigation efficiency while significantly reducing collision risk. The cerebrum module constructs a three-layer reasoning model and leverages VLMs to build an end-to-end detection and verification mechanism, enabling zero-shot open-vocabulary goal navigation without predefined IDs and improving task success rates in both simulation and real-world environments. Additionally, the framework supports multimodal inputs (e.g., text, target descriptions, and images), further enhancing generalization, real-time performance, safety, and robustness. Experimental results on MP3D, HM3D, and OVON benchmarks demonstrate that FSUNav achieves state-of-the-art performance on object, instance image, and task navigation, significantly outperforming existing methods. Real-world deployments on diverse robotic platforms further validate its robustness and practical applicability.

</details>


### [637] [An Open-Source LiDAR and Monocular Off-Road Autonomous Navigation Stack](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03096)
*Rémi Marsal,Quentin Picard,Adrien Poiré,Sébastien Kerbourc'h,Thibault Toralba,Clément Yver,Alexandre Chapoutot,David Filliat*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一个开源越野导航系统，支持LiDAR和单目3D感知，无需特定任务训练。单目方案结合零样本深度预测与稀疏SLAM测量进行度量深度重标定，通过边缘掩码和时间平滑增强鲁棒性，性能接近高分辨率LiDAR。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 越野自主导航需要可靠的3D感知，但LiDAR成本高、功耗大。基于基础模型的单目深度估计提供了轻量级替代方案，但其在户外导航栈中的集成尚未充分探索。

Method: 1) 结合零样本深度预测(Depth Anything V2)与使用稀疏SLAM测量(VINS-Mono)的度量深度重标定；2) 引入边缘掩码减少障碍物幻觉，时间平滑缓解SLAM不稳定性；3) 生成机器人中心2.5D高程图用于基于代价图的规划。

Result: 在照片级真实感仿真(Isaac Sim)和真实世界非结构化环境中评估，单目配置在大多数场景中匹配高分辨率LiDAR性能，证明基于基础模型的单目深度估计是越野导航的可行LiDAR替代方案。

Conclusion: 通过开源导航栈和仿真环境，提供了完整的越野导航流水线和可复现基准。基于基础模型的单目深度估计是LiDAR的可行替代方案，为低成本、低功耗越野导航提供了解决方案。

Abstract: Off-road autonomous navigation demands reliable 3D perception for robust obstacle detection in challenging unstructured terrain. While LiDAR is accurate, it is costly and power-intensive. Monocular depth estimation using foundation models offers a lightweight alternative, but its integration into outdoor navigation stacks remains underexplored. We present an open-source off-road navigation stack supporting both LiDAR and monocular 3D perception without task-specific training. For the monocular setup, we combine zero-shot depth prediction (Depth Anything V2) with metric depth rescaling using sparse SLAM measurements (VINS-Mono). Two key enhancements improve robustness: edge-masking to reduce obstacle hallucination and temporal smoothing to mitigate the impact of SLAM instability. The resulting point cloud is used to generate a robot-centric 2.5D elevation map for costmap-based planning. Evaluated in photorealistic simulations (Isaac Sim) and real-world unstructured environments, the monocular configuration matches high-resolution LiDAR performance in most scenarios, demonstrating that foundation-model-based monocular depth estimation is a viable LiDAR alternative for robust off-road navigation. By open-sourcing the navigation stack and the simulation environment, we provide a complete pipeline for off-road navigation as well as a reproducible benchmark. Code available at https://github.com/LARIAD/Offroad-Nav.

</details>


### [638] [Flash-Mono: Feed-Forward Accelerated Gaussian Splatting Monocular SLAM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03092)
*Zicheng Zhang,Ke Wu,Xiangting Meng,Keyu Liu,Jieru Zhao,Wenchao Ding*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Flash-Mono提出了一种前馈式单目3D高斯溅射SLAM系统，通过多帧上下文直接预测高斯属性，避免了逐帧优化，实现了10倍加速，同时通过2D高斯面元和隐藏状态回环模块提升了几何精度和多视角一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有单目3D高斯溅射SLAM存在时间效率低、几何精度差和多视角不一致的问题，主要源于"从头训练"的优化耗时以及单帧几何先验缺乏帧间尺度一致性。作者认为需要一种利用多帧上下文直接预测高斯属性的前馈范式来解决这些挑战。

Method: 系统包含三个核心模块：1) 前馈预测前端：训练循环前馈模型，通过交叉注意力将多帧视觉特征聚合到隐藏状态，联合预测相机位姿和逐像素高斯属性；2) 2D高斯溅射映射后端：用2D高斯面元替代传统3D高斯椭球体提升几何保真度；3) 基于隐藏状态的高效回环模块：利用隐藏状态作为紧凑子图描述符，实现高效回环检测和全局Sim(3)优化以消除漂移。

Result: Flash-Mono在跟踪和建图质量上达到最先进性能，相比基于优化的GS-SLAM实现了10倍加速，同时保证了高质量渲染。系统在几何精度、时间效率和多视角一致性方面均有显著提升。

Conclusion: Flash-Mono通过前馈预测范式成功解决了传统单目3D高斯溅射SLAM的关键限制，展示了在具身感知和实时重建应用中的潜力。系统的高效性、几何准确性和一致性使其成为该领域的重要进展。

Abstract: Monocular 3D Gaussian Splatting SLAM suffers from critical limitations in time efficiency, geometric accuracy, and multi-view consistency. These issues stem from the time-consuming $\textit{Train-from-Scratch}$ optimization and the lack of inter-frame scale consistency from single-frame geometry priors. We contend that a feed-forward paradigm, leveraging multi-frame context to predict Gaussian attributes directly, is crucial for addressing these challenges. We present Flash-Mono, a system composed of three core modules: a feed-forward prediction frontend, a 2D Gaussian Splatting mapping backend, and an efficient hidden-state-based loop closure module. We trained a recurrent feed-forward frontend model that progressively aggregates multi-frame visual features into a hidden state via cross attention and jointly predicts camera poses and per-pixel Gaussian properties. By directly predicting Gaussian attributes, our method bypasses the burdensome per-frame optimization required in optimization-based GS-SLAM, achieving a $\textbf{10x}$ speedup while ensuring high-quality rendering. The power of our recurrent architecture extends beyond efficient prediction. The hidden states act as compact submap descriptors, facilitating efficient loop closure and global $\mathrm{Sim}(3)$ optimization to mitigate the long-standing challenge of drift. For enhanced geometric fidelity, we replace conventional 3D Gaussian ellipsoids with 2D Gaussian surfels. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Flash-Mono achieves state-of-the-art performance in both tracking and mapping quality, highlighting its potential for embodied perception and real-time reconstruction applications. Project page: https://victkk.github.io/flash-mono.

</details>


### [639] [Joint Prediction of Human Motions and Actions in Human-Robot Collaboration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03065)
*Alessandra Bulanti,Alessandro Carfì,Fulvio Mastrogiovanni*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: MA-HERP：用于人机协作的层次递归概率框架，联合估计和预测人类连续运动和离散动作


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 流畅的人机协作需要机器人持续估计人类行为并预测未来意图。这需要联合推理连续运动和离散动作，而这两者目前大多被孤立建模。

Method: 提出MA-HERP层次递归概率框架，包含：(i) 层次表示：通过Allen区间关系将运动组合为动作；(ii) 统一概率因子分解：耦合连续动态、离散标签和持续时间；(iii) 递归推理方案：受贝叶斯滤波启发，交替进行自上而下的动作预测和自下而上的感官证据整合。

Result: 基于肌肉骨骼模拟的神经模型初步实验评估显示：准确的运动预测、噪声下的鲁棒动作推断，以及兼容在线人机协作的计算性能。

Conclusion: MA-HERP为联合估计和预测人类运动和动作提供了有效的概率框架，有望支持流畅的人机协作。

Abstract: Fluent human--robot collaboration requires robots to continuously estimate human behaviour and anticipate future intentions. This entails reasoning jointly about \emph{continuous movements} and \emph{discrete actions}, which are still largely modelled in isolation. In this paper, we introduce \textsf{MA-HERP}, a hierarchical and recursive probabilistic framework for the \emph{joint estimation and prediction} of human movements and actions. The model combines: (i) a hierarchical representation in which movements compose into actions through admissible Allen interval relations, (ii) a unified probabilistic factorisation coupling continuous dynamics, discrete labels, and durations, and (iii) a recursive inference scheme inspired by Bayesian filtering, alternating top-down action prediction with bottom-up sensory evidence. We present a preliminary experimental evaluation based on neural models trained on musculoskeletal simulations of reaching movements, showing accurate motion prediction, robust action inference under noise, and computational performance compatible with on-line human--robot collaboration.

</details>


### [640] [Enhancing Multi-Robot Exploration Using Probabilistic Frontier Prioritization with Dirichlet Process Gaussian Mixtures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03042)
*John Lewis Devassy,Meysam Basiri,Mário A. T. Figueiredo,Pedro U. Lima*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种基于概率前沿优先级的增强方法，通过DP-GMM和信息增益概率化改进多智能体自主探索算法，在通信受限环境下提升探索性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体自主探索在环境监测、搜救等应用中至关重要，但在通信约束下的有效协调仍面临重大挑战。现有前沿探索算法通过分析已知与未知区域边界来确定最大化探索收益的下一个最佳视点，但需要改进前沿优先级排序的质量。

Method: 提出基于概率的前沿优先级增强方法：1) 使用狄利克雷过程高斯混合模型(DP-GMM)进行概率建模；2) 采用信息增益的概率化表述；3) 将该增强集成到两种最先进的多智能体探索算法中。

Result: 在多种环境复杂度、通信约束和团队规模下，该方法持续提升性能：两种算法的平均增益分别为10%和14%。通过双无人机系统的真实世界实验成功验证了仿真结果。

Conclusion: 提出的概率前沿优先级增强方法有效改进了多智能体探索算法的性能，特别是在通信受限环境中。该方法通过更精确的前沿评估和优先级排序，实现了更高效的协调探索。

Abstract: Multi-agent autonomous exploration is essential for applications such as environmental monitoring, search and rescue, and industrial-scale surveillance. However, effective coordination under communication constraints remains a significant challenge. Frontier exploration algorithms analyze the boundary between the known and unknown regions to determine the next-best view that maximizes exploratory gain. This article proposes an enhancement to existing frontier-based exploration algorithms by introducing a probabilistic approach to frontier prioritization. By leveraging Dirichlet process Gaussian mixture model (DP-GMM) and a probabilistic formulation of information gain, the method improves the quality of frontier prioritization. The proposed enhancement, integrated into two state-of-the-art multi-agent exploration algorithms, consistently improves performance across environments of varying clutter, communication constraints, and team sizes. Simulations showcase an average gain of $10\%$ and $14\%$ for the two algorithms across all combinations. Successful deployment in real-world experiments with a dual-drone system further corroborates these findings.

</details>


### [641] [ARM: Advantage Reward Modeling for Long-Horizon Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03037)
*Yiming Mao,Zixi Yu,Weixin Mao,Yinhao Li,Qirui Hu,Zihan Lan,Minzhao Zhu,Hua Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: ARM框架通过相对优势估计替代难以量化的绝对进度，使用三状态标注策略实现低成本人工标注，结合离线RL实现自适应动作奖励重加权，在长时程毛巾折叠任务中达到99.4%成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长时程机器人操作对强化学习具有挑战性，稀疏奖励难以指导信用分配。传统密集进度奖励成本高昂且不适合非单调行为（如回溯和恢复）。需要更有效的中间监督方法。

Method: 提出优势奖励建模（ARM）框架，从绝对进度转向相对优势估计。引入三状态标注策略（渐进、回归、停滞），降低人工认知负担并确保标注一致性。将ARM集成到离线RL管道中，实现自适应动作奖励重加权，过滤次优样本。

Result: 在具有挑战性的长时程毛巾折叠任务中达到99.4%的成功率，相比当前VLA基线表现出更好的稳定性和数据效率，策略训练期间几乎无需人工干预。

Conclusion: ARM框架通过相对优势估计和三状态标注策略有效解决了长时程操作中的奖励稀疏问题，实现了高成功率和高数据效率，为机器人操作提供了一种实用的强化学习解决方案。

Abstract: Long-horizon robotic manipulation remains challenging for reinforcement learning (RL) because sparse rewards provide limited guidance for credit assignment. Practical policy improvement thus relies on richer intermediate supervision, such as dense progress rewards, which are costly to obtain and ill-suited to non-monotonic behaviors such as backtracking and recovery. To address this, we propose Advantage Reward Modeling (ARM), a framework that shifts from hard-to-quantify absolute progress to estimating relative advantage. We introduce a cost-effective tri-state labeling strategy -- Progressive, Regressive, and Stagnant -- that reduces human cognitive overhead while ensuring high cross-annotator consistency. By training on these intuitive signals, ARM enables automated progress annotation for both complete demonstrations and fragmented DAgger-style data. Integrating ARM into an offline RL pipeline allows for adaptive action-reward reweighting, effectively filtering suboptimal samples. Our approach achieves a 99.4% success rate on a challenging long-horizon towel-folding task, demonstrating improved stability and data efficiency over current VLA baselines with near-zero human intervention during policy training.

</details>


### [642] [Behavior-Constrained Reinforcement Learning with Receding-Horizon Credit Assignment for High-Performance Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03023)
*Siwei Ju,Jan Tauberschmidt,Oleg Arenz,Peter van Vliet,Jan Peters*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出行为约束强化学习框架，在赛车仿真中学习高性能控制策略，既超越专家演示性能又保持行为一致性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统强化学习可能偏离期望的人类行为，而模仿学习受限于演示质量且难以超越专家数据，需要一种既能提升性能又能控制与专家行为偏差的方法

Method: 提出行为约束强化学习框架，引入滚动时域预测机制建模短期未来轨迹并提供前瞻奖励；通过参考轨迹条件化策略，表示专家一致行为的分布而非单一确定性目标

Result: 在高保真赛车仿真中使用专业车手数据评估，学习到的策略在保持与专家驾驶行为紧密对齐的同时获得有竞争力的圈速，在性能和模仿质量上均优于基线方法；在驾驶员在环仿真中的人类评估显示策略能再现与顶级职业车手反馈一致的设置依赖性驾驶特性

Conclusion: 该方法能够学习既最优又行为一致的高性能控制策略，可作为复杂控制系统中人类决策的可靠替代方案

Abstract: Learning high-performance control policies that remain consistent with expert behavior is a fundamental challenge in robotics. Reinforcement learning can discover high-performing strategies but often departs from desirable human behavior, whereas imitation learning is limited by demonstration quality and struggles to improve beyond expert data. We propose a behavior-constrained reinforcement learning framework that improves beyond demonstrations while explicitly controlling deviation from expert behavior. Because expert-consistent behavior in dynamic control is inherently trajectory-level, we introduce a receding-horizon predictive mechanism that models short-term future trajectories and provides look-ahead rewards during training. To account for the natural variability of human behavior under disturbances and changing conditions, we further condition the policy on reference trajectories, allowing it to represent a distribution of expert-consistent behaviors rather than a single deterministic target. Empirically, we evaluate the approach in high-fidelity race car simulation using data from professional drivers, a domain characterized by extreme dynamics and narrow performance margins. The learned policies achieve competitive lap times while maintaining close alignment with expert driving behavior, outperforming baseline methods in both performance and imitation quality. Beyond standard benchmarks, we conduct human-grounded evaluation in a driver-in-the-loop simulator and show that the learned policies reproduce setup-dependent driving characteristics consistent with the feedback of top-class professional race drivers. These results demonstrate that our method enables learning high-performance control policies that are both optimal and behavior-consistent, and can serve as reliable surrogates for human decision-making in complex control systems.

</details>


### [643] [Asymptotically-Bounded 3D Frontier Exploration enhanced with Bayesian Information Gain](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03008)
*John Lewis,Meysam Basiri,Pedro U. Lima*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于OctoMap的边界探索算法，具有可预测的渐近有界性能，通过前向和逆向传感器建模实现O(|F|)复杂度，并集成贝叶斯回归器估计信息增益，相比现有方法提升计算效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模环境中的机器人探索计算需求高，传统方法复杂度随环境规模增长，需要更高效且性能可预测的边界探索算法。

Method: 基于OctoMap的边界探索算法，采用前向和逆向传感器建模实现近似但高效的边界检测和维护，集成贝叶斯回归器估计信息增益以优化视点选择，避免显式计数未知体素。

Result: 仿真显示该方法比现有OctoMap方法计算效率更高，与不依赖OctoMap的基线方法相当；贝叶斯增强框架相比确定性边界基线总探索时间提升达54%，且保证任务完成；真实世界实验验证了计算边界和增强效果。

Conclusion: 提出的算法实现了可预测的渐近有界性能，复杂度与边界数量线性相关，通过贝叶斯增强显著提升探索效率，为大规模环境中的高效机器人探索提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Robotic exploration in large-scale environments is computationally demanding due to the high overhead of processing extensive frontiers. This article presents an OctoMap-based frontier exploration algorithm with predictable, asymptotically bounded performance. Unlike conventional methods whose complexity scales with environment size, our approach maintains a complexity of $\mathcal{O}(|\mathcal{F}|)$, where $|\mathcal{F}|$ is the number of frontiers. This is achieved through strategic forward and inverse sensor modeling, which enables approximate yet efficient frontier detection and maintenance. To further enhance performance, we integrate a Bayesian regressor to estimate information gain, circumventing the need to explicitly count unknown voxels when prioritizing viewpoints. Simulations show the proposed method is more computationally efficient than the existing OctoMap-based methods and achieves computational efficiency comparable to baselines that are independent of OctoMap. Specifically, the Bayesian-enhanced framework achieves up to a $54\%$ improvement in total exploration time compared to standard deterministic frontier-based baselines across varying spatial scales, while guaranteeing task completion. Real-world experiments confirm the computational bounds as well as the effectiveness of the proposed enhancement.

</details>


### [644] [A Flow Matching Framework for Soft-Robot Inverse Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03006)
*Hang Yang,Fangju Yang,Yangming Zhang,Ibrahim Alsarraj,Yuhao Wang,Zhenye Luo,Zixi Chen,Ke Wu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于流匹配的软体连续机器人逆动力学学习框架，将逆动力学重构为条件流匹配问题，采用Rectified Flow生成物理一致的控制输入，相比传统回归方法将轨迹跟踪RMSE降低50%以上。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软体连续机器人的逆动力学学习面临高维非线性和复杂驱动耦合的挑战。传统反馈控制器存在控制抖动问题，确定性回归学习方法难以捕捉复杂的非线性映射以实现精确的动态跟踪。

Method: 提出开环前馈控制的逆动力学框架，将逆动力学重构为条件流匹配问题，采用Rectified Flow作为轻量级实例生成物理一致的控制输入而非条件平均值。引入两个变体增强物理一致性：RF-Physical使用基于物理的先验进行残差建模；RF-FWD在流匹配过程中集成前向动力学一致性损失。

Result: 框架将轨迹跟踪RMSE降低超过50%（相比MLP、LSTM、Transformer等基线）。系统在1.14 m/s的峰值末端执行器速度下保持稳定开环执行，推理延迟低于1毫秒（0.995 ms）。

Conclusion: 流匹配作为学习软体机器人系统微分逆动力学的鲁棒高性能范式，能够生成物理一致的控制输入，显著提升跟踪精度和实时性能。

Abstract: Learning the inverse dynamics of soft continuum robots remains challenging due to high-dimensional nonlinearities and complex actuation coupling. Conventional feedback-based controllers often suffer from control chattering due to corrective oscillations, while deterministic regression-based learners struggle to capture the complex nonlinear mappings required for accurate dynamic tracking. Motivated by these limitations, we propose an inverse-dynamics framework for open-loop feedforward control that learns the system's differential dynamics as a generative transport map. Specifically, inverse dynamics is reformulated as a conditional flow-matching problem, and Rectified Flow (RF) is adopted as a lightweight instance to generate physically consistent control inputs rather than conditional averages. Two variants are introduced to further enhance physical consistency: RF-Physical, utilizing a physics-based prior for residual modeling; and RF-FWD, integrating a forward-dynamics consistency loss during flow matching. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that our framework reduces trajectory tracking RMSE by over 50% compared to standard regression baselines (MLP, LSTM, Transformer). The system sustains stable open-loop execution at a peak end-effector velocity of 1.14 m/s with sub-millisecond inference latency (0.995 ms). This work demonstrates flow matching as a robust, high-performance paradigm for learning differential inverse dynamics in soft robotic systems.

</details>


### [645] [Open-Loop Planning, Closed-Loop Verification: Speculative Verification for VLA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02965)
*Zihua Wang,Zhitao Lin,Ruibo Li,Yu Zhang,Xu Yang,Siya Mi,Xiu-Shen Wei*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SV-VLA框架结合了高效的开环长时程规划和轻量级闭环在线验证，通过低频宏规划生成动作块和规划上下文，轻量级验证器基于最新观测持续监控执行，在动态环境中实现高效可靠的VLA控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型在操作任务中表现出色但推理成本高，采用动作分块预测的方法虽然提高了效率，但开环执行对环境变化敏感且缺乏闭环反馈容易导致误差累积。需要一种既能保持高效性又能提供闭环鲁棒性的解决方案。

Method: 提出SV-VLA框架：1) 使用重型VLA作为低频宏规划器生成动作块和规划上下文；2) 轻量级验证器基于最新观测持续监控执行；3) 验证器结合当前观测和规划上下文，比较规划动作与闭环参考动作，仅在必要时触发重新规划。

Result: 实验表明SV-VLA成功结合了分块预测的效率和闭环控制的鲁棒性，在动态环境中实现了高效可靠的VLA控制，代码已开源。

Conclusion: SV-VLA框架通过将高效的开环长时程规划与轻量级闭环在线验证相结合，解决了VLA控制中效率与鲁棒性的权衡问题，为动态环境中的VLA控制提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models, as large foundation models for embodied control, have shown strong performance in manipulation tasks. However, their performance comes at high inference cost. To improve efficiency, recent methods adopt action chunking, which predicts a sequence of future actions for open-loop execution. Although effective for reducing computation, open-loop execution is sensitive to environmental changes and prone to error accumulation due to the lack of close-loop feedback. To address this limitation, we propose Speculative Verification for VLA Control (SV-VLA), a framework that combines efficient open-loop long-horizon planning with lightweight closed-loop online verification. Specifically, SV-VLA uses a heavy VLA as a low-frequency macro-planner to generate an action chunk together with a planning context, while a lightweight verifier continuously monitors execution based on the latest observations. Conditioned on both the current observation and the planning context, the verifier compares the planned action against a closed-loop reference action and triggers replanning only when necessary. Experiments demonstrate that SV-VLA combines the efficiency of chunked prediction with the robustness of closed-loop control, enabling efficient and reliable VLA-based control in dynamic environments. Code is available: https://github.com/edsad122/SV-VLA.

</details>


### [646] [Learning Task-Invariant Properties via Dreamer: Enabling Efficient Policy Transfer for Quadruped Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02911)
*Junyang Liang,Yuxuan Liu,Yabin Chang,Junfan Lin,Junkai Ji,Hui Li,Changxin Huang,Jianqiang Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: DreamTIP框架通过在大语言模型引导下学习任务不变属性，增强Dreamer世界模型的仿真到现实迁移能力，显著提升四足机器人在复杂地形上的运动性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 四足机器人在多样化和动态地形上的运动面临重大挑战，主要源于仿真环境与真实世界条件之间的差异。传统的仿真到现实迁移方法通常依赖手动特征设计或昂贵的真实世界微调，存在局限性。

Method: 提出DreamTIP框架，将任务不变属性学习整合到Dreamer世界模型架构中。在大语言模型引导下识别并利用接触稳定性和地形间隙等任务不变属性，这些属性对动态变化具有鲁棒性且跨任务可迁移性强。将这些属性作为辅助预测目标集成到世界模型中，使策略学习对底层动态变化不敏感的表示。设计高效适应策略，采用混合回放缓冲区和正则化约束，快速校准到真实世界动态，同时有效缓解表示崩溃和灾难性遗忘。

Result: 在复杂地形（楼梯、攀爬、倾斜、爬行）上的广泛实验表明，DreamTIP在仿真和真实世界环境中均显著优于最先进的基线方法。在八个不同的仿真迁移任务中平均性能提升28.1%。在真实世界攀爬任务中，基线方法仅获得10%成功率，而DreamTIP达到100%成功率。

Conclusion: 将任务不变属性整合到Dreamer学习中，为实现鲁棒且可迁移的机器人运动提供了一种新颖解决方案，有效解决了仿真到现实迁移中的动态差异问题。

Abstract: Achieving quadruped robot locomotion across diverse and dynamic terrains presents significant challenges, primarily due to the discrepancies between simulation environments and real-world conditions. Traditional sim-to-real transfer methods often rely on manual feature design or costly real-world fine-tuning. To address these limitations, this paper proposes the DreamTIP framework, which incorporates Task-Invariant Properties learning within the Dreamer world model architecture to enhance sim-to-real transfer capabilities. Guided by large language models, DreamTIP identifies and leverages Task-Invariant Properties, such as contact stability and terrain clearance, which exhibit robustness to dynamic variations and strong transferability across tasks. These properties are integrated into the world model as auxiliary prediction targets, enabling the policy to learn representations that are insensitive to underlying dynamic changes. Furthermore, an efficient adaptation strategy is designed, employing a mixed replay buffer and regularization constraints to rapidly calibrate to real-world dynamics while effectively mitigating representation collapse and catastrophic forgetting. Extensive experiments on complex terrains, including Stair, Climb, Tilt, and Crawl, demonstrate that DreamTIP significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both simulated and real-world environments. Our method achieves an average performance improvement of 28.1% across eight distinct simulated transfer tasks. In the real-world Climb task, the baseline method achieved only a 10\ success rate, whereas our method attained a 100% success rate. These results indicate that incorporating Task-Invariant Properties into Dreamer learning offers a novel solution for achieving robust and transferable robot locomotion.

</details>


### [647] [RAGE: A Tightly Coupled Radar-Aided Grip Estimator For Autonomous Race Cars](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02892)
*Davide Malvezzi,Nicola Musiu,Eugenio Mascaro,Francesco Iacovacci,Marko Bertogna*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: RAGE：一种仅使用标准传感器（IMU和雷达）实时估计车辆速度、轮胎侧偏角和侧向力的方法，适用于自动驾驶赛车在极限工况下的安全操作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动驾驶赛车需要在物理极限下安全运行，实时估计车辆-轮胎-路面摩擦至关重要。传统方法依赖昂贵、专用的传感器，需要定制安装，限制了可扩展性和部署。

Method: 提出RAGE（实时估计器），仅使用标准传感器（如IMU和雷达）同时推断车辆速度、轮胎侧偏角和侧向力。这些传感器在现代自动驾驶平台上普遍可用。

Result: 通过高保真仿真和在EAV-24自动驾驶赛车上进行的真实世界实验验证了该方法，证明了其在估计车辆侧向动力学方面的准确性和有效性。

Conclusion: RAGE提供了一种使用标准传感器实时估计关键车辆动力学参数的有效方法，解决了传统专用传感器方案的成本和可扩展性问题，适用于自动驾驶赛车在极限工况下的安全操作。

Abstract: Real-time estimation of vehicle-tire-road friction is critical for allowing autonomous race cars to safely and effectively operate at their physical limits. Traditional approaches to measure tire grip often depend on costly, specialized sensors that require custom installation, limiting scalability and deployment. In this work, we introduce RAGE, a novel real-time estimator that simultaneously infers the vehicle velocity, slip angles of the tires and the lateral forces that act on them, using only standard sensors, such as IMUs and RADARs, which are commonly available on most of modern autonomous platforms. We validate our approach through both high-fidelity simulations and real-world experiments conducted on the EAV-24 autonomous race car, demonstrating the accuracy and effectiveness of our method in estimating the vehicle lateral dynamics.

</details>


### [648] [Orientation Matters: Learning Radiation Patterns of Multi-Rotor UAVs In-Flight to Enhance Communication Availability Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02827)
*Martin Zoula,Daniel Bonilla Licea,Jan Faigl,Václav Navrátil,Martin Saska*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种通过校准飞行数据学习异构四旋翼无人机天线辐射模式的方法，使用球谐级数或诱导样本加权平均建模，通过多项式系数线性回归同时解耦两个独立无人机的辐射模式，在真实数据集上达到3.6 dB RMS误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在真实世界应用中，无人机设置经常变化（如有效载荷改变），需要快速重新校准天线辐射模式以实现精确的自主路径规划和集群控制。传统方法难以同时解耦异构无人机的辐射模式。

Method: 使用校准飞行数据学习天线辐射模式，采用两种建模方式：球谐级数或诱导样本加权平均。通过多项式系数线性回归同时解耦两个独立无人机的辐射模式。设计联合校准轨迹，在无障碍无回波高度利用可用飞行时间。

Result: 在真实世界数据集上评估，成功学习两个辐射模式，达到3.6 dB RMS误差（测量噪声水平）。证明该方法能够有效解耦异构无人机的辐射模式。

Conclusion: 提出的辐射模式学习和解耦方法可用于有效载荷变化后的快速重新校准，从而在预期设置变化的真实世界应用中实现精确的自主路径规划和集群控制。

Abstract: The paper presents an approach for learning antenna Radiation Patterns (RPs) of a pair of heterogeneous quadrotor Uncrewed Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) by calibration flight data. RPs are modeled either as a Spherical Harmonics series or as a weighted average over inducing samples. Linear regression of polynomial coefficients simultaneously decouples the two independent UAVs' RPs. A joint calibration trajectory exploits available flight time in an obstacle-free anechoic altitude. Evaluation on a real-world dataset demonstrates the feasibility of learning both radiation patterns, achieving 3.6 dB RMS error, the measurement noise level. The proposed RP learning and decoupling can be exploited in rapid recalibration upon payload changes, thereby enabling precise autonomous path planning and swarm control in real-world applications where setup changes are expected.

</details>


### [649] [MFE: A Multimodal Hand Exoskeleton with Interactive Force, Pressure and Thermo-haptic Feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02820)
*Ziyuan Tang,Yitian Guo,Chenxi Xiao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 多模态反馈外骨骼（MFE）是一种手部外骨骼设备，通过力反馈、压力/振动反馈和热反馈三种模态，增强虚拟现实和机器人遥操作中的触觉体验。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有触觉设备通常只提供单一模态反馈，无法传递丰富的多模态感官信息（力、压力、热觉）。虚拟现实和机器人遥操作的发展需要更全面的触觉反馈来增强情境感知。

Method: 开发了多模态反馈外骨骼（MFE），包含：1）20自由度手部姿态捕捉；2）主动力反馈机制（3.5-8.1N推拉力）；3）基于电渗原理的指尖平面执行器（压力/振动，最大2.47kPa）；4）热电热泵（10-55°C温度渲染）。集成到X-Arm 6和Inspire Hand机器人遥操作系统中进行验证。

Result: 用户研究显示，参与者能够成功识别和操作可变形物体，并能区分不同温度的远程物体。MFE增强了情境感知，提高了机器人遥操作系统的可用性和透明度。

Conclusion: MFE通过整合力、压力和热反馈，填补了现有触觉设备在多模态反馈方面的空白，显著提升了虚拟现实和机器人遥操作中的触觉体验和情境感知能力。

Abstract: Recent advancements in virtual reality and robotic teleoperation have greatly increased the variety of haptic information that must be conveyed to users. While existing haptic devices typically provide unimodal feedback to enhance situational awareness, a gap remains in their ability to deliver rich, multimodal sensory feedback encompassing force, pressure, and thermal sensations. To address this limitation, we present the Multimodal Feedback Exoskeleton (MFE), a hand exoskeleton designed to deliver hybrid haptic feedback. The MFE features 20 degrees of freedom for capturing hand pose. For force feedback, it employs an active mechanism capable of generating 3.5-8.1 N of pushing and pulling forces at the fingers' resting pose, enabling realistic interaction with deformable objects. The fingertips are equipped with flat actuators based on the electro-osmotic principle, providing pressure and vibration stimuli and achieving up to 2.47 kPa of contact pressure to render tactile sensations. For thermal feedback, the MFE integrates thermoelectric heat pumps capable of rendering temperatures from 10 to 55 degrees Celsius. We validated the MFE by integrating it into a robotic teleoperation system using the X-Arm 6 and Inspire Hand manipulator. In user studies, participants successfully recognized and manipulated deformable objects and differentiated remote objects with varying temperatures. These results demonstrate that the MFE enhances situational awareness, as well as the usability and transparency of robotic teleoperation systems.

</details>


### [650] [Learning Structured Robot Policies from Vision-Language Models via Synthetic Neuro-Symbolic Supervision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02812)
*Alessandro Adami,Tommaso Tubaldo,Marco Todescato,Ruggero Carli,Pietro Falco*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出一种神经符号方法，使用视觉语言模型从多模态输入生成可执行的行为树策略，通过合成数据集训练，实现结构化、可解释的机器人决策。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于视觉语言模型的端到端机器人策略不透明且难以分析，限制了其在安全关键应用中的使用。而经典机器人系统依赖结构化策略表示，具有可解释性、模块化和反应式执行优势。需要弥合高维学习与符号控制之间的鸿沟。

Method: 提出神经符号方法：使用视觉语言模型从视觉观察、自然语言指令和结构化系统规范合成可执行的行为树策略。引入自动化流水线生成合成多模态数据集，包含域随机化场景和由基础模型生成的指令-策略对，实现无需人工标注的可扩展监督。

Result: 在两个机械臂上的真实世界实验表明，完全从合成监督学习的结构化策略能够成功迁移到物理系统。基础模型能够生成可解释的结构化机器人策略，为多模态机器人决策提供了不透明端到端方法的替代方案。

Conclusion: 基础模型可以专门化生成基于多模态感知的结构化机器人策略，弥合高维学习与符号控制之间的差距。该方法提供了可解释、模块化的策略表示，适合安全关键应用，并为机器人决策提供了端到端方法的透明替代方案。

Abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have recently demonstrated strong capabilities in mapping multimodal observations to robot behaviors. However, most current approaches rely on end-to-end visuomotor policies that remain opaque and difficult to analyze, limiting their use in safety-critical robotic applications. In contrast, classical robotic systems often rely on structured policy representations that provide interpretability, modularity, and reactive execution. This work investigates how foundation models can be specialized to generate structured robot policies grounded in multimodal perception, bridging high-dimensional learning and symbolic control. We propose a neuro-symbolic approach in which a VLM synthesizes executable Behavior Tree policies from visual observations, natural language instructions, and structured system specifications. To enable scalable supervision without manual annotation, we introduce an automated pipeline that generates a synthetic multimodal dataset of domain-randomized scenes paired with instruction-policy examples produced by a foundation model. Real-world experiments on two robotic manipulators show that structured policies learned entirely from synthetic supervision transfer successfully to physical systems. The results indicate that foundation models can be adapted to produce interpretable and structured robot policies, providing an alternative to opaque end-to-end approaches for multimodal robot decision making.

</details>


### [651] [Vision-Based End-to-End Learning for UAV Traversal of Irregular Gaps via Differentiable Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02779)
*Linzuo Zhang,Yu Hu,Feng Yu,Yang Deng,Wenxian Yu,Danping Zou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种完全基于视觉的端到端框架，使无人机能够直接根据深度图像生成控制指令，穿越复杂且未见过的环境中的不规则间隙。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法依赖显式间隙提取和测量，而现有的端到端方法通常假设规则形状的间隙，导致泛化能力差和实用性有限。无人机在检查、搜救和灾难响应等应用中需要穿越狭窄不规则间隙的能力。

Method: 采用完全基于视觉的端到端框架，将深度图像直接映射到控制指令。在SE(3)空间中操作，结合可微分模拟、Stop-Gradient算子和双峰初始化分布实现稳定穿越。使用两个辅助预测模块：间隙穿越成功分类器和可穿越性预测器，增强连续导航和安全性。

Result: 通过大量模拟和真实世界实验验证了该方法的有效性、泛化能力和实际鲁棒性，能够成功穿越复杂且未见过的环境中的连续间隙。

Conclusion: 该框架为无人机在复杂环境中导航提供了实用的解决方案，克服了传统方法和现有端到端方法的局限性，实现了对未见环境中不规则间隙的稳定穿越。

Abstract: -Navigation through narrow and irregular gaps is an essential skill in autonomous drones for applications such as inspection, search-and-rescue, and disaster response. However, traditional planning and control methods rely on explicit gap extraction and measurement, while recent end-to-end approaches often assume regularly shaped gaps, leading to poor generalization and limited practicality. In this work, we present a fully vision-based, end-to-end framework that maps depth images directly to control commands, enabling drones to traverse complex gaps within unseen environments. Operating in the Special Euclidean group SE(3), where position and orientation are tightly coupled, the framework leverages differentiable simulation, a Stop-Gradient operator, and a Bimodal Initialization Distribution to achieve stable traversal through consecutive gaps. Two auxiliary prediction modules-a gap-crossing success classifier and a traversability predictor-further enhance continuous navigation and safety. Extensive simulation and real-world experiments demonstrate the approach's effectiveness, generalization capability, and practical robustness.

</details>


### [652] [Geometrically-Constrained Radar-Inertial Odometry via Continuous Point-Pose Uncertainty Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02745)
*Wooseong Yang,Dongjae Lee,Minwoo Jung,Ayoung Kim*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种几何约束的雷达-惯性里程计与建图方法，通过联合处理点和位姿不确定性，利用连续轨迹模型传播控制点不确定性，实现动态观测置信度评估和自适应雷达点加权，构建高保真地图提升里程计精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 雷达里程计在恶劣环境中对鲁棒定位至关重要，但雷达回波的稀疏性和独特的噪声特性限制了其性能。现有方法在处理雷达点不确定性和位姿不确定性方面存在不足，需要更有效的几何约束和不确定性建模框架。

Method: 采用连续轨迹模型估计任意时间戳的位姿不确定性，通过传播控制点的不确定性实现。将位姿不确定性与异方差测量不确定性在点投影过程中连续集成，实现动态观测置信度评估和自适应雷达点加权。利用量化不确定性构建高保真雷达地图，并将显式几何约束与不确定性感知建图框架相结合。

Result: 在多样化真实世界数据集上的广泛实验表明，该方法在准确性和效率方面均优于现有基线方法，实现了显著的性能提升。几何约束与不确定性感知建图框架的结合被证明在雷达-惯性里程计中具有显著效果。

Conclusion: 提出的几何约束雷达-惯性里程计与建图方法通过联合处理点和位姿不确定性，实现了动态观测置信度评估和自适应雷达点加权，构建的高保真地图显著提升了里程计精度，特别是在不精确雷达测量条件下表现优异。

Abstract: Radar odometry is crucial for robust localization in challenging environments; however, the sparsity of reliable returns and distinctive noise characteristics impede its performance. This paper introduces geometrically-constrained radar-inertial odometry and mapping that jointly consolidates point and pose uncertainty. We employ the continuous trajectory model to estimate the pose uncertainty at any arbitrary timestamp by propagating uncertainties of the control points. These pose uncertainties are continuously integrated with heteroscedastic measurement uncertainty during point projection, thereby enabling dynamic evaluation of observation confidence and adaptive down-weighting of uninformative radar points. By leveraging quantified uncertainties in radar mapping, we construct a high-fidelity map that improves odometry accuracy under imprecise radar measurements. Moreover, we reveal the effectiveness of explicit geometrical constraints in radar-inertial odometry when incorporated with the proposed uncertainty-aware mapping framework. Extensive experiments on diverse real-world datasets demonstrate the superiority of our method, yielding substantial performance improvements in both accuracy and efficiency compared to existing baselines.

</details>


### [653] [Learning Locomotion on Complex Terrain for Quadrupedal Robots with Foot Position Maps and Stability Rewards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02744)
*Matthew Hwang,Yubin Liu,Ryo Hakoda,Takeshi Oishi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种将足部位置映射集成到高度图中，并结合动态运动稳定性奖励的注意力框架，用于在复杂地形上实现精确稳定的四足机器人运动。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然基于强化学习的运动方法提高了泛化能力和足部放置精度，但它们依赖于从关节角度隐式推断足部位置，缺乏基于优化的方法的显式精度和稳定性保证。需要一种既能保持强化学习优势又能提供精确足部控制的方法。

Method: 引入足部位置映射集成到高度图中，结合动态运动稳定性奖励，在注意力框架下实现复杂地形上的运动控制。该方法通过显式表示足部位置来增强精度和稳定性。

Result: 在训练期间见过的地形以及域外(OOD)地形上进行了广泛验证。结果表明，所提方法能够实现精确稳定的运动，在域内和域外地形上都提高了运动成功率。

Conclusion: 通过将足部位置映射集成到高度图中并结合动态稳定性奖励，该方法在保持强化学习泛化优势的同时，提供了类似优化方法的精确足部控制，显著提高了四足机器人在复杂地形上的运动性能。

Abstract: Quadrupedal locomotion over complex terrain has been a long-standing research topic in robotics. While recent reinforcement learning-based locomotion methods improve generalizability and foot-placement precision, they rely on implicit inference of foot positions from joint angles, lacking the explicit precision and stability guarantees of optimization-based approaches. To address this, we introduce a foot position map integrated into the heightmap, and a dynamic locomotion-stability reward within an attention-based framework to achieve locomotion on complex terrain. We validate our method extensively on terrains seen during training as well as out-of-domain (OOD) terrains. Our results demonstrate that the proposed method enables precise and stable movement, resulting in improved locomotion success rates on both in-domain and OOD terrains.

</details>


### [654] [V2X-QA: A Comprehensive Reasoning Dataset and Benchmark for Multimodal Large Language Models in Autonomous Driving Across Ego, Infrastructure, and Cooperative Views](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02710)
*Junwei You,Pei Li,Zhuoyu Jiang,Weizhe Tang,Zilin Huang,Rui Gan,Jiaxi Liu,Yan Zhao,Sikai Chen,Bin Ran*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: V2X-QA是一个用于评估多模态大语言模型在自动驾驶中多视角推理能力的真实世界数据集和基准，涵盖车辆侧、基础设施侧和协同视角，通过专家验证的多选题标注实现细粒度诊断。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动驾驶基准主要关注自我中心视角，无法系统评估模型在基础设施中心和协同驾驶条件下的性能，需要建立能够评估多视角推理能力的基准。

Method: 提出V2X-QA数据集和基准，采用视图解耦评估协议，在统一的MCQA框架下支持车辆侧、基础设施侧和协同驾驶条件的对比评估。数据集基于十二任务分类法构建，涵盖感知、预测、推理和规划。同时提出V2X-MoE基准对齐基线，采用显式视图路由和视角特定的LoRA专家。

Result: 在十个代表性SOTA模型上的基准测试表明：视角可访问性显著影响性能；基础设施侧推理支持有意义的宏观交通理解；协同推理仍然具有挑战性，需要跨视图对齐和证据整合而非简单增加视觉输入。V2X-MoE表现出色，表明显式视角专业化是多视图推理的有前景方向。

Conclusion: V2X-QA为研究连接自动驾驶中的多视角推理、可靠性和协同物理智能提供了基础，显式视角专业化是提升多视图推理能力的有效方法，数据集和V2X-MoE资源已公开。

Abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have shown strong potential for autonomous driving, yet existing benchmarks remain largely ego-centric and therefore cannot systematically assess model performance in infrastructure-centric and cooperative driving conditions. In this work, we introduce V2X-QA, a real-world dataset and benchmark for evaluating MLLMs across vehicle-side, infrastructure-side, and cooperative viewpoints. V2X-QA is built around a view-decoupled evaluation protocol that enables controlled comparison under vehicle-only, infrastructure-only, and cooperative driving conditions within a unified multiple-choice question answering (MCQA) framework. The benchmark is organized into a twelve-task taxonomy spanning perception, prediction, and reasoning and planning, and is constructed through expert-verified MCQA annotation to enable fine-grained diagnosis of viewpoint-dependent capabilities. Benchmark results across ten representative state-of-the-art proprietary and open-source models show that viewpoint accessibility substantially affects performance, and infrastructure-side reasoning supports meaningful macroscopic traffic understanding. Results also indicate that cooperative reasoning remains challenging since it requires cross-view alignment and evidence integration rather than simply additional visual input. To address these challenges, we introduce V2X-MoE, a benchmark-aligned baseline with explicit view routing and viewpoint-specific LoRA experts. The strong performance of V2X-MoE further suggests that explicit viewpoint specialization is a promising direction for multi-view reasoning in autonomous driving. Overall, V2X-QA provides a foundation for studying multi-perspective reasoning, reliability, and cooperative physical intelligence in connected autonomous driving. The dataset and V2X-MoE resources are publicly available at: https://github.com/junwei0001/V2X-QA.

</details>


### [655] [A Rapid Instrument Exchange System for Humanoid Robots in Minimally Invasive Surgery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02707)
*Bingcong Zhang,Yihang Lyv,Lianbo Ma,Yushi He,Pengfei Wei,Xingchi Liu,Jinhua Li,Jianchang Zhao,Lizhi Pan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出沉浸式遥操作快速器械交换系统，用于人形机器人微创手术，通过低延迟对接机制和第一人称视角感知降低操作复杂性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人形机器人具有微创手术潜力，但其固有的双臂配置需要高效的器械交换能力来执行复杂手术，模拟外科医生手动切换器械的自然工作流程

Method: 提出沉浸式遥操作快速器械交换系统，采用基于单轴顺应性对接和环境约束释放的低延迟机制，集成通过头戴式显示器实现的实时第一人称视角感知

Result: 专家和新手的比较评估显示高操作鲁棒性和快速收敛的学习曲线；新手经过短暂训练后在器械连接和分离方面的表现显著改善；验证了人形机器人在受限临床环境中执行稳定器械交换的技术可行性

Conclusion: 虽然长距离空间对齐在时间成本和协作稳定性方面仍存在挑战，但该研究成功验证了人形机器人在受限临床环境中执行稳定器械交换的技术可行性

Abstract: Humanoid robot technologies have demonstrated immense potential for minimally invasive surgery (MIS). Unlike dedicated multi-arm surgical platforms, the inherent dual-arm configuration of humanoid robots necessitates an efficient instrument exchange capability to perform complex procedures, mimicking the natural workflow where surgeons manually switch instruments. To address this, this paper proposes an immersive teleoperated rapid instrument exchange system. The system utilizes a low-latency mechanism based on single-axis compliant docking and environmental constraint release. Integrated with real-time first-person view (FPV) perception via a head-mounted display (HMD), this framework significantly reduces operational complexity and cognitive load during the docking process. Comparative evaluations between experts and novices demonstrate high operational robustness and a rapidly converging learning curve; novice performance in instrument attachment and detachment improved substantially after brief training. While long-distance spatial alignment still presents challenges in time cost and collaborative stability, this study successfully validates the technical feasibility of humanoid robots executing stable instrument exchanges within constrained clinical environments.

</details>


### [656] [Differentiable SpaTiaL: Symbolic Learning and Reasoning with Geometric Temporal Logic for Manipulation Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02643)
*Licheng Luo,Kaier Liang,Cristian-Ioan Vasile,Mingyu Cai*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出Differentiable SpaTiaL，首个端到端可微符号时空逻辑工具箱，通过可微几何原语实现从高层语义规范到底层几何配置的完全可微映射


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决复杂操作任务中时空约束的优化问题。现有方法存在局限性：可微时序逻辑忽略物体-环境交互关系，而考虑交互的空间逻辑方法依赖离散几何引擎，无法进行精确梯度传播

Method: 开发完全张量化的工具箱，直接在多边形集上构建平滑、自动梯度兼容的几何原语。通过解析推导关键空间谓词（有符号距离、相交、包含、方向关系）的可微松弛版本

Result: 实现了两个核心能力：(1) 在严格时空约束下的大规模并行轨迹优化；(2) 通过反向传播直接从演示中学习空间逻辑参数。实验结果验证了框架的有效性和可扩展性

Conclusion: Differentiable SpaTiaL是首个端到端可微符号时空逻辑工具箱，通过完全可微的几何原语实现了从高层语义规范到底层几何配置的无缝优化，为复杂操作任务提供了新的解决方案

Abstract: Executing complex manipulation in cluttered environments requires satisfying coupled geometric and temporal constraints. Although Spatio-Temporal Logic (SpaTiaL) offers a principled specification framework, its use in gradient-based optimization is limited by non-differentiable geometric operations. Existing differentiable temporal logics focus on the robot's internal state and neglect interactive object-environment relations, while spatial logic approaches that capture such interactions rely on discrete geometry engines that break the computational graph and preclude exact gradient propagation. To overcome this limitation, we propose Differentiable SpaTiaL, a fully tensorized toolbox that constructs smooth, autograd-compatible geometric primitives directly over polygonal sets. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first end-to-end differentiable symbolic spatio-temporal logic toolbox. By analytically deriving differentiable relaxations of key spatial predicates--including signed distance, intersection, containment, and directional relations--we enable an end-to-end differentiable mapping from high-level semantic specifications to low-level geometric configurations, without invoking external discrete solvers. This fully differentiable formulation unlocks two core capabilities: (i) massively parallel trajectory optimization under rigorous spatio-temporal constraints, and (ii) direct learning of spatial logic parameters from demonstrations via backpropagation. Experimental results validate the effectiveness and scalability of the proposed framework.

</details>


### [657] [From Impact to Insight: Dynamics-Aware Proprioceptive Terrain Sensing on Granular Media](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02563)
*Yifeng Zhang,Yue Wu,Jake Futterman,Jacob Meseha,Eduardo Rosales,Irie Cooper,J. Diego Caporale,Feifei Qian*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究开发了一个基于物理的框架，用于在高速跳跃期间仅使用本体感知进行动态地形表征，重点关注加速度相关的颗粒效应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大多数地形表征方法依赖准静态假设，忽略了高速动态条件下（如冲击和快速姿态转换）产生的速度和加速度相关效应。机器人需要在自然地形中穿越时解释这些动态接触力。

Method: 通过控制冲击速度和腿部柔顺性的跳跃实验，测量颗粒地形相互作用。开发了基于动量观测器的估计器来补偿刚体惯性和重力，并引入加速度感知加权回归来处理高加速度事件期间增加的力方差。整合了力分解方法，重点关注加速度相关的附加质量效应。

Result: 实验表明，准静态假设在高速跳跃期间会导致颗粒地形属性估计出现较大差异，特别是在触地和控制器诱导的刚度转换时。速度相关阻力无法单独解释这些差异，而加速度相关的附加质量效应（与脚部下方颗粒夹带相关）主导了瞬态力响应。所提出的方法能够在不同运动条件下一致地恢复颗粒刚度参数，与线性执行器的地面真实数据紧密匹配。

Conclusion: 高速运动期间准确的地形推断需要明确处理加速度相关的颗粒效应。该研究为机器人在动态探索陆地及行星环境时表征复杂可变形地形提供了基础框架。

Abstract: Robots that traverse natural terrain must interpret contact forces generated under highly dynamic conditions. However, most terrain characterization approaches rely on quasi-static assumptions that neglect velocity- and acceleration-dependent effects arising during impact and rapid stance transitions. In this work, we investigate granular terrain interaction during high-speed hopping and develop a physics-based framework for dynamic terrain characterization using proprioceptive sensing alone. Through controlled hopping experiments with systematically varied impact speed and leg compliance, our measurements reveal that quasi-static based assumptions lead to large discrepancies in granular terrain property estimation during high-speed hopping, particularly upon touchdown and controller-induced stiffness transitions. Velocity-dependent drag alone cannot explain these discrepancies. Instead, acceleration-dependent added-mass effects-associated with grain entrainment beneath the foot-dominate transient force responses. We integrate this force decomposition with a momentum-observer-based estimator that compensates for rigid-body inertia and gravity, and introduce an acceleration-aware weighted regression to account for increased force variance during high-acceleration events. Together, these methods enable consistent recovery of granular stiffness parameters across locomotion conditions, closely matching linear-actuator ground truth. Our results demonstrate that accurate terrain inference during high-speed locomotion requires explicit treatment of acceleration-dependent granular effects, and provide a foundation for robots to characterize complex deformable terrain during dynamic exploration of terrestrial and planetary environments.

</details>


### [658] [Tune to Learn: How Controller Gains Shape Robot Policy Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02523)
*Antonia Bronars,Younghyo Park,Pulkit Agrawal*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 控制器增益选择应基于学习可行性而非任务刚度，不同学习范式需要不同的最优增益设置


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于任务刚度选择位置控制器增益的方法在与状态条件策略结合时失效，因为有效刚度来自学习反应与控制动力学的交互。需要研究增益选择如何影响不同学习范式的可行性。

Method: 系统研究位置控制器增益对三种现代机器人学习流程的影响：行为克隆、从零开始的强化学习、仿真到现实迁移。在多个任务和机器人平台上进行广泛实验。

Result: 1) 行为克隆受益于柔顺和过阻尼增益机制；2) 强化学习在兼容的超参数调优下可在所有增益机制中成功；3) 仿真到现实迁移受到刚性和过阻尼增益机制的损害。

Conclusion: 最优增益选择不取决于期望的任务行为，而取决于所采用的学习范式。控制器增益应基于学习可行性进行选择。

Abstract: Position controllers have become the dominant interface for executing learned manipulation policies. Yet a critical design decision remains understudied: how should we choose controller gains for policy learning? The conventional wisdom is to select gains based on desired task compliance or stiffness. However, this logic breaks down when controllers are paired with state-conditioned policies: effective stiffness emerges from the interplay between learned reactions and control dynamics, not from gains alone. We argue that gain selection should instead be guided by learnability: how amenable different gain settings are to the learning algorithm in use. In this work, we systematically investigate how position controller gains affect three core components of modern robot learning pipelines: behavior cloning, reinforcement learning from scratch, and sim-to-real transfer. Through extensive experiments across multiple tasks and robot embodiments, we find that: (1) behavior cloning benefits from compliant and overdamped gain regimes, (2) reinforcement learning can succeed across all gain regimes given compatible hyperparameter tuning, and (3) sim-to-real transfer is harmed by stiff and overdamped gain regimes. These findings reveal that optimal gain selection depends not on the desired task behavior, but on the learning paradigm employed. Project website: https://younghyopark.me/tune-to-learn

</details>


### [659] [Stop Wandering: Efficient Vision-Language Navigation via Metacognitive Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02318)
*Xueying Li,Feng Lyu,Hao Wu,Mingliu Liu,Jia-Nan Liu,Guozi Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: MetaNav：一种元认知导航智能体，通过空间记忆、历史感知规划和反思校正机制解决无训练VLN智能体中的低效探索问题，显著提升性能并减少VLM查询


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于基础模型的无训练视觉语言导航智能体依赖贪婪边界选择和被动空间记忆，导致局部振荡和重复访问等低效行为。作者认为这源于缺乏元认知能力：智能体无法监控探索进度、诊断策略失败或相应调整。

Method: 提出MetaNav元认知导航框架，包含三个核心组件：1) 空间记忆构建持久3D语义地图；2) 历史感知规划惩罚重复访问以提高效率；3) 反思校正检测停滞状态，使用LLM生成指导未来边界选择的校正规则。

Result: 在GOAT-Bench、HM3D-OVON和A-EQA三个基准测试中，MetaNav实现了最先进的性能，同时将VLM查询减少了20.7%，证明元认知推理显著提高了鲁棒性和效率。

Conclusion: 元认知推理能够有效解决无训练VLN智能体中的探索低效问题，MetaNav通过集成空间记忆、历史感知规划和反思校正机制，在保持高性能的同时显著减少了计算开销。

Abstract: Training-free Vision-Language Navigation (VLN) agents powered by foundation models can follow instructions and explore 3D environments. However, existing approaches rely on greedy frontier selection and passive spatial memory, leading to inefficient behaviors such as local oscillation and redundant revisiting. We argue that this stems from a lack of metacognitive capabilities: the agent cannot monitor its exploration progress, diagnose strategy failures, or adapt accordingly. To address this, we propose MetaNav, a metacognitive navigation agent integrating spatial memory, history-aware planning, and reflective correction. Spatial memory builds a persistent 3D semantic map. History-aware planning penalizes revisiting to improve efficiency. Reflective correction detects stagnation and uses an LLM to generate corrective rules that guide future frontier selection. Experiments on GOAT-Bench, HM3D-OVON, and A-EQA show that MetaNav achieves state-of-the-art performance while reducing VLM queries by 20.7%, demonstrating that metacognitive reasoning significantly improves robustness and efficiency.

</details>


### [660] [F2F-AP: Flow-to-Future Asynchronous Policy for Real-time Dynamic Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02408)
*Haoyu Wei,Xiuwei Xu,Ziyang Cheng,Hang Yin,Angyuan Ma,Bingyao Yu,Jie Zhou,Jiwen Lu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于预测物体流的异步推理框架，通过合成未来观测来补偿延迟，提升动态场景中的机器人操作性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 异步推理在机器人操作中普遍存在，但固有的延迟导致生成的动作滞后于实时环境，在动态场景中这种时间错位严重损害策略对快速变化环境的理解和反应能力

Method: 提出新颖框架，利用预测物体流合成未来观测，结合基于流的对比学习目标，将预测观测的视觉特征表示与真实未来状态对齐，使异步策略获得前瞻性规划和运动能力

Result: 实验结果表明，该方法在复杂动态操作任务中显著提升了响应性和成功率

Conclusion: 通过预测物体流合成未来观测的框架能够有效补偿延迟，使异步策略在动态场景中实现更鲁棒的操作执行

Abstract: Asynchronous inference has emerged as a prevalent paradigm in robotic manipulation, achieving significant progress in ensuring trajectory smoothness and efficiency. However, a systemic challenge remains unresolved, as inherent latency causes generated actions to inevitably lag behind the real-time environment. This issue is particularly exacerbated in dynamic scenarios, where such temporal misalignment severely compromises the policy's ability to interpret and react to rapidly evolving surroundings. In this paper, we propose a novel framework that leverages predicted object flow to synthesize future observations, incorporating a flow-based contrastive learning objective to align the visual feature representations of predicted observations with ground-truth future states. Empowered by this anticipated visual context, our asynchronous policy gains the capacity for proactive planning and motion, enabling it to explicitly compensate for latency and robustly execute manipulation tasks involving actively moving objects. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach significantly enhances responsiveness and success rates in complex dynamic manipulation tasks.

</details>


### [661] [A virtual-variable-length method for robust inverse kinematics of multi-segment continuum robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02256)
*Weiting Feng,Federico Renda,Yunjie Yang,Francesco Giorgio-Serchi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出虚拟变长(VVL)方法解决多段连续体机械臂逆运动学问题，相比传统雅可比方法提升20%收敛成功率，减少40-80%平均迭代次数


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于雅可比的逆运动学求解器，特别是从中性/静止配置初始化时，常表现出收敛缓慢，在某些条件下甚至无法收敛（死锁）。需要一种更鲁棒的方法来解决多段连续体机械臂的逆运动学问题。

Method: 提出虚拟变长(VVL)方法，在求解迭代过程中引入段长度的虚构变化，赋予虚拟轴向自由度，缓解不良行为和约束，从而促进或加速收敛。通过综合数值实验与基准雅可比方法和阻尼最小二乘逆运动学求解器进行比较。

Result: 在超过180万次随机试验中（涵盖2到7段机械臂），VVL方法相比基准方法实现了高达20%的收敛成功率提升，在相同精度阈值(10^{-4}-10^{-8})下平均迭代次数减少40-80%。虽然死锁不仅限于工作空间边界，但经验研究表明边界邻近配置是收敛失败的常见原因，VVL方法在统计测试案例中缓解了此类情况。

Conclusion: VVL方法通过引入虚拟轴向自由度，有效解决了多段连续体机械臂逆运动学求解中的收敛问题，显著提高了求解效率和鲁棒性，特别是在边界邻近配置等传统方法容易失败的场景中表现出色。

Abstract: This paper proposes a new, robust method to solve the inverse kinematics (IK) of multi-segment continuum manipulators. Conventional Jacobian-based solvers, especially when initialized from neutral/rest configurations, often exhibit slow convergence and, in certain conditions, may fail to converge (deadlock). The Virtual-Variable-Length (VVL) method proposed here introduces fictitious variations of segments' length during the solution iteration, conferring virtual axial degrees of freedom that alleviate adverse behaviors and constraints, thus enabling or accelerating convergence. Comprehensive numerical experiments were conducted to compare the VVL method against benchmark Jacobian-based and Damped Least Square IK solvers. Across more than $1.8\times 10^6$ randomized trials covering manipulators with two to seven segments, the proposed approach achieved up to a 20$\%$ increase in convergence success rate over the benchmark and a 40-80$\%$ reduction in average iteration count under equivalent accuracy thresholds ($10^{-4}-10^{-8}$). While deadlocks are not restricted to workspace boundaries and may occur at arbitrary poses, our empirical study identifies boundary-proximal configurations as a frequent cause of failed convergence and the VVL method mitigates such occurrences over a statistical sample of test cases.

</details>


### [662] [Backup-Based Safety Filters: A Comparative Review of Backup CBF, Model Predictive Shielding, and gatekeeper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02401)
*Taekyung Kim,Aswin D. Menon,Akshunn Trivedi,Dimitra Panagou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文通过统一比较框架重新审视了三种基于备份的安全滤波器方法，揭示了它们之间的理论联系和差异，并指出了基于备份的安全滤波器保守性的关键来源。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 本文旨在澄清Backup CBF、MPS和gatekeeper这三种基于备份的安全滤波器方法之间的理论联系和差异，通过统一框架进行比较分析，帮助研究人员更好地理解这些方法的共性和特性。

Method: 采用统一的安全滤波器抽象和共享符号表示，建立比较框架，通过分析滤波器非活动集（即名义策略保持不变的状态集合）来比较三种方法，特别展示了MPS是gatekeeper的特例，并将gatekeeper与Backup CBF非活动集内部联系起来。

Result: 研究揭示了三种方法的共同备份策略结构和关键算法差异，证明了MPS是gatekeeper的特例，并明确了基于备份的安全滤波器保守性的关键来源：安全评估通常通过备份操作的可行性而非名义策略的持续安全执行。

Conclusion: 本文提供了一个紧凑的教程和综述，澄清了Backup CBF、MPS和gatekeeper三种基于备份的安全滤波器方法之间的理论联系和差异，为研究人员理解这些方法的共性和特性提供了统一框架。

Abstract: This paper revisits three backup-based safety filters -- Backup Control Barrier Functions (Backup CBF), Model Predictive Shielding (MPS), and gatekeeper -- through a unified comparative framework. Using a common safety-filter abstraction and shared notation, we make explicit both their common backup-policy structure and their key algorithmic differences. We compare the three methods through their filter-inactive sets, i.e., the states where the nominal policy is left unchanged. In particular, we show that MPS is a special case of gatekeeper, and we further relate gatekeeper to the interior of the Backup CBF inactive set within the implicit safe set. This unified view also highlights a key source of conservatism in backup-based safety filters: safety is often evaluated through the feasibility of a backup maneuver, rather than through the nominal policy's continued safe execution. The paper is intended as a compact tutorial and review that clarifies the theoretical connections and differences among these methods.

</details>


### [663] [PRO-SPECT: Probabilistically Safe Scalable Planning for Energy-Aware Coordinated UAV-UGV Teams in Stochastic Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02142)
*Roger Fowler,Cahit Ikbal Er,Benjamin Johnsenberg,Yasin Yazicioglu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种用于无人机（UAV）和无人地面车辆（UGV）团队在随机环境中进行能量感知规划的算法PRO-SPECT，该算法通过混合整数规划建模，在多项式时间内生成风险有界的计划，支持离线规划和在线重规划。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究通常假设确定性旅行时间或使用固定的鲁棒性边界，而实际环境中旅行时间是随机变量。需要一种能够建模随机旅行时间、将整个任务失败概率（能量耗尽）限制在用户指定风险水平的方法。

Method: 将问题建模为混合整数规划（MIP），提出PRO-SPECT算法——一种多项式时间算法，生成风险有界的计划。算法支持离线规划和在线重规划，使团队能够在保持风险边界的同时适应干扰。

Result: 提供了关于解可行性和时间复杂度的理论结果。通过数值比较和仿真展示了方法的性能，证明能够有效生成满足风险约束的计划。

Conclusion: PRO-SPECT算法成功解决了UAV-UGV团队在随机环境中的能量感知规划问题，通过风险有界的方法平衡了任务完成时间和能量约束，支持动态环境下的适应性规划。

Abstract: We consider energy-aware planning for an unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) and unmanned ground vehicle (UGV) team operating in a stochastic environment. The UAV must visit a set of air points in minimum time while respecting energy constraints, relying on the UGV as a mobile charging station. Unlike prior work that assumed deterministic travel times or used fixed robustness margins, we model travel times as random variables and bound the probability of failure (energy depletion) across the entire mission to a user-specified risk level. We formulate the problem as a Mixed-Integer Program and propose PRO-SPECT, a polynomial-time algorithm that generates risk-bounded plans. The algorithm supports both offline planning and online re-planning, enabling the team to adapt to disturbances while preserving the risk bound. We provide theoretical results on solution feasibility and time complexity. We also demonstrate the performance of our method via numerical comparisons and simulations.

</details>


### [664] [ROS 2-Based LiDAR Perception Framework for Mobile Robots in Dynamic Production Environments, Utilizing Synthetic Data Generation, Transformation-Equivariant 3D Detection and Multi-Object Tracking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02109)
*Lukas Bergs,Tan Chung,Marmik Thakkar,Alexander Moriz,Amon Göppert,Chinnawut Nantabut,Robert Schmitt*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于ROS的LiDAR框架，集成合成数据训练的变换等变3D检测与基于中心姿态的多目标跟踪，提升工业移动机械臂的感知鲁棒性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 动态生产环境中自适应机器人需要鲁棒的感知能力，包括6D姿态估计和多目标跟踪。现有方法存在真实数据依赖、噪声鲁棒性不足和时空一致性差等局限性

Method: 基于ROS的LiDAR框架，集成合成数据训练的变换等变3D检测方法，结合基于中心姿态的多目标跟踪技术

Result: 在72个场景中使用运动捕捉技术验证：单独姿态估计IoU为62.6%，集成多目标跟踪后提升至83.12%；LiDAR框架实现91.12%的HOTA指标

Conclusion: 该LiDAR框架显著提升了工业移动机械臂感知系统的鲁棒性和多功能性，为动态生产环境中的自适应机器人提供了有效的感知解决方案

Abstract: Adaptive robots in dynamic production environments require robust perception capabilities, including 6D pose estimation and multi-object tracking. To address limitations in real-world data dependency, noise robustness, and spatiotemporal consistency, a LiDAR framework based on the Robot Operating System integrating a synthetic-data-trained Transformation-Equivariant 3D Detection with multi-object-tracking leveraging center poses is proposed. Validated across 72 scenarios with motion capture technology, overall results yield an Intersection over Union of 62.6% for standalone pose estimation, rising to 83.12% with multi-object-tracking integration. Our LiDAR-based framework achieves 91.12% of Higher Order Tracking Accuracy, advancing robustness and versatility of LiDAR-based perception systems for industrial mobile manipulators.

</details>


### [665] [Cross-Modal Visuo-Tactile Object Perception](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02108)
*Anirvan Dutta,Simone Tasciotti,Claudia Cusseddu,Ang Li,Panayiota Poirazi,Julijana Gjorgjieva,Etienne Burdet,Patrick van der Smagt,Mohsen Kaboli*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出跨模态潜在滤波器(CMLF)，通过贝叶斯推理学习物理对象属性的结构化因果潜在状态空间，实现视觉与触觉的双向先验传递，提升机器人多感官感知的鲁棒性和效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自主机器人操作需要准确估计物理属性以确保安全高效，特别是在接触丰富的交互中。视觉和触觉提供互补信息，但这些属性只能间接观测且难以精确建模，现有方法主要强调强制传感器融合或静态跨模态对齐，缺乏对不确定性和信念随时间演化的考虑。

Method: 提出跨模态潜在滤波器(CMLF)，受人类多感官感知和主动推理启发，学习物理对象属性的结构化因果潜在状态空间。支持视觉与触觉之间的双向跨模态先验传递，并通过随时间演化的贝叶斯推理过程整合感官证据。

Result: 真实世界机器人实验表明，CMLF在不确定性条件下比基线方法提高了潜在物理属性估计的效率和鲁棒性。模型还表现出类似人类的感知耦合现象，包括对跨模态幻觉的易感性和学习跨感官关联的相似轨迹。

Conclusion: CMLF为实现通用、鲁棒且物理一致的机器人多感官感知跨模态集成迈出了重要一步，展示了类似人类的感知特性，为自主机器人操作提供了更可靠的物理属性估计框架。

Abstract: Estimating physical properties is critical for safe and efficient autonomous robotic manipulation, particularly during contact-rich interactions. In such settings, vision and tactile sensing provide complementary information about object geometry, pose, inertia, stiffness, and contact dynamics, such as stick-slip behavior. However, these properties are only indirectly observable and cannot always be modeled precisely (e.g., deformation in non-rigid objects coupled with nonlinear contact friction), making the estimation problem inherently complex and requiring sustained exploitation of visuo-tactile sensory information during action. Existing visuo-tactile perception frameworks have primarily emphasized forceful sensor fusion or static cross-modal alignment, with limited consideration of how uncertainty and beliefs about object properties evolve over time. Inspired by human multi-sensory perception and active inference, we propose the Cross-Modal Latent Filter (CMLF) to learn a structured, causal latent state-space of physical object properties. CMLF supports bidirectional transfer of cross-modal priors between vision and touch and integrates sensory evidence through a Bayesian inference process that evolves over time. Real-world robotic experiments demonstrate that CMLF improves the efficiency and robustness of latent physical properties estimation under uncertainty compared to baseline approaches. Beyond performance gains, the model exhibits perceptual coupling phenomena analogous to those observed in humans, including susceptibility to cross-modal illusions and similar trajectories in learning cross-sensory associations. Together, these results constitutes a significant step toward generalizable, robust and physically consistent cross-modal integration for robotic multi-sensory perception.

</details>


### [666] [HyVGGT-VO: Tightly Coupled Hybrid Dense Visual Odometry with Feed-Forward Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02107)
*Junxiang Pan,Lipu Zhou,Baojie Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: HyVGGT-VO是一个结合稀疏VO计算效率和前馈模型稠密重建能力的新型框架，通过自适应混合跟踪前端和分层优化实现实时姿态估计与全局尺度一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有稠密VO方法存在计算负担重、无法实时输出姿态的问题，而传统稀疏方法虽然计算效率高但缺乏稠密重建能力。需要结合两者的优势来解决这一矛盾。

Method: 提出HyVGGT-VO框架：1) 自适应混合跟踪前端，动态切换传统光流和VGGT跟踪头以确保鲁棒性；2) 分层优化框架，联合优化VO姿态和VGGT预测尺度以保证全局尺度一致性。

Result: 相比现有VGGT方法处理速度提升约5倍，在室内EuRoC数据集上平均轨迹误差降低85%，在室外KITTI基准上降低12%。

Conclusion: HyVGGT-VO成功将传统VO框架与先进前馈模型VGGT紧密耦合，在保持计算效率的同时实现了高质量的稠密重建，是首个实现这种紧密耦合的工作。

Abstract: Dense visual odometry (VO), which provides pose estimation and dense 3D reconstruction, serves as the cornerstone for applications ranging from robotics to augmented reality. Recently, feed-forward models have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in dense mapping. However, when these models are used in dense visual SLAM systems, their heavy computational burden restricts them to yielding sparse pose outputs at keyframes while still failing to achieve real-time pose estimation. In contrast, traditional sparse methods provide high computational efficiency and high-frequency pose outputs, but lack the capability for dense reconstruction. To address these limitations, we propose HyVGGT-VO, a novel framework that combines the computational efficiency of sparse VO with the dense reconstruction capabilities of feed-forward models. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to tightly couple a traditional VO framework with VGGT, a state-of-the-art feed-forward model. Specifically, we design an adaptive hybrid tracking frontend that dynamically switches between traditional optical flow and the VGGT tracking head to ensure robustness. Furthermore, we introduce a hierarchical optimization framework that jointly refines VO poses and the scale of VGGT predictions to ensure global scale consistency. Our approach achieves an approximately 5x processing speedup compared to existing VGGT-based methods, while reducing the average trajectory error by 85% on the indoor EuRoC dataset and 12% on the outdoor KITTI benchmark. Our code will be publicly available upon acceptance. Project page: https://geneta2580.github.io/HyVGGT-VO.io.

</details>


### [667] [O-ConNet: Geometry-Aware End-to-End Inference of Over-Constrained Spatial Mechanisms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02038)
*Haoyu Sun,Meng Zhao,Tianhao Wang,Jianxu Wu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: O-ConNet：一种端到端深度学习框架，仅需三个稀疏可达点即可推断空间过约束机构的结构参数并重建完整运动轨迹，无需在推理时显式求解约束方程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习在科学发现中展现出强大潜力，但其建模宏观刚体运动学约束的能力尚未充分探索。本研究旨在解决空间过约束机构的结构参数推断问题，特别是在极稀疏观测条件下的逆设计挑战。

Method: 提出O-ConNet端到端框架，仅使用三个稀疏可达点作为输入，通过深度学习直接推断机构的结构参数并重建完整运动轨迹。该方法避免了推理时显式求解约束方程，在包含42,860个有效样本的自建Bennett 4R数据集上进行训练和评估。

Result: 在10次运行的平均结果中，O-ConNet达到Param-MAE 0.276±0.077和Traj-MAE 0.145±0.018，分别比最强序列基线（LSTM-Seq2Seq）提升65.1%和88.2%。这表明该方法能有效捕获闭环几何结构。

Conclusion: 端到端学习能够有效捕获闭环几何结构，为极稀疏观测条件下的空间过约束机构逆设计提供了实用途径。O-ConNet框架在仅使用三个稀疏可达点的情况下，成功实现了结构参数推断和完整运动轨迹重建。

Abstract: Deep learning has shown strong potential for scientific discovery, but its ability to model macroscopic rigid-body kinematic constraints remains underexplored. We study this problem on spatial over-constrained mechanisms and propose O-ConNet, an end-to-end framework that infers mechanism structural parameters from only three sparse reachable points while reconstructing the full motion trajectory, without explicitly solving constraint equations during inference. On a self-constructed Bennett 4R dataset of 42,860 valid samples, O-ConNet achieves Param-MAE 0.276 +/- 0.077 and Traj-MAE 0.145 +/- 0.018 (mean +/- std over 10 runs), outperforming the strongest sequence baseline (LSTM-Seq2Seq) by 65.1 percent and 88.2 percent, respectively. These results suggest that end-to-end learning can capture closed-loop geometric structure and provide a practical route for inverse design of spatial over-constrained mechanisms under extremely sparse observations.

</details>


### [668] [Bridging Discrete Planning and Continuous Execution for Redundant Robot](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02021)
*Teng Yan,Yue Yu,Yihan Liu,Bingzhuo Zhong*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种连接离散规划与连续执行的桥梁框架，通过改进的体素网格强化学习规划和任务优先级阻尼最小二乘逆运动学执行，显著提升了冗余机械臂路径规划的稳定性和执行质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 体素网格强化学习在冗余机械臂路径规划中应用广泛，但通过逐点数值逆运动学在7自由度机械臂上直接执行时，会产生步长抖动、关节突变和奇异配置附近的不稳定性问题。需要在不修改离散规划器本身的情况下，建立离散规划与连续执行之间的桥梁。

Method: 1) 规划侧：引入步长归一化的26邻域笛卡尔动作和几何平局打破机制，抑制不必要的转向和消除步长振荡；2) 执行侧：实现任务优先级阻尼最小二乘逆运动学层，将末端执行器位置作为主要任务，姿态和关节居中作为投影到零空间的从属任务，结合信任区域裁剪和关节速度约束。

Result: 在7自由度机械臂的随机稀疏、中等和密集环境中，该桥梁框架将密集场景中的规划成功率从约0.58提升到1.00，代表性路径长度从约1.53米缩短到1.10米，在保持末端执行器误差低于1毫米的同时，将峰值关节加速度降低了一个数量级以上。

Conclusion: 提出的桥梁框架显著提高了基于体素的强化学习路径在冗余机械臂上的连续执行质量，通过改进的规划策略和鲁棒的逆运动学执行层，有效解决了步长抖动、关节突变和奇异配置不稳定等问题。

Abstract: Voxel-grid reinforcement learning is widely adopted for path planning in redundant manipulators due to its simplicity and reproducibility. However, direct execution through point-wise numerical inverse kinematics on 7-DoF arms often yields step-size jitter, abrupt joint transitions, and instability near singular configurations. This work proposes a bridging framework between discrete planning and continuous execution without modifying the discrete planner itself. On the planning side, step-normalized 26-neighbor Cartesian actions and a geometric tie-breaking mechanism are introduced to suppress unnecessary turns and eliminate step-size oscillations. On the execution side, a task-priority damped least-squares (TP-DLS) inverse kinematics layer is implemented. This layer treats end-effector position as a primary task, while posture and joint centering are handled as subordinate tasks projected into the null space, combined with trust-region clipping and joint velocity constraints. On a 7-DoF manipulator in random sparse, medium, and dense environments, this bridge raises planning success in dense scenes from about 0.58 to 1.00, shortens representative path length from roughly 1.53 m to 1.10 m, and while keeping end-effector error below 1 mm, reduces peak joint accelerations by over an order of magnitude, substantially improving the continuous execution quality of voxel-based RL paths on redundant manipulators.

</details>


### [669] [Integrated Identification of Collaborative Robots for Robot Assisted 3D Printing Processes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01991)
*Alessandro Dimauro,Davide Tebaldi,Fabio Pini,Luigi Biagiotti,Francesco Leali*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于模型的集成参数识别方法，用于提高机器人辅助增材制造系统的精度和控制性能，通过五步识别流程确保参数物理一致性，并在6自由度协作机器人上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人辅助增材制造虽然克服了传统笛卡尔系统的尺寸和运动学限制，但机器人动态复杂性增加带来了精度、控制和误差预测方面的挑战。协作机器人通常存在传感器和编程限制，需要可靠的方法来识别系统参数以建立准确的动态模型。

Method: 提出集成参数识别方法，包含五个步骤：1)几何和惯性分析；2)摩擦参数识别；3)控制器参数识别；4)剩余参数识别；5)确保参数物理一致性。该方法同时识别机器人、执行器和控制器的参数，适用于存在传感器和编程限制的协作机器人。

Result: 在6自由度协作机器人上进行热塑性挤出工艺的实际案例验证，实验结果显示识别模型与实际机器人结果匹配度非常好，证明了该方法能够显著提升机器人辅助3D打印过程的精度、控制和误差预测能力。

Conclusion: 提出的集成参数识别方法能够为机器人辅助增材制造系统建立可靠的动态模型，即使在协作机器人存在传感器和编程限制的情况下也能确保参数物理一致性，为提升制造精度和控制性能提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: In recent years, the integration of additive manufacturing (AM) and industrial robotics has opened new perspectives for the production of complex components, particularly in the automotive sector. Robot-assisted additive manufacturing processes overcome the dimensional and kinematic limitations of traditional Cartesian systems, enabling non-planar deposition and greater geometric flexibility. However, the increasing dynamic complexity of robotic manipulators introduces challenges related to precision, control, and error prediction. This work proposes a model-based approach equipped with an integrated identification procedure of the system's parameters, including the robot, the actuators and the controllers. We show that the integrated modeling procedure allows to obtain a reliable dynamic model even in the presence of sensory and programming limitations typical of collaborative robots. The manipulator's dynamic model is identified through an integrated five step methodology: starting with geometric and inertial analysis, followed by friction and controller parameters identification, all the way to the remaining parameters identification. The proposed procedure intrinsically ensures the physical consistency of the identified parameters. The identification approach is validated on a real world case study involving a 6-Degrees-Of-Freedom (DoFs) collaborative robot used in a thermoplastic extrusion process. The very good matching between the experimental results given by actual robot and those given by the identified model shows the potential enhancement of precision, control, and error prediction in Robot Assisted 3D Printing Processes.

</details>


### [670] [Posterior Optimization with Clipped Objective for Bridging Efficiency and Stability in Generative Policy Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01860)
*Yuhui Chen,Haoran Li,Zhennan Jiang,Yuxing Qin,Yuxuan Wan,Weiheng Liu,Dongbin Zhao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: POCO是一个用于机器人操作的后验优化强化学习框架，通过期望最大化过程将奖励加权的隐式后验提炼到策略中，采用离线到在线范式，防止策略崩溃，在仿真和真实世界任务中表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管表达性生成模型能够捕捉复杂多模态的动作分布，但通过强化学习对这些策略进行微调仍然面临不稳定和样本效率低下的挑战。需要一种能够稳定高效微调大型视觉语言动作模型的方法。

Method: POCO将策略改进形式化为后验推断问题，通过期望最大化过程将奖励加权的隐式后验提炼到策略中，无需似然估计。采用离线到在线范式，将在线探索锚定到预训练先验，模型无关设计可微调大型VLA模型而无需架构修改。

Result: 在7个仿真基准和4个接触丰富的真实世界任务中，POCO能够防止灾难性策略崩溃，优于最先进的基线方法，在真实世界任务中达到96.7%的成功率。

Conclusion: POCO提供了一个原则性的RL框架，能够稳定高效地微调表达性生成模型，在仿真和真实世界机器人操作任务中表现出色，为大规模视觉语言动作模型的强化学习微调提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Expressive generative models have advanced robotic manipulation by capturing complex, multi-modal action distributions over temporally extended trajectories. However, fine-tuning these policies via RL remains challenging due to instability and sample inefficiency. We introduce Posterior Optimization with Clipped Objective (POCO), a principled RL framework that formulates policy improvement as a posterior inference problem tailored for temporal action chunks. Through an Expectation-Maximization procedure, POCO distills a reward-weighted implicit posterior into the policy without likelihood estimation. Furthermore, POCO adopts an offline-to-online paradigm that anchors online exploration to pre-trained priors, and its model-agnostic design scales to fine-tune large VLA models without architectural modifications. Evaluations across 7 simulation benchmarks and 4 contact-rich real-world tasks demonstrate that POCO prevents catastrophic policy collapse, outperforms SOTA baselines, and achieves a 96.7% success rate on real-world tasks. Videos are available at our project website https://cccedric.github.io/poco/.

</details>


### [671] [Preferential Bayesian Optimization with Crash Feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01776)
*Johanna Menn,David Stenger,Sebastian Trimpe*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: CrashPBO：一种在偏好贝叶斯优化中整合实验崩溃反馈的机制，通过允许用户报告崩溃来减少硬件实验中的事故，提高数据效率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在机器人硬件系统的参数优化中，标准偏好贝叶斯优化无法处理实验崩溃的情况，导致频繁探索会导致系统崩溃的参数，造成时间浪费和设备磨损

Method: 提出CrashPBO机制，扩展标准偏好贝叶斯优化框架，允许用户在优化过程中同时表达偏好和报告实验崩溃，将崩溃信息整合到贝叶斯优化模型中

Result: 在合成函数基准测试中，该机制减少了63%的崩溃次数并提高了数据效率；在三个机器人平台上验证了方法的广泛适用性和可迁移性

Conclusion: CrashPBO为基于人类偏好和崩溃反馈的参数学习提供了一个灵活、用户友好的框架，特别适用于硬件系统的安全高效优化

Abstract: Bayesian optimization is a popular black-box optimization method for parameter learning in control and robotics. It typically requires an objective function that reflects the user's optimization goal. However, in practical applications, this objective function is often inaccessible due to complex or unmeasurable performance metrics. Preferential Bayesian optimization (PBO) overcomes this limitation by leveraging human feedback through pairwise comparisons, eliminating the need for explicit performance quantification. When applying PBO to hardware systems, such as in quadcopter control, crashes can cause time-consuming experimental resets, wear and tear, or otherwise undesired outcomes. Standard PBO methods cannot incorporate feedback from such crashed experiments, resulting in the exploration of parameters that frequently lead to experimental crashes. We thus introduce CrashPBO, a user-friendly mechanism that enables users to both express preferences and report crashes during the optimization process. Benchmarking on synthetic functions shows that this mechanism reduces crashes by 63% and increases data efficiency. Through experiments on three robotics platforms, we demonstrate the wide applicability and transferability of CrashPBO, highlighting that it provides a flexible, user-friendly framework for parameter learning with human feedback on preferences and crashes.

</details>


### [672] [Realistic Lip Motion Generation Based on 3D Dynamic Viseme and Coarticulation Modeling for Human-Robot Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01756)
*Sheng Li,Jingcheng Huang,Min Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于3D动态视位和协同发音建模的唇部运动生成框架，用于人形机器人语音驱动唇部同步


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实现逼真的唇部同步对于人形机器人自然人机非语言交互至关重要

Method: 基于ARKit标准构建3D动态视位库，通过声母-韵母解耦和能量调制的协同发音机制解决连续语音流中的运动冲突，将高维空间唇部运动重定向到14自由度唇部驱动系统

Result: 通过皮尔逊相关系数和平均绝对急动度指标进行定量消融实验，验证了所提架构的效率和准确性

Conclusion: 该研究为人形机器人语音驱动唇部运动生成提供了一个轻量级、高效且高度实用的范式

Abstract: Realistic lip synchronization is essential for the natural human-robot non-verbal interaction of humanoid robots. Motivated by this need, this paper presents a lip motion generation framework based on 3D dynamic viseme and coarticulation modeling. By analyzing Chinese pronunciation theory, a 3D dynamic viseme library is constructed based on the ARKit standard, which offers coherent prior trajectories of lips. To resolve motion conflicts within continuous speech streams, a coarticulation mechanism is developed by incorporating initial-final (Shengmu-Yunmu) decoupling and energy modulation. After developing a strategy to retarget high-dimensional spatial lip motion to a 14-DOF lip actuation system of a humanoid head platform, the efficiency and accuracy of the proposed architecture is experimentally validated and demonstrated with quantitative ablation experiments using the metrics of the Pearson Correlation Coefficient (PCC) and the Mean Absolute Jerk (MAJ). This research offers a lightweight, efficient, and highly practical paradigm for the speech-driven lip motion generation of humanoid robots. The 3D dynamic viseme library and real-world deployment videos are available at {https://github.com/yuesheng21/Phoneme-to-Lip-14DOF}

</details>


### [673] [Analysis of Efficient Transmission Methods of Grid Maps for Intelligent Vehicles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01753)
*Robin Dehler,Dominik Authaler,Aryan Thakur,Thomas Wodtko,Michael Buchholz*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于补丁的通信管道，利用现有压缩算法高效传输网格地图数据，解决了网格地图在分布式处理和V2X应用中数据量过大的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 网格地图是智能车辆环境建模的基础方法，但细胞级建模导致数据量庞大。虽然补丁网格地图通过调整细胞大小部分解决了问题，但其数据量仍然过大，无法满足新型分布式处理设置和V2X应用的需求。需要从通信角度解决网格地图数据传输的效率问题。

Method: 基于补丁网格地图方法，提出补丁式通信管道，利用现有压缩算法高效传输网格地图数据。对车内通信和V2X通信进行了全面分析，并通过两个真实世界实验设置验证了该管道在这两种用例中的效果。

Result: 研究验证了提出的通信管道在车内通信和V2X应用中的有效性，能够显著减少网格地图数据传输的数据量，提高通信效率。

Conclusion: 总结了智能交通系统中高效传输网格地图数据的推荐指南，为网格地图在分布式处理和V2X应用中的实际部署提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Grid mapping is a fundamental approach to modeling the environment of intelligent vehicles or robots. Compared with object-based environment modeling, grid maps offer the distinct advantage of representing the environment without requiring any assumptions about objects, such as type or shape. For grid-map-based approaches, the environment is divided into cells, each containing information about its respective area, such as occupancy. This representation of the entire environment is crucial for achieving higher levels of autonomy. However, it has the drawback that modeling the scene at the cell level results in inherently large data sizes. Patched grid maps tackle this issue to a certain extent by adapting cell sizes in specific areas. Nevertheless, the data sizes of patched grid maps are still too large for novel distributed processing setups or vehicle-to-everything (V2X) applications. Our work builds on a patch-based grid-map approach and investigates the size problem from a communication perspective.
