### [713] [Go Big or Go Home: Simulating Mobbing Behavior with Braitenbergian Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.00350)
*Elaheh Sanoubari*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 使用Webots机器人仿真平台模拟了Braitenberg机器人群体的二元避免和围攻捕食者行为，研究了围攻呼叫范围和群体规模对围攻成功率的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 模仿动物群体围攻捕食者的反捕食适应行为，通过围攻呼叫机制协调机器人群体对抗威胁，为人工生命中的行动选择仿真和自主智能体控制架构设计提供参考。

Method: 在Webots机器人仿真平台中模拟Braitenberg机器人群体，机器人遇到光源（代表无生命捕食者）时发出围攻呼叫，若能召集盟友则围攻，否则逃离。实验变量包括围攻呼叫范围（无限、中程、短程）和群体规模（10个机器人vs 3个机器人）。

Result: 围攻呼叫范围和机器人群体规模都对围攻成功率有显著影响。不同范围的呼叫召集能力和不同规模的群体协作效果存在明显差异。

Conclusion: 围攻呼叫范围和群体规模是影响机器人群体围攻行为成功的关键因素，该研究为人工生命行动选择仿真和自主智能体控制架构设计提供了重要启示。

Abstract: We used the Webots robotics simulation platform to simulate a dyadic avoiding and mobbing predator behavior in a group of Braitenbergian robots. Mobbing is an antipredator adaptation used by some animals in which the individuals cooperatively attack or harass a predator to protect themselves. One way of coordinating a mobbing attack is using mobbing calls to summon other individuals of the mobbing species. We imitated this mechanism and simulated Braitenbergian robots that use mobbing calls when they face a light source (representing an inanimate predator) and mob it if they can summon allies, otherwise, they escape from it. We explore the effects of range of mobbing call (infinite range, mid-range and low-range) and the size of the robot group (ten robots vs three) on the overall success of mobbing. Our results suggest that both variables have significant impacts. This work has implications for simulations of action selection in artificial life and designing control architectures for autonomous agents.

</details>


### [714] [Real Time Local Wind Inference for Robust Autonomous Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.00343)
*Spencer Folk*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种使空中机器人能够利用机载传感器和嵌入式飞行硬件实时推理周围风场的方法，通过融合地形测量和稀疏现场风测量来预测流场，并研究风模型对运动规划的效用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是解决两个基本问题：1）地形数据是否足以在密集城市环境中进行准确的风预测；2）学习到的风模型对于强调能效和避障的运动规划是否有用。旨在使空中机器人能够在没有先验环境知识的情况下快速评估局部风况，从而将其引入更具挑战性的环境。

Method: 方法结合了深度学习、流体力学和最优控制工具：1）建立使用导航LiDAR进行局部风预测的框架；2）将局部风模型先验整合到后退时域最优控制器中；3）通过模拟演示评估风预测器的预测能力；4）在露天风洞中进行亚尺度自由飞行实验验证实时性能。

Result: 模拟演示表明，当局部风信息整合到运动规划中时，自主城市导航在碰撞率和能耗方面得到改善。实验证明算法能够在嵌入式飞行计算机上实时运行，具有足够带宽来稳定控制小型空中机器人。

Conclusion: 该论文为未知风环境中的局部风推断和运动规划贡献了新的范式，使机器人能够在不依赖先验环境知识的情况下快速评估局部风况，加速了空中机器人进入更具挑战性环境的进程。

Abstract: This thesis presents a solution that enables aerial robots to reason about surrounding wind flow fields in real time using on board sensors and embedded flight hardware. The core novelty of this research is the fusion of range measurements with sparse in situ wind measurements to predict surrounding flow fields. We aim to address two fundamental questions: first, the sufficiency of topographical data for accurate wind prediction in dense urban environments; and second, the utility of learned wind models for motion planning with an emphasis on energy efficiency and obstacle avoidance. Drawing on tools from deep learning, fluid mechanics, and optimal control, we establish a framework for local wind prediction using navigational LiDAR, and then incorporate local wind model priors into a receding-horizon optimal controller to study how local wind knowledge affects energy use and robustness during autonomous navigation. Through simulated demonstrations in diverse urban wind scenarios we evaluate the predictive capabilities of the wind predictor, and quantify improvements to autonomous urban navigation in terms of crash rates and energy consumption when local wind information is integrated into the motion planning. Sub-scale free flight experiments in an open-air wind tunnel demonstrate that these algorithms can run in real time on an embedded flight computer with sufficient bandwidth for stable control of a small aerial robot. Philosophically, this thesis contributes a new paradigm for localized wind inference and motion planning in unknown windy environments. By enabling robots to rapidly assess local wind conditions without prior environmental knowledge, this research accelerates the introduction of aerial robots into increasingly challenging environments.

</details>


### [715] [Hierarchical Motion Planning and Control under Unknown Nonlinear Dynamics via Predicted Reachability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.00320)
*Zhiquan Zhang,Melkior Ornik*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出分层规划控制框架，在未知非线性动力学下进行在线运动规划，通过自适应状态空间分区、分段仿射模型学习和图抽象实现探索与利用的平衡


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在未知非线性动力学下进行自主运动规划需要同时学习系统特性并导航至目标，传统方法通常需要先验系统知识或难以提供形式化保证

Method: 1) 自适应非均匀状态空间分区策略，仅在任务相关区域细化分区；2) 分段仿射模型在线学习；3) 图抽象与可达性验证；4) 松弛可达条件处理欠驱动系统；5) 分层规划控制架构

Result: 仿真验证了框架在探索与利用之间的有效权衡，能够提供形式化的可达性保证，并成功扩展到欠驱动系统

Conclusion: 该框架能够在有限先验知识下实现具有形式化保证的在线运动规划，通过自适应分区和图抽象平衡计算复杂性与规划性能

Abstract: Autonomous motion planning under unknown nonlinear dynamics requires learning system properties while navigating toward a target. In this work, we develop a hierarchical planning-control framework that enables online motion synthesis with limited prior system knowledge. The state space is partitioned into polytopes and approximates the unknown nonlinear system using a piecewise-affine (PWA) model. The local affine models are identified once the agent enters the corresponding polytopes. To reduce computational complexity, we introduce a non-uniform adaptive state space partition strategy that refines the partition only in task-relevant regions. The resulting PWA system is abstracted into a directed weighted graph, whose edge existence is incrementally verified using reach control theory and predictive reachability conditions. Certified edges are weighted using provable time-to-reach bounds, while uncertain edges are assigned information-theoretic weights to guide exploration. The graph is updated online as new data becomes available, and high-level planning is performed by graph search, while low-level affine feedback controllers are synthesized to execute the plan. Furthermore, the conditions of classical reach control theory are often difficult to satisfy in underactuated settings. We therefore introduce relaxed reachability conditions to extend the framework to such systems. Simulations demonstrate effective exploration-exploitation trade-offs with formal reachability guarantees.

</details>


### [716] [Play-Testing REMind: Evaluating an Educational Robot-Mediated Role-Play Game](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.00300)
*Elaheh Sanoubari,Neil Fernandes,Keith Rebello,Alicia Pan,Andrew Houston,Kerstin Dautenhahn*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: REMind是一个创新的教育机器人介导角色扮演游戏，旨在支持儿童的反欺凌旁观者干预。通过机器人表演欺凌场景，让儿童观察、反思角色视角，并通过操控机器人化身来演练防御策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 设计一个创新的教育工具来支持儿童的反欺凌旁观者干预，利用机器人技术和社会情感学习原理，帮助儿童发展应对欺凌的关键技能。

Method: 开发了REMind机器人介导角色扮演游戏，让儿童观察社交机器人表演的欺凌场景，反思角色视角，并通过操控机器人化身来演练防御策略。采用混合方法进行了游戏测试研究，涉及18名9-10岁儿童。

Result: 研究结果表明，REMind体验支持了关键学习目标，包括自我效能感、观点采择能力、理解防御结果以及干预策略。儿童通过游戏获得了反欺凌干预的重要技能。

Conclusion: REMind展示了机器人介导应用戏剧作为支持社会情感学习的新型教学框架的潜力，为儿童反欺凌教育提供了创新的技术解决方案。

Abstract: This paper presents REMind, an innovative educational robot-mediated role-play game designed to support anti-bullying bystander intervention among children. REMind invites players to observe a bullying scenario enacted by social robots, reflect on the perspectives of the characters, and rehearse defending strategies by puppeteering a robotic avatar. We evaluated REMind through a mixed-methods play-testing study with 18 children aged 9--10. The findings suggest that the experience supported key learning goals related to self-efficacy, perspective-taking, understanding outcomes of defending, and intervention strategies. These results highlight the promise of Robot-Mediated Applied Drama (RMAD) as a novel pedagogical framework to support Social-Emotional Learning.

</details>


### [717] [DreamControl-v2: Simpler and Scalable Autonomous Humanoid Skills via Trainable Guided Diffusion Priors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.00202)
*Sudarshan Harithas,Sangkyung Kwak,Pushkal Katara,Srujan Deolasee,Dvij Kalaria,Srinath Sridhar,Sai Vemprala,Ashish Kapoor,Jonathan Chung-Kuan Huang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种改进的框架，通过直接在仿人机器人运动空间中训练引导扩散模型，结合人类和机器人数据集，实现更鲁棒的自主操作技能学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发仿人机器人的鲁棒自主操作技能仍是一个开放问题。虽然强化学习在腿部运动控制上取得成功，但应用于复杂的交互式操作任务时面临长时程规划挑战。现有方法DreamControl使用现成的人类运动扩散模型作为生成先验来指导强化学习策略，但存在局限性。

Method: 提出改进框架：1) 直接在仿人机器人运动空间中训练引导扩散模型；2) 将多样化的人类和机器人数据集聚合到统一的具身空间中；3) 建立更自动化的流程，无需人工筛选干预；4) 通过扩展参考轨迹生成来获得更鲁棒的下游强化学习策略。

Result: 实验验证表明：1) 由于更大的训练数据混合，方法能捕捉更广泛的技能范围；2) 建立了更自动化的流程；3) 扩展参考轨迹生成对实现鲁棒的下游强化学习策略至关重要；4) 在仿真和真实Unitree-G1机器人上进行了广泛实验验证。

Conclusion: 提出的改进框架通过直接在机器人运动空间训练扩散模型并整合多样化数据集，显著提升了仿人机器人自主操作技能的学习效果，为实现更鲁棒的locomanipulation技能提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Developing robust autonomous loco-manipulation skills for humanoids remains an open problem in robotics. While RL has been applied successfully to legged locomotion, applying it to complex, interaction-rich manipulation tasks is harder given long-horizon planning challenges for manipulation. A recent approach along these lines is DreamControl, which addresses these issues by leveraging off-the-shelf human motion diffusion models as a generative prior to guide RL policies during training. In this paper, we investigate the impact of DreamControl's motion prior and propose an improved framework that trains a guided diffusion model directly in the humanoid robot's motion space, aggregating diverse human and robot datasets into a unified embodiment space. We demonstrate that our approach captures a wider range of skills due to the larger training data mixture and establishes a more automated pipeline by removing the need for manual filtering interventions. Furthermore, we show that scaling the generation of reference trajectories is important for achieving robust downstream RL policies. We validate our approach through extensive experiments in simulation and on a real Unitree-G1.

</details>


### [718] [Neural-Assisted in-Motion Self-Heading Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.00168)
*Zeev Yampolsky,Felipe O. Silva,Adriano Frutuoso,Itzik Klein*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种端到端、无模型、神经辅助的初始航向估计框架，相比传统模型方法显著提升精度并大幅缩短对准时间


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 海洋自主平台需要精确导航，初始航向估计的精度和对准时间至关重要。传统基于模型的方法（如双矢量分解和优化姿态分解）需要长时间对准才能达到满意精度，限制了部署效率。

Method: 提出端到端、无模型、神经辅助的初始航向估计框架，使用与传统模型方法相同的输入数据。基于真实世界自主水面车辆采集的数据集进行训练和评估。

Result: 相比传统模型方法，平均绝对误差改善53%，对准时间最多减少67%。显著提升了精度并缩短了对准时间。

Conclusion: 所提方法通过减少对准时间和提高精度，缩短了自主平台的部署时间，并提高了任务期间的导航精度。

Abstract: Autonomous platforms operating in the oceans require accurate navigation to successfully complete their mission. In this regard, the initial heading estimation accuracy and the time required to achieve it play a critical role. The initial heading is traditionally estimated by model-based approaches employing orientation decomposition. However, methods such as the dual vector decomposition and optimized attitude decomposition achieve satisfactory heading accuracy only after long alignment times. To allow rapid and accurate initial heading estimation, we propose an end-to-end, model-free, neural-assisted framework using the same inputs as the model-based approaches. Our proposed approach was trained and evaluated on real-world dataset captured by an autonomous surface vehicle. Our approach shows a significant accuracy improvement over the model-based approaches achieving an average absolute error improvement of 53%. Additionally, our proposed approach was able to reduce the alignment time by up to 67%. Thus, by employing our proposed approach, the reduction in alignment time and improved accuracy allow for a shorter deployment time of an autonomous platform and increased navigation accuracy during the mission.

</details>


### [719] [Long-Horizon Geometry-Aware Navigation among Polytopes via MILP-MPC and Minkowski-Based CBFs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.00162)
*Yi-Hsuan Chen,Salman Ghori,Ania Adil,Eric Feron,Calin Belta*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出分层规划控制框架，结合MILP-MPC长时域引导与CBF几何安全保证，解决复杂非凸环境中考虑机器人动力学、控制限制和精确几何形状的自主导航问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 复杂非凸环境中的自主导航在必须同时考虑机器人动力学、控制限制和精确几何形状时仍然具有挑战性。现有方法难以在计算可处理性和几何安全保证之间取得平衡。

Method: 分层框架：高层使用MILP嵌入MPC生成名义轨迹（将机器人建模为质点以提高计算效率）；低层使用基于Minkowski差空间精确符号距离的CBF作为安全滤波器，并扩展为高阶CBF，显式强制执行机器人几何约束。

Result: 在U形和迷宫环境中对单积分器和双积分器动力学进行测试，结果表明该架构减轻了纯反应式CBF导航的拓扑诱导局部极小行为，实现了安全、实时、几何感知的导航。

Conclusion: 提出的分层规划控制框架成功地将长时域引导与几何安全保证相结合，在复杂非凸环境中实现了考虑机器人完整约束的安全实时导航。

Abstract: Autonomous navigation in complex, non-convex environments remains challenging when robot dynamics, control limits, and exact robot geometry must all be taken into account. In this paper, we propose a hierarchical planning and control framework that bridges long-horizon guidance and geometry-aware safety guarantees for a polytopic robot navigating among polytopic obstacles. At the high level, Mixed-Integer Linear Programming (MILP) is embedded within a Model Predictive Control (MPC) framework to generate a nominal trajectory around polytopic obstacles while modeling the robot as a point mass for computational tractability. At the low level, we employ a control barrier function (CBF) based on the exact signed distance in the Minkowski-difference space as a safety filter to explicitly enforce the geometric constraints of the robot shape, and further extend its formulation to a high-order CBF (HOCBF). We demonstrate the proposed framework in U-shaped and maze-like environments under single- and double-integrator dynamics. The results show that the proposed architecture mitigates the topology-induced local-minimum behavior of purely reactive CBF-based navigation while enabling safe, real-time, geometry-aware navigation.

</details>


### [720] [HapCompass: A Rotational Haptic Device for Contact-Rich Robotic Teleoperation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.30042)
*Xiangshan Tan,Jingtian Ji,Tianchong Jiang,Pedro Lopes,Matthew R. Walter*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: HapCompass：一种低成本可穿戴触觉设备，通过机械旋转单个线性谐振执行器提供2D方向提示，改善接触丰富的机器人遥操作任务


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 接触丰富的操作任务对机器人遥操作构成重大挑战。虽然触觉反馈对接触丰富的任务至关重要，但在可穿戴遥操作界面中提供直观的方向提示仍然是一个瓶颈。现有解决方案（如手持控制器的非定向振动）提供的信息有限，而振动触觉阵列容易产生感知干扰。

Method: 提出HapCompass，一种新颖的低成本可穿戴触觉设备，通过机械旋转单个线性谐振执行器（LRA）来渲染2D方向提示。该设备能够向人类操作员传递方向性触觉反馈。

Result: 评估显示，与仅视觉和非定向反馈基线相比，HapCompass提高了遥操作任务的成功率，减少了完成时间和最大接触力。初步的模仿学习评估表明，HapCompass提供的定向反馈提高了演示数据的质量，从而改善了训练策略的性能。

Conclusion: HapCompass通过机械旋转单个LRA提供2D方向提示，有效解决了接触丰富遥操作任务中的触觉反馈瓶颈问题，提高了任务性能并增强了演示数据质量。作者开源了设备设计和遥操作界面代码。

Abstract: The contact-rich nature of manipulation makes it a significant challenge for robotic teleoperation. While haptic feedback is critical for contact-rich tasks, providing intuitive directional cues within wearable teleoperation interfaces remains a bottleneck. Existing solutions, such as non-directional vibrations from handheld controllers, provide limited information, while vibrotactile arrays are prone to perceptual interference. To address these limitations, we propose HapCompass, a novel, low-cost wearable haptic device that renders 2D directional cues by mechanically rotating a single linear resonant actuator (LRA). We evaluated HapCompass's ability to convey directional cues to human operators and showed that it increased the success rate, decreased the completion time and the maximum contact force for teleoperated manipulation tasks when compared to vision-only and non-directional feedback baselines. Furthermore, we conducted a preliminary imitation-learning evaluation, suggesting that the directional feedback provided by HapCompass enhances the quality of demonstration data and, in turn, the trained policy. We release the design of the HapCompass device along with the code that implements our teleoperation interface: https://ripl.github.io/HapCompass/.

</details>


### [721] [Hybrid Framework for Robotic Manipulation: Integrating Reinforcement Learning and Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.30022)
*Md Saad,Sajjad Hussain,Mohd Suhaib*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出结合强化学习与大型语言模型的混合框架，提升机器人操作任务的效率与适应性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人系统在理解自然语言指令和适应动态环境方面存在局限，需要将低层控制与高层推理有效结合

Method: 提出混合框架：RL负责精确低层控制，LLM负责高层任务规划和自然语言理解，在PyBullet仿真环境中使用Franka Emika Panda机械臂进行测试

Result: 相比纯RL系统，任务完成时间减少33.5%，准确率提升18.1%，适应性提升36.4%

Conclusion: LLM增强的机器人系统具有实际应用潜力，未来研究方向包括仿真到现实迁移、可扩展性和多机器人系统

Abstract: This paper introduces a new hybrid framework that combines Reinforcement Learning (RL) and Large Language Models (LLMs) to improve robotic manipulation tasks. By utilizing RL for accurate low-level control and LLMs for high level task planning and understanding of natural language, the proposed framework effectively connects low-level execution with high-level reasoning in robotic systems. This integration allows robots to understand and carry out complex, human-like instructions while adapting to changing environments in real time. The framework is tested in a PyBullet-based simulation environment using the Franka Emika Panda robotic arm, with various manipulation scenarios as benchmarks. The results show a 33.5% decrease in task completion time and enhancements of 18.1% and 36.4% in accuracy and adaptability, respectively, when compared to systems that use only RL. These results underscore the potential of LLM-enhanced robotic systems for practical applications, making them more efficient, adaptable, and capable of interacting with humans. Future research will aim to explore sim-to-real transfer, scalability, and multi-robot systems to further broaden the framework's applicability.

</details>


### [722] [Passive iFIR filters for data-driven velocity control in robotics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29882)
*Yi Zhang,Zixing Wang,Fulvio Forni*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种基于被动性约束的数据驱动速度控制方法，使用三分钟探测数据通过VRFT设计被动iFIR控制器，在Franka Research 3机器人上优于PID基准，跟踪误差降低达74.5%


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 连接学习型控制与稳定性保证设计，解决传统学习型方法缺乏稳定性保证的问题，同时保持与PID相当的设计复杂度但获得更好的跟踪性能

Method: 基于VRFT（虚拟参考反馈整定）的被动iFIR控制器设计，仅需三分钟探测数据，通过被动性约束保证闭环稳定性，可重新学习适应末端执行器动态变化

Result: 在Franka Research 3机器人上，关节空间和笛卡尔空间速度控制均优于VRFT整定的PID基准，最苛刻参考模型下笛卡尔速度跟踪误差降低74.5%，控制器可重新学习恢复名义性能

Conclusion: 被动iFIR控制器成功桥接了数据驱动学习与稳定性保证，在保持设计简单性的同时提供优于PID的性能，且能适应动态变化，为机器人控制提供了新方法

Abstract: We present a passive, data-driven velocity control method for nonlinear robotic manipulators that achieves better tracking performance than optimized PID with comparable design complexity. Using only three minutes of probing data, a VRFT-based design identifies passive iFIR controllers that (i) preserve closed-loop stability via passivity constraints and (ii) outperform a VRFT-tuned PID baseline on the Franka Research 3 robot in both joint-space and Cartesian-space velocity control, achieving up to a 74.5% reduction in tracking error for the Cartesian velocity tracking experiment with the most demanding reference model. When the robot end-effector dynamics change, the controller can be re-learned from new data, regaining nominal performance. This study bridges learning-based control and stability-guaranteed design: passive iFIR learns from data while retaining passivity-based stability guarantees, unlike many learning-based approaches.

</details>


### [723] [DIAL: Decoupling Intent and Action via Latent World Modeling for End-to-End VLA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29844)
*Yi Chen,Yuying Ge,Hui Zhou,Mingyu Ding,Yixiao Ge,Xihui Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: DIAL框架通过可微分潜在意图瓶颈桥接高层决策与低层运动执行，利用VLM进行潜在世界建模，实现稳定训练和卓越性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有端到端VLA模型主要将VLM作为多模态编码器，直接将视觉语言特征映射到低层动作，这未能充分利用VLM的高层决策潜力，且导致训练不稳定，可能破坏其丰富的语义表示

Method: 引入DIAL框架，通过可微分潜在意图瓶颈连接高层决策与低层运动执行：基于VLM的System-2在VLM原生特征空间中进行潜在世界建模，合成潜在视觉预测；轻量级System-1策略将预测意图与当前观测解码为精确机器人动作。采用两阶段训练：解耦预热阶段System-2学习预测潜在未来，System-1在统一特征空间内基于真实未来指导学习运动控制；随后进行端到端联合优化

Result: 在RoboCasa GR1 Tabletop基准测试中建立新的最先进水平，仅需先前方法1/10的演示数据即可实现卓越性能；通过利用异构人类演示学习物理基础的操作先验，在真实世界人形机器人部署中展现出对未见物体和新配置的鲁棒零样本泛化能力

Conclusion: DIAL框架通过可微分潜在意图瓶颈有效桥接高层决策与低层执行，在保持预训练知识的同时实现稳定优化，显著提升了VLA模型的性能和泛化能力

Abstract: The development of Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models has been significantly accelerated by pre-trained Vision-Language Models (VLMs). However, most existing end-to-end VLAs treat the VLM primarily as a multimodal encoder, directly mapping vision-language features to low-level actions. This paradigm underutilizes the VLM's potential in high-level decision making and introduces training instability, frequently degrading its rich semantic representations. To address these limitations, we introduce DIAL, a framework bridging high-level decision making and low-level motor execution through a differentiable latent intent bottleneck. Specifically, a VLM-based System-2 performs latent world modeling by synthesizing latent visual foresight within the VLM's native feature space; this foresight explicitly encodes intent and serves as the structural bottleneck. A lightweight System-1 policy then decodes this predicted intent together with the current observation into precise robot actions via latent inverse dynamics. To ensure optimization stability, we employ a two-stage training paradigm: a decoupled warmup phase where System-2 learns to predict latent futures while System-1 learns motor control under ground-truth future guidance within a unified feature space, followed by seamless end-to-end joint optimization. This enables action-aware gradients to refine the VLM backbone in a controlled manner, preserving pre-trained knowledge. Extensive experiments on the RoboCasa GR1 Tabletop benchmark show that DIAL establishes a new state-of-the-art, achieving superior performance with 10x fewer demonstrations than prior methods. Furthermore, by leveraging heterogeneous human demonstrations, DIAL learns physically grounded manipulation priors and exhibits robust zero-shot generalization to unseen objects and novel configurations during real-world deployment on a humanoid robot.

</details>


### [724] [Reconfiguration of supernumerary robotic limbs for human augmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29808)
*Mustafa Mete,Anastasia Bolotnikova,Alexander Schuessler,Jamie Paik*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于定量人机增强分析的模块化可重构超数机器人肢体框架，通过量化评估增强效果来指导机器人配置，实现动态非结构化环境中的适应性增强


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有超数机器人肢体主要针对结构化工业环境中的特定任务设计，缺乏对动态非结构化环境的适应性，需要更灵活的框架来实现个性化的人机增强

Method: 提出可重构SRL框架，通过定量人机增强分析定义协作、可见扩展和非可见扩展工作空间的人机增强比，指导SRL的放置、形态和自主性选择，使用折纸启发的模块化元件构建可重构SRL进行验证

Result: 实验验证表明，基于定量增强分析的可重构SRL能够更好地匹配任务需求，为日常环境中的适应性人机增强提供了新视角

Conclusion: 可重构SRL结合定量人机增强分析为动态非结构化环境中的适应性人机增强提供了系统化框架，通过量化评估增强效果指导机器人配置优化

Abstract: Wearable robots aim to seamlessly adapt to humans and their environment with personalized interactions. Existing supernumerary robotic limbs (SRLs), which enhance the physical capabilities of humans with additional extremities, have thus far been developed primarily for task-specific applications in structured industrial settings, limiting their adaptability to dynamic and unstructured environments. Here, we introduce a novel reconfigurable SRL framework grounded in a quantitative analysis of human augmentation to guide the development of more adaptable SRLs for diverse scenarios. This framework captures how SRL configuration shapes workspace extension and human-robot collaboration. We define human augmentation ratios to evaluate collaborative, visible extended, and non-visible extended workspaces, enabling systematic selection of SRL placement, morphology, and autonomy for a given task. Using these metrics, we demonstrate how quantitative augmentation analysis can guide the reconfiguration and control of SRLs to better match task requirements. We validate the proposed approach through experiments with a reconfigurable SRL composed of origami-inspired modular elements. Our results suggest that reconfigurable SRLs, informed by quantitative human augmentation analysis, offer a new perspective for providing adaptable human augmentation and assistance in everyday environments.

</details>


### [725] [SafeDMPs: Integrating Formal Safety with DMPs for Adaptive HRI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29708)
*Soumyodipta Nath,Pranav Tiwari,Ravi Prakash*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SafeDMPs框架将动态运动基元的高效性与时空管道的可证明安全性相结合，为机器人运动规划提供闭式解，避免了传统在线优化的计算负担。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人在人机协作环境中需要同时具备抗干扰鲁棒性和可证明的碰撞安全性。现有方法存在矛盾：动态运动基元(DMPs)具有稳定性和泛化能力但缺乏形式化安全保证；控制屏障函数(CBFs)提供可证明安全性但依赖实时优化，计算成本高，难以用于高频控制。

Method: 提出SafeDMPs框架，将DMPs的闭式效率和动态鲁棒性与时空管道(STTs)衍生的可证明安全、非优化控制律相结合。该方法生成既能抵抗扰动、适应新目标，又能保证避开静态和动态障碍物的运动轨迹，为传统需要在线优化的问题提供闭式解。

Result: 在7自由度机器人机械臂上的实验结果表明，SafeDMPs比基于优化的基线方法快几个数量级且更精确，适合实时、安全和协作机器人应用。

Conclusion: SafeDMPs成功解决了机器人运动规划中鲁棒性与安全性之间的权衡问题，通过结合DMPs的高效性和STTs的形式化安全保证，为实时安全协作机器人提供了理想解决方案。

Abstract: Robots operating in human-centric environments must be both robust to disturbances and provably safe from collisions. Achieving these properties simultaneously and efficiently remains a central challenge. While Dynamic Movement Primitives (DMPs) offer inherent stability and generalization from single demonstrations, they lack formal safety guarantees. Conversely, formal methods like Control Barrier Functions (CBFs) provide provable safety but often rely on computationally expensive, real-time optimization, hindering their use in high-frequency control. This paper introduces SafeDMPs, a novel framework that resolves this trade-off. We integrate the closed-form efficiency and dynamic robustness of DMPs with a provably safe, non-optimization-based control law derived from Spatio-Temporal Tubes (STTs). This synergy allows us to generate motions that are not only robust to perturbations and adaptable to new goals, but also guaranteed to avoid static and dynamic obstacles. Our approach achieves a closed-form solution for a problem that traditionally requires online optimization. Experimental results on a 7-DOF robot manipulator demonstrate that SafeDMPs is orders of magnitude faster and more accurate than optimization-based baselines, making it an ideal solution for real-time, safe, and collaborative robotics.

</details>


### [726] [Design and Aerodynamic Modeling of MetaMorpher: A Hybrid Rotary andFixed-Wing Morphing UAV](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29646)
*Anja Bosak,Dorian Erić,Ana Milas,Stjepan Bogdan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出MetaMorpher变形无人机，通过非线性数学模型和模块化设计，在垂直起降敏捷性和固定翼巡航效率之间取得平衡


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决传统无人机在垂直起降敏捷性和固定翼巡航效率之间的权衡问题，需要一种能够兼顾两者的变形无人机设计

Method: 基于spincopter平台，采用轻质材料和新型机翼折叠策略的简化机械架构，建立非线性飞行动力学模型，支持分段机翼结构的任意力分布

Result: 模型在不同结构配置下表现出可预测的行为，证明了其作为快速设计评估工具的可靠性

Conclusion: MetaMorpher变形无人机模型为无人机设计提供了有效的评估工具，能够平衡垂直起降和巡航效率的需求

Abstract: In this paper, we present a generalized, comprehensive nonlinear mathematical model and conceptual design for the MetaMorpher, a metamorphic Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) designed to bridge the gap between vertical takeoff and landing agility and fixed-wing cruising efficiency. Building on the successful design of the spincopter platform, this work introduces a simplified mechanical architecture using lightweight materials and a novel wing-folding strategy. Unlike traditional rigid-body approximations, we derive a nonlinear flight dynamics model that enables arbitrary force distributions across a segmented wing structure. This modularity allows for testing different airfoils, mass distributions, and chord lengths in a single environment. As part of this work, various flight modes were specifically tested and analyzed in the Simulink environment. The results show that the model behaves predictably under different structural configurations, demonstrating its reliability as a tool for rapid design evaluation.

</details>


### [727] [Semantic Zone-Based Map Management for Stable AI-Integrated Mobile Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29627)
*Huichang Yun,Seungho Yoo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于语义区域的稠密地图管理方法，解决内存受限移动机器人上同时运行SLAM和大型AI模型时的内存瓶颈问题，通过语义区域级关键帧管理提升系统稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 移动机器人需要在内存受限的边缘设备上同时运行稠密地图SLAM和大型AI模型（VLMs/LLMs），但现有几何地图管理策略在内存超限时会导致关键帧加载延迟，影响定位稳定性和模型性能。

Method: 提出语义区域级地图管理方法：将关键帧与室内语义区域（房间、走廊等）关联，在语义区域层面进行关键帧管理，优先保留空间相关的地图内容，同时遵守内存约束，减少关键帧加载/卸载频率和内存使用。

Result: 在大型模拟室内环境和NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano上评估，使用Qwen3.5:0.8b模型时，相比几何地图管理策略，吞吐量提升3.3 tokens/s，延迟降低21.7%。消除内存溢出故障和执行停滞问题，保持定位稳定性并实现稳健的VLM操作。

Conclusion: 该方法为内存受限的AI集成移动机器人实现了高效的稠密地图利用，解决了同时运行SLAM和大型AI模型时的内存瓶颈问题，提升了系统整体性能和稳定性。

Abstract: Recent advances in large AI models (VLMs and LLMs) and joint use of the 3D dense maps, enable mobile robots to provide more powerful and interactive services grounded in rich spatial context. However, deploying both heavy AI models and dense maps on edge robots is challenging under strict memory budgets. When the memory budget is exceeded, required keyframes may not be loaded in time, which can degrade the stability of position estimation and interfering model performance. We proposes a semantic zone-based map management approach to stabilize dense-map utilization under memory constraints. We associate keyframes with semantic indoor regions (e.g., rooms and corridors) and keyframe management at the semantic zone level prioritizes spatially relevant map content while respecting memory constraints. This reduces keyframe loading and unloading frequency and memory usage. We evaluate the proposed approach in large-scale simulated indoor environments and on an NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano under concurrent SLAM-VLM execution. With Qwen3.5:0.8b, the proposed method improves throughput by 3.3 tokens/s and reduces latency by 21.7% relative to a geometric map-management strategy. Furthermore, while the geometric strategy suffers from out-of-memory failures and stalled execution under memory pressure, the proposed method eliminates both issues, preserving localization stability and enabling robust VLM operation. These results demonstrate that the proposed approach enables efficient dense map utilization for memory constrained, AI-integrated mobile robots. Code is available at: https://github.com/huichangs/rtabmap/tree/segment

</details>


### [728] [GraSP-STL: A Graph-Based Framework for Zero-Shot Signal Temporal Logic Planning via Offline Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29533)
*Ancheng Hou,Ruijia Liu,Xiang Yin*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出GraSP-STL框架，基于离线数据实现零样本STL规划，无需环境交互或任务特定重训练


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决在仅有任务无关行为策略收集的离线数据集、无分析动力学模型、无环境交互、无任务特定重训练的情况下，如何合成满足任意未见STL规范的控制策略的问题

Method: 提出GraSP-STL框架：1) 从离线数据学习目标条件值函数，诱导有限时域可达性度量；2) 基于该度量构建有向图抽象，节点代表代表性状态，边编码可行短时域转移；3) 将规划表述为路点序列的图搜索，使用算术几何平均鲁棒性及其区间语义评估；4) 通过学习的目标条件策略执行

Result: 实验结果表明该方法在一系列离线STL规划任务中有效，能够实现零样本泛化到未见STL任务，并通过离线数据中的短时域行为组合实现长时域规划

Conclusion: GraSP-STL框架成功分离了可重用的可达性学习与任务条件规划，实现了从离线轨迹进行零样本STL规划，为离线强化学习和形式化规范规划提供了新方法

Abstract: This paper studies offline, zero-shot planning under Signal Temporal Logic (STL) specifications. We assume access only to an offline dataset of state-action-state transitions collected by a task-agnostic behavior policy, with no analytical dynamics model, no further environment interaction, and no task-specific retraining. The objective is to synthesize a control strategy whose resulting trajectory satisfies an arbitrary unseen STL specification. To this end, we propose GraSP-STL, a graph-search-based framework for zero-shot STL planning from offline trajectories. The method learns a goal-conditioned value function from offline data and uses it to induce a finite-horizon reachability metric over the state space. Based on this metric, it constructs a directed graph abstraction whose nodes represent representative states and whose edges encode feasible short-horizon transitions. Planning is then formulated as a graph search over waypoint sequences, evaluated using arithmetic-geometric mean robustness and its interval semantics, and executed by a learned goal-conditioned policy. The proposed framework separates reusable reachability learning from task-conditioned planning, enabling zero-shot generalization to unseen STL tasks and long-horizon planning through the composition of short-horizon behaviors from offline data. Experimental results demonstrate its effectiveness on a range of offline STL planning tasks.

</details>


### [729] [Communication Outage-Resistant UUV State Estimation: A Variational History Distillation Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29512)
*Shuyue Li,Miguel López-Benítez,Eng Gee Lim,Fei Ma,Qian Dong,Mengze Cao,Limin Yu,Xiaohui Qin*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出变分历史蒸馏方法，通过从历史轨迹中提取模式合成虚拟测量，结合物理运动模型，在UUV集群通信中断时实现鲁棒状态估计


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: UUV集群可靠运行依赖连续水声通信，但该通信方式易受间歇中断影响。通信中断时，标准状态估计器（如UKF）被迫进行开环预测，若环境中存在未建模动态因素（如未知海流），估计误差会迅速增长，可能导致任务失败

Method: 提出变分历史蒸馏方法，将轨迹预测视为近似贝叶斯推理过程，将基于物理的标准运动模型与直接从UUV过去轨迹中提取的模式相结合。通过从历史轨迹中蒸馏出"虚拟测量"实现。引入自适应置信机制，随着通信中断时间延长，逐渐降低对虚拟测量的信任度

Result: 在高保真环境中的大量蒙特卡洛仿真表明，在40秒通信中断期间，该方法将预测均方根误差从约170米降低到15米，实现了91%的误差减少

Conclusion: VHD方法即使在完全通信丢失的情况下也能保持鲁棒的状态估计性能，为解决UUV集群通信中断时的状态估计问题提供了有效解决方案

Abstract: The reliable operation of Unmanned Underwater Vehicle (UUV) clusters is highly dependent on continuous acoustic communication. However, this communication method is highly susceptible to intermittent interruptions. When communication outages occur, standard state estimators such as the Unscented Kalman Filter (UKF) will be forced to make open-loop predictions. If the environment contains unmodeled dynamic factors, such as unknown ocean currents, this estimation error will grow rapidly, which may eventually lead to mission failure. To address this critical issue, this paper proposes a Variational History Distillation (VHD) approach. VHD regards trajectory prediction as an approximate Bayesian reasoning process, which links a standard motion model based on physics with a pattern extracted directly from the past trajectory of the UUV. This is achieved by synthesizing ``virtual measurements'' distilled from historical trajectories. Recognizing that the reliability of extrapolated historical trends degrades over extended prediction horizons, an adaptive confidence mechanism is introduced. This mechanism allows the filter to gradually reduce the trust of virtual measurements as the communication outage time is extended. Extensive Monte Carlo simulations in a high-fidelity environment demonstrate that the proposed method achieves a 91% reduction in prediction Root Mean Square Error (RMSE), reducing the error from approximately 170 m to 15 m during a 40-second communication outage. These results demonstrate that VHD can maintain robust state estimation performance even under complete communication loss.

</details>


### [730] [CReF: Cross-modal and Recurrent Fusion for Depth-conditioned Humanoid Locomotion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29452)
*Yuan Hao,Ruiqi Yu,Shixin Luo,Guoteng Zhang,Jun Wu,Qiuguo Zhu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: CReF：一种单阶段深度条件人形机器人运动框架，通过跨模态注意力直接从未处理的前向深度数据学习运动相关特征，无需显式几何中间表示，实现复杂地形下的鲁棒穿越。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有感知人形机器人运动方法通常依赖于显式几何抽象（如机器人中心的2.5D地形表示或几何相关监督目标），这些方法继承了中间或监督目标的表示偏差，对垂直结构、穿孔障碍和复杂真实世界杂乱环境具有限制性。

Method: 提出CReF框架：1）通过本体感受查询的跨模态注意力耦合本体感受和深度标记；2）使用门控残差融合块融合结果表示；3）通过GRU进行时间整合，采用高速公路式输出门实现状态依赖的循环和前馈特征混合。额外引入地形感知落脚点放置奖励，从足端点云样本提取可支撑落脚点候选，奖励靠近最近可支撑候选的触地位置。

Result: 在仿真和物理人形机器人上的实验表明，CReF能够鲁棒穿越多样化地形，并有效实现零样本迁移到包含扶手、空心托盘组件、严重反射干扰和视觉杂乱室外环境的真实世界场景。

Conclusion: CReF通过直接从未处理深度数据学习运动相关特征，避免了显式几何中间表示的偏差，实现了对复杂几何地形（包括垂直结构、穿孔障碍和真实世界杂乱环境）的鲁棒穿越能力。

Abstract: Stable traversal over geometrically complex terrain increasingly requires exteroceptive perception, yet prior perceptive humanoid locomotion methods often remain tied to explicit geometric abstractions, either by mediating control through robot-centric 2.5D terrain representations or by shaping depth learning with auxiliary geometry-related targets. Such designs inherit the representational bias of the intermediate or supervisory target and can be restrictive for vertical structures, perforated obstacles, and complex real-world clutter. We propose CReF (Cross-modal and Recurrent Fusion), a single-stage depth-conditioned humanoid locomotion framework that learns locomotion-relevant features directly from raw forward-facing depth without explicit geometric intermediates. CReF couples proprioception and depth tokens through proprioception-queried cross-modal attention, fuses the resulting representation with a gated residual fusion block, and performs temporal integration with a Gated Recurrent Unit (GRU) regulated by a highway-style output gate for state-dependent blending of recurrent and feedforward features. To further improve terrain interaction, we introduce a terrain-aware foothold placement reward that extracts supportable foothold candidates from foot-end point-cloud samples and rewards touchdown locations that lie close to the nearest supportable candidate. Experiments in simulation and on a physical humanoid demonstrate robust traversal over diverse terrains and effective zero-shot transfer to real-world scenes containing handrails, hollow pallet assemblies, severe reflective interference, and visually cluttered outdoor surroundings.

</details>


### [731] [RAAP: Retrieval-Augmented Affordance Prediction with Cross-Image Action Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29419)
*Qiyuan Zhuang,He-Yang Xu,Yijun Wang,Xin-Yang Zhao,Yang-Yang Li,Xiu-Shen Wei*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: RAAP框架通过检索增强的对齐学习，将静态接触点定位与动态动作方向解耦，实现跨未见物体和类别的鲁棒性具身交互预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法存在局限性：基于检索的方法因稀疏性和覆盖度不足而脆弱；基于大规模模型的方法在未见类别上经常错误定位接触点并误预测接触后动作，阻碍了鲁棒泛化。

Method: RAAP框架统一了具身交互检索与对齐学习，通过解耦静态接触点定位和动态动作方向预测。使用密集对应关系迁移接触点，并通过检索增强的对齐模型预测动作方向，该模型采用双权重注意力整合多个参考样本。

Result: 在DROID和HOI4D的紧凑子集上训练（每任务仅需数十个样本），RAAP在未见物体和类别上实现了一致的性能表现，并在仿真和真实世界中实现了零样本机器人操作。

Conclusion: RAAP通过检索增强的对齐学习框架，有效解决了具身交互预测中的泛化问题，为机器人在多样非结构化环境中的精细交互提供了鲁棒解决方案。

Abstract: Understanding object affordances is essential for enabling robots to perform purposeful and fine-grained interactions in diverse and unstructured environments. However, existing approaches either rely on retrieval, which is fragile due to sparsity and coverage gaps, or on large-scale models, which frequently mislocalize contact points and mispredict post-contact actions when applied to unseen categories, thereby hindering robust generalization. We introduce Retrieval-Augmented Affordance Prediction (RAAP), a framework that unifies affordance retrieval with alignment-based learning. By decoupling static contact localization and dynamic action direction, RAAP transfers contact points via dense correspondence and predicts action directions through a retrieval-augmented alignment model that consolidates multiple references with dual-weighted attention. Trained on compact subsets of DROID and HOI4D with as few as tens of samples per task, RAAP achieves consistent performance across unseen objects and categories, and enables zero-shot robotic manipulation in both simulation and the real world. Project website: https://github.com/SEU-VIPGroup/RAAP.

</details>


### [732] [CLaD: Planning with Grounded Foresight via Cross-Modal Latent Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29409)
*Andrew Jeong,Jaemin Kim,Sebin Lee,Sung-Eui Yoon*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: CLaD框架通过非对称交叉注意力建模本体感知和语义状态在动作下的联合演化，预测基础潜在前瞻，并用扩散策略生成动作，在LIBERO-LONG基准上达到94.7%成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在语义空间或潜在空间中规划，未能显式对齐跨模态转换。机器人操作涉及通过底层动作耦合的动力学和语义转换，需要统一建模。

Method: 提出CLaD框架：1) 使用非对称交叉注意力让动力学转换查询语义转换，建模状态联合演化；2) 通过自监督目标和EMA目标编码器预测基础潜在前瞻，防止表示崩溃；3) 用观测调制预测的前瞻，条件化扩散策略生成动作。

Result: 在LIBERO-LONG基准上达到94.7%成功率，与参数多得多的大型视觉语言动作模型性能相当。

Conclusion: CLaD通过显式对齐跨模态转换，有效建模机器人操作中的动力学-语义耦合，实现了高效且高性能的动作规划。

Abstract: Robotic manipulation involves kinematic and semantic transitions that are inherently coupled via underlying actions. However, existing approaches plan within either semantic or latent space without explicitly aligning these cross-modal transitions. To address this, we propose CLaD, a framework that models how proprioceptive and semantic states jointly evolve under actions through asymmetric cross-attention that allows kinematic transitions to query semantic ones. CLaD predicts grounded latent foresights via self-supervised objectives with EMA target encoders and auxiliary reconstruction losses, preventing representation collapse while anchoring predictions to observable states. Predicted foresights are modulated with observations to condition a diffusion policy for action generation. On LIBERO-LONG benchmark, CLaD achieves 94.7\% success rate, competitive with large VLAs with significantly fewer parameters.

</details>


### [733] [Learning Semantic Priorities for Autonomous Target Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29391)
*Max Lodel,Nils Wilde,Robert Babuška,Javier Alonso-Mora*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于专家输入训练语义优先级模型的目标搜索方法，在未知环境中通过语义特征引导机器人高效搜索目标


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前目标搜索方法依赖相似领域的大数据集训练，限制了在多样化环境中的适应性。人类专家拥有指导机器人在未知环境中进行目标搜索所需的高级语义关系知识，但现有方法未能有效利用这种专家知识。

Method: 提出一种目标搜索方法，利用专家输入训练语义优先级模型。通过组合优化将学习到的优先级应用于前沿探索规划器，实现语义特征驱动的高效目标搜索，同时确保鲁棒性和完全覆盖。语义优先级模型使用多个模拟专家指导的合成数据集进行训练。

Result: 在先前未见环境中的仿真测试表明，该方法相比覆盖驱动探索规划器能够持续实现更快的目标恢复速度。

Conclusion: 通过利用专家知识训练语义优先级模型，并将其集成到组合优化前沿探索规划器中，可以显著提高机器人在未知多样化环境中的目标搜索效率，同时保持搜索的完整性和鲁棒性。

Abstract: The use of semantic features can improve the efficiency of target search in unknown environments for robotic search and rescue missions. Current target search methods rely on training with large datasets of similar domains, which limits the adaptability to diverse environments. However, human experts possess high-level knowledge about semantic relationships necessary to effectively guide a robot during target search missions in diverse and previously unseen environments. In this paper, we propose a target search method that leverages expert input to train a model of semantic priorities. By employing the learned priorities in a frontier exploration planner using combinatorial optimization, our approach achieves efficient target search driven by semantic features while ensuring robustness and complete coverage. The proposed semantic priority model is trained with several synthetic datasets of simulated expert guidance for target search. Simulation tests in previously unseen environments show that our method consistently achieves faster target recovery than a coverage-driven exploration planner.

</details>


### [734] [Interacting Multiple Model Proprioceptive Odometry for Legged Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29383)
*Wanlei Li,Zichang Chen,Shilei Li,Xiaogang Xiong,Yunjiang Lou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于交互多模型(IMM)的足式机器人本体感知里程计框架，通过多接触假设提升在复杂接触条件下的位姿估计精度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 足式机器人状态估计面临挑战，本体感知里程计受限于可观测性，依赖测量约束抑制漂移。当外部传感器不可靠时，主要依赖本体感知测量，特别是接触相关的腿部运动学信息。现有方法大多基于理想点接触假设，在实际运动中常被违反，导致约束效果降低和估计精度下降。

Method: 提出基于交互多模型(IMM)的本体感知里程计框架，在统一概率框架内整合多种接触假设，实现在线模式切换和概率融合，适应变化的接触条件。

Result: 大量仿真和真实世界实验表明，该方法在保持可比计算效率的同时，实现了优于现有最先进方法的位姿估计精度。

Conclusion: IMM框架通过处理接触不确定性，显著提升了足式机器人在复杂接触条件下的本体感知里程计性能，为外部传感器退化或不可靠情况下的鲁棒状态估计提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: State estimation for legged robots remains challenging because legged odometry generally suffers from limited observability and therefore depends critically on measurement constraints to suppress drift. When exteroceptive sensors are unreliable or degraded, such constraints are mainly derived from proprioceptive measurements, particularly contact-related leg kinematics information. However, most existing proprioceptive odometry methods rely on an idealized point-contact assumption, which is often violated during real locomotion. Consequently, the effectiveness of proprioceptive constraints may be significantly reduced, resulting in degraded estimation accuracy. To address these limitations, we propose an interacting multiple model (IMM)-based proprioceptive odometry framework for legged robots. By incorporating multiple contact hypotheses within a unified probabilistic framework, the proposed method enables online mode switching and probabilistic fusion under varying contact conditions. Extensive simulations and real-world experiments demonstrate that the proposed method achieves superior pose estimation accuracy over state-of-the-art methods while maintaining comparable computational efficiency.

</details>


### [735] [Industrial-Grade Robust Robot Vision for Screw Detection and Removal under Uneven Conditions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29363)
*Tomoki Ishikura,Genichiro Matsuda,Takuya Kiyokawa,Kensuke Harada*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出自动化拆卸空调室外单元的系统，结合两阶段检测和局部校准策略，实现高精度螺丝检测和操作，在真实测试中达到78.3%拆卸成功率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 日本劳动力减少而废旧家电数量增加，需要自动化回收流程。空调室外单元拆卸自动化面临挑战：尺寸变化、污垢和锈蚀影响

Method: 集成任务特定的两阶段检测方法和基于网格的局部校准策略，无需预编程坐标，实现高精度螺丝检测和操作

Result: 螺丝检测召回率99.8%（即使严重退化），操作精度±0.75mm。在120个单元的真实测试中，拆卸成功率78.3%，平均周期时间193秒

Conclusion: 系统证明了工业应用的可行性，能够应对实际回收环境中的挑战，为家电回收自动化提供了有效解决方案

Abstract: As the amount of used home appliances is expected to increase despite the decreasing labor force in Japan, there is a need to automate disassembling processes at recycling plants. The automation of disassembling air conditioner outdoor units, however, remains a challenge due to unit size variations and exposure to dirt and rust. To address these challenges, this study proposes an automated system that integrates a task-specific two-stage detection method and a lattice-based local calibration strategy. This approach achieved a screw detection recall of 99.8% despite severe degradation and ensured a manipulation accuracy of +/-0.75 mm without pre-programmed coordinates. In real-world validation with 120 units, the system attained a disassembly success rate of 78.3% and an average cycle time of 193 seconds, confirming its feasibility for industrial application.

</details>


### [736] [IMPASTO: Integrating Model-Based Planning with Learned Dynamics Models for Robotic Oil Painting Reproduction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29315)
*Yingke Wang,Hao Li,Yifeng Zhu,Hong-Xing Yu,Ken Goldberg,Li Fei-Fei,Jiajun Wu,Yunzhu Li,Ruohan Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 机器人油画复制系统IMPASTO通过学习的像素动态模型和模型预测控制，实现从目标图像到笔画轨迹、力度和颜色的自主推断与执行


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人复制油画面临三大挑战：需要力敏感控制可变形工具（软刷）、预测笔画效果、以及多步骤笔画规划，且通常缺乏人类逐步演示或精确模拟器。核心问题是：仅给定目标油画图像序列，机器人能否推断并执行所需的笔画轨迹、力度和颜色？

Method: IMPASTO系统整合了学习的像素动态模型与基于模型的规划。动态模型从图像观察和参数化笔画动作预测画布更新；滚动时域模型预测控制优化器规划轨迹和力度；力敏感控制器在7自由度机械臂上执行笔画。系统融合了底层力控制、学习动态模型和高层闭环规划，仅通过机器人自我对弈学习。

Result: IMPASTO能够近似人类艺术家的单笔画数据集和多笔画艺术作品，在复制准确性方面优于基线方法。系统展示了从目标图像自主推断笔画参数并执行油画创作的能力。

Conclusion: IMPASTO证明了整合学习动态模型与模型预测控制的有效性，实现了机器人油画复制系统，仅需目标图像序列即可自主规划并执行笔画，无需人类演示或精确模拟器，为机器人艺术创作提供了新途径。

Abstract: Robotic reproduction of oil paintings using soft brushes and pigments requires force-sensitive control of deformable tools, prediction of brushstroke effects, and multi-step stroke planning, often without human step-by-step demonstrations or faithful simulators. Given only a sequence of target oil painting images, can a robot infer and execute the stroke trajectories, forces, and colors needed to reproduce it? We present IMPASTO, a robotic oil-painting system that integrates learned pixel dynamics models with model-based planning. The dynamics models predict canvas updates from image observations and parameterized stroke actions; a receding-horizon model predictive control optimizer then plans trajectories and forces, while a force-sensitive controller executes strokes on a 7-DoF robot arm. IMPASTO integrates low-level force control, learned dynamics models, and high-level closed-loop planning, learns solely from robot self-play, and approximates human artists' single-stroke datasets and multi-stroke artworks, outperforming baselines in reproduction accuracy. Project website: https://impasto-robopainting.github.io/

</details>


### [737] [MRReP: Mixed Reality-based Hand-drawn Reference Path Editing Interface for Mobile Robot Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.00059)
*Takumi Taki,Masato Kobayashi,Yuki Uranishi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: MRReP：一种混合现实界面，允许用户通过手势在物理地面上绘制手绘参考路径，以指导移动机器人导航，相比传统2D界面提高了路径指定精度和可用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在人类共享的室内环境中，移动机器人需要反映人类空间意图的路径（如避免干扰行人流、保持舒适距离），但传统路径规划器主要优化几何成本，缺乏对操作员明确路径指定的支持。

Method: 提出MRReP混合现实界面，用户通过手势直接在物理地面上绘制手绘参考路径；开发定制的手绘参考路径规划器，将用户指定的点序列转换为全局路径，集成到机器人导航栈中。

Result: 通过被试内实验与传统2D基线界面对比，MRReP在路径指定精度、可用性和感知工作量方面表现更优，同时在物理环境中实现了更稳定的路径指定。

Conclusion: 直接在混合现实中指定路径是有效将人类空间意图融入移动机器人导航的方法，MRReP界面显著改善了路径指定体验。

Abstract: Autonomous mobile robots operating in human-shared indoor environments often require paths that reflect human spatial intentions, such as avoiding interference with pedestrian flow or maintaining comfortable clearance. However, conventional path planners primarily optimize geometric costs and provide limited support for explicit route specification by human operators. This paper presents MRReP, a Mixed Reality-based interface that enables users to draw a Hand-drawn Reference Path (HRP) directly on the physical floor using hand gestures. The drawn HRP is integrated into the robot navigation stack through a custom Hand-drawn Reference Path Planner, which converts the user-specified point sequence into a global path for autonomous navigation. We evaluated MRReP in a within-subject experiment against a conventional 2D baseline interface. The results demonstrated that MRReP enhanced path specification accuracy, usability, and perceived workload, while enabling more stable path specification in the physical environment. These findings suggest that direct path specification in MR is an effective approach for incorporating human spatial intention into mobile robot navigation. Additional material is available at https://mertcookimg.github.io/mrrep

</details>


### [738] [Long-Reach Robotic Cleaning for Lunar Solar Arrays](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29240)
*Stanley Wang,Velin Kojouharov,Long Yin Chung,Daniel Morton,Mark Cutkosky*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种用于月球太阳能电池板清洁的小型移动机器人，配备长臂可展开机械臂和可互换清洁工具，通过顺应性手腕和力控制实现稳定接触清洁


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 商业月球活动加速了对可靠表面基础设施的需求，维护任务如检查、清洁、除尘和小修对于保持性能和延长系统寿命至关重要。特别是月球太阳能电池板清洁，因为月尘积累会迅速降低电池板输出功率，缩短任务寿命

Method: 开发小型移动机器人，配备长臂可展开机械臂和可互换清洁工具，在先前视觉引导长臂操作基础上，增加带末端力感知的顺应性手腕和基于速度的导纳控制器，以调节表面清洁期间的稳定接触

Result: 在平面工作台的初步实验中，系统在0.3米到1.0米的臂长范围内执行简单清洁运动时，能保持约2N的法向力，初始接触后的RMS力误差约为0.2N

Conclusion: 早期结果表明，可展开的长臂机械臂是用于月球基础设施（如太阳能电池板、散热器和光学表面）机器人维护的有前景架构

Abstract: Commercial lunar activity is accelerating the need for reliable surface infrastructure and routine operations to keep it functioning. Maintenance tasks such as inspection, cleaning, dust mitigation, and minor repair are essential to preserve performance and extend system life. A specific application is the cleaning of lunar solar arrays. Solar arrays are expected to provide substantial fraction of lunar surface power and operate for months to years, supplying continuous energy to landers, habitats, and surface assets, making sustained output mission-critical. However, over time lunar dust accumulates on these large solar arrays, which can rapidly degrade panel output and reduce mission lifetime. We propose a small mobile robot equipped with a long-reach, lightweight deployable boom and interchangeable cleaning tool to perform gentle cleaning over meter-scale workspaces with minimal human involvement. Building on prior vision-guided long-reach manipulation, we add a compliant wrist with distal force sensing and a velocity-based admittance controller to regulate stable contact during surface cleaning. In preliminary benchtop experiments on a planar surface, the system maintained approximately 2 N normal force while executing a simple cleaning motion over boom lengths from 0.3 m to 1.0 m, with RMS force error of approximately 0.2 N after initial contact. These early results suggest that deployable long-reach manipulators are a promising architecture for robotic maintenance of lunar infrastructure such as solar arrays, radiators, and optical surfaces.

</details>


### [739] [Long-Reach Robotic Manipulation for Assembly and Outfitting of Lunar Structures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29226)
*Stanley Wang,Venny Kojouharov,Long Yin Chung,Daniel Morton,Mark Cutkosky*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种用于月球基础设施建设的紧凑型长臂机械手，采用可展开复合臂，能在1.8米范围内实现小于15毫米的末端精度，适用于电缆布线等任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 月球表面基础设施建设需要半自主或全自主机器人操作，特别是电缆布线等任务需要在大型结构上进行运输、布线和精细操作，需要长臂机械手来覆盖大工作空间。

Method: 设计紧凑型长臂机械手，采用可展开复合臂结构；表征其偏转、振动和展开特性；开发控制策略来减轻这些影响；通过实验验证精度，并演示电缆布线任务。

Result: 实验表明，在臂长达到1.8米时，平均末端精度误差小于15毫米；成功演示了电缆布线任务，验证了其在月球基础设施建设中的应用潜力。

Conclusion: 该可展开复合臂机械手能够有效满足月球基础设施建设的需求，特别是电缆布线等长臂操作任务，为未来月球表面自主操作提供了可行解决方案。

Abstract: Future infrastructure construction on the lunar surface will require semi- or fully-autonomous operation from robots deployed at the build site. In particular, tasks such as electrical outfitting necessitate transport, routing, and fine manipulation of cables across large structures. To address this need, we present a compact and long-reach manipulator incorporating a deployable composite boom, capable of performing manipulation tasks across large structures and workspaces. We characterize the deflection, vibration, and blossoming characteristics inherent to the deployable structure, and present a manipulation control strategy to mitigate these effects. Experiments indicate an average endpoint accuracy error of less than 15 mm for boom lengths up to 1.8 m. We demonstrate the approach with a cable routing task to illustrate the potential for lunar outfitting applications that benefit from long reach.

</details>


### [740] [Kilohertz-Safe: A Scalable Framework for Constrained Dexterous Retargeting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29213)
*Yinxiao Tian,Ziyi Yang,Zinan Zhao,Zhen Kan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种可扩展的运动重定向框架，将非线性重定向问题转化为关节微分空间中的凸二次规划，实现高频率实时性能并保证形式化安全约束


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 灵巧手遥操作需要同时实现高频实时性能和异构运动学与安全约束的运动重定向方法。现有非线性优化方法计算成本高，难以应用于千赫兹级控制；而学习方法通常缺乏形式化安全保证

Method: 将非线性重定向问题重新表述为关节微分空间中的凸二次规划，通过系统线性化纳入异构约束（包括运动学极限和碰撞避免），并集成控制屏障函数提供形式化安全保证

Result: 在Wuji Hand平台上通过仿真和硬件实验验证，优于Dex-Retargeting和GeoRT等最先进方法。平均延迟9.05ms实现高频操作，超过95%的重定向帧满足安全标准，有效缓解复杂操作任务中的自碰撞和穿透

Conclusion: 提出的可扩展运动重定向框架在计算效率和数值稳定性方面表现优异，同时提供形式化安全保证，为灵巧手遥操作提供了一种高效可靠的运动重定向解决方案

Abstract: Dexterous hand teleoperation requires motion re-targeting methods that simultaneously achieve high-frequency real-time performance and enforcement of heterogeneous kinematic and safety constraints. Existing nonlinear optimization-based approaches often incur prohibitive computational cost, limiting their applicability to kilohertz-level control, while learning-based methods typically lack formal safety guarantees. This paper proposes a scalable motion retargeting framework that reformulates the nonlinear retargeting problem into a convex quadratic program in joint differential space. Heterogeneous constraints, including kinematic limits and collision avoidance, are incorporated through systematic linearization, resulting in improved computational efficiency and numerical stability. Control barrier functions are further integrated to provide formal safety guarantees during the retargeting process. The proposed framework is validated through simulations and hardware experiments on the Wuji Hand platform, outperforming state-of-the-art methods such as Dex-Retargeting and GeoRT. The framework achieves high-frequency operation with an average latency of 9.05 ms, while over 95% of retargeted frames satisfy the safety criteria, effectively mitigating self-collision and penetration during complex manipulation tasks.

</details>


<div id='stat.CO'></div>

# stat.CO [[Back]](#toc)

### [741] [A Large-Scale Empirical Comparison of Meta-Learners and Causal Forests for Heterogeneous Treatment Effect Estimation in Marketing Uplift Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06123)
*Aman Singh*

Main category: stat.CO

TL;DR: 本文提出了UpliftBench，在Criteo Uplift v2.1数据集上系统评估了四种CATE估计器，发现S-Learner表现最佳，Qini系数达0.376，前20%客户贡献77.7%增量转化，并识别了关键异质处理效应驱动因素。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在精准营销中，个体层面条件平均处理效应(CATE)估计至关重要，但工业规模上对提升建模方法的系统性基准测试仍然有限。需要为从业者提供基于证据的大规模提升建模方法选择指导。

Method: 使用Criteo Uplift v2.1数据集（1398万客户记录），评估四种CATE估计器：S-Learner、T-Learner、X-Learner（均使用LightGBM基学习器）和Causal Forest（来自EconML）。采用Qini系数和累积增益曲线进行评估，并进行SHAP分析和因果森林不确定性量化。

Result: S-Learner表现最佳，Qini系数为0.376；前20%客户（按预测CATE排序）捕获77.7%增量转化，比随机定向提升3.9倍。SHAP分析识别f8为12个匿名协变量中主导的异质处理效应驱动因素。因果森林不确定性量化显示：1.9%客户为确信可说服者（95%置信区间下限>0），0.1%为确信沉睡者（95%置信区间上限<0）。

Conclusion: 研究为从业者提供了大规模提升建模管道方法选择的实证指导，证明了S-Learner在工业规模数据集上的优越性能，并展示了异质处理效应分析和不确定性量化在实际应用中的价值。

Abstract: Estimating Conditional Average Treatment Effects (CATE) at the individual level is central to precision marketing, yet systematic benchmarking of uplift modeling methods at industrial scale remains limited. We present UpliftBench, an empirical evaluation of four CATE estimators: S-Learner, T-Learner, X-Learner (all with LightGBM base learners), and Causal Forest (EconML), applied to the Criteo Uplift v2.1 dataset comprising 13.98 million customer records. The near-random treatment assignment (propensity AUC = 0.509) provides strong internal validity for causal estimation. Evaluated via Qini coefficient and cumulative gain curves, the S-Learner achieves the highest Qini score of 0.376, with the top 20% of customers ranked by predicted CATE capturing 77.7% of all incremental conversions, a 3.9x improvement over random targeting. SHAP analysis identifies f8 as the dominant heterogeneous treatment effect (HTE) driver among the 12 anonymized covariates. Causal Forest uncertainty quantification reveals that 1.9% of customers are confident persuadables (lower 95% CI > 0) and 0.1% are confident sleeping dogs (upper 95% CI < 0). Our results provide practitioners with evidence-based guidance on method selection for large-scale uplift modeling pipelines.

</details>


### [742] [fastml: Guarded Resampling Workflows for Safer Automated Machine Learning in R](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05225)
*Selcuk Korkmaz,Dincer Goksuluk,Eda Karaismailoglu*

Main category: stat.CO

TL;DR: fastml是一个R包，通过"受保护的重新采样"提供泄漏感知的机器学习接口，在每次重新采样中重新估计预处理步骤，防止预处理泄漏导致的性能虚高。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 预处理泄漏问题：当缩放、插补等数据依赖的变换在重新采样之前被估计时，会导致明显的性能虚高且难以检测。现有机器学习流程中预处理步骤与模型评估的分离容易造成数据泄漏。

Method: fastml采用"受保护的重新采样"方法，在每次重新采样内部重新估计预处理步骤，并将预处理应用于相应的评估数据。支持分组和时间排序的重新采样，阻止高风险配置，审核外部依赖，包含沙盒执行和集成模型解释功能。

Result: 模拟实验显示全局预处理相对于受保护重新采样显著虚高了表现性能。fastml在保持与tidymodels相同测试性能的同时减少了工作流程编排，并通过统一接口支持多种生存模型类的一致基准测试。

Conclusion: fastml提供了一个有效的泄漏感知机器学习解决方案，通过受保护的重新采样机制防止预处理泄漏，简化了工作流程编排，并支持一致的模型基准测试。

Abstract: Preprocessing leakage arises when scaling, imputation, or other data-dependent transformations are estimated before resampling, inflating apparent performance while remaining hard to detect. We present fastml, an R package that provides a single-call interface for leakage-aware machine learning through guarded resampling, where preprocessing is re-estimated inside each resample and applied to the corresponding assessment data. The package supports grouped and time-ordered resampling, blocks high-risk configurations, audits recipes for external dependencies, and includes sandboxed execution and integrated model explanation. We evaluate fastml with a Monte Carlo simulation contrasting global and fold-local normalization, a usability comparison with tidymodels under matched specifications, and survival benchmarks across datasets of different sizes. The simulation demonstrates that global preprocessing substantially inflates apparent performance relative to guarded resampling. fastml matched held-out performance obtained with tidymodels while reducing workflow orchestration, and it supported consistent benchmarking of multiple survival model classes through a unified interface.

</details>
